64-king-the-memer.891.title: 64 King the Memer
64-king-the-memer.891.author: king the memer
64-king-the-memer.891.description:
Peach's letter somehow made it all the way to King who, being bored and having nothing better to do, happily went to the castle

... little did he know he'd spend hours scrambling for stars, all to find a complete fucking random
​

INFO:

After four long years of development (and two and a half lacking releases) King is finally complete - quicker and bouncier than ever before

He can run and roll down hills to gain real momentum, manouver through tough obstacles with ease, fly across the map with good timing, and so much more

With cool new moves like the Rolldash [Z + B], Bubble Bounce [Z + B] and Airjump [Z + A], King is a fun, simple to learn character with incredible potential when mastered

NOTES:

- This mod is split into two parts: the campaign, 
64 King the Memer
, and the character, 
King

- King
 the character does NOT require or support 
Character Select
 - if detected, all functionality will be disabled to avoid the game becoming completely unplayable (hopefully support can be added in the future but as of now the two clash too harshly)

- Included with 
King
 are two 
kSkins
, Sonic the Hedgehog and Bootleg Metal Sonic - You can change your kSkin or switch back to Mario through the pause menu

- All major previous builds are located 
here

aight enough yap im admitedly fucking horrible at releasing anything stable, theres prolly a ton of bugs i js didnt find through my own testing so at least for now try report anything weird 
directly to me
 rather than telling me through lowered reviews (i seen that happen to alot of people it does NOT help) - id keep searching for things to iron out but thatd take me like five more years and by then i woulda burned my ass out and hit another shadow drop like i did with the first remake back in 23, and id bet alot that nobody even heard about that build

but ye apart from that i do hope yall enjoy this, its def nothing crazy but i put in alot of hours to make sure everything is smooth and fits w the original - its gonna be real weird not being on the grind after so long

updates.title: Globals update
updates.changelog:
This update fixes issues with global 
gMarioIsKing[]
 and adds a new one, 
gKSkinInfo[]

gKingExists and g64kExists
 - These simply check if each mod is active which is necessary to use anything below

gMarioIsKing[]

This can be used in mods as a simple

check for whether the given Mario is

King

gKSkinInfo[]

This is useful for grabbing things like

King's current icon, set of models,

display name, assigned sound effect,

and even whether his smaller hitbox is

being used

Spoiler: 
Updates regarding a secret feature

Additionally, three global functions regarding Star King have been added

SAVE_FLAG_UNLOCKED_STAR_KING

This is save flag 
64 King the Memer
 uses

to store whether Star King is unlocked

star_king_is_enabled(m)

This simply checks whether the given

Mario is King and has Star King enabled

star_king_enable(m)

Enables Star King if the given Mario is

King and Star King hasn't been recently

enabled

star_king_disable(m)

Similar to the last, disabled Star King

if the given Mario is King

Luckily for the people who are obviously still gonna click the spoiler I will not reveal how to unlock Star King

Additional Notes:

The unused second name feature in kSkins was removed

gKingStates
 is no longer global

and the first update wasnt about mario

ill be damned

fixed all issues that had arised from coopdx updates, and should be more stable going forward.

cleaned up the UI a bit and adjusted some controls to be more intuitive

easily enter anim testing without a command, using [Z]+[DPAD DOWN]

updates.title: fixed my oopsies
updates.changelog: the window size now adjusts to the animation name, since some of them are Long. also updated playback and frame-by-frame to account for each animations 'start frame', instead of resetting to frame 0.

an-ordinary-coop-mod.391.title: An Ordinary Coop Mod
an-ordinary-coop-mod.391.author: Blocky
an-ordinary-coop-mod.391.description:
This was planned to be released on Halloween

its a bit late but whateverThis mod has two seperate "modes",

-Vanilla game

-Dark mode

When the game goes dark you won't be able to collect stars or keys,

you must collect 25 coins (or more depending on the player count) in order to make the game turn back to Vanilla, 

personally managed to get 70 stars with a group of friends so a full playthrough is of course possible

This mod is only compatible with Vanilla, and will be in the "Romhacks" tab when you'll want to select it

There is also an "entity" that will chase you in levels at night (off by default), to enable it do /aocm

arena-bowsers-castle.531.title: Arena - Bowser's Castle
arena-bowsers-castle.531.author: waifu_png_pl
arena-bowsers-castle.531.description:
hello and welcome to my very first sm64 map ever! this is designed for the arena gamemode so you need to enable it. after you install and enable it, to warp to it you must type " /arena level bcastle ", then you will be warped into the castle. the map features all the standard arena powerups and supports all standard arena gamemodes so you can mix it up. i hope you like it, its been real fun to make. it also features a certain green thwomp known from another version of bowsers castle...

credits:

the texturers resource and booscaster and mr c for rips of sm64 textures and banjo kazooie textures and the modellers resource for the thwomp model for marty. my friend chippiheppu for helping me make sense of how to make an arena map

check out a quick showcase:

arena-blockfort.542.title: Arena - BlockFort
arena-blockfort.542.author: Shifity
arena-blockfort.542.description:
Hello everyone, I present my first mod here!

I made a map for the arena mode,

I planned it to play on the basic arena mode and the battle kart mode.

I was inspired by the battle level of the mario kart games the block fort.

I don't know all the systems of the game yet, I didn't manage to make "correct" lava but if you touch it you still burn.

I hope you like it, don't hesitate to give me feedback.

It was your favorite piranha plant. bye!

arena-hangout-bitforts.7.title: Arena (& Hangout) - Bitforts
arena-hangout-bitforts.7.author: Chilly
arena-hangout-bitforts.7.description:
This is 
Bitforts
, an Arena & Hangout map for your preferred version of sm64coop. (it works on both)

Be mindful of which version you download
, as one is specifically for Arena (included with your game) and the other is for Hangout (which isn't a real gamemode, but something you can add onto your game).

The Arena version automatically adds itself to the map pool through its api, but for those using the Hangout version, a very simple implementation is provided to allow people to access the map through the 
/retrowarp
 command. Feel free to change the Hangout version's way of warping there to better fit your server!

I made the map, but special thanks goes out to 
flipflopbell
 for their 3D Skybox Template, which I used for this.

arena-hellp.10.title: Arena - HELLP!
arena-hellp.10.author: Chilly
arena-hellp.10.description:
Yes I'm aware this is currently broken in the current version. Fix coming soon.

Back with a new ma-- 
HEEEEEELP! HEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEELP MEEEEEEEEEEE! HEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEELP!

Okay but seriously; this is a JOKE map taking place entirely within an enclosed area where your only items are bombs. Prepare to hear dozens of explosions go off while the soothing tune of Piranha Plant's Lullaby plays.

Please don't play this map too seriously, it's actually terrible. But maybe in a fun way. 
i don't regret making it though :trol:

arena-twin-castle-siege.404.title: Arena - Twin Castle Siege
arena-twin-castle-siege.404.author: BuckleyTim
arena-twin-castle-siege.404.description:
So this is an experimental-ish Arena map. It's primarily centered around CTF gameplay (though you can play other modes on it- maybe not king of the hill though as of this writing). It also has large bodies of water as it's major gimmick. Maybe you might want to enable faster swimming with this? I wouldn't know the first thing about balancing for water as a gimmick.

...Which is why I'm uploading this map in an unfinished state (omitting stuff like custom music and a skybox) as I hope to garner a bit of player feedback for this map. Let me know what you guys think of it so I can fine-tune it.

Have a fun time fragging!

----

Known bugs so far:

- One of the springs causes script errors despite working perfectly fine. I am unsure why.

-Animations for the arena weapons bugs out hard while in a swimming state. Nothing unplayable though visually it doesn't work right.

-KOTH hill doesn't spawn sometimes

arena-facing-castles.652.title: Arena - Facing Castles
arena-facing-castles.652.author: BuckleyTim
arena-facing-castles.652.description:
I've had this map idea for a long time and thankfully I finally got the time set aside to make it reality.

Facing Castles is an Arena map made specifically for CTF (you can try the other modes on this map but they won't play well, if arena ever gives me the ability to lock off game modes per level i'll probably do that to save me a headache or two). As many can tell, it's inspired by UT's Facing Worlds, but it's not a 1:1 recreation. Instead, this map tries to emulate the vibe level design wise (and music wise, as the music included is Splash Canyon from Sonic Riders - breakbeats 4 lyfe <3)

The result is a ctf level design that some might hate but others will love. Either way, I hope y'all get some kind of enjoyment out of this remix of the most iconic location from the n64!

arena-hangout-thps-1-warehouse.31.title: Arena (& Hangout) - THPS 1 - Warehouse
arena-hangout-thps-1-warehouse.31.author: BuckleyTim
arena-hangout-thps-1-warehouse.31.description:
The iconic first level from the (n64 version specifically) of the first Tony Hawk's Pro Skater is now available to explore in Super Mario 64 PC Coop, in 2 forms nonetheless!

This mod comes with both a Hangout and an Arena version!

Hangout

 Not too much to say about the hangout version: it's the original stage ported to this game, with a recovery heart and wing cap box to cover any shenanigans that might take place during a hangout.

Ghost-Edit: To get to the hangout, type "/warehouse" in chat. This mod is about as plug-and-play as other hangout maps in that regard.

Arena

  Now this is where things get interesting. I mirrored the map and turned it into a very not-serious arena mode map (that still works with all 7 modes and now has a custom variation of the one song you know very well). Blue side has mirrored textures because I thought it was funny to leave it like that, I swear. There's some jank leftover from trying to brute-force into the arena framework, but hey what's a fun arena game-night without silly maps like this?

Nevertheless, if y'all run into any issues with this let me know and I'll try to make an updated version that fixes whatever arises. Except for the parts where you can get on the top of the level in the middle. That's another "I thought it was too entertaining not to leave it in" decision on my part, lol.

asterix.534.title: Asterix
asterix.534.author: Aso-Designer
asterix.534.description:
"Asterix est là!"

The famous gaul warrior hero created by french comic artists Rene Goscinny and Albert Uderzo is now available in Mario 64! Assets are all from Mario 64, with custom textures and custom elements (like the belt and the helmet's top) done by me. 

Voice clips are straight from few of the Asterix animated movies, in the original french dub (voiced by the late Roger Carel who did Asterix during 4 decades)

Enjoy the mod as I enjoyed working on it!

Asterix (c) Rene Goscinny and Albert Uderzo

backup-star-warp.32.title: Backup Star Warp
backup-star-warp.32.author: wereyoshi
backup-star-warp.32.description:
when collecting a star or key spawn a star copy that other players can use to follow you. Made for scenarios where you need to collect a star to go to a certain place which would otherwise require you to take turns collecting the star or synchronize your star collection with other players. if everyone wanted to go there.

This mod has an api _G.backupstarwarp which contains

getversion - this function returns the back up star warp version

get_backupstarwarpbehaviorid - this function returns the behavior id of the fake star

addactioncheck - this function is for adding actions that you want backup star warps to have ignore backup stars

addtostaridcheck - this function is for if you want backup star warps to only work for certain stars

get_backupstarwarpbehaviorid - this function returns the behavior id of the fake star

addactioncheck - this function is for adding actions that you want backup star warps to have ignore backup stars

addtostaridcheck - this function is for if you want backup star warps to only work for certain stars

when collecting a star or key spawn a star copy that other players can use to follow you. Made for scenarios where you need to collect a star to go to a certain place which would otherwise require you to take turns collecting the star or synchronize your star collection with other players. if everyone wanted to go there.

This mod has an api _G.backupstarwarp which contains

getversion - this function returns the back up star warp version

get_backupstarwarpbehaviorid - this function returns the behavior id of the fake star

addactioncheck - this function is for adding actions that you want backup star warps to have ignore backup stars

addtostaridcheck - this function is for if you want backup star warps to only work for certain stars

ball-moveset.867.title: Ball Moveset
ball-moveset.867.author: EmilyEmmi
ball-moveset.867.description:
My second ever moveset has arrived! This baller moveset takes inspiration from the Mario Party minigame Bumper Balls, as well as everyone's favorite(?) Super Mario Galaxy feature. I took the time to really make it 
feel
 like you're balancing on a slippery, barely controllable ball. It bounces really high, so I'm sure that makes up for the drawbacks. Right?

Features:

ball

Built-in infinite lives toggle (you will want this on, trust me)

100% has been proven possible, even in single player. However, it's probably going to be frustrating playing this alone. You have been warned.

updates.title: vBall.1
updates.changelog:
Don't expect consistent updates. This version exists to fix some bugs and make certain things more fair.

Added 
Boost!
 Hold B while standing still to charge, and release to launch yourself forward. The host may toggle this ability off.

Added a toggle for the moveset. It's host only, because everyone would just turn it off if they had the choice, and that's boring.

Wooden posts (such as those in Bob-Omb Battlefield) now drop their coins when fully pounded.

Bowser's tail hitbox was made significantly more generous.

Bowser now has a cap on how far he can be launched.

Wall Jumps with the ball (which I have dubbed "Ball Kicks") now travel higher based on speed. Note that regular jumps are unaffected by speed, as usual.

If Mario is moves under a ceiling with the ball, he is now ejected from the ball. This makes the Eyerok fight and "Express Elevator--Hurry Up!" in Wet-Dry World a bit easier.

Mario now uses the ball during the credits sequence.

Balls are now properly affected by time stop.

Fixed an issue where turning quickly before hitting Bowser's tail would cause Bowser to be thrown in unintended directions.

Fixed an issue where the Bowser 3 platforms wouldn't fall if Bowser was attacked quickly enough.

Fixed Mario's hitbox radius being bigger, even when not in ball form.

Added a small API.

base-character-stats.254.title: Base Character Stats!
base-character-stats.254.author: zcrudehydro
base-character-stats.254.description:
This mod edits the base 4 playable characters in the game to have their very own stats and abilities! They are as follows:

Mario: Bonks are simply less strong to him.

Luigi: Higher jump, lower running speed. His third jump is a twirl.

Toad: Lower jump, higher running speed.

Waluigi: Takes less damage, lower jump.

Wario: Dies in a singular hit, hold the punch button in the air to hover for a limited time.

This also adds some quality-of-life improvements:

Hold the punch button while twirling to descend much faster.

Landing from a twirl no longer stops you from moving for a bit.

The text on the top left will soon be removed in favor of a much more graceful method of informing the player of the mod.

bingo-coop.930.title: Bingo Coop
bingo-coop.930.author: ProfeJavix
bingo-coop.930.description:
In this mod, a 5x5 table will be generated when the match starts. Each cell will contain a different task, which can be from collecting a star in a specific level to kill a certain boss or player. When a player completes a cell, it becomes failed for the rivals.  Every player must try to make a row (horizontal,  vertical or diagonal) or, if not possible, get the highest amount of completed cells to win the match.
​

Gamemodes
​

Free For All - Every player completes his own tasks.

Teams Mode - The tasks progress is shared for the whole team.

MarioHunt (only if MH is loaded) - The match starts and ends with the MH match, and Runners complete tasks while Hunters try to get in their way.

Chat Commands​

/bingo-team [red | blue]
 select the team you wanna join.

/bingo-start
 start a Bingo match (host only)

/bingo-stop
 stops the current Bingo match if any (host only)

/bingo-mode [ffa | team]
 set the Bingo gamemode (host only)

This commands are only available if MH is NOT loaded.
​

Mod Menu Options​

Show Table Controls
 toggle on-screen Bingo table controls.

Give Buffs On Cell Completion
 toggle if certain cells give buffs. This cells will have a tiny red star on the corner (host only and if MH not loaded)

Buff Seconds [10s-90s]
 the duration in seconds of the cell buffs (host only and if MH not loaded)

Original mod idea by Drenchy. Check out his video:

bmfont.914.author: djoslin0
bmfont.914.description:
BmFont is a lightweight bitmap font rendering library for coop. It supports loading BMFont (.fnt) files or simple sprite sheets, kerning, alignment options, and per‑glyph animations.

This is a library, not a mod on its own.

The upload on this website will not be updated, download it from the 
Github Repo

---

Read the Documentation here

Requires sm64coopdx v1.4 or above

bowser-gauntlet.825.title: Bowser Gauntlet
bowser-gauntlet.825.author: EmilyEmmi
bowser-gauntlet.825.description:
Bowser In The Sky is replaced with the Bowser Gauntlet, where you must play all three Bowser stages in a row and then fight the final Bowser. If you've played BAZR, it's pretty similar to that.

You're given both keys by default, and BitDW and BitFS are inaccessible from their normal areas. You can also disable Gauntlet Checkpoints for a tougher experience- if you die at any point in the Gauntlet, you have to try again from the beginning!

Not compatible with rom hacks, but it IS compatible with MarioHunt, as far as I know.

boyo.96.title: Boyo!
boyo.96.author: Ex Coop Mods Archive
boyo.96.description:
Original Post: February 12, 2023

Author: Karam

Boyo For SM64!

The goofball, pops into the world of [[S u p e r M a r i o]] to strut off his skills!

(Type /boyo on | drips | gat to activate one of the three current versions of Boyo)

Basic Moveset :

Leap! – The replacement for the ‘Long-Jump’, allows you to jump over great distances. Pressing B while performing will cause you to go into a rollout state, slowing down your momentum. (Pressing B while starting will give you a burst of speed!)

Wall Hop! – Bonk, Leap, or Dive onto a wall to scale it! (Diving can be used consecutively.)

Character Swaps – Each version plays similarly to Base-Boyo, just with a few new tricks (more or less), some may be better for specific situations.

Extras :

– Ground-Pounding allows you to transition into Diving and Slide-Kicking depending on if you’re on ground or mid-air

– Slide-Kicking can be done consecutively

– Extra Eye-Poses and Interactions depending on current state

— “10/10 IGN Best Mod” — Best Gamer (Max)

— “Wao-h!” — The Epic

— “thats actually cool” — Crowned Maniac (Intentional Typo)

Thanks to all the little Goobers that helped me find solutions to weird little ‘marmo’ oddities!

bowling.1123.title: Bowling
bowling.1123.author: djoslin0
bowling.1123.description:
Bowl with up to 16 people (
4-6 recommended
) for a fun social hangout or turn it into a competitive event. Finish the match with over 100 points for a chance to permanently unlock a new bowling ball skin, or score a strike for an immediate chance to unlock a skin! This mod is both a tech demo of coops capabilities and is also tons of fun! 

Features:

Traditional bowling rules, 2 rolls per frame, 10 frames per game, potential extra bowl in frame 10.

Celebration system for players that score consecutive Strikes.

24 total bowling balls that can be unlocked by chance after a Strike.

Fully translated localization for Spanish and Portuguese languages.

For modders interested, here are technical features used in this mod:

Realtime physics engine through Lua

New lighting engine capabilities

New BmFont library with functions to animate custom fonts

Other neat demonstrations like scrolling textures, custom camera movements, DoF, etc..

Created by 
djoslin0
 and 
The Incredible Holc

boyfriend-fnf.560.description:
"Beep Bop!"

breaking-bad-death-cutscene.197.title: Breaking Bad Death Cutscene
breaking-bad-death-cutscene.197.author: AgentX
breaking-bad-death-cutscene.197.description:
Breaking Bad Death Cutscene

This mod replaces the normal death sequence with the final shot of Breaking Bad where the camera pans away from Walter White's body. Bubbling is automatically disabled and the sequence is only triggered by dying standing, on your back, on your stomach, suffocating, being electrocuted or drowning.

When a player dies, the music will play and get louder the closer you are to the body and quieter the farther away. The vanilla music also fades out the closer you are to the body.

Press 
[A]
 or 
[B]
 to skip the cutscene.

brutal-bosses.219.title: Brutal Bosses
brutal-bosses.219.author: EmilyEmmi
brutal-bosses.219.description:
This mod makes bosses more difficult. It adds new attacks and adjustments to every boss in the game. Also includes changes to NPCs, such as Toad, Mips, Bob-Omb Buddy, and more. Expect other secrets too...

While this is compatible with rom hacks, you'll have to play in vanilla to experience all of the secret content. Also comes with a /reshuffle command for rom hacks, in case Toad or Tuxie become unreachable.

EDIT: Since people keep reporting this bug, I'm going to say it here: The Bob-Omb Buddy dialog being broken is a CHARACTER SELECT ISSUE. This mod is much older than the latest versions of Character Select, and newer features with Character Select have caused known compatibility issues for a long time. You'll have to either live without Character Select with this mod or deal with the dialog issues for now.

bowsers-koopalings-character-pack.890.title: Bowser's Koopalings Character Pack
bowsers-koopalings-character-pack.890.author: BassiKun
bowsers-koopalings-character-pack.890.description:
With this character pack I bring you the ability to play as a set of characters from Bowser's Koopalings, a Koopalings fan-series on YouTube created by FreezeFlame22! The characters are also all voiced by their voice actors from the show! (Except for one, who instead uses voice clips from the episodes)

To install it, simply place the "[CS] Bowser's Koopalings Character Pack" file into your "mods" folder. The Characters all use the Bowser Moveset mod, so make sure to have that installed, as well as the latest version of Character Select.

Special thanks to:

wibblus and melzinoff for giving me access and permission to use the Koopalings and Bowser Jr. character bases to make these characters. I really couldn't have done this without them!

All the voice actors who helped me make this mod a reality. You all rock!

My friends over at Discord for encouraging me to learn Blender to make this dream come true. If you guys are reading this, thank you from the bottom of my heart!

Cowabunga and FreezeFlame22 himself over on Discord for the sprites used both in the image below and in the character icons found in the mod itself.

The people at the Coop Central server for helping me whenever I had doubts with Blender. Thanks to them, I have improved a bit with the program!

This mod includes the following characters:

Travis Koopa (VA: GengarOfTheOpera):

A chill guy with a very laid-back attitude, Travis comes into Super Mario 64 to both save the day while taking it all easy.

Lauren Knightley (VA: GlitterGhostz)

A nice and friendly, if a bit sarcastic girl. She's an avid gamer and is not afraid of demonstrating her skills!

Ally Rook (VA: Carmen)

Ally is a very sweet girl who, in spite of her ditziness, does everything in her power to support the ones she loves.

Camilla McQueen (VA: Carmen)

A vain and selfish girl from the McQueen family. When Camilla wants something, she will do anything in her power to get it.

Ember Ford (VA: YuriHaru567) 

A girl who is as brash and condescending as she is hot-headed. Ember looks down on everyone else and never passes up an opportunity if it means ridiculing others.

Jade Garnet (VA: GlitterGhostz)

A very mischevious and self-centered girl, Jade finds a lot of amusement in the misfortunes of other people.

Eddie Knightley (Voice Clips: Swoldow)

Lauren's older brother. He is short-tempred and rather brash, but he is genuinely a good guy underneath that tough exterior.

Known Issues:

When going into Shell Mode, the shadow size doesn't match the shell. This is something I will try to fix in the future as I eventually figure out how to adjust shadow sizes.

Hair often clips through the female characters' shells. This is something I was struggling with due to how little experience in Blender I had. I ultimately decided to leave it as it is, but I may try to fix it in the future.

celeste-moveset.612.title: Celeste Moveset
celeste-moveset.612.author: EmilyEmmi
celeste-moveset.612.description:
Celeste's moveset in Super Mario 64! Press X to dash and B to climb. There's also a mod menu, which contains many options.

Also included with this mod is the 
Strawberry Hunt
, which is enabled as long as there are no rom hacks or game modes active. There are 25 hidden strawberries throughout the game. Can you collect them all?

SFX from Celeste and Celeste 64. Textures and models by crystalika.

updates.title: v2.0: The inevitable update
updates.changelog:
This shouldn't come as a surprise. This updates includes all of new features and changes from [CS] Madeline, 
which was released just now by Violet
. They also have compatibility- when both are enabled, all characters can use the moveset, but Madeline gets her own model for the dash trail effect.

This mod also still features the 25 collectible strawberries, which are not featured in the Character Select mod.

character-select-nuzlocke.792.title: Character Select Nuzlocke
character-select-nuzlocke.792.author: wereyoshi
character-select-nuzlocke.792.description:
This mod is a character select nuzlocke mod. when you die the character you are using is eliminated. So if you die as mario then no one can use mario.

It also features an api _G.charselectnuzlockeapi -which has options like addteamcheck which adds a team check for gamemodes.

get_deadcharactertable for getting eliminated characters. reset_nuzlocketable for resetting the nuzlocke table for everyone

Spoiler: 
_G.charselectnuzlockeapi 

--function for other mods to add a team check for gamemodes 

    addteamcheck ,

--function that lets other mods get a table of only the current dead characters

    get_deadcharactertable,

 ---this function lets other mods see if a player has no characters

    get_hascharacterstatus,

--function that lets other mods get a table of only the current living characters

    get_livingcharactertable,

--- function to allow other mods to get the current resetnuzlocksavefunction function

    get_resetnuzlocksavefunction,

--resets the nuzlocke table for everyone

    reset_nuzlocketable,

--function to for other mods to set if this mod will reset the save with nuzlocke table reset

    reset_save_on_reset,

--- function to allow other mods to run code when the local player's nuzlocke table is reset

    on_nuzlockereset,

--- function to allow other mods to run code whenever the local player's nuzlocke table changes

    on_nuzlocketableupdate,

--function used by the host to revive a character for a player

    server_revive_character_for_player,

--this function resets the nuzlocke table of a single player

    reset_nuzlocketableofspecificplayer,

---this function allows other mods to set the current nuzlocke character

    set_nuzlockecharacter,

--- function to allow other mods to replace the function character select nuzlocke uses to reset the current save. 

    set_resetnuzlocksavefunction,

--- function to allow other mods to run code when the local player runs out of characters

    on_nocharactersleftfunction,

--this function returns the current version of the mod

    get_version,

updates.title: v1.1.1
updates.changelog: bugfix for character select 1.16.1

updates.title: v1.1.0
updates.changelog:
added text to nuzlocke reset mentioning save reset

added toggle for nuzlocke free for all which will be disabled if another mod sets the teamfunction

made it so pause exiting from a course will allow you to reselect your character can be toggled.

added character status to mod menu

added the ability to save or load nuzlocke settings. loading is only for the host or a moderator.Saved settings will be autoloaded when hosting.

added command for the host to revive a character for a player and their team.

added optional includelocked param for _G.charselectnuzlockeapi.get_livingcharactertable for including locked characters in the returned table. without said param it will default to not including locked characters in the returned table.

character-movesets.191.title: Character Movesets
character-movesets.191.author: steven3004
character-movesets.191.description:
One of the older mods of sm64ex-coop is back with a slight bit of overhaul, giving each character fairly unique ways to play.

This mod can be toggled by typing 
/char-mov
, in case you prefer your typical vanilla experience. (The moveset is on by default.)

Moves list:

Mario:

Handstand Jump
 (Crawling + A):
 Taken some inspiration from DK94 and Mario VS DK, this is basically a triple jump that goes higher, but has less speed. It's ideal for reaching higher spaces that can't be reached with a backflip or a side flip when there is no space to build up a triple jump, or just a fun lil' alternative to any of the aforementioned jumps.

Luigi:

Passive Stats: 
Luigi can jump higher and swim faster, but his shoes are rather slippery, therefore affecting his ground traction and speed, and wall kick height.

He also has slightly weaker health.

Scuttle Jump: 
By holding A while falling down during some jumps, Luigi will kick his feet to fall slower.

Spindrift Backflip: 
Taken straight from SM64DS, Luigi will do a spinning jump after he falls from a backflip.

Spin Pound 
(Holding Z)
:
 Basically a ground pound, but without the 2 second stop in mid-air and you have more control over it.

Toad:

Passive Stats:
 Toad is the fastest character out of the cast. His ground pound goes faster and running can maintain more speed, but his jump height is the worst. His wall kick, however, can be stronger with speed.

Ground Pound Jump: 
Pressing A while landing with a ground pound basically lets Toad do a higher triple jump.

Waluigi: 

Passive Stats:
 Waluigi moves slightly faster, and jumps slightly lower, while his triple jump is significantly buffed.

But due to being built like a stick bug, he loses way more health than any other character.

Wall Slide:
 Instead of light-bonking onto a wall, Waluigi will slide against it, and triples jumps out of one when A is pressed.

Elegant Jump:
 A take one Waluigi's double jump, where upon pressing A during some jumps, Waluigi will twirl in the air with all is Walugrace and be able to instantly switch directions.

Air Swim 
(Dive + B)
:
 Waluigi can defy gravity and swim three times before he falls to a place that's hopefully not his impending doom.

Wario:

Passive Stats:
 Wario is a much heavier and stronger guy, so he jumps lower and moves slower.

He falls faster with a ground pound and sinks when he's underwater.

He can effortlessly lift heavy objects and loses little to virtually no damage, except when he touches lava.

Shoulder Bash 
(Ground Dive)
: 
With this ability, Wario can ram into enemies and objects and send 'em flying.

Corkscrew Conk
 (Bash + A)
: 
A jump that's roughly the height of a double jump Wario can do while shoulder-bashing. He can also do it mid-air, making it a decent recovery move.

Wild Swing-Ding:
 By rotating the stick quickly while running with and object, Wario can spin it like spining Bowser. Note that for now, this is more of a neat visual thing rather than affecting how far you can throw the object.

Piledriver:
 Pressing Z while jumping with an object in hand and Wario will go pummeling down with it.

Hope you all enjoy the mod!

 By rotating the stick quickly while running with and object, Wario can spin it like spining Bowser. Note that for now, this is more of a neat visual thing rather than affecting how far you can throw the object.

Piledriver:
 Pressing Z while jumping with an object in hand and Wario will go pummeling down with it.

Hope you all enjoy the mod!

One of the older mods of sm64ex-coop is back with a slight bit of overhaul, giving each character fairly unique ways to play.

This mod can be toggled by typing 
/char-mov
, in case you prefer your typical vanilla experience. (The moveset is on by default.)

Moves list:

Mario:

Handstand Jump
 (Crawling + A):
 Taken some inspiration from DK94 and Mario VS DK, this is basically a triple jump that goes higher, but has less speed. It's ideal for reaching higher spaces that can't be reached with a backflip or a side flip when there is no space to build up a triple jump, or just a fun lil' alternative to any of the aforementioned jumps.

Luigi:

Passive Stats: 
Luigi can jump higher and swim faster, but his shoes are rather slippery, therefore affecting his ground traction and speed, and wall kick height.

He also has slightly weaker health.

Scuttle Jump: 
By holding A while falling down during some jumps, Luigi will kick his feet to fall slower.

Spindrift Backflip: 
Taken straight from SM64DS, Luigi will do a spinning jump after he falls from a backflip.

Spin Pound 
(Holding Z)
:
 Basically a ground pound, but without the 2 second stop in mid-air and you have more control over it.

Toad:

Passive Stats:
 Toad is the fastest character out of the cast. His ground pound goes faster and running can maintain more speed, but his jump height is the worst. His wall kick, however, can be stronger with speed.

Ground Pound Jump: 
Pressing A while landing with a ground pound basically lets Toad do a higher triple jump.

Waluigi: 

Passive Stats:
 Waluigi moves slightly faster, and jumps slightly lower, while his triple jump is significantly buffed.

But due to being built like a stick bug, he loses way more health than any other character.

Wall Slide:
 Instead of light-bonking onto a wall, Waluigi will slide against it, and triples jumps out of one when A is pressed.

Elegant Jump:
 A take one Waluigi's double jump, where upon pressing A during some jumps, Waluigi will twirl in the air with all is Walugrace and be able to instantly switch directions.

Air Swim 
(Dive + B)
:
 Waluigi can defy gravity and swim three times before he falls to a place that's hopefully not his impending doom.

Wario:

Passive Stats:
 Wario is a much heavier and stronger guy, so he jumps lower and moves slower.

He falls faster with a ground pound and sinks when he's underwater.

He can effortlessly lift heavy objects and loses little to virtually no damage, except when he touches lava.

Shoulder Bash 
(Ground Dive)
: 
With this ability, Wario can ram into enemies and objects and send 'em flying.

Corkscrew Conk
 (Bash + A)
: 
A jump that's roughly the height of a double jump Wario can do while shoulder-bashing. He can also do it mid-air, making it a decent recovery move.

Wild Swing-Ding:
 By rotating the stick quickly while running with and object, Wario can spin it like spining Bowser. Note that for now, this is more of a neat visual thing rather than affecting how far you can throw the object.

Piledriver:
 Pressing Z while jumping with an object in hand and Wario will go pummeling down with it.

Hope you all enjoy the mod!

character-select-randomizer.775.title: Character Select Randomizer
character-select-randomizer.775.author: wereyoshi
character-select-randomizer.775.description:
This is a character select randomizer mod that randomizes your character on hit, coin collection ,or level change. Each of said randomization methods can be toggled off.

using Character Select v1.15.1 and up will allow the mod to randomize costumes.

It also features an api _G.charselectrandomizerapi -which has options like 

othermodhandlecharacter - for having another mod handle characters

customcharacterrerollfunction - for other mods providing their own character reroll function

forcereroll - for another mod to force a reroll

get_version - for getting the current version of the mod.

updates.title: character select randomizer v1.0.1 fix for character select 1.16
updates.changelog: This release just fixes the mod not being able to randomly select mario on character select 1.16. Said fix should work even if character select decides to go back to using 1 as the first character index.

checkpoints.377.title: Checkpoints
checkpoints.377.author: djoslin0
checkpoints.377.description:
Gives you a checkpoint that you can fall back to.

Press DPAD+DOWN while stationary to place your checkpoint.

Press DPAD+UP to teleport to it.

When OMM is enabled:

Hold L and press DPAD+DOWN while stationary to place your checkpoint.

Hold L and press DPAD+UP to teleport to it.

character-select.149.title: Character Select
character-select.149.author: Squishy6094
character-select.149.description:
A Model Selector for SM64CoopDX with an Extensive API and tons of Support!
​

Our main goal is to make Character Creation on Lua's end as simple as possible, and to move away from the old Skin Pack mod people keep copying and pasting. With this goal in mind, we tried to make everything as streamlined as possible throughout the character addition process, while allowing for tons of customizability!

If you encounter any errors please report them on Github so they can be solved as soon as possible:

Bug Report Submission

Changelog, Resources, and More Info can be found on the Github (Linked in Additional Information)
​

Support Development on 
Ko-Fi
!
​

climb-attack.119.title: Climb Attack!
climb-attack.119.author: eeliottheking
climb-attack.119.description:
In Climb Attack, players race to climb as high as possible on a randomly generated tower by strategically placing blocks. The goal is to outclimb your opponents and reach the highest point before the time runs out. The player who climbs the highest wins the round!

This mod introduces a block-building mechanic inspired by Minecraft, allowing players to construct their way up the tower using a limited number of blocks. Players must carefully manage their block resources and plan their ascent while avoiding obstacles and competing against other climbers.

Key Features:

- Random tower generation: Each round, a new tower is procedurally generated, ensuring a fresh and challenging experience every time.

- Block building: Use the Y button to place blocks and create your path upwards. Punching or kicking blocks will refund your block count.

WARNING
: This mode has a 
LOT 
of objects!  
Do not play with 16 players!
  Do not play with 10 players with max settings for the tower!  You will get 
lag
!  If you experience desynch due to lag, issue
 /round restart 
to try and resolve the issue!

Chat Commands (for server host):

- /round restart: Force the current round to restart and initiate a new cleanup round.

- /set-num-boxes (number): Set the number of boxes to spawn for the tower (default: 100).

- /set-match-duration (number): Set the duration of each match in seconds (default: 90).

- /set-box-vertical-range (number): Set the vertical spawn range for boxes in box units (default: 50).

- /set-box-horizontal-range (number): Set the horizontal spawn range for boxes in box units (default: 5).

- /set-player-boxes (number): Set the maximum number of blocks each player can place (default: 10).

Credits:

Creator: eeliottheking

Music by Eric Matyas - 
www.soundimage.org

Map (Roblox Baseplate) by beardenthusiast

Minecraft mod by zKevin

Special thanks to all the publicly available mods on the GitHub repository for providing valuable information and resources!

Todo List:

-Improve Lag

-Find a better way to detect breaking blocks

-Remove color tags from names

-Find a better way to clear the map

classic-style-playerlist.441.title: Classic Style Playerlist
classic-style-playerlist.441.author: king the memer
classic-style-playerlist.441.description:
Coop's gui is very simple and uniform which works well on its

own, but seems out of place alongside the original game's distinct,

colorful artstyle, at least in my opinion, so i decided to experiment

with what gui i could edit ingame and see how close i could get it

to the original artstyle. the easiest thing to edit i could find was the

playerlist, which i completely overhauled using the file select menu

as a basis

a full lobby of players was too much to fit on one page so i added

a feature that lets you scroll to page 2 with your scroll wheel

alongside the new playerlist is a remodelled logo based on the

vanilla one plus some hud improvements, both are found in the

dynos folder

cmdlib-command-library.604.title: CMDLib (Command Library)
cmdlib-command-library.604.author: kloodi
cmdlib-command-library.604.description:
CMDLib is a command library that helps other mods make commands easier.

There are lots of features including:

Adding Commands

Editing Commands (Not just the description)

Removing Commands

Automatic Argument Parsing

Error Handling

CMDLib commands are prefixed with "!" rather than "/" (For no interfering with sm64coopdx commands)

There are two commands by default that you cannot edit or remove.

!help and !helpcmd, Which give a list of commands and a long description of a specific command respectively.

coco-bandicoot.491.title: Coco Bandicoot
coco-bandicoot.491.author: Aso-Designer
coco-bandicoot.491.description:
Crash's sister made her way to Super Mario 64!  

---

Coco's model assets are from Crash Boom Bang and Mario 64, with custom textures made by me. 

Voice clips are straight from Crash Bandicoot 4. 

------------

The known issues are just a little problem on the sleeping animation. (And one detail on a foot, not appearing in Blender tho) 

custom multiplayer palette is not included for now, but I'll work on it soon. 

-------------

Coco Bandicoot belongs to Activision and Microsoft

coin-requirement-modifier.244.title: Coin Requirement Modifier
coin-requirement-modifier.244.author: Dragonary
coin-requirement-modifier.244.description:
Coin Requirement Modifier

Created by Dragonary

Ever find yourself struggling to find the last red coin, or just too lazy to grab all 100 coins?

This mod allows you to easily change the number of coins needed for the 100 coin and red coin stars with these 3 simple commands:

/coin [number]
 - Change 100 coin star requirement

/redcoin [number]
 - Change red coin star requirement

/resetcoins
 - Reset both coin star requirements

Only the host can run these commands, so you don't need to worry about people messing around with them in a public server.

coin-store.514.title: Coin Store
coin-store.514.author: Q10isarobot
coin-store.514.description:
Have you ever wished those gold coins could be worth something?

Now you have an in game coin store that can be opened at any time pressing the L Button!

with the store open you can use D pad left and right to select what Item you want to buy

If you have enough gold Coins, press down on the D pad to spawn the item in!

On the top left of the screen you can see your coin wallet, buying items will reduce coins while

grabbing coins will increase it.

Collect coins to increase your wallet count.

Collecting a star will award 50 coins..

Current Items and cost:

1----- Make it rain!!!! spawn in a coin every time you press the down button

3----- throwable box

5----- Jump Box

8----- Restore Health

10---- Goomba

10---- Tiny Custom Goomba (will chase you down to the ends of the earth)

12---- Throwable Bob-omb (spawns in hand like a grenade)

15----flyguy

16----Boo

18---- Ukiki Monkey

20---- shell

22-- Mini Mario, has slightly better jump and doesnt take fall damage

25---- 1Up

30---- Metal cap

35---- Vanish cap

40---- Wing cap

45--Giant Mario - Become Giant mario!!! crush your enemies!!!!

45---- Ball

50---- Moon Jump (Hold Down Button)

55---- Chill Bully Minion

60---- Baby Penguin

80---- Evil Piano

500--- Bowser

1000--- Beat the Game!!!!!

This can technically be its own "Game mode" because you can race to see who gets 1000 coins first!

Special thanks to:

AgentXLP
- Many helpfull example code files 
Found Here

WiiBoss- 
Multiplayer Playtesting

Discord Community- For answering my questions and providing resources

coins-speed.1160.title: Coins = Speed

classic-doom-weapons.848.title: Classic Doom Weapons
classic-doom-weapons.848.author: Pseudonym929
classic-doom-weapons.848.description:
12 Weapons from Doom, Doom II, and Doom 64

Includes randomized weapon and ammo spawns, custom hitboxes for handing attacks, HUD for ammo and powerups, and improved first person camera

X and Y to switch between weapons
​
Weapons:

Fist

incl. Berserk powerup

Chainsaw

Pistol

Shotgun

Super Shotgun

Chaingun

Rocket Launcher

Plasma Gun

BFG9000

Unmaker

incl. Demon Key upgrades

must be enabled via chat command

Incinerator

must be enabled via chat command

Calamity Blade

must be enabled via chat command

Items:

Pickups of all weapons

excl. fist and pistol, which are available at start

Clip (+10 bullets)

Shotgun Shells (+4 shells)

Rocket (+1 rocket)

Plasma Cell (+20 plasma)

Fuel Can (+10 fuel)

Berserk

provides full heal

remains active until player exits area (red haze is just a visual effect)

Backpack (+10 bullets, +4 shells, + 1 rocket, +20 plasma, +10 fuel)

doubles ammo capacity (1 time only)

+1 Secret item per area

Commands:

/unmaker (true/false): Toggles Unmaker and Demon Key spawns (server owner only)

/lor (on/off/mix): Toggles Incinerator, Calamity Blade, and fuel spawns. "on" causes them to replace the plasma weapons (plasma cells will remain if Unmaker is enabled), "mix" enables spawning of all weapons and ammo types (server owner only)

/vertspread (true/false): Toggles vertical spread for the shotgun and chaingun (server owner only)

/msglimit (0 - 99): Maximum number of pickup messages 

/msgtime (0-600): # of Seconds a pickup message will remain on screen

/altitemnames (true/false): changes the names of certain items to be more technically accurate (in case that kind of thing bothers you)

/maxitems (any nonnegative integer): changes the maximum number of items that can appear in an area, useful if you're playing a romhack with big levels (server owner only)

/spawns base (
any nonnegative integer
): changes the number of weapons that spawn in an area at 0 stars (server owner only)

/spawns starbonus (any positive integer): changes how many stars the player(s) need to have for an extra weapon spawn, to disable, set to an unreachably high number (server owner only)

/spawns secret 
(any nonnegative integer): changes the number of secrets that spawns in an area 
(server owner only)

/intermission (doom, doom2, doom64, off): changes or disables the intermission screen

/pistolstart (true/false): Toggles Pistol Start. Players will start every level with just a pistol and fists (server owner only)

+4 cheats from the original games (server owner only)

Note: This has not been extensively tested in multiplayer. Bugs are likely to occur.

updates.title: 1.3 Update: Legacy of Rust & Various Fixes
updates.changelog:
Changes:

Added the Incinerator and Calamity Blade from 
Legacy of Rust
, along with the fuel ammo type. Like the Unmaker, these must be enabled with a command before they will spawn.

Added the /lor command to enable the above. "on" will have them replace the Plasma Gun and BFG9k, "mix" will allow all four weapons to spawn. (Plasma cells will still spawn if the Unmaker is enabled)

Added the /pistolstart command. Enabling will cause any weapons picked up by players to be removed upon leaving the level.

Sprites now use the G_TF_POINT filter.

Fixes:

Fixed interactions with Pokeys

Fixed the ACT_FIRE_SHOTGUN_AIRBORNE action

updates.title: 1.21 Update: Intermission fixes and New Commands
updates.changelog:
Changes:

Added the /maxitems and /spawns commands, which server owners can use to spawn more or fewer items.

Fixes:

Fixed a softlock caused by intermission screens in levels with no enemies/items/secrets.

Intermission screens should now display the correct total value.

updates.title: 1.2 Update: Intermissions, Strafing, and miscellaneous fixes.
updates.changelog:
Changes:

Added Intermissions:

Exiting a stage via a star or key triggers an Intermission Screen. These work roughly the same way that Doom 1+2's does, minus the Par times.

The /intermission command can be used to choose between the intermissions for Doom (default), Doom II, or Doom 64. Intermissions can also be disabled with the command.

Significantly improved the standing firing states, allowing for strafing and seamless transitions between standing and walking while firing.

The messages that appear the first time you enter BOB, WF, CCM, and BITDW have been changed to provide advice for new players (will not appear in romhacks).

Made the chainsaw slightly less useless.

Bugfixes:

Fixed interactions with Bob-omb Buddies

Fixed King Bob-omb and Chuckyas ignoring certain projectiles

Issues caused by MIPS have been dealt with...

updates.title: 1.05 Update: Backpacks & Spawning Fixes
updates.changelog:
Changes:

Added Backpacks as a rare ammo pickup (1 in 4 chance 1 will spawn after collecting 24 Stars)

Items will spawn in most areas again

updates.title: 1.01 Update: Multiplayer fixes
updates.changelog:
Changes:

Items are no longer synced, so it should be easier for individual players to find weapons and ammo.

Fixed a bug that affected firing actions in multiplayer.

coopdx-randomizer.620.title: CoopDX Randomizer
coopdx-randomizer.620.author: Blocky
coopdx-randomizer.620.description:
This fixes a few bugs, as well as adding a few new features!

- 
/seed
 command, now you can choose a seed in game, all you have to do is do 
/seed [number

- Persistent warps, Now exiting out of a level will lead you to where you entered it from

- Painting Preview, You'll now be able to see where a painting will lead by just looking at it

- Entry level info, you'll get to see what level other played went in to get to the level they are currently in by checking the player list

fixed seed desyncs

fixed whomps in water

coops-usamune.905.title: Coop's Usamune
coops-usamune.905.author: JuliusButData
coops-usamune.905.description:
Welcome to Coop’s Usamune, An inspired mod of Usamune made by Julius and Jimmy Neutron.

featuring several improvements, custom options, and quality of life additions designed to make gameplay smoother and more enjoyable. This project aims to bring the feel and functionality of Usamune into a more modern and flexible setup while keeping it faithful to the original experience.

Shoutout to: Blocky, Mongolbr and Zlender

updates.title: Coop's Usamune 1.2
updates.changelog:
Welcome to Coop’s Usamune, An inspired mod of Usamune made by Julius and Jimmy Neutron.

featuring several improvements and custom options to make gameplay smoother and more enjoyable.

Shoutout to: Blocky, Mongolbr and Zlender

Note: Make sure to report any bug to Julius / Manolo on DMs

coopware.993.title: CoopWare
coopware.993.author: EmilyEmmi
coopware.993.description:
(Logo by LJ_Retro)

(NOTE: I left "WIP" in the title by mistake in v1.2. Please ignore it, or change the title to remove it if you'd like.)

WarioWare-styled gameplay
 in Super Mario 64 Coop DX! React quickly to complete fast-paced microgames and go for the highest score you can! Work together in 
Coop mode
, or go head-to-head in 
Versus or Team Versus mode
. Featuring 
17 standard microgames
, 
4 challenging Boss Microgames
, and 
64 achievements to earn
, there's plenty of variety, from racing, to trivia, to other fun surprises!

Inspired by "Mario vs. Wario Ware" by Team Cornersoft. More detailed credits within the mod itself. Also features an API to add your own microgames for those with modding experience- check out "Example New Microgame" for an example implementation.

updates.title: v1.2: Big QoL Update
updates.changelog:
Was meant to be a small update to fix a script error, but like with most "small updates" I make, it got out of hand. This update includes lots of quality-of-life changes, two new voice options, and one new Extra game to try.

NOTE: I left "WIP" in the title by mistake. Please ignore it, or change the title to remove it if you'd like.

updates.title: v1.1: The Spectate Update
updates.changelog: Gosh dang it I broke spectate right before release. You can now spectate other players after losing a microgame. I imagine losing Endless Tetris must have been really boring. Other patch notes are included inside of the mod folder, for all 0 people that read those.

coop-studio.1149.title: Coop Studio
coop-studio.1149.author: Krof
coop-studio.1149.description:
Do you remember Saturn64?

This mod is an attempt at a 
Machinma
 mod for the 
SM64COOPDX

What can you do?

Freeze camera

Enter spectator mode for screenshots

Easy animation testing and manipulation

Change facial expressions

Hide HUDs

Useful commands and guide

|

|

Commands

/fzcam
 
"Freeze the camera at the last point you were at"

/hud
 
"Hide the SM64 HUD"

/sshot 
 
"Enter spectator mode to take a screenshot"

/tips
 
"Hide and unhide tips when starting the mod"

/expressions
 
"Open the panel to select any expression"

/anims
 
"Try any animation as Anim-Test"

/commands
 
"Displays the command table that appears when starting the mod"

|

|

Button shortcut

R + Z                      
"Freeze Camera"

L + R                      
"Enter Screenshot mode"

Z + X                      
"Open the expressions panel"

Z + DPAD DOWN  
"Enter animation testing mode"

|

|

SPECIAL THANKS

Krofasty

EmiliEmmy

Wibblus

originally based on Aldex64

crash-bandicoot-64.879.title: Crash Bandicoot 64
crash-bandicoot-64.879.author: TheWolf
crash-bandicoot-64.879.description:
In this first mod, I add 
Crash
 and 
Coco Bandicoot
 as playable skins for SM64CoopDX, along with 
Aku Aku
 as a companion pet!

This is the first version of the mod — future fixes or updates may come later.  

Any feedback or suggestions are greatly appreciated!

Content:

- Crash Bandicoot:
 Playable character skin  

- Coco Bandicoot: 
Playable character skin  

- Aku Aku: 
Custom pet added through WiddlePets  

  (Requires WiddlePets to be active in order to use Aku Aku)

Requirements:

Character Selector

WiddlePets

Voice clips from 
Crash Bandicoot N. Sane Trilogy 
 

Characters and rights belong to 
Naughty Dog / Activision.  

This is a fan-made mod created by a fan, for fans.

cs-and-dynos-emmy-the-robot-extra-nandro.title: [CS and DynOS] Emmy the Robot + Extra Nandroids
cs-and-dynos-emmy-the-robot-extra-nandro.author: Neppy
cs-and-dynos-emmy-the-robot-extra-nandro.description:
Featuring characters from the webcomic Emmy the Robot by Dominic Cellini!

The first pack contains Emmy herself, while the second has Molly, Franny, Amy and Polly from the comic, along with three fandom OC Nandroids; Tabby, Wendy and Lulu.

Targets Super Mario 64 COOPDX, but is compatible with other PC Ports as well. Packaged for Character-Select and DynOS.

If you've read Emmy the Robot, leave me a comment, I'd love to hear what you think about it!

Credit to beanbagdraws for the original low poly Emmy model, which I heavily mangled to fit within Mario's proportions.

cs-annalynn-64.508.title: [CS] Annalynn 64
cs-annalynn-64.508.author: Zepiereite
cs-annalynn-64.508.description:
Annalynn in Super Mario 64!

This is my first mod and was made out of passion for both Super Mario 64 and Annalynn! I learned a how to model and a bunch of other things to make this possible. All thanks to the others that I have listed in the credits!

This mod comes with custom hat models, voice clips, and everything needed to make playing as Annalynn an immersive experience!

CREDITS:

Garrulous64:
 for the 
tutorial video
 that helped me through a lot of doing this for the first time! I also used the template provided by them

Fast64:
 for making the accessible tools that made this possible

Zepiereite:
 Model and custom UI

Cruise Elroy:
 Annalynn (the character and the video game)

Elspeth Eastman:
 Voice (taken from in game voice clips)

updates.title: Texture Accuracy Update!
updates.changelog:
finally figured out to have Annalynn's textures display without those weird borders or being pixel perfect. just as the mario intended.. <3

oh, also ported EVERY SINGLE PALETTE from the original game into the mod! (with a nod to a certain evil variant..)

updates.title: Character Select Updates
updates.changelog: i'll be doing a patch that supports some of the new features that Character Select adds soon! Keep your eyes peeled... it may come with something neat.

updates.title: Annalynn Model Tweaks (v1.0.3)
updates.changelog:
A few more model tweaks, adjusting some proportions in preparation for the costume update!

Planning to add Pretty Annalynn (bow) and Annalynn Mobius (annalynn md)

- Adjusted the volume level of Annalynn's voicelines! (
they are considerably louder than before. i tried to keep special cases at a decent volume, just lmk if i missed one and i'll address it 
)

feedback is always appreciated! share this mod around so more annalynn fans can have some fun!

updates.title: Annalynn Model Tweaks (v1.0.2)
updates.changelog:
Tweaked the model to just feel a bit nicer while I try to figure out why her torso tilts too much

Flattened the bottom of Annalynn's boots

Enlargened the headlamp

Completely changed the belt (it is now a solid color on the hips instead of a plane wrapped around it)

Some small proportional tweaks to the torso

I plan on eventually releasing an update that adds a new outfit to Annalynn, that being just replacing the hat with a bow for her ponytail! I also plan to address her feet 
slightly
 sinking into the floor...

I'm so happy that people out there are enjoying this mod, and I hope to continue revisiting it on occasion to improve it!

updates.title: Hotfix update v1.0.1
updates.changelog: - Fixed a custom palette issue when Annalynn removes her cap

cs-a-hat-in-time-modpack.734.title: [CS] A Hat in Time ModPack!!
cs-a-hat-in-time-modpack.734.author: Asplatim
cs-a-hat-in-time-modpack.734.description:
[CS] A Hat in Time ModPack!!​

The mod includes :​
-Hat Kid (recolor, hats and voice lines) and an alt version!​
-Bow kid (recolor, hats and voice lines)​
-Dj Grooves(recolor, hats and voice lines)​
-The conductor(recolor, hats and voice lines)​
-Mustache Girl (recolor, hats and voice lines)​

Now includes the smug dance from A hat in time !​
(animations made by me and sorry if looks kinda ugly and the music is from a hat in time game)
​
The voice lines are from the game A hat in time! 

3d models mades by me! 

If theres any recomendation or any bug pls let me know!!

Adding soon:

Custom hp bar

Maybe new alts for each character

Changing the star with a time piece from the game

creepy-canyon.54.title: Creepy Canyon
creepy-canyon.54.author: Ex Coop Mods Archive
creepy-canyon.54.description:
Original Post: June 26, 2023

Author: djoslin0

My entry for the level competition.

A single-level casual rom hack with 7 stars.

Requires at least two people to get one of the stars.

Recommended to cap the player count at 2-4.

cs-ario.688.title: [CS] Ario
cs-ario.688.author: wibblus
cs-ario.688.description:
Ario 
the fluffy star bun is here! Along with his trusty cap, this shapeshifting duo has a wide array of moves to show off! Spinning, rolling, and bouncing about, Ario sure is one quick-footed friend! And their cap can protect, and help with reaching new heights in various ways, depending on its form.

No one is quite sure where they come from.. but they are here to have some fun :3

Character credits to 
AceTheBun
 !!

Bit Bomb model created by 
SprSn64 
!!

​

updates.title: v1.3: grafitti + tweaks
updates.changelog:
added a grafitti design for CS 1.16+

Cap Hide prevents poison damage, and slowly heals

sleeping heals more gradually

fast drop while twirling by holding Z

fur and star bit/jacket lining is recolourable

updates.title: v1.2.1 hotfix
updates.changelog:
fixed up some sync issues and script errors from inhaling

better code practises for moveset menu; the CS description text bug is partially fixed and will be FULLY fixed by the next CS update.

updates.title: v1.2: bugfixes
updates.changelog: fixed bugs from coopdx v1.3.2

updates.title: v1.1 release!
updates.changelog:
A new mod version featuring some brand new moves and touchups, as commissioned once again by AceTheBun!

Cap Inhale
: hold out your cap to vacuum up nearby enemies and players, and spit them back out!

New Ball Roll
: Cloud Ario will now transform into a bigbig fluffy ball while rolling!

Bit Bomb
: A summonable little star-bit buddy. Run around with them, or use them for inhale fodder if you are cruel and evil to the baby

Aaaaand a bunch more touchups I've forgetten, heh

cs-audie.654.title: [CS] Audie
cs-audie.654.author: Aso-Designer
cs-audie.654.description:
he peppy wolf from Animal Crossing New Horizons is now available in Mario 64! 

For those who love this gal, you're in for a threat!  

Assets are from Animal Crossing Pocket, Animal New Horizons (for the sunglasses and the dress texture) and Mario 64 for the body. 

Capless and Dead heads are included. 

One details are the hands when by example she removes her sunglasses, it can look "detached", but it's not too important.

Enjoy the mod!

Audie (c) Nintendo

cs-auria-borealis.1041.title: [CS] Auria Borealis
cs-auria-borealis.1041.author: Gamebun
cs-auria-borealis.1041.description:
Note: If voicelines are not playing, you must be on 
Character Select v1.16.1
 or above!

"An ambitious scientist from the Sol Dimension who wields the power of the Mirage Sapphire to travel between dimensions. She is always in search of great potential in the name of scientific innovation."

A commission for DJ Bot (
Twitter
 | 
Bluesky
 | 
DeviantArt
) initially as a simple standalone SM64 mod now given life in the world of SM64CoopDX! Custom voicelines, sourced from Oleander from Thems Fightin' Herds, new idle and running animations. Upload here with permission from the client, with updates from the initial standalone mod, hence the v2.

cs-antasma.1156.title: [CS] Antasma
cs-antasma.1156.author: melzinoff
cs-antasma.1156.description:
Features:

Custom caps, icon, power meter, graffiti art and Preset Palettes!

Voice acted by 
Gauntlet Queen
!

Summon Mines!

Press 
Crouch + B while not moving
 to summon mines that will protect you!

Throw Mines!

Press 
Crouch + B while not moving then press A
 at any point during the summoning animation to throw them instead! They will target players!

Bat Dash!

Crouch + B when moving
 or 
Z + B during a Ground Pound
 will make you Dash into a little bat along with two other bats!

Sleep Status Effect!

All of these 
attacks will make other players snooze
 
when hitting them!

Made by 
Team
 
Trick
star
!

Power Meter made using 
Mike's template
!

ONLY for CS 1.16 and above!​

cs-assassins-creed-character-pack.781.title: [CS] Assassin's Creed character pack
cs-assassins-creed-character-pack.781.author: RPG4
cs-assassins-creed-character-pack.781.description: Assassins from the franchise Assassin's Creed are now playable in SM64! At the moment this mod currently features: Ezio outfit from AC2, Ezio outfit from AC brotherhood, Ezio wearing the Armour of Altair, Edward Kenway, and Connor Kenway! there will be more Assassins in future updates, so stay tuned!

updates.title: The OG update
updates.changelog:
Today there are new additions to the brotherhood, Desmond and Altair!

these have been sitting in my .blend file for weeks lol

there have been some recolourability changes, and a few of the characters broke a tiny bit,  but it's all good : )

Edward's hood has been modified to look like the one used in all the promotional material

you also get a cool new mod pic which will be displayed on the overview tab

updates.title: The nobleman update
updates.changelog:
additions:

Florentine Noble Attire as a playable outfit

eyes to all capless heads except Brotherhood Ezio and Connor

changes:

most of Ezio's belts and blades have been replaced with textures, with the exception of Brotherhood Ezio

Armour of Altair's icon is now high-quality

fixes:

most of the capless heads now look close to the capped heads' original sizes, with the exception of Brotherhood Ezio and Connor

most characters now stand on the ground properly (crouching and crawling are still broken)

some bugs that popped up:

Florentine Ezio, AC2 Ezio, and Edward are now off-center

updates.title: Small Patch #3
Another small patch
updates.changelog: Brotherhood Ezio is fixed. have fun

updates.title: The Kenway Update
updates.changelog: HUGE NEW UPDATE! This update adds Edward and Connor Kenway to SM64! I have also added recolourability to all the models, but now Brotherhood Ezio's a little bit broken sadly. But don't worry, because I plan to fix that soon. Until then, enjoy!

updates.title: A small patch
updates.changelog: Just fixes a bug where Armour of Altair's hood glitches to see a tiny bit of his head

cs-baby-mario.48.title: [CS] Baby Mario
cs-baby-mario.48.author: ThaGurlTIlly
cs-baby-mario.48.description:
This Character Select mod contains a fully voiced Baby Mario! the model was made by ThaGurlTilly & FluffaMario, and the voice was done by ThaGurlTilly, these credits & palette hex values are in the README that is included in the zip file! 

(my limited knowledge has given this model some issues, where he clips into the floor, I do not know how to fix this, and since it's not that bad or noticeable, it will not be messed with)

(photos taken with the Sharen's Details + mod enabled)

cs-baby-princesses.1052.title: [CS] Baby Princesses
cs-baby-princesses.1052.author: VioletSM64
cs-baby-princesses.1052.description:
The Three Princesses come to save the day... as babies

Bring your pacifiers and diapers as these 3 babies try to defeat the hydrogen bomb that is Bowser, in this SM64 Mod.

Play as 3 Characters:

Baby Peach

Baby Daisy

Baby Rosalina

Custom Recolorability included

Custom Caps included

Voicelines included (All voicelines are from Mario Kart 8)

Have fun running around in SM64 as these 3 little gremlins!

updates.title: Offset Fix
updates.changelog: This update fixes an offset issue with most of the animations in the mod, along with that, the Custom Caps now work properly, enjoy this small update!

cs-baldi.185.title: [CS] Baldi
cs-baldi.185.author: CT Himself
cs-baldi.185.description:
The math man himself has arrived.

Ruler and math machines not included

updates.title: Back to revamping old CS packs
updates.changelog:
Looks like it's that time of week again, where I run out of unique ideas and start revamping old CS mods I already made, this time, it's everybody's favorite pinhead.

CHANGELOG:

A new model, made to fit the SM64 style more accurately

No more unsaturated colors!

New falling sound effect

And for the first time in CT CS history...well, you'll just have to sit through the ending to find out.

updates.title: Recolorabilty
updates.changelog: Forgot I wanted to add in recolorability so here ya go (recolorable Baldi is a separate character BTW)

updates.title: COMPLETE OVERHAUL!
updates.changelog: New and more accurate model, along with a fixed icon to make it not break with the DK64 mod

cs-beat.367.title: [CS] Beat
cs-beat.367.author: EscherSimp
cs-beat.367.description:
"YAHOO!"

This is beat from jet set radio. the model is made and exported by me and my friend Sabaki helped with the rest. this mod includes voicelines from jsr, some jsrf voicelines to fill in the gaps, and a sonic racing game voiceline. this also includes some unused texture for mario like looking around so any mod that uses those animations they will work.

cs-ben-10-rath.679.title: [CS] Ben 10 - Rath
cs-ben-10-rath.679.author: Junior3DGames
cs-ben-10-rath.679.description:
[CS] Rath by Blue Jr. (Junior3DGames)
​

Description​
LEMME TELL YA SOMETHIN' COOP DELUXE COMMUNITY! THIS MOD WILL ADD THE MOST COOL ALIEN FROM BEN 10 ON Y'ALL ROSTER OF CHARACTERS, YOU WANNA FIGHT RATH?! YOU ALREADY LOST!

What does Rath have?​
• Very palette swappable

Emblem: Eyes and Omnitrix color

Skin: Orange fur

Hair: Black stripes

Gloves: White fur

• Fully voiced with voice lines from the show!

• Custom life icon and health bar!

• Custom normal, wing and metal cap!
 
except the wings when he's with wing cap on..

(Special thanks to all the people on the Coop Central server who helped me publish my first mod, I appreciate all the help, tips, and everything y'all did for me, hopefully I'll be doing some more fun mods later on!)

(And don't worry! I plan on doing a new update fixing and adding some more things soon!)

​
• 
ANYBODY HUNGRY?
​
​

cs-bananza-kong.1064.title: [CS] Bananza Kong
cs-bananza-kong.1064.author: ProfeJavix
cs-bananza-kong.1064.description:
IMPORTANT: Load with CharacterSelect to use it

Our old friend DK is trying to get his golden bananas back, which were stolen by Bowser. Use his moves like rolling, ground slapping, chunk attack and more, in order to beat enemies and get 'em back.
​
​
CREDITS
​

ProfeJavix: main coding and chunk model​

SwagSkeleton95: main custom models and animations​

Baconator2558: HP Meter, Star Select Texture and coding help​

PeachyPeach: coding help​

ManIscat2: coding help and Fast64 help​

SullyBoy: DK music covers​

Note 1: DK comes with and without pants. Change it via CS.

Note 2: Toggle DK music via Mod Menu.

cs-biker-wario.638.title: [CS] Biker Wario
cs-biker-wario.638.author: BuckleyTim
cs-biker-wario.638.description:
Wario hops back onto the scene, only this time wearing a set of biker duds that'll be familiar to anyone who's played WarioWare!

Fast facts:

Model Made by BuckleyTim (That's Me!)

New voicetable consisting of not-so-new Wario Land 4 / WarioWare GBA soundclips

Cap support included

Recolor-ability included:

  -Had to get a little tricky with the colors- PANTS changes Wario's vest and SHOES is ironically what changes the color of Wario's Pants. Shoes and Shirt are both handled by SHIRT. everything else is tied to what it should be.

Happy belated Warch 10th- I mean, March 10th!

cs-bowser-jr-moveset.36.title: [CS] Bowser (+Jr) Moveset
cs-bowser-jr-moveset.36.author: wibblus
cs-bowser-jr-moveset.36.description:
The King of the Koopas, and his son, playable!​
Includes a shell spin move (crouch+B, moving), fireball (crouch+B), and various other tweaks and animations!

This mod requires Character Select 1.9 or greater.

You can enable various attributes of the Bowser Moveset into your own [CS] characters with just a few extra lines of code! (refer to the README file in the download for more info)

[NOTE: The download for this mod contains multiple folders, and so, cannot be installed using drag and drop on the sm64coopdx window. Please navigate to the Appdata folder for coopdx and install through there.]

updates.title: v1.2: coopdx 1.0 update
updates.changelog:
this mod now 
requires 
Character Select to work, since it is now the standard for custom characters.​

this update is for full coopdx 1.0 compatibility, along with some extra updates that this mod was in need of.

Bowser and Jr both have palette presets.

Characters using the moveset are now able to have a custom shell-spin sound effect set for them.

Jr received a small model update. (he's only got one tooth!!)

a few bugfixes and Lots of code cleanup.

cs-britz-strudel.1014.title: [CS] Britz Strudel
cs-britz-strudel.1014.author: Asplatim
cs-britz-strudel.1014.description:
Britz 
is a boy from the 
Berman Empire
. He was separated from his family due to his father being outed as a spy and promptly executed. Since then, he's been forcefully made to be a child soldier in order to keep his persecuted mother and sister alive.
​
...well now hes in coop deluxe lol

The mod includes:

-Voices lines 

-Full model with custom caps

-Recolor options!

(Model made by 
@Asplatim
 on twitter and commisioned by Germed-Owls on discord!)

cs-bubsy.1101.title: [CS] Bubsy
cs-bubsy.1101.author: Randtastik.
cs-bubsy.1101.description:
The release of the Bubsy the Bobcat mod for Super Mario 64 Co-op Deluxe! A skinpack mod that replaces Mario.

MOD CONTAINS:

The main bobcat himself, Bubsy.

Appropriate voice clip pack from Bubsy 3D.

Recolorability.

Built-in recolors for his main outfit.

Torso wings.

Cap replacements.

2 alt. costumes; long sleeves and jacket.

HP icon replacement.

Life Icon replacement.

Character Select graffiti and compatibility.

A dual effort with Cherri (
https://x.com/chtxgt
) who helped with the coding side as well as figuring out where I may have screwed up and needed help on something.

Also Twitter and Bluesky links for the post.

		https://twitter.com/x/status/2022413945383063668

		https://bsky.app/profile/randtastik.bsky.social%2Fpost%2F3merfdb5z6k2e

updates.title: [CS] Bubsy 1.1 HOTFIX UPDATE.
updates.changelog:
Very minor update that fixes some errors Bubsy had, namely how;

He'd cause a constant, "Character Select has Script Errors" message to come up.

How sometimes upon being booted out of a level Mario's, "Mama Mia" sound effect would play.

Thank you all for enjoying this mod, and I hope you enjoy it further!

cs-cacee-kiwi-cactus.1042.title: [CS] Cacee "Kiwi" Cactus
cs-cacee-kiwi-cactus.1042.author: Gamebun
cs-cacee-kiwi-cactus.1042.description:
Note: If voicelines are not playing, you must be on 
Character Select v1.16.1
 or above!

"A feisty ex-bandita. A cactus-rabbit who packs a mean punch and is doing her best trying to give up her old ways by putting her old skills to better use, hopefully."

A commission for 
lightdasher
 and with permission to release publically! Comes with her voicelines taken from SRB2, by 
MoxyDi
, an alternate outfit that hides her arms as well as a fully customizable palette. Sadly, no custom moveset but perhaps an update in the future maybe.

cs-buckley-tims-poke-pack.189.title: [CS] Buckley Tim's Poké Pack
cs-buckley-tims-poke-pack.189.author: BuckleyTim
cs-buckley-tims-poke-pack.189.description:
Several Low-Poly Pokemon (Lucario, Zeraora, Cinderace, and Victini) for your Character Select roster. ONLY FOR CS v1.8 OR ABOVE

Features

Lucario:

- full recolor-ability

    -blue maps to Cap color

    -yellow maps to Shirt color

    -black maps to Pants color

    -white maps to Gloves color

   -yeah it's the smash ult voicelines lol

Zeraora:

- full recolor-ability

   -blue maps to Shirt color

   -yellow maps to Cap color

   -grey maps to Pants color

  -this time I've cribbed Yun's voicelines from Street Fighter IV lol

Victini:

  -orange fur maps to Cap color

  -yellow fur maps to Pants color

 -voicelines taken from Tat from Klonoa 2

 -sorry in advance if the voicelines are annoying

Cinderace:

-red fur is cap

-white fur is overalls/pants

-dark navy blue fur is shirt

-yellow fur is shoes

-voicelines this time are from Makoto from SFIV

-models are original ones made by me, Buckley Tim

Enjoy!

updates.title: Cinderace enters the field!
updates.changelog:
Been a while since I've updated this pack, hasn't it! I've been trying to add a new character for a while but got distracted by just about everything along the way (to say nothing of the mons I tried to add but weren't satisfied with). But hey, now I'm all ready to add Cinderace to the pack!

Some notes about Cinderace:

-red fur is cap

-white fur is overalls/pants

-dark navy blue fur is shirt

-yellow fur is shoes

-voicelines this time are from Makoto from SFIV, to match how I did Zeraora

-voicelines may be changed if I decide I don't like how they play out

Model done by me ofc, it was fun making this bunny as always.

And of course, thanks for over 7k downloads and 36k views! That's nuts, I'm glad people like this pack as much as I like making it!

updates.title: [v1.2] Victini Added!
updates.changelog:
Have a third Pokemon while I tinker away at other things. Victini will not necessarily bring you victory over that one kaizo romhack, but they provide great morale support!

Fast Facts about Victini:

- full recolor-ability

   -orange fur maps to Cap color

   -yellow fur maps to Pants color

- full voice-acting

  -voicelines taken from Tat from Klonoa 2

  -sorry in advance if the voicelines are annoying

and of course the low-poly victini model was made by me.

Also, I can't thank y'all enough for 2,300 downloads and nearly 10k views! I'm glad y'all enjoy my little pokemon models. Hopefully I can make a few more as long as I still keep up with coopdx modding.

updates.title: [v1.1] Zeraora Added!
updates.changelog:
Well, this mod's going from a standalone Lucario mod to a small pack of Pokemon models (and by small, I mean exactly 2 at the moment). This new update adds Zeraora, the Thunderclap Pokemon, to the mix. In addition, I've given Lucario and Zeraora preferred palettes so you can be their regular colors without effort.

Fast Facts about Zeraora:

- full recolor-ability

    -blue maps to Shirt color

    -yellow maps to Cap color

    -grey maps to Pants color

- full voice-acting

   -this time I've cribbed Yun's voicelines from Street Fighter IV lol

as always, the mario-64-proportioned Zeraora model was done by me.

Hope you enjoy this update that makes everything work with v1 of coopdx!

(also wow, 1k downloads on the first version of this? thanks a lot! glad you enjoy the 'cario.)

cs-brian-griffin.217.title: [CS] Brian Griffin
cs-brian-griffin.217.author: SuperKirbylover
cs-brian-griffin.217.description:
Holy crap, Lois, it's Brian Griffin! Playable in

!

Inspired by the

,
