Interested in seeing the source files? 
View them all on Github
!

updates.title: "OKEY DOKEY" + Code Update
updates.changelog:
Changelog:

Massively updated code

No longer supports backwards compatibility; previously did this due to a lack of an official mobile port, which now exists

Misused WIP code to replace Mario's name in game dialogue; this is removed

Added a new failsafe

If Character Select is outdated, it will warn the host

Added 
BrianOKEYDOKEY.ogg

Plays upon playing with Brian as your preferred character

updates.title: Dialogue replacement
updates.changelog:
Changelog:

Added dialogue replacement (i.e. Mario -> Brian)

Will show when 
dialog_set_replace_name("Luigi")
 ships

updates.title: 1.10 Compatability
updates.changelog:
Changelog:

Now compatible with Character Select v1.10 (still backwards compatible!!)

Palettes work again

Added credits via v1.10's credits menu

updates.title: World's Second Most Minor Fix
updates.changelog: Turns out, I forgot to edit the LUA file to include the new audio files. So uh, here's that to fix it.

updates.title: Missing sounds and bugfixes
updates.changelog:
Added:

CHAR_SOUND_UH2

CHAR_SOUND_UH2_2

Removed:

Torso Tilt on Metal Cap

Fixed:

Martini hand position

updates.title: Typo fix
updates.changelog:
i literally just made a typo in an audio file so i fixed that

BrianMAMMAMIA
 -> 
BrianMAMAMIA

cs-calamitas.1175.title: [CS] Calamitas
cs-calamitas.1175.author: Auguste
cs-calamitas.1175.description:
I have learned 3d modeling and animation just so I could add my favorite hyperfixation in this game.

Here's Calamitas, the current final boss of the Calamity mod for the hit video game Terraria.

You can press X to fire a projectile that destroys most stuff with an AoE

cs-canari.1019.title: [CS] Canari
cs-canari.1019.author: takkotito
cs-canari.1019.description:
Canari, the electric gamer from Pokémon Legends Z-A!

I felt like this was a good follow up for my Iono mod, for the moment this mod is gonna be a bit incomplete since we don't have any voice lines for the character to use, but I'll try to update it when and if we get some eventually.

She comes with custom caps, in this case it's her face mask, as well as recolorability.

Let me know if there's any problems or glitches with the mod!

cs-carl-wheezer-64.507.title: [CS] Carl Wheezer 64
cs-carl-wheezer-64.507.author: CornObjects
cs-carl-wheezer-64.507.description:
Carl Wheezer
, the biggest fan of Jimmy Neutron's mom in the entire universe and gobbler of unfinished croissants the world over, now infesting your copy of Mario 64 with friends and making terrible noises just like in the show. Nobody else seems to have done it yet, and I've always been a fan of bringing horrible things to life via blender, so here you go.

Comes with:

Custom voicelines of highly-variable compression and quality from 5 different Jimmy Neutron shovelware games

Palette support on his skin and hair under appropriate palette categories, facial decal is not amazing but I did my best

Llama life count icon for proper theming, Carl does love his llamas after all

Hat model is himself, to represent finally acquiring his long absent self-confidence and using it to rise above the challenges before him (and 
definitely not
 because I still have yet to find a fix for that, promise)

Carefully-named internal files to minimize the risk that you'll miss out on hearing Carl's beautiful voice because another CS mod shares filenames in its voice system

No script errors that I could find anywhere, after way too much trial-and-error figuring out why it was calling in the lua file for a custom health HUD that this mod doesn't have

Credits:

Garrulous64
 - 
This excellent tutorial video
 I used to make this from scratch by following it, along with the "Fast64 GART" plugin for blender and multiple different template resources linked in the video description. If you want to make your own CS mod, I strongly recommend taking a look at it and the linked resources, they help immensely.

TheVGResource
, specifically Models Resource and Sounds Resource - Model + Sounds

daneeklu
 on OpenGameArt - Pixel art llama sprite used for the lives icon

Emerald
 and 
Squishy
, on the coop mod discussion channel of the discord server - Tons of help with understanding and fixing bugs with the mod while I worked on it

My pal 
Steveski
 - Testing, troubleshooting and moral support

, specifically Models Resource and Sounds Resource - Model + Sounds

daneeklu
 on OpenGameArt - Pixel art llama sprite used for the lives icon

Emerald
 and 
Squishy
, on the coop mod discussion channel of the discord server - Tons of help with understanding and fixing bugs with the mod while I worked on it

My pal 
Steveski
 - Testing, troubleshooting and moral support

cs-catto-boi.1122.title: [CS] Catto Boi
cs-catto-boi.1122.author: KatelynGamingYT
cs-catto-boi.1122.description:
It's Catto Boi (By Mango-Ki) as a playable character in SM64 Coop DX!

So far V1 includes...

Catto Boi (The Cat Himself)

Custom Stars (Model Replace)

Custom Coins (Textures)

Custom Sounds (For Catto Boi)

1.5X Speed (A Touch Faster)

THIS MOD WILL REPLACE COINS AND STARS! IF YOU DON'T WANT THAT THEN REMOVE THE STAR GEO AND COIN FOLDER!

More for this is coming soon, so please keep an eye out!

Current Plans:

Custom(-ish) Moveset

Full Custom Sounds

GRAND FROZEN TUNA (Grand Star replacement.)

Localized 
EVERYTHING
 (This means the stars, the coins, their textures will only show if Catto is being played as, and it's local to the player.)

Max Lives Set (Cats have 9 lives right?)

Custom UI (C'mon, this should be obvious.)

That's all that is planned so far. Thank you all for downloading! And I hope you all will enjoy!

Credits:

Mango-Ki - Catto Boi (Character and Model)

CS Template - Squishy

Graffiti Code - Lightson

Star Model Template - Wall_E20

cs-christmas-select.451.description:
For the holiday season I decided to host a Character Select collab. Mlopsfunny, CT Himself, Melzinoff, Superclown, and I have come together to create some festive characters. Special thanks to PainterSeap and Pyronoid for their Voice Acting. Last but not least, Squishy6094 did made some Peppermint and Ornament coins to add a bit of holiday flair to the game.

Characters:

Whitey (By Trashcam)

Alvin The Munkshroom (By Mlopsfunny and PainterSeap)

Arthur (By CT Himself)

Snow King (Melzinoff and Pyronoid)

Grinch (Superclown)

Hhgregg (Superclown)

Hope you all enjoy and have a great holiday season!

I forget this site exists but I'll keep updating it here just incase. Honestly just check the gamebanana page for more info. For the recent update however:

All Hyakkaryourans and their swimsuits, Standing Himari, Swimsuit Izuna, Swimsuit Kanna, Swimsuit Fubuki, Hoshino (Armed), and Toki (Bunny) are playable

Fubuki, Mari (Base outfit), Reisa, Yukari, and Izuna has better rigging, moving halos, and a StarGet expression for the ones that didn't have it

School Category for CS

Alts can be loaded with commands on CS now

Characters are now loaded 100% Alphabetically regardless of what pack the character is in

cs-conker-banjo.375.title: [CS] Conker & Banjo
cs-conker-banjo.375.author: MiiMario64
cs-conker-banjo.375.description:
Conker and Banjo join Mario 64 Co-op deluxe!
​

In an exciting twist for retro gaming fans, Banjo and Conker are teaming up with Mario in the classic Super Mario 64 Co-op mod! This fan-made mod brings together three beloved gaming icons for an unforgettable multiplayer experience. Imagine exploring the iconic worlds of Peach's Castle with Banjo's strength and Conker's cheeky humor alongside Mario's timeless agility. Whether you're soaring through the skies or stomping Goombas, this crossover adds a fresh layer of fun to the game, blending platforming magic with nostalgic charm!

Credits:

Greenstranger500 - Helping with some of the code, doing some voice lines for conker, helping with audio.

MiiShadow64 - Everything Else

Trailer for mod: 

This was a commission if you want your own mod contact @MiiShadow64 on discord

Thanks everyone enjoy the mod!

cs-conan-edogawa.608.title: [CS] Conan Edogawa
cs-conan-edogawa.608.author: DavidHolandaOne
cs-conan-edogawa.608.description:
"Only one truth is revealed, the appearance of a child, the brains of an adult, I am the great Detective Conan!"

The protagonist of Detective Conan finally enters the world of Super Mario 64, ready to find the Black Organization who made him shrink to a child and get the antidote to come back to his teenage form.
​

Recolorable for shoes, shirt, pants, skin and bowtie (no hair for the time being).
​

Fully voiced, with voicelines from Puyo Puyo crossover and from the anime itself.
​

The victory pose is now his iconic pose of him pointing at the screen saying "There is always only one truth!".
​

Removable glasses (works as a cap).
​

Model made by 
DavidHolandaOne
.

Credits to 
Warioplier
 for managing to rig the model and import it to SM64CoopDX.

Detective Conan
 is a work by 
Gosho Aoyama
, and it's owned by 
Shogakukan
 and its production comittee.

​

cs-deltarune-ch4-secret-boss-moveset.758.title: [CS] Deltarune Ch4 Secret boss (+ Moveset!)
cs-deltarune-ch4-secret-boss-moveset.758.author: SwagSkeleton95
cs-deltarune-ch4-secret-boss-moveset.758.description:
Your browser is not able to display this video.

The secret boss from chapter 4 busts his way into Mario 64!

Originally just a model swap mod, coding help from Baconator2558 (
Youtube
) and 
@Kaktus64
 (
Bluesky
) with voice acting from Starwarrior64 (
Twitter
, 
Youtube
) it's become something a bit more than t
hat
.

THIS MOD FEATURES:

Full recolorability

Custom UI graphics

Bowser moveset compatibility (Shell slide)

Voice acting (Toggle between voice acted lines and game sounds!)

A brand new moveset integrating the TP bar mechanic from the original game

A tough-as-nails challenge mode that forces you to use your moveset against Bowser in a deadly game of tennis

Optional alternate skyboxes for the bowser levels

A small example mod to show how you can use the moveset's TP bar or rude buster in your own mod (Lancer approved!)

Be sure to check the mod menu to toggle most of these options!

MOVESET

While Gerson uses the standard moveset, using the Hammer Of Justice costume will give you access to a special moveset consisting of 4 new moves.

Hammer Spin: 
Press Z + A mid-air to bounce yourself into a powerful hammer spin! Great for movement, good for crushing enemies. Costs 6 TP to use.

Shell Groundpound: 
Performing a ground pound with enough TP will send two koopa shells from your sides! Good for taking out small groups of enemies. Costs 1 TP to use.

Dive Roll:
 Holding Z after a dive lets Gerson roll to keep his momentum and extend the slide.

Justice Buster: 
Press Z + B to unleash your most powerful attack: the mighty Justice Buster! This attack costs 33 TP to use, but is very powerful against most enemies. The projectile will home in on any nearby targets and swiftly strike them down. This move is necessary against Bowser in the challenge mode!

REQUIRES WIBBLUS' BOWSER MOVESET
 -
 Shell slide: 
Shell slide from the Bowser Moveset. Replaces the slide kick.

TP BAR

The moveset's main feature is the new TP bar, which is used to perform Gerson's special moves. TP is spent by using moveset moves, but can be regained by collecting coins, defeating enemies, collecting stars, swinging Bowser by the tail or entering new levels. Or, if you would prefer, the mod provides a (host-exclusive) option to regenerate TP automatically at a quick rate, allowing you to use your moves as much as you please.

LANCER

Huh- Lancer?

The mod comes with a small example mod featuring Lancer. Open it up to get an example of how to use this mod's TP bar and rude buster for your own characters! This will require the Gerson Boom mod as a dependency.

cs-cream-the-rabbit.282.title: [CS] Cream the Rabbit
cs-cream-the-rabbit.282.author: Gamebun
cs-cream-the-rabbit.282.description:
Note: If voicelines are not playing, you must be on 
Character Select v1.16.1
 or above!

Cream's birthday is all over but she still wants to have fun! Escaped from her own mod, she explores the vast worlds of CoopDX! I know there's been a few ports by others of this model (and I appreciate it) though I figure I get an official version from me, with some extra bits.

Comes with a customizable palette, new animations replacing the idle, sleep and running anims, custom sounds, health hud, life and star icon and new star model. As of v2.0, she now regains the ability to fly as well as bringing along several of her outfits from Cream 64! As of v3.0, Vanilla has joined the pack as a replacement for Peach! This also includes replacing the two Toads at the end with their chao, Cheese & Chocola!

Simply press (A) to fly out of any of the jumps, the side flips and wall kicks. You need to press (B) to fly out of a long jump and then press (A) to keep flying. This is built to allow players to still be able to do the BLJ if needed.

A companion mod, 
Cheese the Chao
, is also available!

Cream's outfits are also separated into four packs to not overwhelm players when there's suddenly 80+ outfits on her single slot. Simply place the main folder 
(char-select-cream)
 alongside any of the other pack folders in the 
mods
 folder to install the mod correctly.

If you simply just wanna play as Cream, you only need to worry about the main pack and can ignore the rest. The packs are:

Main: The Rabbit Herself

Contains her default design, remade to allow custom palettes!

Pack 1: Canon Outfits + a Few Extras

updates.title: New Cream outfit, various texture changes and menu music
updates.changelog:
Added new outfit: Squishy Cream, based on Squishy6094's avatar, as a huge thank you for helping us get the Cream API and then some updated for v1.16 of CS! She's available through pack 1 if you wish to select her!

Replaced the placeholder graffiti texture with a new custom one by Funkys0da! 

Custom letters and signature textures should now be working in latest Character Select version as of this update (v1.16.2) though they were already in previous update. 

Added CS menu music to go alongside the default, song is 
System Screen: Menu
 from Sonic Heroes.

updates.title: v1.16 compatability and then some
updates.changelog:
Now supported on latest builds of Character Select (huge thanks to Squishy6094 for the overhaul!)

If voicelines are not playing, make sure you're on v1.16.1!

This means all the packs are now under a single Cream icon, so you may want to enable fast select to find the outfit ya like.

This ALSO means that when you save your outfit, it'll remember which one ya picked last.

Added temporary graffiti image to CS Menu, will be updated later with a custom one

Added pose for CS Menu, based on her Advance 2 art as close as I could get it.

Added custom Peach and End Toad models (Princess Vanilla for Peach, Cheese and Chocola for the two Toads respectively)

Added custom textures for peach letter and signature (currently not working in CS v1.16.1, should be fixed in later version)

There will be a smaller update coming later to add a few new things. Just waiting till someone gets back from their trip.

updates.title: Various bugfixes, toggles, etc
updates.changelog:
Huge thank you once again to AloXado320 for the various code fixes and code additions. 

Fixed where you would die if you ever flew over quicksand

Fixed an issue where grabbing a ledge when flying would make Cream appear flying but in the ledge grab state

Fixed where flying after jumping out of water would cause camera issues when using the default cam (if it's still a little awkward, please let me know)

Fixed the models in Packs 2 through 4 in regards to the capless head model being visible when used with other mods such as OMM. The capless function has been removed for all the alts. 

- Default Cream model has also been updated to remove the unlit pupils and update the various textures to appear less blurry.

Added a toggle to locally disable flying for those who wish to not use it or to avoid conflict with other mods.

Per request, added a toggle to locally disable the new custom star model and revert back to the default star model. Note, this only changes the model, not the hud icon. 

- Both toggles can be found in the mod menu

updates.title: Fixed CS Bug with Debugging Info Enabled
updates.changelog: Title says it all.

updates.title: Flying, Outfits, the works!
updates.changelog:
Flying has been added from Super Cream 64! Should work basically the same as it did there. Controls will be listed in the main mod description.

Mod has been updated to support most of her outfits from Super Cream 64. The ones omitted were created specifically for friends, mutuals and streamers and don't wanna include them unless permitted. Full list will be posted in the description.

In addition, the outfits are also separated into packs to not clog up player's CS screens. The main folder will just contain normal Cream while the other four packs will contain the various outfits.

Updated all sound files to not be as loud as before.

Made the custom palette model a separate selection since it would break whenever the player would fly.

Added more unique animations for the star dance, exit painting and sleeping.

Face state will change as well with certain animations

Various other behind the scene code optimizations (thank you so much Aloxado320)

updates.title: Removed star_geo.bin
updates.changelog: Title says it all, in case people don't want the Red Star Ring forced in.

updates.title: Return of fluffy tail
updates.changelog:
Added proper texture to tail, actually shows up now.

Added additional credit for new cream voice clips.

updates.title: Fixed Description
updates.changelog: - Description no longer wraps off the window

updates.title: Reimported cream folder, cleaned up code
updates.changelog:
Reimported the cream folder so that it's actually cream_geo instead of mario_geo, won't keep remaking mario_gen.bin and repacing the mario model

Went back and renamed various things in-code for future proofing.

cs-dk-arcade-pack.383.title: [CS] DK Arcade Pack
cs-dk-arcade-pack.383.author: Brob2nd

updates.title: Small palette update!
updates.changelog:
Hi! A few days after the last update of this mod turned 1 year old, i decided to post a small update for this mod adding and improving some details here and there, with the main addition of new palettes for Jumpman and Stanley!

This version added 17 palettes for Jumpman and Stanley, which means the mod now has a total of 27 palettes (Specifically, Jumpman has 13 new palettes, with a total of 17 palettes and Stanley has 4 new palettes, with a total of 10), mostly being based on the many ports of the first Donkey Kong game from the arcades, this required some code optimization (and with that, i mean changing the way the palettes were added to be a lot easier and less annoying) in order to make this possible.

Also, character categorys and full support for 4:3 was added as well, so that's cool, i guess.

I hope everyone enjoys this small update!

updates.title: The Christmas Update!
updates.changelog:
Merry Christmas everyone!

To celebrate it, i decided to release a new version of the DK Arcade Pack, with improved features and models, and new little stuff!

Changelog:

Jumpman's main model got mutiples changes and fixes, such as:

Eyebrows & sideburns are now recoloreable thanks to TheGreatMario64!

Jumpman's metal state also got fixed, now it works as intended

The new, revamped alt system from Character Select version 1.11 got added as well, remplacing the old alt system.

Updated Credits from Character Select version 1.10 were added as well!

(the other 2 Jumpman models made by ThatGurlTilly will get changes and fixes in the future, if you were asking about that)

(the other 2 models made by ThatGurlTilly will get changes and fixes in the future as well!)

Not only that, both Jumpman and Stanley got new preset palettes thanks to Character's Select most recent version! 4 for Jumpman and 6 for Stanley, giving a total of 10 total preset palettes!  let's see if you get the references for them, more coming in the future!

Credits: AlexXRGames, ThatGurlTilly, BlueKazoo, TheGreatMario64, Squishy6094, ER1CK, and Brob2nd

I hope y'all enjoy this new update, Merry christmas!

cs-doki-doki-literature-club-characters..title: [CS] Doki Doki Literature Club Characters!
cs-doki-doki-literature-club-characters..author: GalacticalXenon
cs-doki-doki-literature-club-characters..description:
I'll get Natsuki done eventually, I promise.

If you find the voices too loud, download "QuieterVoices.zip" and drag its "sound" folder into "char-select-ddlc," replacing the mod's sounds with quieter versions. 

Adds 3 characters, Sayori, Monika, and Yuri, all voiced!

Sayori uses the voice of Nepgear from Hyperdimension Neptunia, Monika uses the voice of Kaede Akamatsu from Danaganronpa V3, and Yuri uses the voice of Tifa Lockhart from FF7 remake.

Made using the blender character template found on the coop-deluxe github page, plus the Character Select custom character template.

updates.title: Version 2!!!
updates.changelog:
-Added Yuri!! She uses the voice of Tifa from the FF7 remake, I feel it suits her decently well, and has plenty of voice lines to use.

-Heavily increased quality of all textures. If you prefer the more pixel art look of the older version, sorry about that...

- Added new voice lines to Monika. Her voice kinda sucked since Kaede had no attack noises or anything like that, so I added some lines from Ann from Persona 5, as she has the same voice actor. They mesh well together, and now she has lines that actually make sense for jumping and attacking.

-Added custom healthbar, I plan to make different per-doki ones later on (at least changing the color of the heart) Also, the health heart is like half a pixel misaligned?? Its using the same resolution as the original texture so i have no idea why its like that. I'll try to fix it later.

cs-doorway-divers-favchars.745.title: [CS] Doorway Divers (FavChars)
cs-doorway-divers-favchars.745.author: Fav
cs-doorway-divers-favchars.745.description:
Dummie, Frank, Huggert, and Panella have come to invade Super Mario 64!​
Who said modding in your OCs wasn't fun?
​

Dummie has two extra jumps he can use at (almost) any time! From your base jump, to side flips, to even long jumps! He even has a faster running speed!​

(Fun note: Wall kicks replenish your extra jumps!)

As a bonus, if you happen to have your wing cap on or activated the special triple jump, the last jump will change! Pull off some sick tricks with this!

As Frank, you can fly around by double jumping for a short amount of time before he gets tired. If you hold jump again while flying, Frank will burst upward, and hover back down until you let go of the button. Use the second jump to thrust yourself based on your directional input!​

Huggert's a lot slower than the rest, but makes up for it with his lower gravity. If you hold jump again after your first jump, Huggert will use the power of the stars to float upward, and slowly descend back down. Great for long falls downward!​

Panella's a lot stronger than the rest, capable of carrying objects easier, no matter the weight. If you ground pound and press A or B at the right time, Panella will either perform a Super Jump, or a Super Kick. Your directional input will influence where she'll go!​
​
I hope you enjoy this mod as much as I did making it!​

​
Credits:

Garrulous64
 
- 
Mario 64 Modding Tutorial Video

CoopDX team - Referenced code from the built-in 
Extra Characters mod
 to better understand how movesets are structured

Dummie 
- For being a good boy

​

updates.title: V2.1 - Cleanups, Colors, and Content
updates.changelog:
Hiya folks! I've been meaning to release this update to the mod for a while, even if its not as big. Oh, and happy new years!

Changed the mod's official name from FavChars to "Doorway Divers." Gone are the days of being unoriginal by having your username and then "Chars" afterwards LOL

Updated the in-game mod description

Updated Panella's main model due to missing certain details

Panella's slidekick is now slipperier, making her moveset's ability more useful

Added Panella's "Off the Clock" alternate outfit

Panella now has her own set of custom caps

Fixed Huggert's dropped caps not recoloring properly

In-Menu Character Select V1.16 credits support

Added a huge load of new palettes for each character! In total, there's roughly around 70 new palettes! Think you can guess what each one references? (Making them is fun, alright?)

updates.title: V2 - FAVCHARS
updates.changelog:
After a little while, the gang's all here!

​
This update features 3 newcomers to the pack, along with some tweaks to Dummie!

Added Frank​

Added Huggert​

Added Panella​

Added support for Character Select's 1.16 menu update (futureproofed!!)​

Added menu animations​

Added several new premade palettes​

Added character category​

Decreased Dummie's running speed a smidgen​

Polished Dummie's textures a bit​

Reworked Dummie's recolorability to be more accessible​

Gave Dummie a cookie for being a good boy​

​

cs-dry-bowser-bowser-moveset-compatible..title: [CS] Dry Bowser (Bowser Moveset Compatible!)
cs-dry-bowser-bowser-moveset-compatible..author: Garrulous64
cs-dry-bowser-bowser-moveset-compatible..description:
EDIT (v2): I've re-started the mod from scratch after getting some assistance from Melzinoff. Dry Bowser now has multiple parts to recolor, opens his mouth when spitting fireballs (but lacks wings as a result), has no more issues with his arms/animations, AND has a new Dead Eye texture.

Mod Includes:

Dry Bowser Skin (NSMB DS Model)

Recolor Support (Hair -> Hair, SKIN -> Stomach, SHIRT -> Shell, GLOVES -> Hands/Feet, EMBLEM -> Eyes, CAP -> Wristbands)

Custom Caps (Bowser's Minions! Paragoomba, Boo, and a Chain Chomp)

Bowser Moveset Support! (Shell Spin + Fireball | Enable Bowser/Bowser Jr. Moveset Mod to use | Credit to Wibblus)

Voice Pack (Bowser's Inside Story - Kennie James Voice)

Dead Eye Texture

updates.title: Fixed all issues & Increased Quality!
updates.changelog:
Thanks to Melzinoff's help and guidance, I've re-done Dry Bowser from scratch and fixed all his issues! He now doesn't have any weird arm problems, opens his mouth when spitting fireballs, removed the script error related to a missing sound file, added in Dead Eye Texture, and made it so each of his parts are now recolorable individually instead of all being in one slot (I genuinely just liked how that looked, but it's better this way for sure).

Still has Bowser Moveset compatibility (Shell Spin, Fireball, Heavy Stomp SFX - Credit to Wibblus)

I've also replaced the Metal Shell with a Chain Chomp instead as it looks much better than the shell model.

updates.title: The Model Update!
updates.changelog:
Hello! After a while, i've finally managed to release the other half of the last update from a couple of days ago, yipee!

This update adds really big changes related to Boshi's model; The model has been decompiled and revamped thanks to 
@WBmarioo
 !

With this, many needed additions and improvements were able to be made (like better recolorability, caps, eye states, etc.)

We worked very hard on this update, i hope everyone enjoys it!

updates.title: Hotfix.
updates.changelog: Hi, there was a small error with the EM version that showed a script error because of me forgetting to change the name of a file, and as a result, Boshi's model didn't show, sorry for that

updates.title: Really small update.
Another Moveset Update!
updates.changelog:
Hello! I've been working on this update for a while, and i was also planning on adding more stuff, but i couldn't for many reasons, that will come in version 1.5 though.

Anyways, this update adds many new stuff for Boshi's moveset! some of these additions include a Ground Pound Cancel and a Ground Pound Jump, buffs to Boshi's character stats (like speed or jump height, everything going to 0.95 now), and also being able to flutter jump after pretty much every jump action as possible now! that includes stuff like Wall Jumping, Jumping out of water or jumping while burning, etc!

I worked a lot on this update, so, enjoy it!

updates.title: The Moveset Update!
updates.changelog:
Hi, this new (and really big update) adds a new moveset to Boshi!

This moveset is the same moveset that Yoshi has in the Extra Characters mod, except Boshi has some changes compared to Yoshi and Mario's moveset!

Boshi has a slighty lower jump and he's slightly slower than Mario, but he has a also 6 frame longer flutter jump with a little more height than what Yoshi has, since well, Yoshi and Boshi are kind of a Mario/Wario situation, other changes were also made but the mentioned ones are the most revelant

Outside of that, credits were added to the mod!

Thanks to 
@xLuigiGamerx
 for the moveset!

updates.title: Little update with fixes and changes to Boshi's recolorability!
updates.changelog:
Hi, after almost one month of releasing the Boshi CS pack, I decided to release a little update that fixes and changes some things related to Boshi's recolorability!

Changelog:

Boshi's Teeth are now recoloreable, sharing recoloreability with the Gloves slot now.

Fixed Boshi's Metal recolorability being wrong, as Metal recolorability was shared with the Emblem slot, instead of the Cap slot.

cs-fazbear-64.325.title: [CS] Fazbear 64
cs-fazbear-64.325.author: SwagSkeleton95
cs-fazbear-64.325.description:
Fazbear 64​
Welcome to 
Freddy Fazbear's Pizza
 the Mushroom Kingdom, where fantasy and fun come to life!​

In a special crossover, Freddy Fazbear and his band have been invited to the Mushroom Kingdom to throw a big pizza party! (Oh, and William Afton is there) Unfortunately that dastardly King Koopa, angry that he wasn't invited, has taken all 120 pizza slices and scattered them throughout the painting worlds.

Now it's up to Freddy & friends to recover them all before they get cold, and show that big turtle what for!
​
FEATURES:

-7 new playable characters!​
-Freddy Fazbear (Comes with golden Freddy alt!)​
-Bonnie the Bunny (Comes with movie palette alt!
)
​
-Chica the Chicken (Comes with...No alts.)​
-Foxy the Pirate (Comes with unwithered alt!)​
-Endoskeleton​
-The puppet​
-Springtrap (Comes with Spring Bonnie alt!)​
-Custom graphics!​
-A custom, Fazbear-themed health meter​
-Custom star models in the form of pizza slices, dead stars and gift boxes (May be overriden by other mods)​
-A custom lives icon based on the unused lives mechanic from FNAF 1​
​

MORE TO COME:

In the future, I'm hoping to add:

-A custom story that replaces the dialogue in the game if you're playing as the band (Toggleable)​
-Edited stats for Foxy (And maybe the rest of the band? Toggleable)​
BUGS I'M AWARE OF:

-None!​

THE LATEST VERSION OF SQUISHY'S CHARACTER SELECT IS NEEDED TO USE THIS MOD!
​

updates.title: v0.4.5: A couple of fixes
updates.changelog:
A couple of model fixes.

Springtrap is now recolorable! All transparency issues (that I was aware of) have no been fixed as well.

updates.title: v0.4: The Puppet update!
updates.changelog:
The puppet joins the cast of Fazbear 64! For now, this is all the characters I want to add in the mod. The puppet comes with a staggering single custom sound and a custom star model in the form of a gift box!

This update also fixes some minor errors, and gives Springtrap his own custom star.

Enjoy!

updates.title: v0.3: The Springtrap update!
updates.changelog:
Everyone's favorite yellow (formerly) rabbit joins the mod! Freddy and friends aren't quite so thrilled to have him here, but he's here.

This update adds Springtrap, who comes with new sounds, a new life icon, and a Spring Bonnie alt. Note that while Spring Bonnie is recolorable, Springtrap isn't (yet). This'll come in a future update, hopefully.

This update also fixes some oversights from the previous update, namely a faulty error message, and Foxy's animations being applied universally.

Have fun!

updates.title: v0.2: The Foxy update!
updates.changelog:
He's a little bit late, but Foxy the Pirate joins the crew!

This update adds Foxy (I'm sure you guessed), who comes with an unwithered alt, new custom sounds, and a custom longjump animation based on his FNAF2 jumpscare.

But wait! A secret fifth character has joined! There is now also a bare endoskeleton to play as.

In other news, the future plans for the mod have expanded a little bit.

I'm hoping to give Foxy different stats from the rest in the future (buffed running speed and longjump distance, in particular), and another future update will be adding completely custom dialogue to the game, altering its plot to match the silly little pizza party synopsis from the modpage, exclusively if you're playing as Freddy or any of his friends.

Both of these will be toggleable.

Have fun!

cs-gabys-modding-frenzy.1109.title: [CS] Gaby's Modding Frenzy
cs-gabys-modding-frenzy.1109.author: Gabrimer
cs-gabys-modding-frenzy.1109.description:
Welcome aboard, to my Modding Frenzy!
​

This mod project involves the idea I had at the beginning of the year, which was to make a year-long inspired project, adding multiple different sets of characters into SM64COOPDX! The character selection that I'm making is mostly either OCs I've made, or other characters from my friend's games/projects.

That being said, I understand this modpack might not interest most people, but I figured I'd share my work here, as I am happy with what I've made! (and it'd be nice seeing other people play with these characters)

I'm releasing each modpack on a monthly basis, with each pack having a certain theme to it, either being characters from a certain game, or characters from a similar origin/story. I'll be posting whenever I release a month's pack on my socials, then updating this mod page to include that pack!

It's worth noting that some packs won't be included in this mod page, for reasons such as an OC's author not wanting public access to these character mods, or anything related to the sort.

With that out of the way, let me introduce you to our character selection!

---------- ---------- ---------- ---------- ----------

February - Aria Skies Character Pack​

This month's pack is none other than the fighters from 
Aria Skies
! As a way to celebrate the game's first anniversary, I decided to dedicate this month to the character pack.

Includes:​

7 new characters (with custom Character Select graffiti and music track)

Red

Erika

Feng

Starre

Khaed

Wolske

Bilksem

Unique costumes for each character based on their different color palettes from the original game!

March - Jam Character Pack​

For March, we have a selection of characters that originated from game jams! This volume includes characters from 
H.A.R. VEST
, 
Moon Munchies
, and 
Date Summons
.

Includes:​

5 new characters (with custom Character Select graffiti and music track)

Jason

Mipp

Lola

May

Manat

---------- ---------- ---------- ---------- ----------

So far, this project includes February and March's modpack (January was a private release between my friends and me), but as I mentioned previously, I'll be periodically adding new characters each month, so be on the lookout for that!

Link to Gaby's SM64COOP Modding Frenzy Playlist!

Credits:​
Gabrimer: Mod Creator, Character Modeller, CS Music Track Composer, Coder

Pokopish: Aria Skies Creator, Original Hat Modeller & Graffiti/Life Icon Artist

Squishy6094: Character Select Creator

Remember that this mod 
requires
 
Character Select
 for it to work!​

---------- ---------- ---------- ---------- ----------

cs-generic-soldier-odst-helldiver-cog-ge.title: [CS] Generic soldier [ ODST | HELLDIVER | COG GEAR ]
cs-generic-soldier-odst-helldiver-cog-ge.author: Ash-Must-Die
cs-generic-soldier-odst-helldiver-cog-ge.description:
There is a mission that needs completion in the mushroom kingdom, and who better to handle it than the faceless grunts that turn the tides of war on the daily? With the might of the ODST, the COG, and the HELLDIVERS, this operation will be complete in no time. 

Features:
 

Custom Voice lines

3 outfits to choose from

Recolorable 

Uses repurposed code from Alestar24's Shy Guy mod for costume swapping functionality.

Needs Character Select to function.

ThaGurlTilly
 - who was kind enough to help and give me the OK to port this to Character Select.

Happy Febu-scary! It's Ghostface!

This character model natively features custom color support. I merely ported the dynOS mod to the Character Select infrastructure and added my own custom-edited character sounds and icons.

As a big FunWorld costumes enthusiast, this character model was a must-have. This was originally for personal use but I figure others would enjoy too.

cs-godzilla-mothra.437.title: [CS] Godzilla & Mothra
cs-godzilla-mothra.437.author: Garrulous64
cs-godzilla-mothra.437.description:
The King and Queen of Monsters work together to strike fear into the heart of the Koopa King! This is a very experimental mod for me, tried out a lot of new ideas. Mothra is always on Godzilla's back and will grow wings when you get the wing cap. Godzilla will also transform into Mecha Godzilla when he gets the Metal Cap!

Mod Includes:

Godzilla & Mothra Skin (Godzilla Generations (Dreamcast)/Godzilla Ultimate Double Smash (DS) )

Custom Caps & Wings (Mothra/MechaGodzilla - Custom Model by 
Stevem37
)

Voice Pack (Various Godzilla sounds)

Recolor Support:

SKIN - Main Body 

HAIR - Scales

EMBLEM - Eyes

SHIRT - Mothra Body

GLOVES - Mothra Eyes

Mothra phases through Godzilla here and there, but overall I'm happy with how this one came out. Hope you guys enjoy it!

updates.title: CEL-HONK UPDATE!
updates.changelog:
The biggest and most important update for this mod is here. It took me months to upload it, but I hope you like it

​
in this update, I upgraded the lighting, including cel-shading styles, a key feature of the game

The music from the CS menu has also been included (only for Character Select 1.16 and later).

This has been the biggest update I've made to a mod on the site so far. I think this will be the last update for this mod

I hope you enjoy it
​

Tipo
pie+

Mod by:
 
Tails

​
Press

 to do a light attack then press
 A
 after a light attack to preform a heavy attack:

​
Press

cs-grey-man.546.title: [CS] Grey Man
cs-grey-man.546.author: CornObjects
cs-grey-man.546.description:
In the year 1998, a strange and unique little game named LSD: Dream Emulator came out on the PS1 only in Japan, based on a dream journal and the bizarre experiences chronicled within. Despite how locally-restricted its release was and how niche its focus, as well as frankly being clunky as all hell mechanically, it still ended up becoming a cult classic of sorts, including one particular rare entity found within gaining notoriety of its own; 

The Grey Man, one of the few truly-dangerous things you could come across on your dream journeys. One which ignored all obstacles to make its way forward slowly and menacingly, ending your dream instantly if you make contact. A total enigma, beyond the fact that it was as strange as it was scary.

Anyways, that's enough gaming history and mysteries, now you get to watch this spooky entity do sick jumps and fly around with wings on his hat while making funny noises. Plus, he's finally in a game with decent FPS and controls by default.

Features:

Complete custom palette recolorability, including a bonus when hat is removed

Full custom hat model set (including hat removal for vulture/monkey/OMM/etc.)

Custom lives icon, as is tradition

An entire set of sounds cut from SFX and audio snippets used in LSD itself, mainly the base audio clips that the strange randomized music in-game is built out of, so GM's "voice" is basically the music of the game in a sense

Integration with the "Character Movesets" mod, GM uses the Waluigi moveset and can double-jump, swim in the air by diving mid-air multiple times and takes extra damage from hits (can be changed easily with one simple edit in the main.lua file, the zip includes a readme with info on how)

Maybe some slight jank here and there (did my best to avoid it though)​

Credits:

TheVGResource
 - Models, Textures and Audio

"LSD Dreamy Texture Pack" by 
BTL Games
 on itch.io - The image used for the lives icon, specifically "8.png" from the "faces" folder, downscaled to 64x from 1024x original

I'mYourCat
 on the CoopDX discord server - Helping me fix yet another annoying metal material bug that was preventing export in blender, by taking a look at my blend file and telling me what workaround I needed to do to fix it

cs-gwain-warriors-64.598.title: [CS] Gwain Warriors 64
cs-gwain-warriors-64.598.author: jonathanoflebones
cs-gwain-warriors-64.598.description:
Release Trailer:

Alternate Download Link: 
CLICK HERE

You need the latest version of Character Select for the mod to work, Click This Text to go to the Download page.

I've been working on this project for a little while, and it's finally ready...

You can now play as Geo and the rest of the Gwain Saga cast in SM64 Coop Deluxe!

Gwain Warriors 64 is a Character Select mod that brings 9 characters from the Gwain Saga series to the game. With a few extra additions such as:

-Alternate costumes for each character!

-Various Texture Replacements Fitting to the Show

-A Noobe WiddlePet!

Download Noobe Here: 
MOD LINK

-And a few other additions! (that's about it)

CREDITS:

B. Bones Johnson
 - Mod Idea, Modelling

Phantalón Gilimbecil
 
- Owner of GSFD, Release Trailer

Sonac
 
-
 
Promotional Art, Icon Textures

Vyndelaa
 
- 
Character Face Textures

Dankira 
- 
Remix Outfit Designs

SleepyAnger
 
- Character Descriptions
​
Gwain Saga is a webseries created by GeoExe, this mod couldn't have happened without it. So make sure you check it out in the link below!

Link to Geo's YouTube Channel

And that's all I have to say for now, here's a few extra images that were taken while making this mod.

Have fun!

as the title says, fixed bugs that were causing script errors with newer coopdx versions, and cleaned up code for playing audio samples, animations, and object grabbing!

also, her character description has been modified to align with the release of Silksong!

cs-hell-inspectors-custom-character-pack.title: [CS] Hell Inspector's Custom Character Pack
cs-hell-inspectors-custom-character-pack.author: Hell Inspector
cs-hell-inspectors-custom-character-pack.description:
A character pack that's taken me awhile to actually release, all of these models I made months ago but I finally got the incentive to release this after I made the Eustace rig.

Bringing in characters from numerous franchises such as Wallace & Gromit, SpongeBob, Chicken Run and others for a strange model pack

Full Character List

Wallace (Wallace & Gromit)

Gromit (Wallace & Gromit)

Ginger (Chicken Run)

Rocky (Chicken Run)

Mr. Tweedy (Chicken Run)

SpongeBob SquarePants (SpongeBob SquarePants)

Patrick Star (SpongeBob SquarePants)

Squidward Tentacles (SpongeBob SquarePants)

Mr. Krabs (SpongeBob SquarePants)

Eustace Bagge (Courage the Cowardly Dog)

Hank Hill (King of the Hill)

Homer Simpson (The Simpsons)

Hugh Neutron (Jimmy Neutron)

Rabbid (bwah)

Woody (Toy Story)

New to v1.5

Courage (Courage the Cowardly Dog)

Seymour Skinner (The Simpsons)

Superintendent Chalmers (The Simpsons)

EDIT 8/8/24: I am gonna try to work on adding voice clips to certain characters, an older version of the pack did have voices but I couldn't figure that out then so I'll be sure to get that working soon

updates.title: [CS] Hell Inspector's Custom Character Pack (The Voice Update)
updates.changelog:
Quite a few of the characters now have voices!

Voice List

Wallace

Rocky

Eustace Bagge

Homer Simpson

Hugh Neutron 

Rabbid (voicelines by Contendo and Murioz, special thanks to them!)

Woody

And with the new voices comes three newcomers, the new characters are

Courage (Courage the Cowardly Dog) [with voice!]

Seymour Skinner (The Simpsons)

Superintendent Chalmers (The Simpsons)

cs-il-piantissimo.583.title: [CS] Il Piantissimo
cs-il-piantissimo.583.author: Garrulous64
cs-il-piantissimo.583.description:
Il Piantissimo, Delfino Plaza's 
Dashing 
Denizen arrives in Super Mario 64 Co-op Deluxe! I was inspired to add ol' Monteman to the game after seeing him playable in 
Super Mario Eclipse
! Since he's so similar to Mario, thankfully a lot of Mario's mesh was usable to bring him to life here.

Mod Includes:

Il Piantissimo Skin (Mario 64/Sunshine model edited by me)

Easter Egg when losing Cap (For Zelda Fans)

Custom Caps

Voice Pack

Recolor Support

cs-in-stars-and-time-character-pack.218.title: [CS] In Stars and Time Character Pack
cs-in-stars-and-time-character-pack.218.author: NumberOneJenny
cs-in-stars-and-time-character-pack.218.description:
The 
Character Select mod
 is required to make this pack work!

Starring the six main characters of the beautifully crafted timeloop focused RPG by insertdisc5, In Stars and Time!​

Included in this pack:

Siffrin

Mirabelle

Isabeau

Odile

Boniface (Bonnie)

Loop

Also includes custom caps for MOST of the characters! (except Isabeau, LITERALLY couldn't think of anything for him,  sorry 
 )

Does not include custom sounds, custom stars or customizable palettes.

cs-jack-black-steve.677.title: [CS] Jack Black Steve
cs-jack-black-steve.677.author: VioletSM64
cs-jack-black-steve.677.description:
Welcome to the Overwor-, wait a second... this isn't the Overworld!

Steve from the movie "A Minecraft Movie" is now playable in SM64 Coop Deluxe, play as one of the greatest actors, Jack Black, in this fun little joke mod. 
(yes i do know April Fools day was a few days ago, just go along with it...)

(Steve does not have a Custom Animation for ground pounding, the 2nd image included a 
seperate mod by kaktus
)

What the mod includes:

Custom Wings (Elytra Wingsuit)

Recolorability

Voicelines from the Minecraft Movie Trailers/Clips

STEVE

"CHICKEN JOCKEY!"

cs-jaidenanimations-and-alpharad.294.title: [CS] JaidenAnimations and Alpharad
cs-jaidenanimations-and-alpharad.294.author: VioletSM64
cs-jaidenanimations-and-alpharad.294.description:
In this Modpack you will be able to play as the awesome Youtubers, JaidenAnimations and Alpharad!

Their designs are based on their Youtube channels, Jaiden's being her avatar in her Storytime Animated videos and Alpharad is based on his PFP and his video thumbnails!

No voicelines are included in this mod, however if someone would like to help me add some that would be cool to add in a future update ^^

Please note that this pack contains 2 characters, in the future there might be a chance to add more content creators in here so if any content creators would like to see themself transform into a cute little guy then feel free to ask!

Have fun :]

cs-jenny-wakeman-my-life-as-a-teenage-ro.title: [CS] Jenny Wakeman (My Life as a Teenage Robot)
cs-jenny-wakeman-my-life-as-a-teenage-ro.author: TheEnderDwonk
cs-jenny-wakeman-my-life-as-a-teenage-ro.description:
A mod that adds Jenny (XJ-9) from My Life as a Teenage Robot as a character via the Character Select mod for SM64 COOP DX.

Comes with a voice mod, custom icon, and unique wing cap model.

The model was created by me.

The voice lines come from the Nickelodeon All Star Brawl and Nickelodeon Kart Racers series of games, performed by Janice Kawaye.

Special thanks to CO-OP central Discord user Warioplier for helping me troubleshoot the mod, and to the contributors of the Character Select templates Github repo.

Gameplay of the custom wing cap in action:
tags: my life as a teenage robot

cs-kagamine-twins.885.title: [CS] Kagamine Twins
cs-kagamine-twins.885.author: VioletSM64
cs-kagamine-twins.885.description:
The Star Twins have arrived in the Mushroom Kingdom!
​

You can now play as Kagamine Len and Kagamine Rin in this fun Vocaloid Pack! Packed with Voicelines from Kagamine Len and Rin themselves! (PLUS Recolorability and Custom Caps!)

Please note that features from the Triple Baka Pack such as Dynamic Eyes, Custom Music, and etc. are not included in this modpack.

You must have the latest version of Character Select and SM64 Coop Deluxe in order to play this mod!

Mod by: Violet

Voicelines by: Chalz​

updates.title: Junio Sonic Name Change & Custom Power Meter
updates.changelog:
I've changed the name of the mod to reflect the actual studio behind the Sonic CD cutscenes. I called the mod Toei Sonic originally because that's what the model on Models Resource was called.

Also added a Custom Power Meter!

cs-kakkoi-elbertson.770.title: [CS] Kakkoi Elbertson
cs-kakkoi-elbertson.770.author: The Memelord
cs-kakkoi-elbertson.770.description:
HEY, PAISANOS!
 

Ever wanted to play as that one mafia gal from 
Gensokyo Odyssey
 in Super Mario 64?

No?

Then I guess this isn't the mod for you then... BUT, if you are, then look no further than the 
Kakkoi Elbertson mod!

(You will need the character select mod in order for this work, chucklenuts! It's also worth mentioning that this mod includes voicelines with curse words, so if you can't handle curse words lightly or you don't want your parents to listen on your gaming session with Kakkoi, then this mod isn't for you after all.)

The mod includes:

-Custom model of Kakkoi Elbertson from the hit game Gensokyo Odyssey (duh)

-Custom voicelines and sounds provided by Kronington, Abder Fumo, and VA RagingAngel (As per her request, RagingAngel asked me to put a link to her X [formerly Twitter] account here: 
https://x.com/RagingAngelhaha?t=TNHXgfUwmOONvwZwhlVJvw&s=09
)

-Custom models for the normal, wing, and metal cap (Sorry vanish cap lovers. Will roll out an update that includes a custom model for the vanish cap in the future.)

The full credits to the mod can be found inside the mod folder. It is a text file named "Credits.txt"

Enjoy murdering bowser's goons and 
abusing 
 playing Kakkoi Elbertson in SM64!

Also, here's a roadmap of what I plan to do with this mod in the future:

-Fixing up any broken animations or issues

-Change the color palette of Kakkoi like most other character mods do

-Polish up the model if necessary

-Add a custom health bar

-Give Kakkoi a new moveset relating to her gun and the coins you collect in the game

-Custom animations maybe?

-Release alternate skins for Kakkoi, such as an Inu variant!

If you would like to help with the development of these future updates and you have experience in doing so, let me know in the comments and I'll get back to you when I can!

Thank you and enjoy the mod!

Mods featured in the trailer:

King's Devtools 
by king the memer
 
(It's not actually shown in the trailer, but I used it to get on top of the castle. Still worth mentioning, as it's the perfect mod to test out your own mods or to mess around!)

Day Night Cycle 
by AgentX

Music used in the trailer:

Gensokyo Odyssey OST -49 Bullet You Can't Refuse 
by Kronington
​
​

updates.title: Palette fixes
updates.changelog: -Fixed some issues with palettes not working as intended.

updates.title: Colorful Mob Update!
updates.changelog:
This update contains the following changes and additions:

-Added a couple of new voicelines to Kakkoi (Credits to VA RagingAngel for lending me her voice. Her twitter can be found in the Credits text inside the mod folder)

-Polished up the model a bit so the model looks more clean.

-You can now change the color palette of Kakkoi! You can change the color of the following body parts (and accessories):

*PANTS: Jean pants

*SHIRT: Coat

*GLOVES: Leaves on hat and coat

*SHOES: Shoes

*HAIR: Hair

*SKIN: Skin color

*CAP: Hat

(A video demo of how to change the preset palette can be found below)

Enjoy coloring your Kakkoi!

cs-kazuma-kiryu-fan-update.519.title: [CS] Kazuma Kiryu: Fan Update
cs-kazuma-kiryu-fan-update.519.author: ThaGurlTIlly
cs-kazuma-kiryu-fan-update.519.description:
"Come at me if you want to die!"​

A fan update of the original 
Kazuma Kiryu mod
 made by 
Mediocre Metastasis

all credits for the original mod, including the wonderful custom moveset, and thanks go to them for allowing me the permission to post this update that I made!

check our their 
Goro Majima mod
 they just released!

What's in this fan update anyway?

well I'm glad you asked! not only is the normal character model slightly improved
 
(color edits, backface culling issues fixed, improved alternate hands.)

but it also includes 
brand new costumes 
based on other games in the series! you can now play as Yakuza 0 Kiryu, Joryu from Like A Dragon: Gaiden, as well as Taichi Suzuki from Like A Dragon: Infinite Wealth!

The moveset from the original mod is retained in its entirety, including the boss fight changes! 
(as far as I know)

I hope you like it! and once again thanks to Mediocre Metastasis for permission to release this mod!
​

cs-kiki-animal-crossing.498.title: [CS] Kiki (Animal Crossing)
cs-kiki-animal-crossing.498.author: Aso-Designer
cs-kiki-animal-crossing.498.description:
A normal cat villager from Animal Crossing, (one of my personal favorites) a black cat who loves books and is a great friend too!

Kiki's assets for the head and tail are from Animal Crossing Pocket Camp, and the rest of the model is native from Mario 64. Voice clips are from Isabelle in Mario Kart 8, but does fits because the voice of certain category of female villagers are similar. 

Minor issue is the character floating, but I'll fix this in a future update.

King Dedede is BACK, and this time he's brought friends! Please welcome, Kirby, Bandana Waddle Dee, Meta Knight, Adeleine, Susie, Marx, Taranza, Magolor, Daroach, Chef Kawasaki, Knuckle Joe, Bonkers, Tac, Rocky, AND Escargoon!

updates.title: DREAM BIG! (HUGE UPDATE!)
updates.changelog:
King Dedede's Dream Friends now has 16 playable characters! New to this update we have, Daroach (Kirby Squeak Squad), Escargoon (Kirby Right Back At Ya), Knuckle Joe, Magolor (Kirby's Return to Dream Land), Bonkers, Tac, and Rocky!

More character specific Voice Clips have been added as well to characters like Chef Kawasaki (Who now has his anime voice, like King Dedede and Escargoon).

updates.title: Taranza & Chef Kawasaki!
updates.changelog: Two new friends are here! Someone requested Taranza and Magolor (Still working on Magolor), and I realized I could edit this Chef Kawasaki model to fit the game a bit better. More Dream Friends on the way soon!

updates.title: King Dedede's Dream Friends!
updates.changelog:
King Dedede called in backup! New to the mod, play as Kirby, Bandana Waddle Dee, Meta Knight, Adeleine, Susie Haltmann, and Marx! All come with a sound pack, custom caps, recolorability, and most have blinking/death eye textures!

(I've also left the original stand-alone Dedede mod up for download alongside the new pack)

updates.changelog: Masked Dedede replaces the Metal Cap, and the King is now recolorable!

cs-kirby-deluxe.1126.title: [CS] Kirby Deluxe!
cs-kirby-deluxe.1126.author: funkymonkeyjay
cs-kirby-deluxe.1126.description:
DISCLAIMER
​
This mod will only work if you have the 
Character Select
 (v1.16 onwards, preferably v1.16.3)
 mod enabled + 
the current version of SM64 Co-op DX
 (v1.4 onwards, preferably v1.4.1)
.

Character Select [Squishy6094]

Play as the pink puffball warrior in SM64 Co-op DX with a moveset directly inspired by 
Kirby and the Forgotten Land (2022)
, made to fit within Kirby's N64 era!​

This mod features:

Copy abilities in the form of the base game's power-ups, with Copy Ability Essences replacing the cap models!

Custom objects for the Air and Star bullets!

"Normal" and "Classic" costumes!

A host-only configuration that allows Kirby to puff up infinitely, perfect for ROM-hacks!

An API that allows modders to add objects for Kirby to inhale through LUA functions!

 
Enjoy my work? Follow my socials! — 
Bluesky
 | 
YouTube
 | 
Bluesky (Gamedev)
 | 
YouTube (Gamedev) 
​
CONTROLS
​

BUTTON
ACTION
[ A ] 
(MIDAIR)
Hover 
(Lasts temporarily, but can be configured by the host to last forever, suited for ROM-hacks)
[ B ]
Inhale
[ Z ] + [ B ]
Slide Kick
[ Z ] + [ CONTROL STICK ]
Dodge
[ L ]
Wave Hello

INHALE API
​
To hook a custom object for Kirby to inhale, or if you want to edit an existing object, you first need to have its behavior ID, once you've obtained it, you can proceed with adding these functions:

_G.kirbyInhaleHookBehavior
​
Allows the modder to hook a custom behavior for Kirby to inhale.

FIELD
TYPE
NOTES
id
integer (BehaviorID)
Behavior ID of the object to inhale.
canRotate
bool / function
Check to see if an object can rotate as its being inhaled, default is 
true
.
canEat
bool / function
Check to see if an object can be removed once it reaches Kirby's mouth, default is 
true
.
allowSuckFunc
bool / function
Special checks for special objects
 (I.E. Koopa the Quick)
, set 
false
 to stop the inhale, default is 
true
.
deleteOnDetect
bool
Deletes an object if it's within Kirby's inhale range, default is 
false
, set 
true
 to activate.
onEatFunc
function?
Special function that activates once the object's been deleted 
(I.E. add to Big Bully #2's condition once a bully has been eaten)
, default is 
nil
.

_G.kirbyInhaleEditBehavior
​
Allows the modder to edit an existing behavior for Kirby to inhale.

FIELD
TYPE
NOTES
id
integer (BehaviorID)
Behavior ID of the object to inhale.
canRotate
bool? / function?
Check to see if an object can rotate as its being inhaled, can be ignored.
canEat
bool? / function?
Check to see if an object can be removed once it reaches Kirby's mouth, can be ignored.
allowSuckFunc
bool? / function?
Special checks for special objects 
(I.E. Koopa the Quick)
, can be ignored.
deleteOnDetect
bool?
Deletes an object if it's within Kirby's inhale range, can be ignored.
onEatFunc
function?
Special function that activates once the object's been deleted 
(I.E. add to Big Bully #2's condition once a bully has been eaten)
, can be ignored.

SPECIAL THANKS
​

@Squishy6094
 — 
Testing, Suggestions, Additional Help

@EmilyEmmi
 — 
Help with Footstep Sounds

@Cooliokid 956
 — 
Help with Inhale Vortex Orientation

Various Testers — 
@charity
, "Honii", "Jerik", "Charlotte Lottie Lotte the III", 
@Syning
, 
@Kristall
, 
@Morishiko
, 
@Jekino
, 
@Kaktus64
, "the_silly :3", "trainyoy", 
@CristobalElMario
, "Carlson"... 
(LMK if I missed anyone else that participated in the testing sessions!)

updates.title: [CS] Kirby Deluxe v1.2.1
updates.changelog:
HOTFIX​

Kicking Kirby in multiplayer no longer sends them flying far.

updates.title: [CS] Kirby Deluxe v1.2
updates.changelog:
FIXED BUGS/ADDITIONS​

Star Bullets no longer hurt the player that shot it in the first place.

Star Bullets can now collide with other players similarly to how they collide with enemies.

Star Bullets can no longer be pushed around by pushable actors.

Proper version checking.

updates.title: [CS] Kirby Deluxe v1.1.1
updates.changelog:
HOTFIX​

Fixed Water Jump action making you go unusually fast.

updates.title: [CS] Kirby Deluxe v1.1
updates.changelog:
FIXED BUGS/ADDITIONS​

Kirby has been sped up by 20%.

Wall bonking has been removed.

Shocked animation received their respective expressions.

You can now dodge during the Crouch Slide action.

You can now return to a hover after launching an Air Bullet.

Kirby sounds no longer play while paused or on [CS] screen.

Kirby can puff out when landing on the ground after getting tired of hovering.

Inhale sound is now a sample instead of a stream.

Star Bullets no longer stop on ledges, a failsafe has been implemented just in case.

Inhale action no longer makes you invulnerable.

KNOWN ISSUES TO SOLVE​

Crashes occurring, suspected to be related to the hover action, not sure exactly.

Actions not working, for whatever reason. 
(For now, make sure that your SM64 Co-op DX/Character Select versions are v1.4.1 and v1.16.3 respectively, or above)

cs-kos-mos.1056.title: [CS] Kos-Mos
cs-kos-mos.1056.author: Asplatim
cs-kos-mos.1056.description:
KOS-MOS is a character from the Xenosaga/Xenoblade series.​
She is an armored android combat weapon with an artificial intelligence. Her design is based on the KOS-MOS's Version 1 model from Xenosaga Episode I: Der Wille zur Macht; both the original and redesign are by Kunihiko Tanaka.
​
Kos-mos is from the very first game Monolith Soft ever developed back in 2002 called Xenosaga. This is the game that established the entire Xeno series for the company and is what made Kos-mos the face of the series and the mascot of Monolith Soft.
​
The purpose of this mod is to help spread awareness of both Xenosaga and Xenoblade by introducing people to Kos-mos and hopefully getting people interested in the Xenoblade series.
​

cs-kuribo-challenge-64.285.title: [CS] Kuribo Challenge 64!
cs-kuribo-challenge-64.285.author: PakPecik
cs-kuribo-challenge-64.285.description:
Give yourself a little challenge and collect as many stars as you can by hopping around as a Goomba in his Iconic Green Shoe from Super Mario Bros 3!​

HOP into the action by literally HOP into the action! (Walking is no longer possible)​

The shoe's flat surface prevents you from drowning into the quicksand (Just try not to move more often)​

Higher triple jump, but lower normal jump​

Trouble when flying? there's a new way to do it: While performing Super Dropkick with the wing "cap", quickly press the A button to activate the wings on your back. You can also do this over and over again in the air as long as you got the wing cap​

Speaking of cap, you won't find some anytime soon, we're replaced them with TOTALLY NOT DEAD Goombas....​

You're immune to spinies now. Cause why not?​

Requires character select to play​

You may or may not drown faster with the use of the shoe in water​

Key of the moveset (GROUND POUND!):​

A new way to triple jump: When landing from a ground pound, press the A button to perform the higher triple jump

Super Dropkick: When ground pounding in the air, press the B button to perform a dropkick with a very HORIZONTAL directions, you can also do it when landing from a ground pound

Super Jump Kick: When ground pounding in the air, press the A button to perform a jump kick with a more higher range. Useful if you need a little boost upwards

If you think the distance of your dropkick is a little too far, just stop it with a ground pound. You can also ground pound in situations like jumping from a top of the pole or a little rising surfaces

Download the mod and receive yourself the Iconic Replica of the Green Shoe and  a TOTALLY REPLICA of the TOTALLY NOT DEAD Goomba with wings! ....Please?​

A CONTROLLER IS REQUIRED FOR MUCH SMOOTHER GAMEPLAY OF CHARACTER!​
THIS MOD REQUIRES CHARACTER SELECT MOD V1.11.2 AND ABOVE

Special Thanks to Melzinoff for the Goomba voicelines and the rest of SM64COOPDX Modding Community for helping me with Coding Materials!
​
​
All jokes aside, this is the first mod that i ever made and i'm looking forward to hear your opinions about the mod, how can i upgrade it,  the problems you encountered, and etc.
​
​
Therefore, feel free to contact me on the SM64COOPDX discord if you had any of these thoughts above
​
​
Last but not least, thank you for downloading my mod and Have Fun!
​
- PakPecik

cs-madeline.1177.title: [CS] Madeline
cs-madeline.1177.author: VioletSM64
cs-madeline.1177.description:
Madeline has climbed so many mountains she reached the Mushroom Kingdom...

Help her overcome her own insecurities and defeat Bowser who stole all of her strawberries (and the stars)!

Play as 
Madeline
, the young Canadian miss who loves to overcome challenges. Always ready for some most likely deadly platforming.

Or... play as 
Badeline
, the dark alter ego of Madeline. She is there to bring pain and torment to... herself?

This mod is complete with a brand new moveset based on the videogame 
Celeste, 
with all new controls that can change the usual Mario 64 experience!

CONTROLS:

DASH:

Press B to dash in the joystick's direction, you will go slightly up when dashing in midair.

Hold A or U-DPAD while dashing for an upward angle.

Hold Z or D-DPAD while dashing for a downward angle.

Hold no direction to dash straight forward, up, or down.

You can jump or kick from a grounded dash. Fly with the wing cap by crouching, then dash jumping.

You can jump or kick from a grounded dash, and dive from a midair dash.

Dashes will also automatically grab objects

CLIMBING:

Hold B to grab walls and hold towards it to climb up

Climb down by holding away and press A to jump up.

TIP: Jumping or climbing up uses more stamina than climbing sideways/down

Type /cel_controls if you need to see what the controls are for the Celeste Moveset

For advanced techniques, see the Celeste Wiki.

Mod also includes custom palettes for Madeline and Badeline based on some of their past adventures!

CREDITS:

VioletSM64: Pack Creator / Models

EmilyEmmi: Celeste Moveset Code

MelissaMekrose: Madeline/Badeline VA

Crystalika: Strawberry Model

Play as 
Madeline
, the young Canadian miss who loves to overcome challenges. Always ready for some most likely deadly platforming.

Or... play as 
Badeline
, the dark alter ego of Madeline. She is there to bring pain and torment to... herself?

This mod is complete with a brand new moveset based on the videogame 
Celeste, 
with all new controls that can change the usual Mario 64 experience!

CONTROLS:

DASH:

Press B to dash in the joystick's direction, you will go slightly up when dashing in midair.

Hold A or U-DPAD while dashing for an upward angle.

Hold Z or D-DPAD while dashing for a downward angle.

Hold no direction to dash straight forward, up, or down.

You can jump or kick from a grounded dash. Fly with the wing cap by crouching, then dash jumping.

You can jump or kick from a grounded dash, and dive from a midair dash.

Dashes will also automatically grab objects

CLIMBING:

Hold B to grab walls and hold towards it to climb up

Climb down by holding away and press A to jump up.

TIP: Jumping or climbing up uses more stamina than climbing sideways/down

Type /cel_controls if you need to see what the controls are for the Celeste Moveset

For advanced techniques, see the Celeste Wiki.

Mod also includes custom palettes for Madeline and Badeline based on some of their past adventures!

CREDITS:

VioletSM64: Pack Creator / Models

EmilyEmmi: Celeste Moveset Code

MelissaMekrose: Madeline/Badeline VA

Crystalika: Strawberry Model

cs-majid.785.title: [CS] Majid
cs-majid.785.author: Roy3314
cs-majid.785.description:
Have you ever wanted to play as MY OC? No? That's an expected response but too bad cuz

Majid is now in Coop DX as a Character Select mod!

Featuring a model made by XLuigiGamerX (thank you bud)

Majid is here and with tons of features,including :

Voice acting for the fella.

Custom caps, wearing the same blue cap everyday has never looked this good !

Custom Health Meter, Very well drawn !

And a custom moveset ! (Requires 
Easy Custom Moveset
) Here are his moves!

Side Twirl: Instead of side flipping normally, Majid starts spinning around at high speeds ! You can go down faster by holding Z

Triple Long Jump: Pressing (or holding) A after a long jump will make you do a triple jump with more speed than usual!

Ground Pound Dive: Pressing B while doing a ground pound will make you dive​

I hope you have fun with my silly mod, big thanks to everyone who helped​

cs-marlow.808.title: [CS] Marlow
cs-marlow.808.author: Micro
cs-marlow.808.description:
haha, super marlow 64

Marlow, (also referred to as "Marloon") Heard that Princess Peach was making a cake, And of course assumed that cake instantly equals a party, And what's a party without balloons?

I'm not sure she can even eat, So why would she care so much about the cake?

(This mod is also compatible with GustavoSasaki's Easy Custom Movesets)

CREDITS:

Micro (Me): The 3d model used for the mod, as well as the "voice clips"

angelicmiracles: The "disable torso tilt" lua, since without it, Due to how the model was made, Causes the torso to disjoint.

I Hope you enjoy the mod!

cs-martlet.651.title: [CS] Martlet
cs-martlet.651.author: Micharus
cs-martlet.651.description:
Snowdin's former Royal Guard, reporting in.

Or sleeping in.

One of the two.

Martlet from Undertale Yellow is now playable in SM64 COOPDX!
​
This character mod includes:
​

Recolorability!

Custom voice lines by Ciozio!

Custom Cap in the form of the Royal Guard Guidebook!

Custom Lives and Stars icons, Power Meter, and Celebration Star!

Custom animations!

Custom moveset!

The odd feeling that she fits into this game a little TOO well!

Think about it!

And maybe more to come...?

Moveset Details
​

The power of flight! Martlet can fly without the need of a Wing Cap by pressing A in midair during a Triple Jump (or, of course, by using a cannon), but watch your Stamina Meter!

She gets five seconds of flight time without the Cap, and afterwards she starts falling like a... well, if you know, you know. Touching the ground, splashing into deep water, or using a cannon will fully restore Stamina, grabbing onto a pole in midair restores one second, and grabbing a coin restores half a second!

Pitching down won't speed you up much, and pitching up is... not recommended.

If you have some Stamina left, dive during a midair Ground Pound by pressing B. At the cost of one second, you can trigger flight again! Use this to get extra height or reach, or to easily change directions! Also, press A during 
any
 dive to trigger flight as well!

Press A during a midair Ground Pound to Long Jump instead! This risky move costs two seconds and is technically against safety protocol, but with good timing, you can use it to Wall Kick! Just remember: you can't Ground Pound during a Long Jump! Make sure it's worth the risk!

If you bonk into a wall while flying, hold A to flutter and slow your descent just like you would with the Wing Cap! This won't work if you're Long Jumping, though!

Triple Jump out of Ground Pounds by pressing A upon landing!

Martlet can fly 
ANYWHERE
 with the Wing Cap! Forget about air traffic control, no-fly zones, and Stamina Meters, the sky is 
YOURS! 
Pitch up as high as you want! Pitch down to go as fast as you want! This bird's gotta fly!

Be sure to follow safety protocol by pressing A to brake when necessary!

You'll keep flying if the Wing Cap wears off, but you'll have only three seconds of Stamina left. Get to a safe place to land!

Rumor has it that someone who shares vague similarities to Martlet may grant her something a bit better this time.

Additional Credits:
​

Team UTY (Character)

Emmalume (Design)

Ciozio 
(Voice Acting)

ZenderTroop
 (Additional Assistance, Humoring Me)

Kody
 (Bob-Omb Protocol)

Make sure you have Character Select Version 1.12 in order to use this mod!​

updates.title: Version 1.1.0
updates.changelog:
Added a new move: press A while Ground Pounding to Long Jump in midair at the cost of two Stamina!

Collecting a coin now restores half a second of Stamina!

The Stamina Meter now tints red to indicate how much of the current second remains.

Fixed an issue with a check that failed to stop Martlet from becoming WAY too excited about being shot out of a cannon at certain angles without the Wing Cap.

Made Wing Cap-less fluttering more consistent with its counterpart.

Here's Maurice Spaghetti, Peppino's highly judgemental brother! He dislikes his Italian heritage, loves to gamble, and has a history of violent outbursts with his iconic sack of nickels. He always disapproves of Peppino's life choices and has a complicated relationship with him, however he oddly gets along with The Noise.

NOTICE
: Just like 
Pizza Pack
, this pack can only run on COOPDX. Running it on EX-COOP (including EX-COOP compatibility) will not work.

Features include:

Fully voiced by 
Chip Potato

Custom caps as well as a custom life icon

Pizza Tower inspired Health HUD (Courtesy of 
SuperKirbylover
)

SuperKirbylover
 for the original Pizza Pack mod, as well as allowing me to make this mod

ZAIDORZ
 for mixing voicelines (This applies to the original Pizza Pack too)

cs-millenium.169.title: [CS] Millenium
cs-millenium.169.author: melzinoff
cs-millenium.169.description:
The Feral Zentros from the hit unreleased beat’en up/horror game Shadow Ninjas X, has finally arrived to Super Mario 64. Looks like she ended up in the wrong dimension and has to save a completely different princess this time. Watch her fail spectacularly in glorious 64 bits.

No Recolor available. Sounds, custom caps are included.

[Commissioned by 
Konata Kisaragi
, based on their OC/Design]

cs-mips.326.title: [CS] MIPS
cs-mips.326.author: Rabblet
cs-mips.326.description:
Here's a 
Character Select
 mod I made a couple of months ago for some friends, a stylized Mips, complete with half-lidded eyes, lop ears when "hatless", custom sounds taken from Tomba!, Worms, and a couple of other places, and 0% arms. 

Palette compatible version included!

		https://twitter.com/x/status/1746579034253791443

Feedback and eventual issue reports are appreciated!

Model made by using the Fast64 Mario template and the Mips model from the actual game as a base.

Credit also goes to Yuyake and everyone else involved in the 
Extra Characters
 mod, as I used their files as a template to learn how CS stuff worked months ago.

cs-modern-penguin.1061.title: [CS] Modern Penguin
cs-modern-penguin.1061.author: LukeTheLPSWolf
cs-modern-penguin.1061.description:
And for my first mod; A penguin!

I've noticed how lacking the world was in a penguin skin, so I thought I'd step in and give the world this mod as my first jump into the modding scene!

Has custom voicelines from Super Mario Galaxy and a few from yours truly

Has a custom life icon and a custom 3d render as graffiti

thats pretty much it; have fun!

cs-mlops-yoshi.214.title: [CS] Mlops Yoshi
cs-mlops-yoshi.214.author: MlopsFunny
cs-mlops-yoshi.214.description:
YOSHI IS HERE!

Yoshi has descended from the castle, in hopes of meeting Mario again! This 
[CS]
 pack features Yoshi, and has a few features to it! Lets go over them!

Yoshi is Recolorable, and features a Preset Pallete, using the Coopdx one!​

He has ALL hands, capless states and captables programmed!​

Voices, Wich were Provided by 
Yuyake
, and a Custom Life Icon Render, Using 
SM64 ReRendered's Yoshi rig
 as a base for it!​

I made this model in a attempt to make a good Yoshi model that stayed accurate to the SM64 Style. Im very happy with the armature trickery I was able to pull off with it, and I couldn't have done it without the help of may friends, including 
XLuigiGamerX
. I've been holding off on this guy for a loong while, but I think its high time I release him.

NOTE: YOU MUST HAVE THE LATEST VERSION OF CHARACTER SELECT BY SQUISHY TO RUN THIS. IF IN DOUBT, REINSTALL IT FROM THE MOD PAGE.
​

updates.title: BIG file restructure for DX support!
updates.changelog:
It took a bit, but now it's finally here! Instead of just Yoshi, its now Mlops' Yoshi! So it shouldnt mess with extra chars no more! Make sure that you delete the old version when you download this update, as this one has a different folder name! Now: The patch notes:

Renamed all files and functions to have a mlops prefix in the begining. now his CT should be CT_MLOPSYOHI!

Globalized the CT, so now mods can use him more extensively!

cs-mother-64-pack.271.title: [CS] Mother 64 Pack
cs-mother-64-pack.271.author: MlopsFunny
cs-mother-64-pack.271.description:
[WARNING: THE PACK IS STILL IN BETA, REPORT ANY ISSUES TO ME!]
​

Welcome to the Mother 64 Pack! 
as of now, the pack's aim is to add all the main playable characters of the Mother Series (As of now, Ninten, Pippi Ness and Lucas), along with their variations to SM64 Co-Op Deluxe! In the future, more characters of the series will be added.

CURRENT ROSTER:
​

Ninten: This Psychic 12 year old is the grandson of the allusive George and Maria. He begins his adventure in Podunk, when a poltergeist happens at his house. the protagonist of the original Mother (design from Mother Encore)​

Alternate variations: Ken (Mother Novelization) and Douglas Halloway (Mother: Invasion from the unkown)​

Pippi: This girl who lives in podunk is always getting herself into a mess! She also has a thing for eating grass, so it seems? Legend has it she's based off a famous book's character!

Ness: An average 12 year-old with psychic powers, who left his hometown, Onett, after meeting a hero from a ruined future. the first out of the chosen four from Mother 2​

Lucas: A timid and nervous teen, who lost his mother and brother, Claus, at a young age. Protagonist of Mother 3.​

Alternate variations: Lucas (EarthBound 64 Design)​

This pack also incules:​

Unique Preset Palletes for every character and their variations!​

Custom Caps for each and every character!​

Custom Life Icons, Made by myself!​

​

Custom Power Meters, Also made by myself!​

No voices, currently, but they will soon be made!​

Fully Functional Invisibility cap and Metal Cap!​

NOTE: YOU MUST HAVE THE LATEST VERSION OF CHARACTER SELECT BY SQUISHY TO RUN THIS. IF IN DOUBT, REINSTALL IT FROM THE MOD PAGE.
​

updates.title: The "STILL WORKING ON IT!" update
updates.changelog:
Hey! after a lot of thinking, and a fellow modder releasing their own Ness, I decided to let out a small update to show that yes, im still working on this. The update is very indeed limited to:​

- 
SuperPhanto's Ness
 compatibility! Yes, this means you can use both Ness models togheter MOSTLY as god intended. Only thing I wasn't able to figure out was the health icon, so if SuperPhanto wants to tag in to try and help figure out how its done, feel free.​

- Power Meters! Currently only for Ness and Ninten (Including his ALTs). Yes, I know they look crappy, but its what I got rn. I plan on seeing if I can get someone who is better experienced w em to help later.

- Mod Credits! This has been long warranted so now that CS has a update to support it, I've set up the basework for mod credits. They'll be updated along w the mod.​

And the most noteworthy addition...

THATS RIGHT!
​
Pippi is now the 1st newcomer of the mod! Not the most memorable, but the FIRST parthner of the series, you know my girl Pippi had to get in! This is probably gonna be the rare only case I release a standalone character, cuz I wanna have all the series characters out in one release. but I was starting to burn out so I decided to release her just to show I havent forgot.

Might be a small update but I still hope you guys like what I had to serve. Now go out there and live that life to the fullest!​
