cs-moonwalker.1169.title: [CS] Moonwalker
cs-moonwalker.1169.author: frobissuck
cs-moonwalker.1169.description:
The stylish dancer with cosmical power.

Moonwalker
 from YOMIH Mod by InklessBrush is now available in sm64coopdx with his own moveset. 

Moonwalker
 don't have time to stay still. He'll be always moving even with no input. While he's in moonwalk, he can do higher jumps, double jumps, twirls, kicks and dives. And also he can dance with his very own song.

No input
 
- Moonwalking. You can control his direction by moving camera.

A Button while Moonwalking
 - Moonjump. Very high jump with stylish animation.

A Button while Moonjumping
 
- Midjump. Very low jump, but can be useful for air control.

Z Trigger while Moonjumping
 
- Twirl. Works like a regular Twirl, but you can also Midjump in it.

Z Trigger while Midjumping
 
- Dive. Faces away the camera and dives forward with some vertical speed applied.

L Trigger
 
- Dance. Makes a looping dance with some music turned on. Can't be used while in air.

Credits:

Your Only Move Is Hustle creator - Ivy Sly

Moonwalker mod creator - InklessBrush

Graphics and some coding - frobissuck

Idea author and coding - CrazyDany

cs-moushley.1151.title: [CS] Moushley
cs-moushley.1151.author: Gamebun
cs-moushley.1151.description:
Note: you must be on 
Character Select v1.16.1
 or above for voicelines to work!

"The president's daughter and lover of all things cheese. Aided by one Leon S. Kennedy, they both escape the clutches of the Las Plagas cultists and Not-Spain and now she spends her time munching on the thing she loves best."

The little mice herself, Moushley makes her debut into CoopDX. With two outfits available to pick from, from her original RE4 design to the one from RE4R and the original meme itself. Also included are the option to select from her voices from RE4 and RE4R, labled when selecting your outfit.

There is also a secondary mod that adds 
Moushley as a PET
 if you wish to double your mice.

Credits:

Original fanart design: 
Agrimmora

Model: Gamebun, Leon RE4 model by Capcom

Graffiti Art: 
Funkys0da

Voices: Ashley Graham from both Resident Evil 4 (Carolyn Lawrence) and Resident Evil 4 Remake (Genevieve Buechner)

Cheese PET in photos from 
Cheese the Chao PET mod

cs-neco-arc.327.author: Rabblet
cs-neco-arc.327.description:
Neco-Arc from the Melty Blood series, with a suspiciously familiar hat!

Character Select
 mod made for a friend some months ago, complete with custom voice lines taken from her various appearances in her source series, a colorable hat for her default appearance and also a palette compatible alt version included!

		https://twitter.com/x/status/1746576123054428163

Colorable Neco-Arc with Mario's default palette:

Feedback and eventual issue reports are appreciated!

Model made by using the Fast64 Mario template as a base.

Credit also goes to Yuyake and everyone else involved in the 
Extra Characters
 mod, as I used their files as a template to learn how CS stuff worked months ago.

cs-paper-partners-64-ttyd.47.title: [CS] Paper Partners 64 + TTYD
cs-paper-partners-64-ttyd.47.author: melzinoff
cs-paper-partners-64-ttyd.47.description:
Please make sure you have Character Select 1.11!!
​

Paper Partners 64 + TTYD is CS pack with 23 characters! It includes EVERY Paper Mario Partner! And includes sounds for every partner, some even voice acted! Also includes features to make it even more special.

Characters include:

Goombario                         - Goombella

Kooper                                      - Koops

Bombette                    - Madame Flurrie

Parakarry                           - Baby Yoshi

Lady Bow                                  - Vivian

       - Watt                          - Admiral Bobbery

Sushie                                 - Ms Mowz

Lakilester                                    

But it includes lot more bonus characters: Blooey, Torque, Hayzee, Screamy, Jerry, aka Luigi's partners are in too! As well as Piper, Shy bandit and Princess from Color Splash!!

But THAT'S NOT ALL:

All 7 baby yoshis are selectable through a skin selector made by wibblus!

All characters have custom caps, sounds and icons.

PM64 characters have custom celebration stars, the star spirits!

TTYD characters have custom celebration stars, the crystal stars!

Bowser moveset compatibility so that the koopas and Torque can go in their shell using their dive kick.

Armature magic to make some characters more polished~

Palette presets too!

Custom Power Meters for TTYD characters!

Thanks to Gauntlet Queen for voicing Watt, EllieSpectacular for the Admiral Bobbery voice, ordatz for the baby yoshi sounds, Lucina of Stardust for Flurrie's voice and wibblus for Vivian's voice.

Thanks wibblus for the overall support on this mod and Squishy for the palette presets!

updates.title: Forgot to credit EllieSpectacular for the new Bobbery voice
updates.changelog: Ya new voice we've been working on, its not finished yet

updates.title: Quick fix, forgot to add the shell for koops
updates.changelog: das it baybeeee

updates.title: oops forgot to remove some files so it made conflicts
updates.changelog:
Removed the redundant files, especially the torque ones that made conflict when all three mods were used together.

PLEASE DOWNLOAD THIS OKAY

updates.title: Fixing Bobbery for DirectX users
updates.changelog: Also the mod is now three seperate mods in one zip to avoid resource bloat from my mod.

updates.title: PM64 Power Meters and CS 1.11 Compatibility
updates.changelog:
wibblus helped me on this update by changing the baby yoshi skins code to use CS 1.11

PLEASE USE CS 1.11, KEEP YOUR CS UP TO DATE.

Also The Paper Mario 64 cast now has Custom Power Meters.

Also fixed mistakes with cap files.

updates.title: Sound Fixing and Power Meters
updates.changelog:
Finally took the time to fix the four sounds causing issues.

I also added custom power meters for all TTYD characters (other characters might receive it, im just busy and this is kinda boring to do)

I also want to take the time to talk about common issues and how to resolve them:

- All sounds are broken: You're probably using an outdated mod called Extra Characters that is built in with coopdx > update Extra Characters!

- Bobbery crashes the game: You're using the directX build of coopdx > use OpenGL if you can, if not, deleted the file in the actors folder called bobbery_geo.bin

- Vanish cap and warping causes other textures to have the vanish effect: I used an old version of the fast64 plugin that broke vanish textures. I would have to re-export every character that have that issue, nothing you can do on your end. Sorry.

Please use the coop central discord if you need help, and use the discussion tab if as a second option.

updates.title: Fsish 64 fix
updates.changelog:
Sushie had issues underwater, fixed them! 

Also made the mod drag and drop, if you want to use the mod as dynos, move the model of the character you want to dynos/packs/(name of your character) and rename it to mario_geo, luigi_geo, wario_geo, waluigi_geo or toad_player_geo. That's it!

Have fun! Remember to post issues on the discussion thread of the mod! Thank you to people who pointed the sushie issue!

updates.title: PAPER PARTNERS V3.0: Blooey, Torque and then Princess, the Shy Bandit and Piper!
updates.changelog:
That's right! I fixed a whole bunch of things and got so bored doing that i did 3 more characters! And with Blooey and Torque, all of Luigi's partners are now here!

Thanks for wibblus for the help on Torque and Squishy for adding the palette presets for the characters!!

Changelog:

- Fixed Metal Recolors for all characters.

- Fixed Sushie spazzing.

- Fixed Transparency issues for Goombella, Kooper, Koops, Sushie, Watt.

- Added Victory faces for Goombario, Goombella, Sushie, Watt, Bombette, Jerry, Lady Bow.

- Fixed issue with idle bopping for Goombario and Goombella.

- Bobbery's cap now is fully recolorable.

- Flurrie's body is recolorable and her hair tied to CAP!

- Minor sound issues fixed.

- Bobombs texture bleeding in romhacks fixed!

Added:

-Blooey the Blooper!

-Torque the Spike Top!

-Princess the Chain Chomp!

-The Shy bandit the Shy Guy!

-Piper the Ptooie!

- Torque has Bowser moveset compatibility!

- 1.8 Palette compatibility with Palette presets!

Aaaaand that's pretty much it! Doubt there's not much else to do for Paper Partners! 23 characters!! That's a LOT!

updates.title: Paper Partners v2.1: Hayzee and color fixes
updates.changelog:
So the release of 2.0 had some issues, with leftover files that would cause issues with other packs and would not let you play as Mario with the pack active (as well as arena related issues).

I want to make this pack arena friendly so those fixes and future fixes are to remedy compatibility with it as well as polish some older models which has issues derived from lack of experience with blender.

Also, neat lil bonus: Hayzee, the Crazee Dayzee is now playable!

CHANGELOG

Mario in no longer replaced automatically

Lakilester's belly is recolorable (linked to GLOVES)

Descriptions are fixed using 1.7 auto text

Mowz's let's a go sound fixed (by that i mean removed because it caused issues)

Screamy's color is now linked to SHIRT also has their hurt expression changed

Metal is recolorable on Screamy, Lakilester.

NEW

Hayzee, the crazee dayzee as a playable character.

PALETTE

SHIRT: 8dbf9f

SHOES: a7bde9

SKIN: f7d794

PANTS: d3d0d3

cs-parappa-the-rapper.212.title: [CS] PaRappa the Rapper
cs-parappa-the-rapper.212.author: MlopsFunny
cs-parappa-the-rapper.212.description:
It's PaRappa!
​

PaRappa is a lovestruck rapper who is always fighting for his friends, and mostly for the love of his life, Sunny Funny. Whenever he runs into a problem, he never gives up and just keeps on believin'!

This 
[CS]
 pack features the following:​

Completely Original Model, Recolorability and Pallete Preset included!​

Voicelines, Taken from the games. Might make completely original ones in the future!​

A Unique Life Icon Render, as Always!​

NO Cap Switching or Captables, Parappa NEVER takes off the beanie, after all!​

PaRappa is one of my favorite games, so I put a lot of Passion and effort into this, you can expect a simple Boxy Boy Pet to release soon, to go along with him!

NOTE: YOU MUST HAVE THE LATEST VERSION OF CHARACTER SELECT BY SQUISHY TO RUN THIS. IF IN DOUBT, REINSTALL IT FROM THE MOD PAGE.
​

cs-pet-luma.371.title: [CS & PET] Luma
cs-pet-luma.371.author: Alestar24
cs-pet-luma.371.description:
I have a memory stuck in my head, a memory of me and my brother on the sofa exploring distant galaxies. He was always player 1 and I was player 2, but despite i couldn't do much as P2 I enjoyed following him and defeating the enemies nearby.

So, if you too had the same experience as me and relive those adventures, then this mod is for you.

Welcome back Luma!

Here are the feature of this modpack:

1. A [CS] Luma Skin, fully recolorable and voiced.

He comes with an alternative style that replace him as a Lumalee (the suicidal cutie from the film) and 4 other costumes!

2. I understand that this is a very basic model (at least he is cute and floaty) so for the ones that doesnt like to be just a flying little star there is a [PET] Luma version included in the mod pack (as a separate mod).

Dont worry, the [PET] version still has recolorability, voices and all alt. styles!

So, are you ready to revive those memories? Because it is Luma time!!

(The modpack files contains the .zip files of the 2 mods separately, so you will need to extract it, then you can just drag and drop the 2 mod files in the game.)

updates.title: [CS & PET] Luma 1.1
updates.changelog:
This shiny cutie is finally back with a simple update and some new friends too! Lets see:

-A total of 4 new fancy costumes have been added:

1. This one still has to give back Mario's hat after staying in it for a long time, it definetly loves to wear it. Welcome to 
Luma & Hat
!

2. Who knows how many galaxies are out there? This Luma wants to explore them all. 
The Explorer Luma
!

3. When Rosalina reads something to her little Lumas, this one always fall asleep. The 
BedTime Luma
!

4. Wait, why is there a Snufit in here? Was it in another of my mods? Ooooh now I see, it is not a Snufit, is the 
Shy Luma
!

-In the old version there was 2 styles with non-recolorable eyes, those styles have been removed to make some space to a lot of new 
preset palettes
!

-The code has been updated with the latest 
CS stuff
, so now the names are displayed correctly, even in dialogues!

-Of course the 
PET
 version received all the new costumes too yay!

Well, what are you waiting for? It is time to get on an adveture with Luma once again!

(The modpack contains 2 different .zip files, so you will need to extract it, then you can just drag and drop the 2 other files in the game).

(This mod requires the latest Character Select mod version to work)

cs-pet-deep-cut-splatoon-3.820.title: [CS+PET] Deep Cut (Splatoon 3)
cs-pet-deep-cut-splatoon-3.820.author: funkymonkeyjay
cs-pet-deep-cut-splatoon-3.820.description:
It's 
Splatsville
's very own idol group, 
Deep Cut
, here to reap the spoils hidden within the 
Toadstool Castle
 walls of the 
Mushroom Kingdom
~!
​
FEATURES

My take on 
Shiver
, 
Frye
, and 
Big Man
, in the style that is somewhat akin to the SM64 model style, all recolorable!

A 
Salmonid Smallfry
 that follows you around, made possible with the 
"WiddlePets"
 mod, with fully recolorable hair as well!

A palette of faces for a wide range of expressions!

Some new animations!

New music for power-ups, star collect, mission selection... 
and a very special one hidden somewhere in the endgame
, which can all be turned on/off using the 
"/deepcut_mus"
 chat command!

Compatible with 
"Character Select"
 v1.14 onwards!

DISCLAIMER

This mod will only work if you have either one or both of the 
"Character Select"
 (If you just want to have the playable characters) or the 
"WiddlePets"
 (If you just want to have the Smallfry) mods enabled, which you can obtain through the following links:

Character Select [Squishy6094]

WiddlePets [wibblus]

Special thanks to 
@SwagSkeleton95
 for giving me tips on how to add custom music that can be turned on/off!

Credits to sources I've used for this mod + trailer are in the video's description!
​

updates.title: Sneak Peek at a Future Update!
updates.changelog:
It's been a while since our beloved 
Deep Cut
 made the scene on 
Peach's Castle
, and I must wonder, whatever happened to the other idol groups? Y'know, the 
Squid Sisters
? 
Off the Hook
? Where are they?
 ... Well, they're on their way!

Introducing; SplatIdols 64! 

(... or I could call it the "Now Or Never Seven Pack", either way, it's still a work in progress, I'll decide a new name once I'm done)
​

That's right, I'm making an update to this mod to add 
Callie
, 
Marie
, 
Pearl
, and 
Marina
 as playable characters 
(maybe even the Inklings/Octolings...?)
, and not only that, I'm going to be adding a bunch of other new stuff to this already fishy platter;

[
] An extra move for when you press the 
[L] 
button, in which each of the idols get to use their signature weapon to help them obtain 
Power Stars
!

[
] A total rework of the 
"extra faces"
 gimmick, giving the characters a TON of unique expressions + bringing back the unused directional eyes!

[
] A rework of the 
Deep Cut
 characters, fixing Y-offsets and odd, buggy rigs!
 (looking at YOU, Big Man...)

[
] Semi-accurate hair physics! 
(Only for Callie and Marina)

[
] Hairstyles for 
Smallfry
 from 
"Splatoon 3"
!

[
] Costumes 
(Hypno Callie, OE Pearl, etc.)

 - Implemented / 
 - Not Yet Implemented / 
 - Semi-Implemented / 
 - To Be Decided

I can't define a proper release date yet, but I have been posting updates through my 
Bluesky
, so stay tuned!

So, with that being said and done... Stay fresh, and don't get cooked, stay off the hook!
​

cs-pik-pak.766.title: [CS] Pik-Pak
cs-pik-pak.766.author: Kaktus64
cs-pik-pak.766.description:
[CS] Pik-Pak

A CS mod featuring all three pikmin captains from Pikmin 2.

(And more to come in the future!)

 Olimar

A hard worker and family man who often

sacrifices his time off to support his family.

He also seems to be a magnet for bad luck.

 Louie

The quiet new driver and the embodiment

of the word 'troublemaker.' He has a

ravenous and alarmingly adventurous appetite.

 The President

The president of Hocotate Freight. He loves

money and works his employees hard,

but he somehow has a hard to dislike personality.

Comes with caps & voicelines for all the characters!

Credits:

Me for making the models & rigging them

SwagSkeleton95 for Collecting the voicelines used here (originally from his Pikmin Captains mod)

Have fun!

cs-peanut-marshal.1154.title: [CS] Peanut & Marshal
cs-peanut-marshal.1154.author: SideofSquid
cs-peanut-marshal.1154.description:
Peanut & Marshal from Animal Crossing as playable characters in Super Mario 64!

This is my first custom character mod and the first time I have ever rigged a model successfully. None of this would be possible without Garrulous64's amazing tutorial on how to do this along with the Coop Central discord server. I would've been able to complete this project sooner, however using Toad as the base model proved to be a mistake for these characters as I've had to do some manual adjustments to allow the limbs to be (mostly) normal. After meticulous testing, I am confident there are nearly no issues. These characters are complete with voices, blinking animations, no weird mesh overrides, and color customization!

CREDITS:

-The character select template by Squishy

-The original model from Animal Crossing Pocket Camp Ripped by Centrixe on The Models Resource

cs-plushee.489.title: [CS] Plushee
cs-plushee.489.author: VOKSMOTH
cs-plushee.489.description:
Its Plushee! Here to make things a bit more cute and spooky!

Requires Character Select v.1.12 or Greater
​
Features

Modified Hud. (Life Icon, Power/Health Meter)​

Fully Color-able Palette + Plushee's Blurple Preset​

Modified Normal Cap. Don't lose your head!​

+ Bowser (+Jr) Moveset Compatibility! 
(Mod Credit: wibblus)

Allows Plushee to do a silly yet speedy 
Spin Cycle
!

(Special Thanks to Scribbasock, TreeboyAdvance and Fuzzman! We learnt more about Blender and modding SM64 together to get here, and hopefully more mods coming soon!)​

updates.title: Quick Fix Update 2.1
updates.changelog: - Slightly reduced the size of Plushee's Spin Cycle to be more in line with their actual body size.

updates.title: MR.BONES UPDATE
updates.changelog:
RATTLE ME BONES! Plushee's loyal Guardian has joined the Adventure!

Your browser is not able to display this video.

Features

New Life Icons for both Plushee and MR.BONES.

New Playable character, with loads of funny sounds!

MR.BONES is fully color-able with his own preset palette option. 

'Hair' changes the dominant Boxing Glove color.

Bowser Moveset Compatibility: 

Larger Hitbox for better interaction with objects/items, Larger Anims.

updates.title: Quick Fix Update!
updates.changelog:
Just a few small fixes from the initial release. If you downloaded the mod after 8pm last night, you may have these changes already!

- Fixed an issue with Plushee's inner torso having caved in vertices on the left shoulder

- Fixed issue with the UVs that involved a white spot appearing on Plushee's sweater Zipper and inner fluff when doing the Spin Cycle. (This was only really noticeable if their color palette was changed to be a darker color.)

cs-pmw-pac-man.1127.title: [CS] PMW Pac-Man
cs-pmw-pac-man.1127.author: kurobutt
cs-pmw-pac-man.1127.description: Re-creation of Pac-Man's 2D bill-boarded character model from Pac-Man World on PSX. This uses textures sourced from the original game, but the geometry was created loosely based on screenshot references. Made this a while ago, so it's quite old.. uploading here, as I only got around to porting it to CS just now. Supports color-changing, has a default palette, a few voice clips, and a life icon. This does not contain a moveset, it's just a simple character skin.

Fixed Peddito palette's shoes being black instead of red

updates.title: Minor Texture Tweak
updates.changelog:
Changelog:

Edited some textures to remove an accidental outline due to how SM64 processes transparent pixels

updates.title: The Palette Update
updates.changelog:
Changelog:

Added every solid color palette from Pizza Tower to Peppino, Gustavo and Noise

Added one custom palette to Peppino, Gustavo, and Noise

Peddito (Peppino)

Crustavo (Gustavo)

Original Doise (Noise, colorpicked from Robby1scool's drawings)

Added 4 new palettes to Noisette

Peppino & Noise comics / Old design

McPig's drawing based off of a tabletop game with friends

An old Toppinbot Portrait (purple variant)

Doisette (colorpicked from Robby1scool's drawing)

updates.title: Course Select Texture fix
updates.changelog:
Not necessary, but it was bothering me since I realized I screwed up how the Course Select texture is supposed to be rendered in the UI.

Changelog:

Edited Course Select texture to look less like Shit (gave it a white background)

updates.title: Course Select Texture + Code Update
updates.changelog:
Changelog:

Massively updated code

No longer supports backwards compatibility; previously did this due to a lack of an official mobile port, which now exists

Misused WIP code to replace Mario's name in game dialogue; this is removed

Added custom Course Select texture (template provided by Mike)

Added a new failsafe

If Character Select is outdated, it will warn the host

updates.title: Credits Bugfix
updates.changelog:
Changelog:

Fixed an issue where the credits would repeat for every character in the pack (see screenshot-- it's godawful)

updates.title: 1.10 Compatability
updates.changelog:
Changelog:

Now compatible with Character Select v1.10 (still backwards compatible!!)

Health meter works again

Palettes work again

Added credits via v1.10's credits menu

Added dialogue replacement (i.e. Mario -> Peppino, Mario -> Noise, etc)

Will show when 
dialog_set_replace_name("Luigi")
 ships

Thank you for your patience! My apologies for not realizing it broke a week or two ago.

updates.title: Added Missing Voicelines
updates.changelog:
Nothing huge, and this time it's an actual update.

Added 
OOOF.ogg
 and 
UH2.ogg
 to the cast's voicelines

Added version number to the mod's description

updates.title: Not necessary but I wanted to do it anyway
updates.changelog: I edited the description of the mod in CS to say what characters are included in the pack, who voices who, and credit to ZAIDORZ for mixing. That's it. You don't really need to update it if you don't want to, nothing important or game-breaking is addressed or added.

updates.title: New Heads For The Noises
updates.changelog:
Wahoo!!! It's literally just one thing, but I think it helps make the mod feel more expressive. Sorry for all of the updates/tweaks, by the way.

Noise & Noisette have unique heads for death/burn eye state

cs-professor-q.1089.title: [CS] Professor Q
cs-professor-q.1089.author: Gamebun
cs-professor-q.1089.description:
Note: If voicelines are not playing, you must be on 
Character Select v1.16.1
 or above!

"Full name Quayshaun Star, a turbian researcher dimensional world traveler belonging to an organization known as Organization Zero. He possesses both genius and the overwhelming magic of his bloodline, which stems from one of the Six Heroes who helped escape from the void long ago. A mad scientist who would do anything for the sake of his research and enjoyment."

A commission for Professor Q (
Twitter
 | 
Bluesky
), posted with permissions, featuring his character doing research things in Peach's castle!

Comes with two outfits to choose from, new voice clips, taken from Zoe from League of Legends, and a new simple run animation.

cs-rick-kine-coo.1065.title: [CS] Rick, Kine & Coo
cs-rick-kine-coo.1065.author: Kaktus64
cs-rick-kine-coo.1065.description:
Friends by air, sea, and land! The three animal friends from Kirby's Dream Land 2 are now a CS pack, all combined into one with a custom moveset! You'll swap to each animal friend depending on what you're doing.

Moveset:

Slide Kick: Turn into a giant rock and roll forwards.

Press A in air: Fly with Coo (Press A again to flap higher!)

B while flying as Coo: Spin with a parasol for a bit more height.

Ground Pound: Kine appears and slams downwards.

B during a Ground Pound: Dive forwards and cancel your ground pound.

cs-scott-the-woz.1002.author: Kaktus64
cs-scott-the-woz.1002.description:
Hey all, Scott here!

I had this one sitting in my mods folder for a while, so I decided to update it for CS 1.16 and release it!

Scott has his basic outfit, and an alt that gives him the outfit he uses in some video segments, mostly used in "The Guy Game" video.

He also now comes with an option to turn on a blue border that overlays on top of the screen!

Credits:

Kaktus64: The model and the code used for the mod itself

Saulis2cool4u/Saultube: Rigging Scott

ChocolateFrog18: Voiceline collecting

cs-scatman-john.1027.description:
John Paul Larkin has been damned to spend his Scatman afterlife trapped in Super Mario 64 all because someone thought it was funny to spam his music in SM64 YouTube videos 20 years ago!

Special thanks to lemons.flp for palette help.

Features custom voices snipped from I'm a Scatman, Scatman's world and The Invisible Man.

Custom life icons, alternate palette, and CS graffiti

No custom music... yet. If someone wants to help me figure out how to add that and I need a composer.

updates.title: Ring hand mistake fix
updates.changelog: Fixed where Scatman's ring was erroneously placed on his right hand when holding his fedora in his right hand. His ring is on his left hand.

cs-shy-guy-64-festive-dlc.453.title: [CS] Shy Guy 64 (Festive DLC)
cs-shy-guy-64-festive-dlc.453.author: Alestar24
cs-shy-guy-64-festive-dlc.453.description:
It is time to celebrate with the Shy Guys!

This CS skin pack should act as DLC for the original Shy Guy 64 mod, as it adds extra party-theme costumes for Shy Guy.

For now it contains 3 extra Xmas costumes (as is it nearly Xmas) but it will be updated with more stuff for each annual event.

So, lets see what is inside the present:

1. A Santa Shy Guy that is giving everyone toasts for Xmas, a little weird but YEAH TOASTS!

2. A Mini Shy Gal with a very warm and cozy winter jacket, so cute!

3. A Shy Guy with a ridiculous Xmas sweater, very itchy but at least its warm.

I hope you like this little Xmas present from me, happy holidays!

(P.S. This mod requires the latest Character Select mod version to work.)

updates.title: [CS] Shy Guy 64 (Festive DLC) 1.1
updates.changelog:
Even here more Shy Guy has been added! Lets see:

1. This one its a submersible guyand he is ready to have fun during the summer! the Scuba Shy Guy!

2. This guy its ready to be celebrated in his special day, the Birthday Shy Guy!

Plus, the code and the voicelines have been updated just like the original skin pack, thats great! I hope you enjoy, see ya!

cs-shy-guy-64.250.title: [CS] Shy Guy 64
cs-shy-guy-64.250.author: Alestar24
cs-shy-guy-64.250.description:
Rejoice Shy Guy fans, cause they just arrived in sm64coopdx ready for everything!

This [CS] pack features a revisited model of the vanilla Shy Guy of sm64, but now he has recolorability, custom icons and sounds. Plus, there are A LOT of alternative styles to fully customize your own Shy Guy and more will arrive in the future (a big thanks to Squishy for helping me in the code for the alt. costumes).

So, what are you waiting for? It is Shy Guy time!

(P.S. This mod requires the latest Character Select mod version to work)

updates.title: [CS] Shy Guy 64 1.6
updates.changelog:
Ladies and gentlemen, after an enormous amount of time, they are officially back, it is Shy Guy time once again!

For this time, a lot of new fellow Shy Guys have arrived, lets see them all:

1. They took a pause from the kart world to have fun with us, say hi to the 
Pit Crew Shy Guy
 and 
Shy Gal
!

2. He has done the Cool Cool Mountain slide like 1000 times someone pls stop him, the 
Slope Styler Shy guy
!

3. Directly from Ninja Hideaway, this guy its a master sushi lover, the 
Ninja Shy Guy
!

4. He is a member of Bowser elite squad, ready to serve always, 
Sergeant Guy
!

5. Now you are gonna wonder, why the hell this one is dressed like a 
chicken
, welp that a mystery for the amazing Shy Guy Mystery Hour to solve (go see Saltydkdan's video, you will love it) (and no, its not a chicken jockey reference).

6. The 
MarioBro Shy Guy
 has found his pants yay, and apparently he has been joined by another plumber fanatic, the 
MarioSis Shy Gal
!

7. And for last, the one you all have been waiting for, ready to lead a new army, the great leader from Paper Mario, 
General Guy!!!

And wait, thats not all! There are 2 more festive themed Shy Guys coming in the Festive DLC, the 
Birthday Shy Guy
 and The 
Scuba Shy Guy
!

Plus, the entire code of this mod has been updated with the latest CS stuff, so now all the different styles has 
unique 
descriptions and the names are displayed correctly, even inside npc's dialogues! Aaaand the voicelines are now a bit more loud, to match other characters voices.

And at last, to prevent the overpopulation of Shy Guys in this mod, I decided to split them in 2 different packs, one with all the classic Shy Guys and one with all the bizarre Styles that I made, called 
FanMadeDLC
.

By doing so you can just select the packs you like to prevent absurd loading times for online play.

So, thats all... Damn that was quite a lot uh? I hope you will enjoy this update and thank you so much to have played with Shy Guy 64. See ya!

(The modpack contains 2 different .zip files, so you will need to extract it, then you can just drag and drop the 2 other files in the game).

(This mod requires the latest version of Squishy's Character Select mod).

updates.title: [CS] Shy Guy 64 1.5
updates.changelog:
Here we go again with another update, lets see:

1. This is going to be a very colorful update because Preset Palettes are here! The normal Shy Guy, the Spear Guy and the MiniGal got a total of 9 different palettes, representing all the classic Shy Guy Colors while all the others got their own unique ones (maybe I will add more in the future).

2. The Guy from the old wild west has become even more threatening with his new jacket, ready to redeem the next bounty!

3. The best toast chef in the world got his classic tie back!

4. To thank all of you, I made and added a new Shy Guy to honor the wonderful sm64coopdx community, the most swag of all the Shy Guys, the Community Fan Guy!

And thats not even all! Xmas is close and i made a present for all of you:

From now on, together with Shy Guy 64 updates i will release special DLCs containing extra themed costumes for Shy Guys, starting with the Festive DLC that will be released soon!

For the future? I received a lot of suggestions for other costumes, don't worry I didn't forget them, they are still in w.i.p. so stay tuned!

I am also planning to add custom power meters in the future, i just have to figure out how to do it.

And yes, other mods different to Shy Guy 64 are planned too.

So, see you next time my dear Shy Guy Fans and have fun!

(P.S. The latest Character Select mod version from Squishy is required for this mod to work).

updates.title: [CS] Shy Guy 64 1.4
updates.changelog:
The spooky scary days has finally arrived, and even the Shy Guys wants to celebrate, even tho everyone do that in their own ways, it is still going to be a fabulous thriller night! So lets see what is inside the bucket:

1. This guy, directly from Paper Mario, got very inspired by the dias de los muertos, so he decided to take his guitar and celebrate in the streets with his healing solo, the Sombrero Guy!

2. I'm pretty sure he is dead, but wow nice halloween costume! We are going to need a Luigi to stop him scaring people around. I'm talking about the eyeless Ghost Guy!

Thats all for this spooky update, have fun collecting candies and stars with the new Shy Guys, see ya!

updates.title: [CS] Shy Guy 64 1.3
updates.changelog:
Hello there, here we are again with a new update, lets see:

1. A new Shy Guy joins the team, the most famous variation, which even appeared in the film, the Snifit! (I still don't know how I managed to forget about him, sry Snifit)

2. Updated all other costumes code, there were some recolorabilty issues, especially with the Metal Cap, Toady outfit and YEAHTOAST outfit, but now everything is fine! (I hope)

More and more Shy Guys are coming to Peach's Castle and more will arrive in the future.

Plus, feel free to contact me on Discord for any suggestion or problem with these Shy Guys.

Until next time, see ya!

updates.title: [CS] Shy Guy 64 1.2
updates.changelog:
You really thought these Shy Guys had disappeared huh? Well no, they were busy, they were trying to understand what the newcomer was trying to tell them, the only words they understood were like "YEAH TOAST!!!!!!"

Apart from that, here's the new stuff:

1. Added a new style, directly from the SMG4 universe, the weird Shy Guy obsessed with Toasts!

He comes with recolorable butterfly wings and a nice toast for everytime he gets a star.

2. The Toady Shy Guy got a totally new better looking hat, so that shades are not to moot anymore.

3. The Chef and the Party Shy Guy got improved hats, what a style!

4. Some minor modification

So yeah, for now the Shy Guys will just try to understand the Toast Guy (is he happy, scared, hungry? idk), but more Shy Guys will arrive in the future (and I am open to suggestions!).

Until the next time Shy Guy fans 
.

cs-smw-rex.390.author: Garrulous64
cs-smw-rex.390.description:
It's wonderful that characters like Ninji and Birdo have been made into Mario mainstays, but Rex from Super Mario World has been left in the dust! Well, not anymore! Rex for Character Select is here! This is the FIRST custom character I was able to get working, so it means a lot that I'm able to release him!

Mod Includes:

Rex Skin (Custom Model by 
PeachesCastle
, Proportion edits by me)

Custom Life Icon

Metal Rex Model & Texture Color

Sound Pack (Super Mario World Sound Effects)

Custom Caps (Models by 
PeachesCastle
)

Blinking Animation & Death Animation!

v3.1 Recolor Support!

Skin - Stomach/Face/Wings

Hair - Main Color

Shoes - Shoes

Thanks to 
Morishiko 
for fixing up my LUA files! No More Script Errors, and I know why they were erroring now.

updates.title: Small SMG3 Voiceline Fix / Melony Voicelines removed
updates.changelog:
Heya this is just a small but overdue update:

This update just fixes a few SMG3 voicelines that were not working properly

Along with this update, I sadly removed the voicelines used for Melony in this mod due to complications involving the original Voice Actor, if you want to play the mod with the Melony voice, that is completely fine, however as of now, I will be looking for a new Melony voice actor immediately.

updates.title: SMG3 VOICE YAHOOO
updates.changelog:
Heya yall, It has been a while since this mod has been updated, and that is because I have been focusing on some other mods I have been working hard on! Cannot wait for you all to see them when they are finished!

With that being said, this will likely be the last update to this mod for a while as I focus on other mods, this is not the end but we will see soon enough

As for the update contents:

- SMG3 FINALLY HAS A VOICE! Thank you LuigiDeathStare for doing the voice!

- Melony's animations have been fixed up a bit to fix the leg clipping issue whenever she crouches or crawls

updates.title: Watermelon Update!
updates.changelog:
The new SMG4 update has arrived with a few new additions!

First off, a brand new character has arrived! The sleepy girl who was once a watermelon, Melony has arrived! Voiced by 
ShiningLotl
! Please be sure to check this character out!

Along with Melony, Meggy and SMG4 were both given new alt costumes based on their past adventures!

Along with the additions, here are the rest of the changes:

Changed Meggy's eye textures to be more pixelated and aligned with the rest of the other characters

Fixed Meggy's head placement whenever she is capless

updates.title: The Mr. Puzzles Update!
updates.changelog:
It is TV Time, with your friend Mr. Puzzles!

Mr. Puzzles makes his low poly debut in SM64, join him as he tries to go for his 5 star rating!

Thank you 
Shads
 for voicing Mr. Puzzles! 

As for the rest of the changes:

The Original Meggy mod is now implemented into the mod, to swap to the original model, just go to your CS Menu and head down to Meggy, then you can swap to either version by pressing right or left

SMG4's voicelines have been given louder volume

The descriptions of the characters in the CS Menu are now in a 4:3 ratio to make it more aligned with CoopDX Mario's description

updates.title: The SMG4 Update
updates.changelog:
The rest of the gang has arrived, took them a little longer than expected!

Changes:

Added SMG4, SMG3, and Tari into the Mod!

Voicelines were added for SMG4 and Tari (SMG3 will have voicelines in a later update

Icons were given a slight update

Bug Fixes:

Fixed Meggy having the same color pallete as the host of a server

(And if you are wondering, no there are no issues with the audio, that is an issue on your side)

More characters will be added in the future! Please let me know as to who you want to see added!​

cs-sophia-persona-5-strikers.1015.title: [CS] Sophia (Persona 5 Strikers)
cs-sophia-persona-5-strikers.1015.author: JSS
cs-sophia-persona-5-strikers.1015.description:
Personal mod I'm releasing to the public with a few updates since I initially posted it on twitter around 3 to 4 years ago now.

2 models! Sophia in her default state and Sophie in her Phantom Thief attire.

Voicelines from P5S

She's completely recolor compatible and has a default palette.

Custom animations baked into her bin file so you can use her as a Dynos mod and still have those animations

updates.title: Bug fixes and improvements
updates.changelog:
Character Select version no longer includes the baked character animations, this means all of the custom animations are handled in the lua file. This fixes a bug where she would not do her custom select animation when first entering the character select menu

Dyno's version now included which still has the animations built in.

Updated her Face UV's on the Sophia skin which allows a new facial expression on the character select.

The hearts on her head are no longer 2d planes and are now 3d. This now fixes her hearts using other players palette colors on her hearts when they exist.

cs-sonkie-himself-2-0.445.title: [CS] Sonkie Himself 2.0
cs-sonkie-himself-2-0.445.author: Maya_132
cs-sonkie-himself-2-0.445.description:
Who tf are you?!

This is My sona model i wanted to finally release after some weeks of development! it includes a moveset and Voice by yours truly... all credits on the github!

How the moveset works:

Momentum Groundpound: its just a groundpound that mantains your speed

Super dive: if you keep Z pressed while groundpounding you will do an petty cool dive (you can choose not do it if you only press Z once)

Walljump thing: If you dive to a wall and then press A you will get launched upwards!

Double jump: its a double jump. duh. you can do it meanwhile single jump, triple jump, dive, long jump, or freefall.

It features recolorability and custom anims. Hope you have as fun as we had making him!

updates.title: NOTICE ABOUT VOICE CLIPS
updates.changelog:
Hi, I know this isn't great news but I am currently unable to fix the mod due to my laptop being in a nearly unusable state for the past couple of months. I have also generally stopped caring about the game in general, so me actually releasing an update regardless is a pretty slim chance unfortunately. I know nothing about what's going on with the game, the community, the mods, what I need to change for the voices to work again, whatever.

TLDR; You're gonna either have to find a way to fix it yourself, or just deal with it for now. Sorry guys, but life's taking me elsewhere for the time being. Hope you're OK with that, because I can't really do anything about it right now.

cs-ssb-pikachu.1022.title: [CS] SSB Pikachu
cs-ssb-pikachu.1022.author: ProfeJavix
cs-ssb-pikachu.1022.description:
IMPORTANT: this mod needs Character Select to work

MOVESET
​

Normal Smash:
 press B to throw bouncing Thunderball. Can shock other players.

Up Smash:
 press Y to perform a Quick Dash to the stick direction. Press A to go up or Z to go down. Can be repeated instantly one time if the stick or the buttons are still held.

Down Smash:
 press X to cast a Thunder. Can be performed in air and shock-throws other players on hit.

Side Smash:
 hold B while ground pounding to charge a Skull Bash to the stick direction. The more charge, the more speed. Shock-throws other players on hit.

Moveset can be disabled via CharSelect options.

Original mod idea by Drenchy. Check out his video:

Check out Kog's showcase:

Credits:
​

lochteps for the model, sounds and some of the CS setup.
​

srGSR for WeatherCycleDX Mechanics
​

updates.title: Smash Up fix
updates.changelog: Removed Flying Pokemon Type from Pikachu (now you can't spam Smash Up in air)

updates.title: Non-pvp mechanics, WeatherCycleDX mechanics and some fixes

New Features:

Now projectile attacks harm normal enemies

If WeatherCycleDX enabled, Pikachu's ElectroBalls and Thunders will be buffed if there's a rain or a storm (ALL CREDITS TO srGSR for this)

Misc small fixes

cs-south-park-64.1060.title: [CS] South Park 64!
cs-south-park-64.1060.author: CandyDaCat
cs-south-park-64.1060.description:
“So come on down to South Park and meet some friends of mine..”
 

“Mis amigos aqui en South Park yo les voy a presentar..”

This is my first time making a mod, and it's a South Park one! I'm surprised no South Park mods were ever made in the past so I thought.. "Why not make one myself?"

FEATURES

The four main boys themselves!

Custom icons and voicelines!

Lots of profanity!

Spice up SM64 TV-MA style. and have yourself a time!

CREDITS

SeniorPasta - Trailer Thumbnail Art

Squishy6094
 - Providing the Character Select template on Github

Garralous64 - That one helpful tutorial on YouTube

The Spriters Resource - Providing the models and sounds from the South Park N64 Game
​
UPCOMING CHARACTERS IN THE FUTURE​
Pip Pirrip

Wendy Testaburger

Shelley Marsh​

cs-super-mario-world.776.title: [CS] Super Mario World
cs-super-mario-world.776.author: Wall_E20
cs-super-mario-world.776.description:
Ever wanted Super Mario World's Mario playable in Super Mario 64? well, i do, thats why i made:

Super Mario World in Super Mario 64! [CS]

that's right! Super Mario World!

he is not just a simple reskin, he has 
Moveset!
 with it A LOT of custom actions!

since he is SMW Mario he can't do Mario's Default actions like punching or walljumping (that could be a problem with some parkour challenges... but feel free to switch to normal Mario any times!).

About his Moves:   

A to Jump
 - Press A to jump, simpler than that! he has only one jump, no double jumps or triple jumps. like in the original game: 
Hold The Jump Button to Jump Higher 
or 
Build up Speed 
to Jump even more!

B to Run
 - Hold the B Button to Run, He can get fast! maybe you manage to Jump over most of the difficult places like that.

Y to Spinjump
 - Spinjump! one of the most known actions from the SNES the spinjump! you can spinjump on most enemies! some will get defeated and do 
Poof!
 
others will get no damage so be careful!   you can also SpinJump on objects that need 
Groun Pound 
to be used, like the big Blue Coins Button!

X to Hold Objects
 - 
(is possible to use B to grab objects by enabling it in the mod menu)
 Since it could be done, the 
X Button is used to grab objects
 like boxes or bob-ombs, Remember that like the original game you have to 
Hold Down 
the X button to keep holding the object and 
Release it 
to throw it! 
It also works with Bosses such as Bowser!

Z to Crouch
 - Press Z to Crouch, Mario will not be abile to move when crouched, but if you move before crouching
 you will slide on the ground 
for a bit, allowing you to sneak in small places!

Objects and Interactions
 - Mario is also abile to interact with most objects: 
Open Doors By walking into them 
or 
Grab on Poles
 by jumping on them and press Up and Down to go Up and Down.

Water Movement
 - When in water, Mario can 
Swim By pressing A
. you can also Grab objects while underwater too!

Others 
- it may happens you get hurt, 
if you get at 4 Health Points you will get SMALL!
 right after playng the shrinking animation. But dont worry! 
Collect Coins To Heal your Health!
and 
you will return BIG again
. there are also Winning and Dieing animations, be sure to check them out!

While Jumping around the levels, you may notice some 
Slope Blocks 
run on them to 
Climb the Wall
 and get on top of places! 
(i placed them for you <3) (Thanks to ManIsCat for the slopes blocks code!)

- Stuff you may want to know

- Is this mod done?

this is a "Demo" Release because i was taking long to make this. 
in the future Expect some Changes! 
Like Power ups! from the game!

- Is Mario Recolorable?

yes, i added an alt Recolorable Costume
 (is an alt because i couldn't make it Palette Accurate)
 use that in case you want to use custom palettes!

is an 
ALT COSTUME
 accessed by 
pressing right
 in the cs menu
 (saying this because apparently people didn't notice)

- Does it works online?

this works online! i fixed most of the networking bugs, but don't expect to not find them! (report the non-online bugs too!)

- Does it have mod support?

it 
should
 work with most of the mods, don't expect it to work with all mods! 

THIS MOD ONLY WORKS IF CHARACTER SELECT IS ENABLED!

SMW Mario Can be choosen from the CS Menu

Be sure you are using the latest version!

don't expect this mod to do not have bugs or being accurate to the SNES!

This should be all! Thanks for reading and playng my mod! 

(Thanks again to ManIsCat for the Slopes Blocks code and Altiami and other people from Coop Central Discord server!)

updates.title: B To Hold Toggle! and Bugfixes!
updates.changelog:
Added new "Grab with B" option as asked many times to add!

now you can decide if grab with the B button or the X button!

(Accessible in the Mod Menu)

Fixed Bug with objects interactions such as Custom objects not working as intended when SMW mario is enabled (even if not selected)

fixed weird animation bug

removed default palette from recolorable mario alt because it was confusing for some people apparently.

updated mod description

updates.title: [CS] Super Mario World BugFix!!
updates.changelog:
Bugfix update!

fixed bugs:

100 coins star animation softlock

Mario not dieing if touches lava on a moving platform

added Slopes Blocks to Rainbow Ride and Wing Mario Over the Rainbow entrance

fixed animations for some actions (walking - running up walls)

power upping/downing on a shell takes you off the shell

fixed slopes blocks not spawning in some levels that have multiple areas, like Tiny Huge Island

Thats it for now!

i know some levels are hard or not beatable, that will be andled in a next bigger update. but feel free to switch to normal mario anytime!

thankyou for playng my mod!

cs-swimwear-mario-yoshi.1172.title: [CS] Swimwear Mario & Yoshi
cs-swimwear-mario-yoshi.1172.author: Icebladeabra
cs-swimwear-mario-yoshi.1172.description:
This mod adds Mario's swimwear outfit from Super Mario Odyssey, and Swimwear Yoshi from Mario Kart World.

They both have an increased swimming speed, and a much faster flutter kick to match the breaststroke speed.

Yoshi also has the added ability to flutter jump.

cs-swagskeleton95s-character-select-pack.title: [CS] SwagSkeleton95's Character Select pack
cs-swagskeleton95s-character-select-pack.author: SwagSkeleton95
cs-swagskeleton95s-character-select-pack.description:
After much demand, my five DynOS playermodels are available in the Character Select mod, and they're joined by six additional exclusive models; adding up to a total of eleven new models!

Both princess models have compatibility with their movesets from Extra Characters, and share animations and voice clips from that mod. Bowser and Dry Bowser also have Bowser Moveset compatibility!

Credit to Melzinoff for the Princesses' animation

Credit to SuperKirbyLover for Peach's voice

Credit to MorphiGalaxy for Daisy's voice

Credit to Wibblus for Bowser moveset

If all goes well, this mod will be updated with additional characters and minor fixes, but it's mostly finished as is. Enjoy!

​

cs-tenna.901.title: [CS] Tenna
cs-tenna.901.author: birdekek
cs-tenna.901.description:
Mr. "Ant" Tenna from Deltarune Chapter 3

This version of Tenna, had the original goal of being accurate to the in-game sprites, but it kinda evolved from that, so i am ditching the name "[CS] Accurate Tenna."

Still though, i believe i maintained a pretty good accuracy to the original sprites.

Sadly this CS does not support recolorization. I tried to set it up but it was very difficult and probably couldn't work in the way i imagined it.

If i do find out a method, and have enough motivation to update this CS 
[CS] Trollface v2 literally having nothing to its name
 i can release another version of this with the recolorable versions as costumes. [This is why Tenna and Tenna (Suit) are seperated into different characters.]

i haven't actually played chapter 3 i just like tenna

Enjoy!

Trailer

DELICIOUS

updates.title: The Cuphead Pack!
updates.changelog:
The Cuphead Pack! (Inkwell Isle III Fixed!)

Finally the fix update is here, as an apology i've also added some extra content for you all
​

Now working in both Character Select Version 15 and 16!

So FINALLY the voicelines work on both versions, and if you are using version 16 you'll hear some familiar tunes in the background (thank you Violet and your code from the Triple Baka mod for solving this, yall are heroes).

Secret Ending?

Go into the menu and you'll find a settings menu for the mod! Theres only the option of making the ending turn into the "secret ending" and i'll stop there.

Thats all i got, just a fix for the pack that i hope yall enjoy, see you all next update! 
(which is gonna take a while since it will be a big one)
​

updates.title: The Cuphead Pack!
updates.changelog:
Small hotfix for the full pack version:

cuphead couldn't double down no more 

so yeah i fixed that (idk how these small things keep slippping through the cracks, sorry)

updates.title: The Cuphead Pack!
updates.changelog:
The Cuphead Pack! (Version: Inkwell Isle III)

This update took a while to come out due to the models being glitched which after a long time i finally managed to fix, anyways, here are the things added to the mod!

Full Pack Download!

Now instead of downloading both 
Cuphead 
and 
Mugman
, the full pack is now just one file! of course you can still download the ones you want by choosing the separated CS files, but this makes it that its way easier getting both characters in your game!

Custom Music!

Thats right! the SM64 tracks have been replaced with cuphead ones from the original game 
(adapted from the SM64 soundfont from videos i found on youtube, i don't know how to make them myself but they are credited in the mod)
, here is the list of tracks that have been replaced:

Power/Metal Themes with 
Fun House Frazzle

Boss fight theme with Clip Joint Calamity

Bowser fight with Floral Fury

Final Bowser fight with One Hell Of a Time

Credits theme with Cuphead OST - Closing Credits

(
The following video was recorded while the update was a WIP)

Your browser is not able to display this video.

Extra stuff yall probably don't care about

Reworked models and code

Mugman's
 face textures are finally fixed

Compatibility
 with character select version 1.16 (which isn't available in this site yet cuz its a wip)

Life icons are now good looking

One more update?

Theres only one more update planned for this mod, is it going to be the last? i don't know, but it will be the BIGGEST UPDATE THIS MOD WILL EVER RECEIVE, so i would be looking forward for some 
delicious last stars 
soon

cs-squishy.672.title: [CS] Squishy
cs-squishy.672.author: Squishy6094
cs-squishy.672.description:
The first public release of [CS] Squishy, A Character Select Pack meant to set a defining quality standard for modern Character Select Packs. This pack aims to deliver a fun and unique momentum-based moveset inspired by mods such as OMM, Pasta Castle, King the Memer, and More while utilizing all the Character Select API has to offer!

Put simple, uhmmm silly lady go zoom with codee!!! >.<

This release is made purely in celebration of my birthday!! Which of course means that this is not yet a finished product! I ask that you report ANY issues you encounter with the mod in the 
Github Issues
 for the mod as well as give feedback for what you think I can improve on! And also stay up to date by following progress in the 
Squishy Discord Server
!!!

This release features:

Squishy (x1)

 

A full Moveset making use of Character Select's Moveset Hooks

A Low skill floor, retaining base SM64 movement, Yet a High Skill Ceiling, Allowing for Practice-Perfect Gameplay

Near-Full OMM Support

Custom Host command for Manual Balancing 
/squishy-speed

An entirely custom camera, Doodell Cam!

Built and catered specifically for the Speed of Squishy

Inspired by OMM, Kero Quest, and Grace

Fully customizable via SM64CoopDX's Camera Settings

updates.title: Switching Pre-Release Link
updates.changelog: Hey so a ton of changes has happened to CS Squishy as of late, but Pre-Releases don't feel quite fitting. I'm re-versioning the mod to "Beytah" until I feel comfortable with a full-ass release. The Download button will now redirect to the latest commit download on the github repo rather than the Pre-Release made like 8 months ago. As of now I highly recommend following the repo on github rather than this site page if you're interested in being updated on changes.

updates.title: An actual update? You spoil me!

A small update, but one I felt worth doing nontheless. Changes include:

Finally gave shitilizer his own CT! Now he no longer uses the base "CT_CHAR" and instead uses "CT_SHITILIZER"! This should lead to better compatibility.

Globalized Shitilizer's CT, so now other mods will be able to do more stuff with him.

Deprecated non-stars version, as it has been long enough in my eyes.

cs-toon-link.460.title: [CS] Toon link
cs-toon-link.460.author: Visorcat
cs-toon-link.460.description:
Toon link is here in Mario 64 Co-op Deluxe!
​
This little hylian boy with a brave heart journey through land and sea (and even train tracks on a separate occasion) to put a stop to Ganon and his army while meeting new friends to aid him on his quest. this time, he'll have to enter the world of paintings to face different foes along with a certain king koopa.

Credits:

Huge thanks to MiiMario64 for fixing the face of the model with making it one texture and helping me with the Lua description. he's doing commissions at this moment so be sure to check him out.

cs-the-sugar-queen-gang.151.title: [CS] The Sugar Queen Gang
cs-the-sugar-queen-gang.151.author: MtgamesGnM
cs-the-sugar-queen-gang.151.description:
4 original characters have joined SM64CO-OP!  They all have unique personalities and vibes and stuff

BEA​
The candy thief herself​

Bea is a retired royalty with her goal being 1 thing and that is to obtain and consume the legendary Peach's Cake.  Even if she has to take down giant monsters, the cake is worth it all

Ms. CLOWN​
Bea's lanky sidekick​

Clown is here to aid Bea on her quest and help her reach some stars she might have more trouble collecting.  She stands at an 11 feet tall with her hair brushing against the top of every doorway she walks through

DILBO​
Clown's loyal pet​

Formerly a wild animal, Clown picked it up and holds it under her care.  However, dilbo tend to wander, so this one found its way in a place it probably shouldn't have.  It seems to have taken a liking to the culture of the Mushroom Kingdom and has picked up a few of its popular tunes

HORNETTE​
Bea's creepy stalker fan​

A strange entity from an unknown origin, Hornette is obsessed with Bea to the extent that she wants to be just like her.  The only issue is that she is so inept at understanding boundaries that Bea simply cannot stand her.  However that does not stop her from trying to get her #1 hero's attention.

NEW THINGS IN THIS SPECIFIC VERSION:​

Each character now has alternate costumes (Pictured Below)

Hornette is now fully-voiced by my friend Pickpen (Artist and character designer for Nessy the NES Robot)

All custom animations have been reset to default

cs-toothless-mini-pack.540.title: [CS] Toothless Mini Pack
cs-toothless-mini-pack.540.author: MrMarco1003
cs-toothless-mini-pack.540.description:
Popular dragon from How to Train Your Dragon movies makes his way to Super Mario 64! Toothless practiced more walking on his hind legs, so he can safe princess Peach from Bowser! Mod also contains Toothless's offsprings from HTTYD3/Homecoming as a bonus, because I'm a nice guy!

Mod Includes:

Toothless, Dart, Pouncer and Ruffrunner skins

Blink, half blink and dead eye textures!

Toothless voice mod from movies! (Offsprings has same voice than Toothless, expect it's higher pitched)

Caps (Normal, wing and metal)

Normal and wing caps are replaced by viking helmets

Metal cap is replaced by Hiccup's helmet

Life icons

Custom health bar

All models are also recolorable!

Skin: Skin color for all models

Shirt: Fake tail fin color for Toothless

NOTE: This mod requires latest version of Character Select mod to work!

YouTube Video of the Mod

cs-the-wastelanders.892.title: [CS] The Wastelanders
cs-the-wastelanders.892.author: JimboJumbo64
cs-the-wastelanders.892.description:
[THE NEWEST VERSION OF CHARACTER SELECT IS NEEDED FOR THE FULL EXPERIENCE, USE IT AT YOUR OWN RISK]

This is a custom character mod pack for the main three protagonists of 
Disney's Epic Mickey
, Mickey Mouse, Oswald the Lucky Rabbit, and Gremlin Gus.

After beating the blot, the three heroes who saved wasteland are now saving a princess from a reptilian-looking monster.

This is the big update to my last mod, Wastelander Mickey, which now adds Wastelander Oswald and Wastelander Gus, and maybe some more things will come soon too.

Thank you everyone who helped me along the way making this mod.

[OLD] Here's the release trailer.

Ghosty and Salt helped me with .luaing, while I did everything else. And thank you to MrScaryHalloween for playtesting my mod.

I of course do not own these characters. Everything in this mod, besides the graffiti art, are from Disney, Disney Interactive, and Junction Point Studios.

updates.title: EYES BE MOVIN'!!!
updates.changelog:
This new update is mainly just some minor updates.

-Changes the recolorables to be costumes of the base models, instead of their own separate character.

-Adds a whole bunch of color palettes for the recolorables because who doesn't like options.

-Adds blinking heads to the base characters, along with a left and right looking animations for both the base characters and recolorables.

This will probably be the last big update to the cast, except for bug fixes, more color palettes and what not. I am satisfied with how my custom characters are and won't be making any changes to them anytime soon, probably will update them when I get better at modding and 3D modeling, but here's hopin'. Thank you again to everyone who has helped me with this mod of mine and everyone else who gave me ideas along with you guys who checked out the mod. I am very happy you all are enjoying it so far and don't worry about telling me what should added, fixed, or tweaked because I want to make this mod as good as I can make it. And don't worry, there is still more to come so stay tuned!

updates.title: RECOLORABLE UPDATE!!!
updates.changelog: You guys have asked for it, and now it's here, The Wastelanders are now fully recolorable along with some other new things as well, make sure to get the stylish newest version of character select for the full experience, it's on github and I think now it on this mod page, have fun!

updates.title: Oopsie
updates.changelog: I accidently posted the wrong mod, lol.

cs-vl-tone-and-cjes-luigi-archived.12.title: [CS] VL-Tone and CJes Luigi - ARCHIVED
cs-vl-tone-and-cjes-luigi-archived.12.author: Yuyake "FunkyLion"
cs-vl-tone-and-cjes-luigi-archived.12.description:
THIS MOD IS ARCHIVED. It will be continued in 
[CS] The Originals
!

A big throwback to the late 2000s of SM64 community! 

    The models were extracted from their original romhacks to ensure the models were as close to the originals as possible!

These also include the hex codes for their respectful original colors!

Requires Squishy's 
Character Select
 Mod enabled.

Will be added eventually in the main repo.

Special Thanks to:

FluffaMario
 - proper romhacks to extract models from, and fixes on mirror.

SonicDark
 - providing assistance in the restored model.inc.c files.

Credits to:

Starxxon/VL-Tone - VL Luigi

CJes - CJes Luigi

updates.title: ARCHIVED
updates.changelog:
This mod will be archived as it'll be continued by 
[CS] The Originals
.

updates.title: Light and Ambient Fixes
updates.changelog:
Changelog:

A visual glitch for CJes Luigi's logo and sideburn in Arena's Blimp City has been fixed.

updates.title: Now acts as an Alt. Switch!
updates.changelog:
Changelog:

Eye Switches not working for VL has been fixed.

Inaccuracies for both VL and Cjes models have been fixed.

Cjes acts as an oufit to VL, saving list space.

Fixed textures.

Now shows the version number on Character Select menu.

updates.title: Fixed Logo to be more Accurate!
updates.changelog: Fixes logo UV to match the original.

updates.title: Updated Logo
updates.changelog: I have updated the emblem to be directly from VL-Tone's textures. Up 'til now, the emblem was reused from CJES's because of alpha issues, however I have found a way to fix that and have applied an edited version of VL's Emblem to be as faithful as possible!

updates.title: Fixed Script Error for CoopDX v1.0.1
updates.changelog:
This fixes the script error that is caused by the custom texture icon.

Since the icon is basically just vanilla Luigi icon, I have set the icon usage straight from Vanilla's.

updates.title: Models now match the Vanilla Models in Quality.
updates.changelog:
Ambient Colors has been fixed for the textures, which means they're up to par with the vanilla models.

This includes:

Metal Environmental Texture

Metal Wings

Logo

Sideburns

updates.title: Updated Character Models -- sm64coopdx v1.0
updates.changelog:
Changes:

Logo is adjusted for the new extra part of EMBLEM.

Character Select Default Color Palette is adjusted to include EMBLEM coloring.

METAL Coloring has been updated.

Mirroring has been fixed.

updates.title: For Character Select v1.8
updates.changelog:
Now that Character Select included a palette saving system to activate default palettes for each model, this mod is updated using the ORIGINAL colors of each model.

You can download the new 
Character Select
.

VL-Tone​

CJES​

cs-violets-sonic-pack.671.title: [CS] Violet's Sonic Pack

cs-violets-sonic-pack.671.description:

 and

Hope everyone has fun in this speedy mod, gotta go fast!

Cirno

Meiling

updates.title: Touhou 64 v3.0
updates.changelog:
Touhou 64 - Character Select​
A model pack for 
SM64CoopDX
 and the 
Character Select mod
 which adds Touhou characters.

Character list​

Mima

Sanae Kochiya

Momiji Inubashiri

Chen

Reimu Hakurei

Marisa Kirisame

Reisen (Bougetsushou)

Doremy Sweet

Alice Margatroid

Yuuka Kazami

Yumemi Okazaki

Yuuma Toutetsu

Joon Yorigami

Installation​
Copy the mod directory into the mods folder of the game. You will need to have the 
Character Select mod
 installed.

Resources​

SM64CoopDX

Character Template

Character Select Mod

Discord Server

Fast64

Blender v3.6

Credits​

Player Legend
 - Models

Tough Guy Blues - Mima icon, testing

Lilpaulo3232 - New voices, from 
Touhou Sky Arena -MATSURI- Climax

Qwealm - Original base for new voices

License​
Models and code from Touhou 64 Character Select © 2025 are licensed under CC BY-SA 4.0Sounds belong to the developers of 
Touhou Sky Arena -MATSURI- Climax

updates.title: Touhou 64 v2.0
updates.changelog:
Touhou 64 v2.0 Release

Added Chen, Reimu, and Marisa

In total, the roster is:

Mima

Sanae Kochiya

Momiji Inubashiri

Chen

Reimu Hakurei

Marisa Kirisame

Added sounds, currently all characters have the same voice. Sounds are a work in progress, so I am open to feedback. Voice clips were taken from 
Fantasy Kaleidoscope ~The Memories of Phantasm~
.

cs-vinny-vinesauce.338.title: [CS] Vinny Vinesauce
cs-vinny-vinesauce.338.author: Ash-Must-Die
cs-vinny-vinesauce.338.description:
Variety streamer takes the role of bing bing wahoo man.

Needs Character select to function.

Includes:

Custom Voice lines

Custom Icon

5 costumes to choose from

Updates may come in the future, adding more voice lines, costumes, and recolorability.

All voice clips extracted from Vinesauce's streams

Make sure to check out Vinesauce on Twitch and YouTube

cs-triple-baka-pack.418.title: [CS] Triple Baka Pack
cs-triple-baka-pack.418.author: VioletSM64
cs-triple-baka-pack.418.description:
Blue hair, blue tie, hiding in your Wi-Fi!

The Cheerful Vocaloid, 
Hatsune Miku
, her eager yet mischievous friend, 
Kasane Teto
, and the most stubborn of the bunch, 
Akita Neru
, 
arrive in the low poly world of the Mushroom Kingdom!

This mod comes with:

Hatsune Miku 
(Mario, Mesmerizer, Sonic, Triple Baka, MCLS, Brazilian, World Is Mine, Static, Classic)

Kasane Teto 
(Luigi, Mesmerizer, Shadow, Triple Baka, SynthV, Voicepeak, Spoken For, Birdbrain, Classic)

Akita Neru 
(Wario, Mesmerizer, Silver, Triple Baka, Flop Era, Classic)

Custom Voicelines from Miku, Teto, and Neru themselves (Done by chalz)

Custom Caps

Recolorability

Custom Health Bar

Custom Cap music

New Expressions

AND MUCH MUCH MORE!

Credits:

Violet: Creator

Chalz: Miku/Teto/Akita Voicelines and Music

Wibblus: Hair Physics / Coding / Animations

Zam Boni / Animations

ManIsCat2: Coding

Baconator: Coding

SwagSkeleton: Coding

Mayo: Thumbnail Art

Be sure to download the latest Character Select version in order to use the Triple Baka Pack mod correctly!

WARNING: This mod may have a person with Blue Hair, Blue Tie, hiding in your Wi-Fi!

Link to the Trailer!

So Retro support (Mod done by EmilyEmmi)

Miku's Default Palette adjusted slightly

Credits:

Teto Sprites: Keeby2

Neru Sprites (Editted Miku Sprites): BoxxyPop

updates.title: CS V1.16 Error Fix
updates.changelog:
Hiya, with CS V1.16 releasing, I went ahead and fixed a few errors regarding the mod, you should now no longer see any errors with the mod itself

With that being said, there are no further updates for the mod right now, but we are working hard on the next one currently, I will give an update whenever I feel is necessary, happy new years to everyone!

updates.title: Error Fix
updates.changelog:
Expect some updates for a bit, there is usually bugs to be found right as the mod releases

- Fixes Errors caused when opening the game in v1.5.1 Coop

updates.title: Triple Baka Deluxe!
updates.changelog:
Oh boy, it's been a long while since I updated this mod, and for good reason too! This mod update has been in the works for over 2 months, and I do not say it lightly when I say this mod can very well be considered a new mod considering all the changes and additions given to the mod. It has been almost one year since the first release of 
[CS] Hatsune Miku
, since then, we have grown to include both Kasane Teto and Akita Neru in the pack as well, and the pack has grown a lot of support since then, having over 50k downloads on the Mod Website! I would love to thank you all for your support on the mod, we wouldn't be here today if it wasn't for the people that loved this mod!

Lets go over the Changelog shall we?

Changelog:

Models (Hatsune Miku, Kasane Teto, Akita Neru)

Every model has now been redone, giving them a much more needed glowup, some few new details were added on the models, and some were given a much bigger overhaul, like the Mario skins

Hatsune Miku

Mario Miku

Mesmerizer Miku

Triple Baka Miku

Sonic Miku

Magical Cure Love Shot Miku

World Is Mine Miku

Brazilian Miku

Static Miku

Kasane Teto

Luigi Teto

Mesmerizer Teto

Triple Baka Teto

Shadow Teto

SynthV Teto

Voicepeak Teto

Spoken For Teto

Birdbrain Teto

Akita Neru

Wario Neru

Mesmerizer Neru

Triple Baka Neru

Silver Neru

Flop Era Neru

Classic Models are also included in the mod (Only the base models) in case you prefer playing around with the original characters

Everyone now has their own idles, they also seem to be more joyful running and jumping around 
(Miku Idle / Jump / Run animations done by Zam Boni, Teto / Neru Idles done by Violet)

Options Menu

There is now an options menu to customize your playing experience while using the mod

Vanilla Animations
: Turn ON in order to use the SM64 Animations rather than the new Custom Animations for the Triple Baka

Dynamic Eyes
: Turn ON to turn on the Dynamic Eyes previously mentioned above

Custom End Screen
: Turn ON to show the custom end screen at the end of the game rather the vanilla version

Custom Cap Music
: Turn ON to listen to the lovely custom songs made for the Caps when wearing them, turning it off reverts it back to the vanilla songs

Anamanaguchi Miku Ending Music
: Turn ON to enjoy the ending music made for the mod 
(Ending Music by Chalz)

Jump Jump Jump UP!!! Ending Music
: 
Turn ON to enjoy the ending music made for the mod (Having both ending music turned on will override it to this one by default, and I heavily recommend this song over the Anamanaguchi Ending) 
(Ending Music by Chalz)

New Additions

Akita Neru will now have a low Rin Voicebank instead of the original high pitched Miku Voicebank as her voice. 
(Voices done by Chalz)

Teto now has her own Custom HP Bar!

The older Life Icons have been replaced with newer (and much better) Life Icons

While using Wing Cap, going into flying mode allows you to ride around on an object based on what character you are using! 
(Code done by Wibblus)

Miku - Leek

Teto - Baguette

Neru - Cellphone

The Base Models for Miku / Teto / Neru all have 5 new palette options for them that you can try out! Of course, you still have the recolorability option if you want to give your own flair to the Triple Baka

Vanish Cap now has it's own music (Based on Gocha Gocha Urusee!)

Miku / Teto / Neru now have a little fun animation when you are selecting a character in the CS Menu 
(Animations done by Wibblus)

Character Select v1.16

Triple Baka Pack will be compatible with both v1.15.1 and the upcoming v1.16, there will be a few additions to the Triple Baka Pack when you use v1.16 

Miku / Teto / Neru will have their own music to go along with CS' new theme that plays in the background while selecting a character

Miku / Teto / Neru will have some graffiti in the background of the CS Menu

Miku / Teto / Neru will now be referred to as "Miku", "Teto", "Neru", instead of their full names like in v1.15.1, this is why the dialog code was removed in this version

That should be all the new changes for this update! Please note that there might be a small update or two some time after the mod releases to account for bug fixes and possibly new additions, but I think I am happy with where the mod currently sits at and I cannot wait to see everyone's reaction to what we have been cooking up these past few months, with that being said, we hope you enjoy this mod, have fun!

updates.title: Costume Update!
updates.changelog:
Long time no see! The Triple Baka Pack has received a small but pretty good update!

The Triple Baka Pack now has 3 new costumes:

Magical Cure Love Shot Miku

Shadow (the Hedgehog) Teto

Mesmerizer Akita

With that being said, only one bug was fixed which was that some expressions still played on the metal forms of the Triple Baka, those were all removed and fixed

Enjoy the new costumes!

updates.title: Triple Baka!
updates.changelog:
Hiya everyone! Back with a huge update for the Miku and Teto mod, which is now officially called the Triple Baka Pack with 
Akita Neru
 finally joining Miku and Teto on their journey in Super Mario 64!
​
Here are all the changes/additions that this update brings:

Additions:

Akita Neru is officially a new character added, with some high pitched voicelines as well! She also has a costume which is based on Wario, with hopefully more costumes for her coming soon!

Hatsune Miku now has a new outfit, being based on her Sonic collab attire!

Kasane Teto also now has a new outfit, being based on her outfit from the song "Override"

Custom Cap music! Wear a cap and you may hear a familiar tune as you wear it!

New Expressions! Miku/Teto now do a happy face whenever getting a star/key, and Miku/Teto/Akita get a shocked expression whenever getting hurt/thrown/blown away

You will now be referred to as Miku/Teto/Akita instead of "Mario" depending on which skin you use

A surprise waiting for you at the end of the game? 

Changes:

Fixed Hatsune Miku's name from her description (It was Hastune Miku 
)

Fixed Recolorability for Miku's metal leak

That should about sum it up! Not sure when the next update will be but I do hope you enjoy this mod a lot, Me and Chalz put a lot of effort into this and it would be great to see you all enjoy it! Happy Miku Day!

Link to Triple Baka Pack Trailer
​

updates.title: Hand State Recolor Issue Fixed
updates.changelog:
Sorry for another quick update, this fixes the recoloring for the hand states on Mario Miku and Luigi Teto!

If you find any bugs or issues with the Miku mod please let me know and I will fix it!

updates.title: Luigi Teto Eye Fix
updates.changelog: Just a quick little patch to fix Luigi Teto's blinking animation, oopsies thats my bad!

updates.title: You can call me Teto!
updates.changelog:
Hello everyone! I am here to bring a huge new update for the Hatsune Miku mod!

Hatsune Miku felt a little lonely being by herself so she brought along her eager yet mischievous friend, Kasane Teto!

Kasane Teto comes with her very own voicelines along with 4 new costumes!

Regular (UTAU Outfit)

SynthV Outfit

Mesmerizer Outfit

Luigi Outfit

Along with this there have been a few changes added to the Miku mod itself:

Miku and Teto's metal form is now recolorable (Uses the Hair slot)

A brand new Custom Health Bar for the mod!

Fixed hand placements for when Miku has them open or taking her cap off/on

Miku costumes (Mesmerizer and Brazilian) now have their textures metal as well

Miku Voicelines overhauled! (Done by chalz!)

Miku Palette updated!

With that being said, have fun with both Miku and Teto hiding in your Wi-Fi!

updates.title: Mesmerizing Update
updates.changelog:
This update will likely be the last Miku update for a while as I shift my focus onto other mods I am working on

This update features 
Mesmerizer Miku
 as another alt costume for Hatsune Miku!

Also Capless Heads are fixed across all Mikus, she now has her new head model instead of the old one

Please let me know if you really wanna see more content of this mod, I don't see myself adding more to the mod in the future, but if enough people wants it, I will gladly return to this, so anyways enjoy!

cs-wastelander-mickey.836.title: [CS] Wastelander Mickey
cs-wastelander-mickey.836.author: JimboJumbo64
cs-wastelander-mickey.836.description:
[CHARACTER SELECT MOD IS NEEDED]

Mickey has left Wasteland after beating the Blot and is now saving a princess from a reptilian-looking monster. Thank you everyone who have helped me make this custom character mod a thing, I had a very fun time making it and learned so much of modding and blender, still hate blender though.

Assets and model are from: Junction Point Studios, Seed Studio, and Disney.

[Images of the Custom Character Mod]

updates.title: FUNNY UPDATE!!
updates.changelog: Since now that Wastelander Mickey is bundled with Oswald and Gus, and also because I got nothing better to do, this update will replace the current model of mickey with my first ever model of Mickey, and he definitly has seen better days.

updates.title: Now with better voice quality.
updates.changelog: I figured out along the way how to make better quality sounding clips. so I went back and redid all of his voicelines and I was gonna wait to do this once I've finished up Oswald and Gus. but I decided to just put out a new update so future people wont have to listen to his old voicelines.

cs-weirdo.515.title: [CS] Weirdo
cs-weirdo.515.author: pinkertonbyweezer
cs-weirdo.515.description:
Weirdo.

Occupation: Weirdo.

Species: Weirdo.

Description: Weirdo.

An unfinished Character Select mod for my persona.

Features:

Colorability

Someone asking "who is that?" when someone watches over your shoulder

Getting flipped off as soon as you reach the end of a level (pictured left)

The Weezometer

Weezer-Themed caps

Bugs:

Switching caps does not change the head model correctly

Vanish-Metal cap makes Nostrils and Eyes Vanish-Metal

Metal cap Open Hands/Peace Sign do not work correctly

Silent (intentional for now)

There's a good chance I just don't touch this thing again on this site, but I hope to add voice acting to her and potentially a moveset (!!!!) that's entirely inspired by that one beta mod I don't think needs mentioning.
