cs-wario-land-64.1103.title: [CS] Wario Land 64
cs-wario-land-64.1103.author: SwagSkeleton95
cs-wario-land-64.1103.description:
Waah! It's been too long since the last brand new Wario Adventure! Maybe I should pick up the old treasure hunting sport again...This bounty for saving Princess Toadstool will do! What? This is supposed to be 
Mario's 
game?! Who cares!? Don't I deserve a little glory, too?? I'll just have to butt in and show how much better of a hero I truly am! No need to thank me, wahahaha! Now keep on reading to see what I have to offer!​

Five Differen
t Flavors of Wario!
​

I think I'll bring some of my best friends along for this adventure..! That's right, it's Me, and Me, and Me and Me and Me! This adventure lets you play as up to five of my beautiful selves! Play as the me from Land 3, 4, Shake it, Virtual Boy, and from my very first original game! If that isn't an amazing deal, I don't know what is, guhaha!

​

My Abilities!
​

My abilities are different from that lame show-off, Mario's! Enjoy playing as someone 
actually
 powerful for once! My shoulder-bash will easily take out any weak enemy that you hit with it, and it won't wait for any doors either! Wahahaha! Cool, huh? And that's not all of my awesome movement options, either! Bash, hold Z, and jump, and I'll do an awesome front flip! Let's see Mario do that!! Guhahaha! How about you find the rest yourself? My moves totally turn Mario's adventure upside down! Some things react differently to my abilities, so try to find every possible way to screw things up!

​
Get Stronger!
​
What, I'm still not tough enough for you!? You should have a little more respect! But your old pal Wario has you covered. Gather those shiny Power Star things to gain new, powerful versions of your abilities! How 'bout that? Take down multiple enemies with the 
Super Ground Pound!
 And not even Bowser will stand a chance against my 
Super Shoulder Bash!

​
Raise Your Rank!
​
Did you think this hero stuff was free!? No way! I deserve a little something too, you know? Those painting worlds are full of my favorite thing in the world: Coins. Help your pal Wario out and grab as many of them as you can! That Princess Toadstool had the right idea; I think I'll buy myself my own fancy castle with the money. I'll keep track of just how many you've found, and give you my personal, 
Wario-approved
 score at the end!

​
Find Treasure!
​
You'd better not think that strength is all you need to complete this adventure! Treasure hunting needs brains, too, you know!? And my brain is as smart as it gets. Each level has a valuable hidden gem somewhere in it, but you'll need to really explore to find some of them... I'm counting on you here! Each gem you find will multiply your ending score, so you can't miss out! There's sixteen gems in total, but...I thought there were only fifteen levels!?

​
Interact!
​
Sounds like everybody was expecting Mario! What, aren't they happy to see me instead!? All the friendly characters in the game will react differently to my awe-inspiring presence. Even the signs have re-written themselves to explain 
my
 controls instead!?

It doesn't stop at talking! I'll try bashing into someone to see if they have any goodies for me! It's a fair trade for saving their fancy princess, don't you think? Wahahaha!

​
What else do you want me to tell you!?​

What are you waiting for, huh!? Aren't you convinced yet!? There's still more to discover in the adventure, but I won't just tell you everything. Go find out for yourself! And a great big thanks to the developers of this mod for bringing my dazzling self into this game!

SwagSkeleton95 - Models, textures, HUD, Coding, Dialogue, renders, modpage​

Cheekimelon - Dialogue​

TheBoomerAgainstTheZoomers - Menu descriptions, Sound​

SullyBoy - Graffiti textures​

Morishiko & Baconator2558 - Ending jingles​

Sharen - Contributor​

Jerthepear - Contributor​

Kog64 - Contributor​

And the playtesters!

Wobbmin​

Hijacked​

SuperMoi64​

SchmooMaster​

BG​

THIS MOD REQUIRES THE LATEST VERSION OF SQUISHY'S CHARACTER SELECT MOD!

Watch the overview and trailer here!
​
Notes:

I'm aware of standard camera having some trouble with Wario's swimming. This will be fixed in the next update.

BG​

THIS MOD REQUIRES THE LATEST VERSION OF SQUISHY'S CHARACTER SELECT MOD!

Watch the overview and trailer here!
​
Notes:

I'm aware of standard camera having some trouble with Wario's swimming. This will be fixed in the next update.

Waah! It's been too long since the last brand new Wario Adventure! Maybe I should pick up the old treasure hunting sport again...This bounty for saving Princess Toadstool will do! What? This is supposed to be 
Mario's 
game?! Who cares!? Don't I deserve a little glory, too?? I'll just have to butt in and show how much better of a hero I truly am! No need to thank me, wahahaha! Now keep on reading to see what I have to offer!​

Five Differen

t Flavors of Wario!
​

I think I'll bring some of my best friends along for this adventure..! That's right, it's Me, and Me, and Me and Me and Me! This adventure lets you play as up to five of my beautiful selves! Play as the me from Land 3, 4, Shake it, Virtual Boy, and from my very first original game! If that isn't an amazing deal, I don't know what is, guhaha!

​

My Abilities!
​

My abilities are different from that lame show-off, Mario's! Enjoy playing as someone 
actually
 powerful for once! My shoulder-bash will easily take out any weak enemy that you hit with it, and it won't wait for any doors either! Wahahaha! Cool, huh? And that's not all of my awesome movement options, either! Bash, hold Z, and jump, and I'll do an awesome front flip! Let's see Mario do that!! Guhahaha! How about you find the rest yourself? My moves totally turn Mario's adventure upside down! Some things react differently to my abilities, so try to find every possible way to screw things up!

​
Get Stronger!

​
What, I'm still not tough enough for you!? You should have a little more respect! But your old pal Wario has you covered. Gather those shiny Power Star things to gain new, powerful versions of your abilities! How 'bout that? Take down multiple enemies with the 
Super Ground Pound!
 And not even Bowser will stand a chance against my 
Super Shoulder Bash!

​

Raise Your Rank!
​
Did you think this hero stuff was free!? No way! I deserve a little something too, you know? Those painting worlds are full of my favorite thing in the world: Coins. Help your pal Wario out and grab as many of them as you can! That Princess Toadstool had the right idea; I think I'll buy myself my own fancy castle with the money. I'll keep track of just how many you've found, and give you my personal, 
Wario-approved
 score at the end!

​
Find Treasure!

​
You'd better not think that strength is all you need to complete this adventure! Treasure hunting needs brains, too, you know!? And my brain is as smart as it gets. Each level has a valuable hidden gem somewhere in it, but you'll need to really explore to find some of them... I'm counting on you here! Each gem you find will multiply your ending score, so you can't miss out! There's sixteen gems in total, but...I thought there were only fifteen levels!?

​

Interact!
​
Sounds like everybody was expecting Mario! What, aren't they happy to see me instead!? All the friendly characters in the game will react differently to my awe-inspiring presence. Even the signs have re-written themselves to explain 
my
 controls instead!?

It doesn't stop at talking! I'll try bashing into someone to see if they have any goodies for me! It's a fair trade for saving their fancy princess, don't you think? Wahahaha!

​
What else do you want me to tell you!?​

What are you waiting for, huh!? Aren't you convinced yet!? There's still more to discover in the adventure, but I won't just tell you everything. Go find out for yourself! And a great big thanks to the developers of this mod for bringing my dazzling self into this game!

SwagSkeleton95 - Models, textures, HUD, Coding, Dialogue, renders, modpage​

Cheekimelon - Dialogue​

TheBoomerAgainstTheZoomers - Menu descriptions, Sound​

SullyBoy - Graffiti textures​

Morishiko & Baconator2558 - Ending jingles​

Sharen - Contributor​

Jerthepear - Contributor​

Kog64 - Contributor​

And the playtesters!

Ever wanted to make your own rom hack but never knew how to change the names of your levels?

Ever wanted to just simply make the level names fun and goofy or just have a new taste?

Now you can! Enter the Lua file and start getting creative!

You can even change the star names if you want! How cool is that?

Note: Please do
 
NOT 
use this for offensive purposes. This is intended to help people with their amazing rom hacks.

P.S: You do not need my permission to host or make your own mod with this, nor do you need to credit me. Just do what you want and be happy, alright?

dbg.912.title: Dbg
dbg.912.author: djoslin0
dbg.912.description:
Dbg is a tiny, immediate-mode debug-drawing library for Lua that lets you quickly visualize things in the game world.

It is very useful for debugging a mod you're creating. This is a library, not a mod on its own.

The upload on this website will not be updated, download it from the 
Github Repo

---

Read the Documentation here

Credits for the original line rendering code go to Isaac

Requires sm64coopdx v1.4 or above

dgokis-moveset.1021.title: DGoki's moveset
dgokis-moveset.1021.author: Dgoki
dgokis-moveset.1021.description:
What is this moveset?

Is a funky moveset, fully made by me.

It was made to be powerful while not removing things like the ability to BLJ from the player.

I was going to keep this private, however many people asked me to release it, over weeks and months.

I am 11 months late on my promise to release this, so i remastered it to make it more enjoyable.

I thought for a while no one cared about this anymore but i was wrong about that.

So i updated this moveset and improved it by a ton.

This moveset includes:

Speed modifier 
[PRESS Y TO SWITCH]  
| (It includes 0,1x,0.5x,1.0x,1.3x,1.5x and 2.0x speed.)

Dir-Rotation   
[PRESS X TO SWITCH]
  | (Turn this off to BLJ or do similar things.)

Custom moves  
 [CAN BE DISABLED IN SETTINGS]
 | (Ground pound jump and dive, able to dive out of almost everything, able to quadruple jump, slide kick out of a dive with an A Press, etc.)

Here a list with all commands:

/dgm_help - Tells you basics about the moveset.

/dgm_moves - Tells you a list with the moves.

/dgm_reset - Reenters the level with full health. (good if you get stucked)

/dgm_version - Tells you the version. (Duh)

This is how the hud looks like:

Here a list with all the settings:

Special thanks to all the people that helped me test this goofy moveset.

day-night-cycle-dx.3.title: Day Night Cycle DX
day-night-cycle-dx.3.author: AgentX
day-night-cycle-dx.3.description:
This mod adds a fully featured day & night cycle system with night, sunrise, day and sunset to sm64coopdx. This mod was originally made for sm64ex-coop but was overhauled and updated to use new sm64coopdx exclusive Lua functionality. Days last 24 minutes and you can switch to and from 24 hour time with /time 24h

Special thanks to MaiskX3 for the night time music.

Special thanks to AngelicMiracles for the sunset, sunrise and night time skyboxes.

Special thanks to eros71 for salvaging the mod files.

updates.title: Day Night Cycle DX v2.5.2
updates.changelog: Fixed a bug with one of the behavior scripts to prevent a possible crash. Mod functionally the same otherwise.

updates.title: Day Night Cycle DX v2.5.1
updates.changelog: Fixed script error with /time command

updates.title: Day Night Cycle DX v2.5
updates.changelog:
Added brand new sunrise, sunset, and night skyboxes for Underwater City (WDW) skybox

Added brand new sunrise, sunset, and night skyboxes for Snow Mountains (CCM) skybox

Added brand new sunrise, sunset, and night skyboxes for Desert (SSL) skybox

Added brand new sunrise, sunset, and night skyboxes for Above Clouds (JRB) skybox

Added Environment Tint compatibility

Completely overhauled lighting calculation code to be more performant

Made small optimizations and clean ups all around

Made the sun rise sooner in April

Adjusted night colors

Fixed night music not ending at the exact sunrise time

Made the lighting direction hook use a 
Vec3f
 instead of a 
number

despair-marios-gambit.103.title: Despair Mario’s Gambit
despair-marios-gambit.103.author: Ex Coop Mods Archive
despair-marios-gambit.103.description:
Original Post: July 12, 2022

Author: Sunk

Romhack by GMD.

There are 120 stars in this large romhack.

Slight warning that the credits course will be very laggy.

Known issues/inconsistencies:

Courses 9 and 12 are a bit fuzzy since there’s an issue with fog.

There are no actors since for some reason they didn’t want to work.

The first bowser fight has a starting textbox, which isn’t in the original hack.

Course 15 has a star select screen, which isn’t in the original hack.

There is no gate preventing Bowser 2 from being killed without going through the whole stage.

The hack has aglab camera; this port doesn’t.

Despair Mario's Gambit Update 
Romhack created by GMD Category: Romhack Overall improved experience: Now uses custom skyboxes Changed camera mode from 8 directional to romhack Stars now spawn in precisely the correct place (ignoring off-by-1 error)Added preview blue coins Course 15 no longer has an act selector Loading times should overall improve

Despair Mario's Gambit 
Quick update...literally (made loading a bit faster by not having unnecessary files)Also small changes Category: Romhack Making this update now because I've seen more people host this hack.

Despair Mario's Gambit
 update

Bowser 1 fight no longer shows the cutscene

Bowser fight entry cutscenes are disabled in this hack normally, but disabling it also removes the textbox. The bowser 1 fight was not supposed to have a textbox, so this is fine, but the bowser 2 fight does.

Fixed bowser 2 fight script errors

Bowser no longer moves in the bowser 2 fight

This is in the original romhack

In bowser 2 fight, there is now a metal box that blocks bowser's tail. This box can only be removed by usage of the switch at the top of the level. Before this, you could skip that entire climb since the gate couldn't block the throw.

The floor below the bomb in the bowser 2 fight now exists.

duels.9.title: Duels
duels.9.author: EmilyEmmi
duels.9.description:
This add-on mod lets players engage with 1v1 battles with each other at any time! Simply type /duel [player name] to request a duel! Other commands include:

/forceduel [NAME|ID,NAME|ID] - As a host or moderator, force two players to battle.

/bestof [NUM] - Set the amount of wins needed for a match.

/sky [0-2] - Set the background and music for a match.

/time [SEC] - Set the time until Sudden Death.

/forfeit - Leave a duel.

/spectate-duel [NAME|ID] - Spectate another duel.

You can also enter "random" for /duel and /forceduel to pick a random player. 
Do NOT use with game modes.

updates.title: v1.2
updates.changelog:
Update for coopDX v1.0. Fixes player name rendering.

That's literally it.

dynamic-lives-icon.232.title: Dynamic Lives Icon
dynamic-lives-icon.232.author: EmilyEmmi
dynamic-lives-icon.232.description: This mod changes your lives icon to match your palette. It also changes it based on what caps (or lack thereof) you're wearing! Also includes Character Select Support, and an API that allows you to add a recolorable icon for your character. See head.lua for details.

updates.title: v2.0
updates.changelog: It's about time this got updated. In addition to bug fixes, this new version includes API support, allowing you to add recolorable icons to characters in Character Select! If you get the latest commit to Extra Characters Plus from GitHub, it'll have support already (EC icons created by Yuyake). MarioHunt also supports the API.

dynos-allergic-to-mountains-64-official-.title: [DynOS] Allergic To Mountains 64 Official Co-op Model Pack
dynos-allergic-to-mountains-64-official-.author: ThaGurlTIlly
dynos-allergic-to-mountains-64-official-.description:
Allergic To Mountains 64
 was a project I started for the Mario 64 PC port way back in 2020, it has since been basically cancelled, and as a final farewell, I decided to make one final update to the characters, when Allergic To Mountains began as Super Show 64, it was a coop mod, Mario and Luigi were the first models to be made for the project, and now we've come full circle, Mario 64 Co-op has gotten a lot of changes, those changes have resulted in updates to my models, done by third parties, that took creative liberties in order to add the new features, like custom colors, resulting in the removal of the cel shading i've grown so fond of, these updates done by myself, aswell as FluffaMario, takes no liberties, not only is the cel shading back, but the recoloring is still possible! this pack includes Mario, Luigi, both Wario models, as well as a completely new Toad!

Credits as well as official palette colors are in the included .Txt file​

updates.title: v1.0 out!
updates.changelog:
It took a long time, but I've finally updated the older models to be up to standard.

The Mario model in particular has been ported to a better template and now includes recolorable metal cap, metal wings, and a few model fixes like improved overalls and cap coloration. Luigi's metal cap has been similarly fixed.

Enjoy!!

I'd like to thank everyone for enjoying the DynOS, and being so kind about it in the comments. My motivation to make more like this is currently a little low- but who knows! It might come back. Thanks a ton, either way! You're the best.

updates.title: Waluigi update!!
updates.changelog: Second to last planned update brings Waluigi to the pack, completing the crew! The final update (1.0) will consist of small fixes to bring every model up to the same standard, and fixing some minor annoyances. Enjoy!

updates.title: Wario and Toad!
updates.changelog: It's Wario and Toad! Waluigi is on his way, but it might take a while. Enjoy!

dynos-swagskeleton95s-replacements.564.description:
A massive DynOS pack that replaces over 
50 models
 (56, to be exact) with updated yet low-poly designs.
​
Every single enemy and NPC 
has recieved an overhaul, along with several smaller changes like new textures for the coins, cap switches, and exclamation boxes for a brand new way to view Super Mario 64.

This pack is best used alongside 
my Playermodel pack
 or 
its CS expansion.

My previously released Bowser and Peach DynOS packs come built-in with this one. I'm leaving them up in case anyone wants to install them seperately, though.

SPECIAL THANKS to 
@HopperSama
 for motivating me to finish this project, 
@ManIsCat2

easy-custom-moveset.485.title: Easy Custom Moveset
easy-custom-moveset.485.author: srGSR
easy-custom-moveset.485.description:
Easy Custom Movesets

This mod allows anyone to add unique movesets to any character, no coding required. Just fill out the forms at 
ECM Form Website
, and in less than 5 minutes, your character with new moves.

Also, it comes pre-configured with over 
100 modded characters
, so you can start playing immediately without any manual setup!

* the character and custom animation are from other mods, check "
Mods Integrated
" section to see who made then.

Adding/Editing Moveset 

Access 
ECM Form Website

Fill the name field, it should be the same as in Chracter Select menu

Configure the rest of the options for your character

Download the generated Lua config file without renaming the file

Place the file in mods/Easy-Custom-Movesets/moveset_configs folder

Enable Chracter Select, Easy Custom Moveset and your Character mod in-game

Select your character and play!

Integrating your mod

Inside your main.lua, after _G.charSelect.character_add ,  execute _G.customMoves.character_add to change the character stats.

		Code:
	

-- Default Character Select Code
_G.charSelect.character_add(
    "Custom Model",
    {"Custom Model Description", "Custom Model Description"},
    "Custom Model Creator",
    {r = 255, g = 200, b = 200},
    E_MODEL_CUSTOM_MODEL,
    CT_MARIO,
    get_texture_info("custom-icon")
)

-- Modify character stats if customMoves exists
if _G.customMovesExists then
    _G.customMoves.character_add({
        name = "Custom Model",
        swimming_speed = 500
    })
end

For example, to add support to the Iono character mod, I added line 61-63 to the Iono main.lua 
Here
 .

Allows the character to perform an super fart jump while ground pound with Z button. This jump has an limited number of uses per level.

updates.title: v1.8 (Jumpfinity Update)
updates.changelog:
This update adds the ability to do jumps in the air, allowing for the recreation of the classic double jump. However, it goes beyond that—it's highly customizable. You can define how many air jumps a character can perform and tweak each one individually, including its strength, animation, sound, and forward velocity slowdown.

Moves that alter the timing of hitting the ground while requiring an A pres ( such as Peach’s hover, Luigi’s slow descent, or in air jumps) can make double and triple jumps feel awkward. So,with disable_double_jump and long_jump_triple_jump enabled, you can still do triple jumps while not having to perform the tricky timing of double jump.

The kick_dive setting resolves what I consider the most awkward aspect of Mario 64’s movement: the kick and dive being mapped to the same button. Many times, I intended to perform one but accidentally did the other instead. With kick_dive, pressing B always performs a kick first, and pressing it again performs a dive. This makes character movement much more intuitive.

Additionally, thanks to djoslin0, wall sliding has been added to the mod!

Added stats:​

wall_slide_on
: Allows the character to perform wall slide. ( Thanks to djoslin0 )

wall_slide_gravity
: Gravity effect when wall sliding

wall_slide_max_gravity
: Max downward velocity when applying gravity of wall slide

wall_slide_jump_forward_vel
: Forward velocity added when jumping from wall slide

wall_slide_jump_strength
: Increases the height of jump after wall slide

wall_slide_jump_type
: Type of the jump after wall slide

in_air_jump
: How many jumps in the air the character can do

in_air_jump_strength
: Jump strength of in air jumps

in_air_jump_animations
: Animation of in air jumps

in_air_jump_sound
: Sound of in air jumps

in_air_jump_forward_vel_multiplier
: How much forward velocity is converted to in air jumps

in_air_jump_forward_vel_slowdown
: How much forward velocity is lost each time the character do an air jumps

kick_dive_on
: When pressing B, instead of performing a dive or kick depending on speed, the character will always execute a kick first. If B is pressed again, a dive will follow

disable_double_jump
: Disable double jump

drench-game.760.title: Drench Game
drench-game.760.author: EmilyEmmi
drench-game.760.description:
Inspired by Dani's Crab Game, which is based off of the Netflix series Squid Game, is... Drench Game! Commissioned by Drenchy, this mod lets you compete in 8 different minigames to earn the most points and win the prize of [insert high amount here] coins! FEATURING:

High quality custom maps
 by biobak and Woissil, and one low quality map by me.

Original soundtrack
 by murioz (one track by Awesome Seal Guy on YouTube).

Voice acting!?
 Featuring Espi as Toad, Trashcam as Waluigi, and Squeex as Mingle Callout (also Waluigi).

Totally legit ads
 made by Squeex's YouTube community!

TEAM MODE:
 Pick your own teams or select at random. Features auto-balancing for uneven teams.

ELIMINATION MODE:
 You lose a minigame, you lose it all. For either hardcore players or very short games.

And most important of all: the beds are bouncy.

Note: If you downloaded this mod in Drenchy's server prior to 6/28 at 8 PM EST, or the mod's name does not have a version number, you have an older version and should download this one. It fixes a major bug with the Duel minigame.

updates.title: v1.2 (BETA)
updates.changelog:
Not a complete release yet, but I decided to release v1.2 as a public beta, so you can play it now by following these instructions:

Go to 
GitHub - EmilyEmmi/Drench-Game: Minigame collection for sm64coopdx inspired by Crab Game

Select "Code", then "Download Zip"

Delete or rename your old version of Drench Game from the mods folder (this version has different file names for the audio tracks)

Install the zip you download like you would any other mod

The download link on this page will be updated when this version is fully complete.

escape-sequence.771.title: Escape Sequence
escape-sequence.771.author: Pseudonym929
escape-sequence.771.description:
Escape Sequence
​

This is a gameplay mod that adds a timed escape sequence after a player collects a star, similar to how levels work in Wario Land 4 and Pizza Tower.

During the escape sequence, the player must return to a portal located at spawn. The time limit is based on the player's proximity to the portal when they collect the star. If the timer runs out, the player will die and the star won't be counted.

This mod is somewhat compatible with custom levels, though isn't guaranteed to work for every star. By default the sequence is disabled in levels and areas where the player cannot return to spawn in vanilla, though these settings can be adjusted through chat commands.

How the Timer Works:

The timer uses multiple variables (italicized below) which can be adjusted by the server owner through chat commands. The formula for determining how much time you are given is as follows:

base timer value
 * (player's distance from spawn on the xz-plane / 
zero-radius
) ^ 
xz-exponent
 + player's distance from the portal on the y-axis / 
y-units-per-second
 * 30
​

Base timer value
 can be modified with the chat command "/basetime"

Zero-radius
 can be modified with the chat command "/zeroradius"

XZ-exponent
 can be modified with the chat command "/xzpower"

Y-units-per-second
 uses different values for when the player is above the portal versus when they are beneath it. The value for when the player is above can be modified with the chat command "/fallratio", while the value for when the player is beneath can be modified with the chat command "/climbratio"

All players can also change the sound that plays after they collect a star with the chat command "/warnsnd"

updates.changelog:

fix-that-rom-hack-camera-bug.586.title: Fix That Rom Hack Camera Bug
fix-that-rom-hack-camera-bug.586.author: EmilyEmmi
fix-that-rom-hack-camera-bug.586.description:
A bunch of people have been upset about a recent change to camera behavior in custom levels (more specifically, any level that uses the "Rom Hack" camera mode). 
You can fix this issue without this mod by simply toggling "Invert X" in your "Camera" options (see image).
 But since not everyone knows this, here's a mod I made in like 10 minutes that does it for you. Given that the Invert X camera option doesn't affect any other camera mode other than Free Camera, I'm of the opinion that this should be changed back to its behavior pre-1.2.0.

while developing king i figured out that the one frame window on

now wall kicks not only work as intended but are far easier to perfect for

feel free to use this for any moveset mods, there is no clash

between seperate instances of the fix

forced-characters.42.title: Forced Characters
forced-characters.42.author: Yuyake "FunkyLion"
forced-characters.42.description:
Character Select MUST be disabled!

THIS ONLY WORKS FOR NETWORK!

This is a mod that forces all players to be as a character in order! Here is how the order starts:

Mario

Luigi

Yellow Toad

Blue Toad

Wario

Waluigi

Toad (Original)

Toad (Toadette)

The rest are same order, just different colors!

Credits:

SMSAlfredo - Original Modder

AngelicMiracles - Concept & Modification

freecamera.457.title: FreeCamera
freecamera.457.author: crazy1755
freecamera.457.description:
Controls
​

Up/Down/Left/Right to move the camera

C-Stick to turn the camera

A/Z to move the camera up and down

R/L for zooming in and out

B to toggle mouse turning

Commands
​

freecam (toggles FreeCamera)

freecam_mspd [NUMBER] (sets the camera's movement speed)

freecam_tspd [NUMBER] (sets the camera's turning speed)

Your browser is not able to display this video.

updates.title: Flood Expanded v2.3.0
updates.changelog:
Additions​

Pause Menu Rework

Flood Menu!

Several new Birdcam settings

More Lobby songs.

Changes​

Improved some of Birdcams code. It didn't fix any bugs.

Spectator Camera now supports C-Buttons

Peanut is much less common now

Updated UV scrolling function with new UV-Scroll library by 
@djoslin0
 

Metal Cap makes you invincible to the flood again

Several minor changes to Avalanche Peaks

Bug Fixes​

Fixed CTT's rendering issues that came with the release of v1.4

Fixed some API oversights.

Fixed some bugs that could occur with the Level Limiter feature

Fixed UP's transparency on certain textures

Fixed Difficulty command

Returning Features​

Progression speedrun mode

CTT had to be stripped of its fog. I couldn’t figure out a way of fixing it by keeping the fog, as fixing one problem brought others.

For the next update in a quadrillion years, expect to see a statistics menu, and more lobby songs.

Check out the !resources folder in FE's folder, it contains a reference sheet that might be very helpful to you!

it's kinda outdated and not really needed anymore because of the Flood Menu but we don't talk about that

updates.title: Flood Expanded v2.2.2
updates.changelog:

/flood modifiers causing script errors

Returning Features​

Pressing B while in spectator will increase your movement speed.

Check out the !resources folder in FE's folder, it contains a 
reference sheet
 that might be very helpful to you!

updates.title: Flood Expanded v2.2.1
updates.changelog:
Changes​

You can now toggle between the OG Flood Model and the new flood model.

v2 Flood model has recieved some major updates.

Revamped Level Warping system, this aims to try to iron out bugs with the previous one.

First lobby is now Flood Casino.

SSL's flood is now water.

Flood Model is now 3x bigger.

First lobby song is now randomized between 5 different tracks.

Removals​

Removed the camera tracking that the flood had in the previous update. I didn't like this at all and i decided to phase it out.

Additions​

Added a restart option in the pause menu.

You can now press Z with Character Select to access the CS menu in FE's custom pause menu.

Added Bomb-Omb Battlefield and gm_construct as new lobby levels.

There is now much more flood types that API mods can use.

INSANE performance increase. Flood Expanded v2.2.1 is over FIVE TIMES as performant as the previous version

Bug Fixes​

May not be a bug fix, but the revamped level system could make the lobby scoreboard work better.

When pressing tab, if you were finished, it would display other dead players as also being finished.

Check out the !resources folder in FE's folder, it contains a 
reference sheet
 that might be very helpful to you!

updates.title: Flood Expanded v2.2.0
updates.changelog:
Flood Expanded v2.2.0​

The tHIRD part.

Here are most of the changes present:

Changes​

When using the Reds modifier, the marker will track the nearest reds before the flag.

Snowman's Lands penguin and blowing snowman objects have been removed, meaning you no longer can be blown off the stage.

Presets are now updated to include features that were added in v2.1.0.

Names are concatenated in the scoreboards.

CTT now has a custom level ID thanks to 
@AgentX
 providing me the blend.

CTT now has a port of Waluigi Pinball as a nod to the original theme.

CTT's wingcap no longer replaces the level music.

21< PSS star should be disabled?

Kill table is now ran before the area sync check.

King Whomp now gets deleted in the Whomp's Fortress lobby.

Flag marker now spins and uses DJUI resolution as opposed to N64 res.

Much more rankings!

Flag now moves with the boat in Jolly Roger Bay.

Commands now have much more descriptions.

Removals​

Removed Dire Dire Docks, as it was a mediocre level and generally didn't work well with romhack support.

Additions​

More API functions + better romhack support.

Flood model is updated to support bigger levels.

Vigette is applied when you are underwater.

New Avalanche Peaks theme.

Win popups.

Win rates you can access via the pause menu. These do not get updated when AFK'ing.

Returning Features​

Lighting is changed when under the flood.

Time Scoreboard.

Bug Fixes​

Player time should restart when restarting levels now.

Flag hitbox being too tall is fixed.

Other​

Mod name was changed to exclude version number. I have a suspicion this is why mod storage doesn't save between versions.

also a very slight performance increase...

v2.2.0 Credits:

@MaiskX3
 - Cooked more music!

Check out the !resources folder in FE's folder, it contains a 
reference sheet
 that might be very helpful to you!

updates.title: Flood Expanded v2.1.0
updates.changelog:
Flood Expanded v2.1.0​
The second part.

Here are most of the changes present:

Changes​

Modifiers now display dynamically in the command.

Joystick controls are now supported in the pause menu.

API is larger and has more documentation.

Pause menu now displays the version number.

UP and FCS now use custom level IDs.

Custom SFX now plays in the pause menu.

Removals​

Removed the strange High Score system.

Additions​

All of the achievements have been filled out.

32 more lobby songs, making a total of 64 lobby songs.

New Map "Flood Casino."

Flood Rankings. [ Suggested by 
@TheIncredibleHolc
 ]

More settings in the pause menu.

Returning Features​

Voting Menu... or well more like a Voting Level.

SL is re-added from base Flood.

Reds Modifier.

v2.1.0 Credits:

@djoslin0
 - Made some helpful functions.

@EmilyEmmi
 - Made some of the Voting Level icons.

@ManIsCat2

Check out the !resources folder in FE's folder, it contains a 
reference sheet
 that might be very helpful to you!

updates.title: Flood Expanded v1.5.0!!!
updates.changelog:
Flood Expanded v1.5.0!​
This is probably the best update for FE so far, as quite a lot of changes are present here, and I would say its pretty stable! So, here's a list of em all:

Things removed!​

Removed Birdslair

Removed some unused debug messages present from v1.4.0

Removed CS [Crystal Slide]

Removed TotWC

Removed Unused assets to decrease file size

Things changed!​

Compatibility issues present with Coop DX v1 are fixed

Trollface's AI has been re-worked and added to

Reversed Slide Levels

Cleaned up the Menu a bit more 
[Re-arranged flood speed display]

Changed Agent X's Name color in CTT

Fixed up SR support a bit more - 
@MaiskX3

Fixes!​

Fixed Marathon Mode

Fixed a major oversight in FE's code regarding the Red Coin Modifier

Fixed CTT having an issue with the Scoreboard

Additions!​

Added a new Config system containing several commands

Added a Round-Cooldown command to change the cooldown between levels

A new custom level called AP [Avalanche Peaks]

Added support for Music Mods/Music Replacements

FCS Remake!

Added a new 
PvP
 Modifier - 
@MaiskX3

Added support for custom trollface replacements

Added a 
VOTING
 System!!! 
[This was a massive undertaking for me!]

Added a Quick-Start bind for solo FE players 
[Start + A]

New music for UP by 
@MaiskX3

Keep in mind:

Bugs are likely with the voting system, its not 100% perfect, and if I can fix it more in the future, I'll release it as a v1.5.1 patch.

Commands:​
/flood start random

/flood random

/flood modifiers 
[NSMB, Instakill, Reds, Trollface, PvP]

/flood mapmode 
[Default, Random, Voting]

/flood difficulty 
[number between 0-10]

/flood spectator 
[Normal, Follow]

/flood config 
[Difficulty, Round-Cooldown, Popups 
[ true | false ]
]

/flood info

Thanks to these people!​
@Cooliokid 956
 - For helping out with most of FE's code and his undying patience with me!

@MaiskX3

updates.title: Flood Expanded v1.4.0!!
updates.changelog:
Flood Expanded v1.4.0​

An update to Flood Expanded

Readme has more information about modding FE

UP's Platforms now have a sound and move differently ( + a rendering fix)

FE Has became more optimized with the help of EmeraldLockdown

New hud to show each players distance to flags

New spectator mode

Fixed a bug where warps would still work in levels like in TOTWC

Most music now uses a custom ID to preserve original SM64 music

New music has been added, and some has been pushed out

New speedrun mode

Star Road support is partially finished (should be atleast playable now)

Trollface's rubber-banding has been decreased

also thanks to EmeraldLockdown and Zyaxyl

Commands 

/flood start random

/flood random

/flood modifiers 
[NSMB, Instakill, Reds, Trollface]

/flood mapmode
 [Default, Random]

/flood difficulty 
[number between 0-10]

/flood info

If you have NSMB Modifier on

/flood coincount 
[number]

updates.title: Update, v1.3.0 is out!
updates.changelog:
An update to Flood Expanded​
This is version 1.3.0 of Flood Expanded, i was originally gonna release this on Friday,

but i decided to release it today because of the previous versions i uploaded to this site

being VERY buggy.

Changes!

Fixed DDD (Should be fixed, it had a bug where the flood objects wouldn't load in the sub area)

Made it so other people can now hear your NSMB item drop sounds

Added Popups

More and clearer descriptions of commands

Modifier table

Revamped Level System (thank you so much coolio)

Added most of the sub-areas of levels (For example CCM's slide)

Red coin gamemode thing (modifier)

More Flood effects

Cap Blocks are now only visible in GM_CONSTRUCT

A new level "Bird's Lair"

Trollface. (modifier)

Instakill (modifier)

A timer on Slide Levels (100 seconds) to stop AFK hosts from softlocking the game essentially

Commands

/flood start random

/flood random

/flood modifiers 
[NSMB, Instakill, Reds, Trollface]

[Default, Random]

/flood difficulty 
[number between 0-10]

[number]

geoguessr-scavenger-hunt.188.title: GeoGuessr / Scavenger Hunt
geoguessr-scavenger-hunt.188.author: EmilyEmmi
geoguessr-scavenger-hunt.188.description:
GeoGuessr implemented into Super Mario 64! This game mode is somewhat similar to Hide and Seek, with a much greater emphasis on the "Hide". One player hides anywhere in the game, and the other players have to find them using picture/word clues.

This mod was originally made for BizzareScape's video. This version is more robust, and includes:

A built-in screenshot system

/hint, if you prefer words instead

Multiple options for automatic hider selection

Variety of settings

Automatic 100% file

OMM Rebirth support

Supports most, if not all rom hacks

NOTICE: 
For whatever reason, this mod is prone to desync issues. If you continuously have problems, you can try hosting with less players (or avoid players with a bad connection). You can also set both Auto SS Time and Auto SS Time (First) to OFF in the settings, and send screenshots manually with your computer's screenshot feature.

updates.title: v1.1
updates.changelog:
Update for sm64coopdx v1.0. Also has some minor bug fixes:

Fixed hider getting stuck in AFK

All players are now vampires (no longer render in mirror, fixes being able to see players)

Fixed being able to view the player list by holding the button down between games; players that attempt this will now be disqualified from the round

updates.title: New Fludd v2.0 Features and Fixes
updates.changelog:
Change Log
​
===Features===

• Rocket Nozzle added

• Turbo Nozzle added

• Option to disable renders

• Option to enable debug mode

• Water now regenerates

• Walking on water while using the Turbo Nozzle

===Smaller Changes===

• Snow particles appear while hovering

• Upward velocity while hovering has been nerfed

• Added a soft speed cap to hovering

• water gauge now updates at 500% higher FPS

• Animations blacklisted for Hover, Rocket, and Turbo Nozzles

• Added a buzz sound when trying to hover with no water

===Fixes===

• Fixed taking fall damage when holding "X" with an empty water gauge

• Fixed double water gauge rendering• Fixed hovering on lava

• Fixed camera glitch when hovering out of a water source

• Fixed poll water regeneration• Fixed infinite speed glitch with Hover Nozzle

• Fixed warping to the top of water sources when hovering• Fixed Faulty blink texture for Mario

Commands​
• /fludd renders [true|false] disables or enables the imagery

• /fludd debug [true|false] enables or disables debug mode

YouTube Video Showcase​

gmario-0-rng.839.description:
Makes you jitter randomly all over the place! - wybh24

Randomiser, Corruption-esque!

EPILEPSY WARNING! Do NOT play this mod if you are at risk!

It's recommended you play this mod on a fresh save file.

This mod may still be in development. Hence the 'Alpha' in the mod name.

Speaking of mod name
, I don't know what to call it aside from '
Pos randomiser
' or '
gMario[0] RNG
', I'm really not sure, as when I started developing on this mod, it only changed position, then I added more things that edit more of gMarioStates[0] so I called it '
gMarioStates[0] RNG
' however, now, that's not all it does. I thought of it as more of a 
Corruption-esque mod
, so I'm calling it '
gMario[0] RNG
' as some sort of nickname for what it does.

Credits:

applemansunny
 (Basis for Coin Counter)

goombas-easter-egg-hunt.746.author: jonathanoflebones
goombas-easter-egg-hunt.746.description:
Goomba's Easter Egg Hunt is a hack released in 2015 by Kaze Emanuar with BroDute as a contributor. There are 20 Eggs to collect, but there's a catch. You'll be given a very restricting goomba moveset disallowing for advanced jumps or punches, how many Eggs can you get before giving up?

By Downloading the hack you also get an additional Goomba character from the original hack, with recolorability included. You can also use it outside of this hack without the moveset if you'd like.

Credits:

Me - Porting

Fearl
 - Coding Help

WBmario, ManIsCat2 - Goomba Recolorabilty Help

grand-theft-cargo.550.title: Grand Theft Cargo
grand-theft-cargo.550.author: Q10isarobot
grand-theft-cargo.550.description:
Grand Theft Cargo is a Huge Sandbox city map with many indoor and outdoor locations for you to explore.

This Rom hack has 3 levels

1. Starship Hub world

2. Grand Theft Cargo, A Huge City with 6 stars including a  boss fight

3. The floor is lava, a Giant Apartment with 6 stars and a fun surprise!

some locations include:

Apartment

Gas station

Bank

Photo Studio (useful for getting screenshots of mario with no background)

And many many more!!!!

Have fun platforming from rooftop to rooftop!

All of the levels are Modeled by me in blender. The City was initially intended to be for "Bonelab" a VR game and is very detailed and pushes the limits of what SM64 can Handle. This is a great rom hack to sandbox/roleplay in or play hide and seek. This mod also goes great with my 
Coin Store
 mod!

hangout-dshanyies-sm64-custom-maps.1140.title: [Hangout] dshanyie's SM64 Custom Maps
hangout-dshanyies-sm64-custom-maps.1140.author: jonathanoflebones
hangout-dshanyies-sm64-custom-maps.1140.description:
This is a collection of 3 maps created by dshanyie with no stars that were converted into hangout maps, some of which have been used in SM64 Machinima videos before. This pack contains the following 3 maps:

-Mario & Luigi's House

-Yoshi's Island

-Green Hill Zone

I wouldn't recommend hanging out on this green hill version however as it is very broken and is just there for archive purposes.

You can teleport to any of these maps using the command "/dshan" alongside the following names:

"[broshouse|brosinside|yi|yi_inside|ghz]"

The house was also used in a few machinima videos before, do you remember which?

Have fun hanging out in these 3 areas!!

hangout-mcdonalds.43.title: Hangout - McDonald's
hangout-mcdonalds.43.author: Chilly
hangout-mcdonalds.43.description:
Welcome to McDonald's!
 
(yes, really.)

This is a hangout map themed around an iconic (for better or worse) restaurant you've probably eaten at before. This is the 1.0 release, so it's just the restaurant and a basic surrounding area.

This map was mostly just a pet project to learn more about Blender and is actually my first map made for Co-op.

A very simple implementation is provided to allow people to access the map through the 
/mcd
 command. Feel free to change the method of warping there to better fit your server!

hangout-romhack-marios-house-tomatobird8.title: [Hangout/Romhack] Mario's House (Tomatobird8 Version)
hangout-romhack-marios-house-tomatobird8.author: jonathanoflebones
hangout-romhack-marios-house-tomatobird8.description:
This is an old level model created a long while ago by Tomatobird8 of what's meant to be Mario's House. 

There are a lot of old hacks like this one that are just a single level with no objects, and I feel like they could work well as hangout maps. The Map has 2 Houses and 2 connected pools, and a few item boxes in the hangout version. use /house-tb8 command to warp to the house. You can hang out in here and make machinimas in 60fps or something like that.

I'm also uploading the original romhack version of the level, for archival purposes.

hangout-shy-star-village.374.title: Hangout - Shy Star Village
hangout-shy-star-village.374.author: Alestar24
hangout-shy-star-village.374.description:
Apparently all those Shy Guys that came in Peach's Castle recently decided to build their own little harbor town (probably because they were too many so they no longer fit inside), and now they are inviting you to visit this little place called Shy Star Village:

This place is a very simple town (inspired by star road) where you can go after venturing who knows where in order to relax, chat with friends or even roleplay.

This town feature a big main mansion, a little restaurant where you can recharge your energy, a pipe to get back at Peach's castle, a simple parkour to warm up for the next adventure and a lot of little cute houses, all with furniture inside!

I wish you a pleasant stay here at Shy Star Village!

(This is an hangout map, the warps should work with most of the rom hacks. Plus, note that this is my first ever map, i created this as a test ground to learn how maps making works. I had a lot of fun making this, but there could be some bugs around. If u find any, DM me on discord pls. Have fun!)

hide-and-seek-dx.512.title: Hide and Seek DX
hide-and-seek-dx.512.author: Dan_SM64
hide-and-seek-dx.512.description:
A full rewrite of the Hide and Seek mode that improves the overall experience.

Improved stability, design, and game flow.

Reworked PVP for stability, pacing, and balance.

Fixed all stalling exploits.

Revamped HUD for a streamlined experience.

Single-Level mode; based on Fast H&S.

Full-Game mode; based on Original H&S.

ROM Hack Support (Star Road, 74, Rainbow Road, Sapphire)

All Levels Unlocked (Warning: Save file will be overwritten!)

Credits:

Written by Dan

Super Keeberghrh and djoslin0 (Original Hide and Seek)

Sunk (Star Cutscene Fix, Complete Save)

Sunk and Blocky (Automatic Doors)

EmeraldLockdown (Cannon Toggle)

PeachyPeach and Isaac (Remove Big Boo)

EmilyEmmi (HMC Elevator Fix, DDD Submarine)

birdekek (HUD Name Processing)

LittleFox64 (Support)

DISCLAIMER: Anyone is allowed to modify and republish this mod as they wish, as long as they credit the original work on this mod. Thanks for playing!

updates.title: Version 1.1
updates.changelog:
The v1.1 update for Hide and Seek DX does the following:

FULL-GAME

Player List can now be used in Full-Game Mode if the host enables it; Use /playerlist to toggle.

Infinite Lives to disable the "Game Over" warp in Full-Game Mode.

Course List has improved presentation.

GENERAL

PVP has been reworked for greater stability, pacing, and balance.

Hiders have more time to disperse.

Camera Collision is now forced on to prevent X-Raying.

Tweaked time increments to be more balanced with less players.

Tweaked the HUD to take up less space on the screen.

Removed desync fix attempt, which was causing problems rather than helping.

COURSES

Castle Grounds is now the initial course, fixing Full-Game spawn-in when connecting.

Whomp's Fortress is reduced to a 90-second start time.

Removed Big Boo to prevent stalling in Big Boo's Haunt (Code by PeachyPeach and Isaac)

Secret Aquarium is removed to prevent random crashes.

hide-and-seek-pvp.518.title: Hide and Seek PVP!
hide-and-seek-pvp.518.author: Peccato
hide-and-seek-pvp.518.description:
This adds global PVP to Hide and Seek, so you can hit your annoying teammates off the stage!

Huge credits to Super Keeberghrh and djoslin0 for making the original Hide and Seek, this wouldn't have been done without them!

i keep trying to post a single mod to this website, but i slip up a single time on something obvious that i should've done earlier, and it doesnt get approved.

gore-frogger.252.title: Gore/Frogger!
gore-frogger.252.author: TheIncredibleHolc
gore-frogger.252.description:
A meteor has ruined your home, and now you must clear your way through dangerous random obstacles to find a new pond! There are a total of 7 different spawn-able obstacles, 5 of which will be randomly picked and spawned each round. This is a spin-off of our upcoming Gore/Hardmode mod, so expect blood and splats. PvP IS ENABLED, so knock each other around to ensure your own survival!

KNOWN BUGS: 
Due to extreme time constraints, some of these bugs were unable to be fixed in time. These will be updated and fixed in the near future!

-CoopNet jank will sometimes think players are crushed by Thwomps when they aren't. This can break rounds. If needed, type /Reset to force the round to end.

-Waluigi's hat will show up when he's on fire.

-Some objects (like blood particles) will double and triple as more players join.

Credits:

@TheIncredibleHolc
  (me!) - Started the project, programmed most of the mod and game-mode concepts. Made all the models and environments in blender, though Birdekek is a much better 3D artists and touched up the texture work.

@Cooliokid 956
  - Coolio did a lot of heavy lifting on some of the crazier functions, like raycasts with the hunter obstacle, custom camera work, and some other secret stuff. Frankly, this mod would not have been possible without his expertise! He's one of the smartest here, if not the best.

@birdekek
  - After I initially modeled all the obstacles, Birdekek did a full map cleanup with new textures and got everything looking 100x better.

@frijoles.z64
 
- Modeled the original Frog Mario custume, and did an absolutely amazing job at it! It also served as a template for the other frog characters.

@birdekek
  and 
Tilly
- For creating the other frog costume models of the remaining 4 selectable characters. Tilly has been especially helpful in her blender knowledge and has saved us on quite a few occasions!

@Warioplier
  - For creating a very nice 3D model of a pickup truck for the traffic obstacle. He also added Toad as the truck driver. Nice touch! 

And lastly, shoutout to the rest of the Gore team for keeping Gore projects tight-lipped and for providing valuable feedback, ideas, and testing: 
@Blocky
 , 
Saniky
, 
I'myourcat
, 
@Keeberghrh
 .. (You will see more from these guys in Gore/Hardmode, coming soon!)

gore-hard-mode.422.title: Gore/Hard-Mode!
gore-hard-mode.422.author: TheIncredibleHolc
gore-hard-mode.422.description:
Gore/Hard-Mode!​
Category: Romhack

Difficulty: 10/10

Take a dive into the challenging world of 
Gore/Hard-Mode!
 Often called "Real life Mario 64", this mod originally started as a port of Kaze's Unfair Mario 64. It quickly grew into a cursed lovechild between Unfair Mario and 'I Wanna Be The Guy' sporting ridiculous obstacles and gory inspiration from both. Be prepared to die numerous times in unexpected ways!

Features:

120 completely obtainable stars. 
(Some speed-run tactics may be needed!)

20 collectable challenge trophies with a special prize if you unlock them all. 
(Trophy hunt starts after 50 stars collected.)

Player behavior overhaul. Prepare for Splats, crunches, chomps, and many new ways to die!

All existing vanilla enemies now have new and upgraded behaviors.

Some levels have been modified for extra difficulty! 
(Can be disabled by using Romhack Compatibility mode)

Entirely original secret boss fight.

"I Wanna Be The Guy Mode" - Plays identical to the mod, but you start at zero stars. On death, all progress (Stars, keys, flags) are all reset back to 0... Current record is 21 stars!

Togglable options for in the Mod Menu. 
(
Romhack Compatibility, Enable Hell on Game-over, Enable PVP deaths, Enable IWBTG Mode, Enable Dizzyness.
)

Compatible with Rom-hacks, Arena, Flood, and more! 
(Enable Rom-hack Compatibility mode if needed.)

Gore Team

Incredible Holc 
- Project Lead.

@Cooliokid 956
  - Major technical contributor that kept this project going and brought the toughest ideas into existence!

@Blocky
  - Major technical work, enemy behavior contributor, lots of other things including the 
secret final boss
!

@birdekek
  - Contributor, built out a lot of the custom Hell level, added the "blood mist" when Mario dies.

Tilly
 - Contributor, created AMAZING models for the secret room trophies and the trophy hunt prize 

@saniky
 - Contributor, created all of the GORE character models, including bitten_in_half and decapitated character models.

@Sharen64
 - Creator of the Inertia mod, approved using in Gore mods.

@MetalKingBoo
 - Creator of the character screaming sounds. Check out his YT! [
www.youtube.com/@Metalkingboo
]

SaMiX - Creator of the Ultimate Bowser Remix used in the final fight. Check it out here! [
SaMiX
]

Special thanks to other Gore contributors: Isaac, Frijoles, ProfeJavix, I'mYourCat, Chilly, and the Coop Community!

updates.title: Gore/Hard-Mode! v1.1 Update
updates.changelog:
Same mod, but updated with a number of different bug-fixes and tweaks! You should definitely upgrade to this version!

Fixes:

Pressing Dpad Down no longer gives player 3 stars. (This was a leftover function for testing.)

Players no longer have doubled/tripled speed when flying or sliding with others present.

Fixed camera for Free_cam users in the final boss fight.

Fixed Piranha Plant and Pokey characters from doubling/tripling projectiles.

(HMC) Fixed Dorries Cavern rendering bug when elevator clipping.

(TTM) Fixed script errors when leaving slide.

(TTM) Fixed warp point for when Mario leaves the slide.

Heave-Ho enemies no longer kill all players when launching one player.

Partial fix for certain audio instances playing multiple times.

Shockwaves now travel faster, so be on the lookout for that.

You can now hear other players splat.

As always, please report any bugs to me so I can fix them. Thanks! -IncredibleHolc

hl1-hl2-hud-mod-pack.224.title: HL1 + HL2 HUD Mod Pack!
hl1-hl2-hud-mod-pack.224.author: birdekek
hl1-hl2-hud-mod-pack.224.description:
This mod pack has 2 mods contained within, a HL1 HUD and a HL2 HUD recreated for sm64ex-coop/sm64-coop DX, it shows several vital statuses

I would recommend using this mod with mods like mQuake and other mods that have first-person cameras.

This mod also has a health bar that goes from 0 - 100 as opposed to 0 - 8.

instabub-support-on-demand-bubbling-and-.author: cdario

instabub​
Support on-demand bubbling and bubble warping in sm64coopdx.

Controls​

D-Pad Up: Instantly enter bubble

D-Pad Up-3x (rapidly): de-bubble

While in bubble:

D-Pad Down: Warp above player (cycles thru players in a loop)

insta-death.559.title: Insta Death
insta-death.559.author: Q10isarobot
insta-death.559.description:
Can you beat SM64 if any damage kills you instantly?

This is a simple challenge mod for SM64.

If the player takes any damage including fall damage they will die immediately.

you can still swim normally underwater and regain your health when you resurface, but any other damage in the game will kill you immediately.

compatible with all game modes and rom hacks!

This is just a simple challenge mod, I like seeing videos like "can you beat sm64 if ____" (cant jump, floor is lava, ect) but most of those videos are using classic romhacks and I want to bring some of those challenges to SM64 coop

I may make other similar challenge mods for coop in the future

updates.changelog: -fixed bubble death for multiplayer

- fixed dying twice if failing bowser stage

-better water in and out of water
- general improvements

hangout-final-fantasy-7-gaia-overworld.6.title: Hangout - Final Fantasy 7 - Gaia Overworld
hangout-final-fantasy-7-gaia-overworld.6.author: BuckleyTim
hangout-final-fantasy-7-gaia-overworld.6.description:
This was supposed to be an April Fools joke entitled "FF7 FULL GAME (REAL)", but bugs and crashing errors got too far in the way for me to meet my self-imposed deadilne. Those are all fixed now, so I might as well upload what I consider to be pushing the limits of coopdx's ability to render exported maps as workable level entries.

This mod contains 3 hangout maps representing the northern, eastern, and western continents of FF7's overworld map. There are a few errors (such as the bridges on the west continent) but given how long it takes to export these maps it's passable I suppose.

Probably for the best if you play this with a mod that increases your movement abilities. Or maybe not, sometimes it's just cool to get lost in the world of another game from Mario's point of view...

Edit:

Access the maps by typing either /ff7-east , /ff7-west , or /ff7-north into the chat.

Also comes with a midislap I did of the overworld/main theme into a combo of the m64 and mario party 2 soundfonts.

Hexagone is the hexagone gamemode found in Fall Guys!

The mod contains the gamemode Hexagone from Fall Guys!

Idea proposed by BizzareScape

izesavestates-v2-1-5-mod-release-develop.title: iZeSaveStates v2.1.5 [MOD-RELEASE] (Developed by iZePlayz)
izesavestates-v2-1-5-mod-release-develop.author: iZePlayz
izesavestates-v2-1-5-mod-release-develop.description:
Adds SaveStates to SM64EX-COOP!​

Save up to 4 states at the same time by using the 4 D-Pad buttons

To load states, hold down L and press the corresponding D-Pad button

Each player gets their own 4 local savestate slots (Global SaveStates maybe in the future)

Commands and local settings​

Use /autoload or /al to toggle AutoLoading the latest savestate upon death

Use /autoheal or /ah to toggle AutoHealing after loading savestates

Use /savestates, /savestate, or /ss to get infos about your local settings and slots

Changelog​

SaveStates are now much more accurate and precise

You will now be automatically teleported/warped into the correct level, area and act when loading a SaveState

[HOTFIX-1] Fixed a Softlock-Bug that occurred when entering a level/loading zone under specific circumstances

[HOTFIX-2] The normal coin counter, the amount of already collected red coins and the amount of “collected secrets” are now no longer affected by loading savestates.

Removed the unnecessary color codes in the “mod-name”

Removed Herobrine and added Wario Apparition

kaizo-mario-64.829.title: Kaizo Mario 64
kaizo-mario-64.829.author: jonathanoflebones
kaizo-mario-64.829.description:
A hack made by OmegaEdge29 and Released in 2009, Kaizo Mario 64 is a romhack of the game that cranks up the difficulty by a 
BRUTAL
 amount.

It fills every level with annoying enemies, deadly fire, and other kinds of dangerous traps. Even though the level geometry is the same, collecting all 120 stars is one HELL of a challenge. 

There was an old port of this hack, but as far as i know that one is very old, dated, and inaccurate. Plus it was never uploaded to this here mod site.

This version also improves on that porting it from scratch and fixing all incorrect object positions and bugs that caused the original port to be unbeatable in certain levels. And as far as i know all stars are possible so, good luck.

kapis-rock-n-roll-moveset.547.title: Kapi's Rock n Roll Moveset
kapis-rock-n-roll-moveset.547.author: Kristall
kapis-rock-n-roll-moveset.547.description:
It's time to Rock n Roll!

Controls:

(Ground) A: Jump |

(Air) Hold A: Twirl

(Ground) Hold Z: Roll

(Air) Hold Z: Dive

Land a Dive with neutral Joystick: Pound

(Air) B : Dash

B > A: Dash Cancel

Neutral Roll > A: High Jump

Roll > A: Long Jump

Dive > A: Slingshot Boost

(Wall) A: Walljump

L: Cam-lock

You can grab with a Dive or Dash

  Underwater:

Joystick: Move

A:Up | Z: Down

B:Underwater Dash | B > A/Z: Underwater Twirl

You drown quicker as Kapi!

Original Roblox Game made by PaperKitty, if you have the time, you should play it, it's peak.

kart-battle-modes.44.title: Kart Battle Modes
kart-battle-modes.44.author: EmilyEmmi
kart-battle-modes.44.description:
Note: The file containing the mod is called "Shine Thief.zip".

It's every battle mode from the Mario Kart series, now playable in sm64coopdx! Featuring many stages, (somewhat janky) Rom hack support, and 
support for all Arena and Tag maps.

Contains the following features:

ITEMS! 
18 unique items, such as Red Shells and Super Stars. You can set these to Frantic or Skilled for more or less powerful items respectively, or turn them off for classic Shine Thief gameplay.

OMM Support!

Various maps from across Super Mario 64

Many variants, such as being on Shells or having a Boost

API that lets you create your own variants and more

Included with this mod is 
Arena Base Stages
, which adds stages from the original Arena mode, and 
Arena DX Stages
, which adds stages featured in sm64coopdx (+ Space Central). Both are compatible with both versions of coop, and credit goes to their original authors, such as AngelicMiracles.

Credits:

Programming: EmilyEmmi (main), EmeraldLockdown (network), NeedleN64 (ceiling climbing speed up), Agent X + others (arena spring code/minor stuff for held items)

Resources: Blocky (Shine model), byNinten501 (Moon model on Models Resource) NeedleN64 (SSL painting), djoslin0 (Shell Rush), Agent X + others (Fire Flower model), viandegras (boomerang model), Mario Kart 8 Deluxe (Feather model), Chilly (McDonald's painting), LeoHaha (crown graphic)

SFX: Various from Mario Kart series + Super Mario Odyssey; Super Mario Sunshine sfx provided by NeedleN64

Arena maps: AngelicMiracles + others

Mod icon: HiEpik!

updates.title: v3.7: The Bug Exterminator Update
updates.changelog:
Another small update to fix some bugs with the new Renegade Roundup rules, as well as fix some longstanding bugs such as Showtime starting early sometimes and the Bullet Bill item breaking the camera.

There are 
two
 significant new features this update:

You can now play 2-team Renegade Roundup with the new 3-team rules instead of the classic "Cops and Robbers" rules. This form is referred to as "VS Renegade Roundup" as opposed to "Classic Renegade Roundup".

Added "Custom Item Selection" (shown in screenshot). This allows you to prevent certain items from appearing. You can remove items you don't like, or only enable Blue Shells 
for a miserable experience
. I won't stop you.

Also, Lightning now stuns longer and the Boo steals from the closest player rather than a random one. Full changelog is available with the mod. 
"Shine Thief.zip" is the mod. Base Stages and DX Stages are map packs, and have not been updated since last version.

updates.title: v3.6: The Teams update
updates.changelog:
Medium-sized update; no new maps or items, but there IS a brand new Team Selection option that lets you customize team games! I worked really hard on it, please use it 

Also, you can now play Renegade Roundup with a team count other than 2! Free-for-all/0 teams isn't available, though. This plays a bit different than 2-team Renegade Roundup, so it's basically a new mode!

And as always, more bug fixes and game adjustments than you can shake a Green Shell at.

Check the changelog included inside the mod folder for more info. Also remember that 
Shine Thief.zip is the mod
; Arena - Base Stages and Arena - DX Stages are map packs and have not been updated since last version.

updates.title: v3.5: Long overdue update
updates.changelog:
This game mode has really gotten popular! I've gotten around to fixing some of the most egregious bugs and added many gameplay adjustments, new items, and new features. Since there's a lot of changes, I wrote them down in this 
changelog
 (it's pretty long, so I would just read gameplay adjustments and new content).

(Arena - Base Stages and Arena - DX Stages also received minor updates. Also, make sure you download Shine Thief.zip - that's the actual mod.)

updates.title: Kart Battle Modes update
updates.changelog:
The long awaited update! This update adds FIVE new game modes, along with the original Shine Thief, the blue shell, new variants, new maps, and many other changes. Also sm64coopdx v1.0+ exclusive.

Shine Thief: The original mode, based on Mario Kart Double Dash and Mario Kart 8 Deluxe. Keep the Shine for enough time to win!

Balloon Battle: Classic balloon battle based on entries Super Mario Kart through Mario Kart DS. Eliminate all players to win! You become a Bob-Omb when eliminated. Get revenge on the other players!

Balloon Attack: Balloon Battle with its modern score-attack rules (Mario Kart Wii-Present). Hit players to score points! You lose half of your points when eliminated.

Coin Rush: Based on Coin Runners, which first appeared in Mario Kart Wii. Get as many coins as you can! Hit other players to make them drop coins.

Renegade Roundup: Mode from Mario Kart 8 Deluxe, similar to "Cops and Robbers". Renegades must dodge the Law. Save your teammates by opening the cages!

Moon Runners: Shine Runners from Mario Kart DS. Get as many Moons as you can! The players with the least amount of moons will be eliminated.

kaizo-mario-64-2.841.title: Kaizo Mario 64 2
kaizo-mario-64-2.841.author: jonathanoflebones
kaizo-mario-64-2.841.description:
An unofficial sequel to Kaizo Mario 64 created by MarvMario and MrMarioTendo, it has 108 stars across the vanilla levels, but with more enemies, moved objects, and plenty of fire, AND chuckyas. 

Like I said There's 108 stars total, however Bowser 1 and 3 were unaccessible for strange reasons, so I've removed the doors for those. Don't just go immediately for the final boss though, go beat those Kaizo levels why don't you? 

And also, some of the dialog is in german as well, mainly the course names.

kazuma-kiryu.302.title: Kazuma Kiryu
kazuma-kiryu.302.author: Mediocre Metastasis
kazuma-kiryu.302.description:
"Come at me if you want to die!"​
This mod adds Kazuma Kiryu from Yakuza into Mario 64.

Can be used with character select or typing 
/kiryu on
 in chat.​

This mod gives Kiryu new animations, a new moveset comprising of a new attack combo and a dropkick, and revamped boss battles where you attack them by punching them rather than throwing them.

Kiryu's punch combo replaces Mario's attack when you press B. Punching slightly moves Kiryu forward:

Kiryu's dropkick replaces Mario's dive when on the ground:

The revamped bosses include:

King Bobomb

Bowser 1, 2, and 3

BUGS:​

King Bobomb star doesn't warp the player out of BOB when collected

Chainchomp sometimes does not get flung

If any one knows how to fix these bugs notify me. You can view my code through my Github page here 
GitHub - Smoah06/kazuma-kiryu-mario-64-coop-dx
.

kings-devtools.339.title: King's Devtools
kings-devtools.339.author: king the memer
kings-devtools.339.description:
While developing King I realized it was often a pain in the ass to test certain things, so

I thought id compile some neat tools together that anyone can use with ease to test their mods

CONTROLS:

D-Pad Up - Toggle Debug Movement

D-Pad Down - Toggle Stats Display

D-Pad Left - Open Level Select

D-Pad Right - Open Cap/Power Select

DEBUG MOVEMENT:

Use the debug movement to quickly travel

through any level without taking damage

It can also open doors

A - Go Up

Z - Go Down

B - Move Faster

STATS DISPLAY:

Use these stats to test custom actions, determine

exact positions to place objects, and more

SPD -
m.forwardVel

VEL -
m.vel

POS -
m.pos

ANG -
m.faceAngle

ACT -
m.action

LEVEL SELECT:

D-Pad Up/Down - Switch Level

D-Pad Left/Right - Switch Star/Act

A - Confirm

B - Exit

CAP/POWER SELECT:

The Klepto option sends Mario's cap to

Klepto in Shifting Sand Land (to test capless models)

D-Pad Left/Right - Switch Cap

A - Confirm

B - Exit

L MODE:

When enabled, the tools are only active when holding L

If not holding L the D-Pad will do nothing and the

Devtools icons will be fully hidden

komodo-joe.517.title: Komodo Joe
komodo-joe.517.author: Aso-Designer
komodo-joe.517.description:
One of the second bosses of Crash Bandicoot 2 : Cortex Strikes Back. 

Joe is part of the Komodo Brothers , a duo of komodo dragons known for their sword fighting skills.

Joe is highly intelligent, and consider the mammals inferior to him. 

No scimitar here, but Joe can still punch his adversaries with sneak and fierce! 

Assets used are elements from the original PS1 model and Mario 64. Voices clips are from Crash Bandicoot N Sane Trilogy and Crash Team Racing Nitro Fueled.  

Minor issues is the model "sinking", and invisibility cap acting weird on this character, but it doesn't ruin the gameplay (imo). I'll fix it in a later update.

Komodo Joe (c) Activision/Microsoft

learn-to-make-code-mods-resources-and-tu.title: Learn To Make Code mods Resources and Tutorials
learn-to-make-code-mods-resources-and-tu.author: Q10isarobot
learn-to-make-code-mods-resources-and-tu.description:
Do you want to make Code mods and don't know where to start? Start here!!!

This mod contains many useful code resources that are easy for a beginner to understand and use.

I have also made a tutorial (featured below)  and more are planned to come.

this mod contains SEVERAL code mods in one folder, they are meant to be used as starting points for you to make your own mods

RESOURCES:

HoldLtoenterPU.lua = this is the mod that is made in my tutorial video, hold L to multiply players current speed * 2.

this will allow you so much speed that you can clip into 
parallel universes
.

PlayerSizeControl.lua = press dpad up or down to make player bigger or smaller, press Y to return to 0

PressLtoResetinStartMenu = while the game is paused, press L to reset players position to the start of the level. this is a conveniant way to prevent softlock. ROMHACK MAKERS: you can copy this code into the main.lua file in your romhack, this is great for testing maps or just keeping players from getting softlocked.

PressUptoSpawnRandomEnemy.lua = press the up button to spawn a random enemy near the player

Simpletimer.lua = a timer that counts up every second as you play

CyclethroughActions.lua = view all of the actions in the game (minus some that would cause softlock)

Cyclethroughmodels.lua = view all of the 3d Models in the game (minus some that dont show up)

Soundtest.lua = test all sounds from the game (minus some that are silent)

Bigmario Example.lua = an example of mini mario and Mega mario powerups

SpawnanevilSmiley.lua = an simple example of a custom Enemy

TUTORIAL:

LINKS:

Hooks List

Mario State

Constants

More Examples

Player Sounds

PERMISSION

all of the code in this mod is free to use in your mods no credit.

this is a resource to use as a starting point to make your own mods

updates.changelog: - added more sample luas including "Evil smiley" custom enemy lua

- new resources added, cycle through all models, sound, or actions in game

-example big and small mario powerups

- "can you beat mario if you grow every 30 seconds" example mod added

level-names-translated-10-times.636.title: Level Names Translated 10 Times!
level-names-translated-10-times.636.author: Peccato
level-names-translated-10-times.636.description:
This mod translates all of the level names in Super Mario 64 10 times, I hope you have some good laughs!

Here is the full list of the level names:

Main Courses

Bob Omp's domain

Noisy

Jolly Rogers Bay

cold mountains

Big boss hunting

Katz's Labyrinth Cave

Deadly mud

The sand comes down quickly

dior dior ducks

snow craft

The world is hard.

high mountain

big islands and small islands

Check talk time

Rainbow Journey

Bowser + Caps + Secret Levels

Gentleman of the dark world

A dog in the sea of fire

Flying in the sky

A secret picture of Princess Peach

Metal Hat Cave

the captain's tower

Lack of drainage

Mario Rainbow Wings

Private aquarium

debt

Enjoy!

also "debt" is credits if you were wondering

level-picker.306.title: Level Picker
level-picker.306.author: tampico
level-picker.306.description:
Most custom levels come with a command to warp there, but I found it hard to remember the commands for all the levels I had installed. This mod adds two commands (
/lp
 and 
/lph
) to view and warp to custom levels you have installed. Please note that this will only work for levels registered via 
level_register
 (vanilla courses will not show up).

Chat-based: 
/lp

HUD-based: 
/lph

low-poly-mario.709.description:
Mario, As seen from far a way in the original game
 Comes back as a Character Select / Dynos for Super Mario 64 Deluxe!

This isn't just a simple model port, but is also modified to be:

Fully Recolorable! 
This includes the emblem as well!

- if you want to use the CS version, when downloading be sure to select the file with the "[CS]" at the start.

the other file contains the Dynos version

With this is sure that you are never going to experience lag!

link64.532.title: Link64
link64.532.author: Bwogglyswog
link64.532.description:
Fearing "
The King of the Koopas
" may seek the Triforce's power after conquering the Mushroom Kingdom Princess Zelda sends one of her most trusted allies to ensure Bowser's defeat!

Mario's old friend and Hyrule's savior
 Link
 is here!

Features:
​
-Custom HUD, voice lines, celebratory stars, animations and expressions

-Custom Wing and Metal Caps ("Roc's Cap" and "Mirror Cap")

-A sword with extended range and "SMART" integration that can pull things towards you

-Recolorable to really get into the "co-op" spirit

-Zora Flippers

-Insane satisfaction when booting your friends across the map

-A 
bonus character
 who followed Link to the Mushroom Kingdom

Future Plans:
​
-Add more sword moves like the Spin Attack and Jump Slash, and 
possibly 
some unique ones like the Pogo Stab and Sword Beams

-Remove the "SMART" integration and assign Grab its own button

-Add custom moves and attributes

-More custom animations

-Change Link's in-game name

-Potential widdlepet(s)

-Maybe add more swordfighters like a Stalfos or Darknut/Ironknuckle?

P.S.

if you're wondering if this is supposed to be young or adult link... yes

updates.title: Yeah it's dead
updates.changelog:
For anyone wondering, yeah the mod is basically dead. It got too ambitious for me to handle alone and I got fed up with hitting dead ends, so...

If anyone smarter than me wants to pick up where I left off then 
be my guest.

updates.title: Sword Update 1
updates.changelog:
Changelog:

-Link's 3 hit combo has been replaced with his sword. It has approximately 3x the range of Mario's punch

-The Ground Pound has been replaced with the Down-Stab

-The Air Kick has been replaced with the "Link Kick"

-Zora Flippers appear in the water along with new expressions

-A handful of SFX adjustments

-Minor adjustments to the Character Select preview

livesplit64.382.title: LiveSplit64
livesplit64.382.author: Isaac0-dev
livesplit64.382.description:
This is a simple coop mod that I made in an attempt to make a LiveSplit clone. For those who don't know: "LiveSplit is a timer program for speedrunners that is both easy to use and full of features." - 
LiveSplit
 I made this because I had the idea to be able to see each other's splits on the same LiveSplit window. This coop mod syncs with each player, so you can see when someone splits in real time. It comes built in with an autosplitter, so hopefully no need to split manually at the moment. To open a simple menu, press D-pad up and C-up at the same time. On this menu, you can move the timer around to where you want. There are a few buttons, allowing you to start/stop and reset the timer, and edit splits. Splits are saved thanks to mod storage on the host's machine only, but splits are synced when players join. I'd love some feedback on this mod! This was just something I decided to make as a fun challenge, so it's not exactly overflowing with features at the moment. I hope this mod is useful!

Author: flipflop bell

Update (12/22/2022)

Fixed some stuff in the files, added some actors i forgot, vertical vanish cap fix is inside main.lua this time, added custom skyboxes, coded an endscreen, added the custom death transition, and an infinite lives toggle

Original Version

The harder version of LDD is here! Mostly ported using RM2Coop by @wRadion; 45 degree wallkicks by @Sunk; and healing 1-ups by: @Blocky.jpeg Just a small notice that i couldn’t get custom skyboxes to work and you’re gonna need a small mod i made to get some ztars while the issues aren’t fixed.

This mod is dependent on a mod which fixes some issues with vanishing cap floors. This can be downloaded below:

There are two versions of this mod available for download. The lite, or nerfed version, or the hardcore version.

lugs-delightful-dioramas.128.title: Lug's Delightful Dioramas
lugs-delightful-dioramas.128.author: PeachyPeach
lugs-delightful-dioramas.128.description:
ROM hack made by 
Lugmillord
 in November 2020.

Ported to PC by 
jesusyoshi54
.

Ported to Coop by 
PeachyPeach
.

Lug's Delightful Dioramas features 7 main levels, 7 special levels and 74 stars.

The Coop port comes with a 
Story mode
 (enabled by default) that makes all players in a current main course advance to the next act after collecting the current act star.

To enable/disable the 
Story mode
, type the command /lld-story on or off.

lugs-delightful-dioramas-green-comet.100.description:
Original Post: December 9, 2022

Author: flipflop bell

Green Comet version of Lug’s Delightful Dioramas by: Floralys; ported by Flipflop Bell using RM2ExCoop 0.3. This hack has 80 new green stars, 6 in each course, 5 in each Qube except Spectral Spectacle which has 3 stars and all courses are unlocked.

I have also added an infinite lives toggle since this hack uses infinite lives, and instead of having lives only be infinite, I decided to add a toggle because coop can make stuff really easy sometimes.

No screenshot to not spoil any star location.
