luigis-mansion-64-marce-version.761.title: Luigi's Mansion 64 (Marce Version)
luigis-mansion-64-marce-version.761.author: jonathanoflebones
luigis-mansion-64-marce-version.761.description:
A very strange romhack that also happens to be Titled 'Luigi's Mansion 64' but that's where the relation to Mansions ends, it was created by an user named Hacker Marce. RHDC says the release date is unknown but I can confirm that this hack is incredibly old, maybe around 2008 to 2009-ish.

I tried to port it as accurately as I could to preserve this old oddity hack once I remembered it's existence once again. It contains a few weird custom levels as well as various alterations to vanilla levels. The only one I couldn't get working as of now is Lethal Lava Land, as it seems to have been modified in very primitive software and current Romhack Porting Tools can't take account for that. I believe it'll have to be recreated manually, which I may try eventually.

There's also a bit of text in spanish, strangely not for the rest of the game though.

If you're curious as to what this is, go ahead and download it. See if you can make any sense out of it. There are 7 stars that can be obtained but you can go further than that if we count vanilla levels.

updates.title: Lethal Lava Land Restored
updates.changelog:
Changelog:

			-Restored frauber's 
Flat Lethal Lava Land

Click to expand...

After trying for the entirety of today, I successfully restored all of Lethal Lava Land from the original ROM into Co-Op! This level also happens to be an edited version of a Classic level created by frauber, one of the SM64 romhacking pioneers that dates back to 2008. It was an edit of LLL so primitive that modern porting tools like RM2C couldn't extract it, until now. As I have taken the task to recreate it myself manually as accurately as I could solely modifying the original LLL's level files.

This level would also later appear in SM64: The Missing Stars with an updated layout. The level can be beaten, the only issue as of now is that some objects don't stay on top of the custom platforms but it doesn't halt progress whatsoever. Enjoy!

mario-size.935.title: Mario Size
mario-size.935.author: _rd64_
mario-size.935.description:
Requires sm64coopdx v1.4 or above

Mario Size lets you shrink or grow Mario on the fly, changing how he moves around!

How it works

Shrink Mode:

Controls: Hold Y

Effects: Mario gets smaller and walks faster

Grow Mode:

Controls: Press Y twice, hold on the second press

Effects: Mario gets bigger, walks slower, and makes the ground shake with each step

Reset Size:

Controls: Press X

Effects: Mario instantly goes back to normal size

Perfect for speedruns, challenges, or just messing around!

Enjoy experimenting with different sizes and finding new ways to play!

Changelog v1.0.1

Bug Fixes

- Level Entry Freeze: Added validation to prevent logic execution during cutscenes

Multiplayer Enhancements

Added Bowser footstep sound effects

Optimized camera shake system

Implemented additional jump shake feedback

Increased maximum size limit

Full multiplayer compatibility maintained

This will serve as the stable release for the time being. I don't plan on updating it until I have significant changes to implement. It's functioning correctly now, but this update was essential.

mario-on-indigo-island.712.author: Fearl
mario-on-indigo-island.712.description:
Mario 
on
 Indigo 
Island
​

About:

• 
1
1
1
 Stars

• 
Custom Objects

•
 
The Mushroom Cup. Sequel

• 
Casual

• 
Openworld

"
Mario
 
on
 
Indigo
 
Island
 is a major romhack made by 
usernamesarespiders
 features over 13 levels and a total of 111 Stars Compared to The Mushroom Cup, 
this hack is set in the
 
openworld and has got a gameplay style focused in exploration over platforming
. Not following the previous game, Mario has to explore the island and clear out of the rampage between two parallel worlds."

Plot:

"After the collapse and escape of the Solitude Fortress, Mario has duped! The Cosmic Goombas have managed to take over his vacation island! Now he must exit his comfort zone and explore the island to close the opening rift of the Cosmic Dimmension and the Indigo Island! But that begs to differ, where is Bowser in all this?"

Other notes:

• 
This port uses 
v1.4
 of the romhack.

Credits:

• 
usernamearespiders
 (Hack Creator)

• 
Fearl
 (Porter)

mario.126.title: MariO
mario.126.author: PeachyPeach
mario.126.description:
Portals in Super Mario 64.

Inspired by Portal (the game).

Controls:

D-pad left: Shoot a blue portal.

D-pad right: Shoot an orange portal.

D-pad down: Close both portals.

D-pad up: Enable/disable first person mode.

Portal shots open a portal when they collide with a surface, an object or another player.

When two portals are open, touch one of them to get teleported to the other one instantly.

You can move almost any object from a portal to another, including other players.

In first person mode, move the camera with the mouse or the right stick.

The first person camera uses the settings of the free cam, so, if you want to change the sensitivity of the camera or invert the axes, pause the game, open the Options and go to Camera.

Bind D-pad left/D-pad right to your mouse left button/right button for a better experience.

Credits:

Authors
: PeachyPeach

mariohunt.8.title: MarioHunt
mariohunt.8.author: EmilyEmmi
mariohunt.8.description:
In this game mode, players are split into "Runners" and "Hunters". Runners try to complete the game, while Hunters try to stop them. Includes:

Verbose game settings

Support for 7 languages

Robust Rom Hack and OMM Rebirth support

Built-in menu by Blocky

Snow in December

MarioHunt.zip is the standard version. MarioHunt_Lite is a smaller version that removes some minor features, such as the lobby. api_stuff.zip contains mods that use the MarioHunt API, including a compatible name tags version.

Mod by EmilyEmmi, mod icon by MaybeNotJohny. Additional credits available on GitHub.

updates.title: v2.8
updates.changelog:
I say this every time, but... FINALLY! The big v2.8 update has arrived. Featuring several new game options, huge balance and QoL changes, and bug fixes. Lots of them.

The big new feature this update is the new 
Game Area
 option! If you're tired of playing the same stages over and over, now you can choose to play the entire game in Main Floor, Basement, or Upstairs! Cap stages will be moved to new locations so all stars are possible. Or try the hellish Top Floor, containing ONLY TTC, RR, WMotR, and TotWC. Also available for Star Road and Ztar Attack 2.

If you don't like bouncing off of players, you can also turn on Disable Player Collision. I point this out because I prefer to play with this option on.Oh yeah, invisible walls are gone now, too. TTC is playable now?

updates.title: v2.7.4
updates.changelog:
Hotfix for sm64coopdx v1.1, mainly to fix a crash involving the players list and Japanese characters. 

Also, I FINALLY changed the elevators so you can't camp with them in HMC anymore! I'd also like to thank Squishy for the visual changes to the darkness and toxic gas sabotages in this update.

Also the link sends you to GitHub now because I realized it was faster than attaching the files in two places.

updates.title: v2.7.3
updates.changelog:
Time for yet another hotfix. Sigh...

Saying "desync" won't make random players hunter anymore. Hopefully. It better not! Also fixed some other stuff, mainly with nametags.

EDIT: I forgot to change the in-game name of the mod, so it will still say "v2.7.2". Oops.

updates.title: v2.7.2
updates.changelog:
Will I ever be free

Fixes a bug Sunk reported with the location censorship in MysteryHunt. I also updated Nametags, among other things.

updates.title: v2.7.1
updates.changelog:
I AM SPEED! Hotfix for the new sm64coopdx version. [Changelog](changelog.md)

(Copied from v2.7)

Note that Nametags (MH) is now obsolete, as it has been implemented into the mod by default. api_stuff.zip does contain a version of Limbokong's Voicechat which includes MysteryHunt support, however.

updates.title: v2.7
updates.changelog:
The long overdue update is finally here! In addition to fixing some issues caused by the sm64coopdx merge, this includes the new game mode MysteryHunt!

Note that Nametags (MH) is now obsolete, as it has been implemented into the mod by default. api_stuff.zip does contain a version of Limbokong's Voicechat which includes MysteryHunt support, however.

updates.title: v2.6.2 (READ CAREFULLY!)
updates.changelog:
Minor new features, bug fixes, and updating for sm64coopdx v1.0. A version compatible with v36.1 of sm64ex-coop and v0.2 of sm64coopdx is also included.

TOURNAMENT UPDATE:
 v1.0 of sm64coopdx will NOT be used. Please make sure you have access to the previous version if you are participating!

btw if you want mh nametags go to the github there's a 3 attachment limit

updates.title: v2.6.1
updates.changelog: Small update for the anniversary of MarioHunt, which is April 18th! Focus on balance. (EDIT: Changed date of anniversary; in-game event is still the 19th)

mario-in-the-dreamscape.116.title: Mario in the Dreamscape
mario-in-the-dreamscape.116.author: Fearl
mario-in-the-dreamscape.116.description:
Mario in the
 
Dreamscape
​

About:

• 145 Stars

• Custom Warp

• Funny Levels

• Lot of Lore

Bowser has made his way to some outskirted lands of the [Mushroom Kingdom] and is causing mayhem in each individual land by sending wisps of evil black smoke into the pipes that lead to each individual land. Peach, however, remains safe in her castle.

Bowser rushed to the back of the overworld and set up locked doors behind him as he went. The doors require star power to open, so Mario begins his usual journey of collecting stars to reach Bowser.

Credits:

• Angry (Hack Creator)

• Fearl (Porter)

• Er1ck (Playtesting - Scroll Fix)

• Woissil (C10 Code)

mario-luigi-superstar-saga-ost-replaceme.author: Garrulous64
mario-luigi-superstar-saga-ost-replaceme.description:

25 Songs from Mario & Luigi Superstar Saga (GBA)

mega-man-x.167.title: Mega Man X
mega-man-x.167.author: ganewatch
mega-man-x.167.description:
Mega Man X Movesets for sm64coopdx​

Current version: 
v1.2.13

Compatibility: 
coopdx v1.4.1 and above. Anything below that is not guaranteed to work.

Disclaimer: 
I put the download for v1.2.13 twice instead of the the main mod + the extra voice packs. If you want the extra voices that are compatible with v1.2.13, use this link 
https://mods.sm64coopdx.com/mods/mega-man-x.167/version/1863/download?file=6963

Credits:

ShionKaito438 for the extra voices pack

Heroslight, BlackJoystick, and Dankira for play testing

Blocky for the Menu Template

CNOE for suggesting Buster speed up changes

Garlicker for suggesting the damage mechanic

Twin Drive System for letting me about mirror room issues and null check problems. Also his code for not having players render as many times as players who left the server.

dj for his vtx scroll code

Agent X for his updated sound code

Alysson da Paz for the Neutral Armor HUD sprite. Unknown123 for the Alia HUD sprite

-----------------------------------------

As X:

B: X-Buster

Z: Dash

Y (Ground): Punch

Y (Air): Ground pound

As Gaea Armor X:

B: X-Buster

Z: Dash

Y (Ground): Punch

Y (Air): Ground pound

X: Giga Attack

As Shadow Armor X:

B: X-Buster, Saber for charged version

Z: Dash

Y (Ground): Punch

Y (Air): Ground pound

X: Giga Attack

As Zero/Black Zero:

B (Ground): Triple Z-Saber combo

B (Air): Air slash

Z: Dash

Y (Ground) + Move/Skid: Punch

Y (stationary): Rekkoha

Dash (Ground) + Y: Shippuga

B Attack -> Y: Shippuga

Y (Air): Kuuenzan

X (Ground): Ryuenjin

Dash (Ground) + X: Raikousen

X (Air): Hyouretsuzan

Dash (Air) + X: Sentsuizan

As Vile:

B: Vulcan (Cherry Blast)

Z (Ground): Dash Attack

Z (Air): Ground pound (Cancellable into specials with extra cost)

Y: Napalm (Bumpity Boom)

X: Cannon (Front Runner)

As Vile MK-II:

B: Vulcan (Cherry Blast)

Z (Ground): Dash Attack

Z (Air): Ground pound (Cancellable into specials with extra cost)

Y: Flame Round

X: Cannon (Front Runner)

As Alia (Currently a clone of X):

B: Alia-Buster

Z: Dash

Y (Ground): Punch

Y (Air): Ground pound

Extra voices include
:

X4 EN voice for X

X6 JP voice for X

X4 EN voice for Zero

X5 JP voice for Zero

MHX JP voice for Vile

X8 JP voice for Alia

To use the extra voices, you have to replace the original voice files in the main mod, by copying what's inside the sound folder of the extra voices into the sound folder of the main mod

updates.title: Mega Man X - v1.2.13
updates.changelog:
Fixed a glaring bug introduced in v1.2.12 that made Goombas register hit effects even during their squishing/knockback animations, which is quite annoying. This had to be fixed, hence this patch.

Water Balloons no longer register hits during their explosion animation.

updates.title: Mega Man X - v1.2.12
updates.changelog:
An update that originally meant to address issues reported after v1.2.11 released. I was told that the mod causes softlocks to happen for mods such as Fly Guy pet mod or Yoshi's flutter jump or Peach's float in extra chars, but I could not reproduce any of the mentioned problems despite trying different combinations of mods. Therefore, all I can say regarding this is to have all of your mods and coopdx updated to their latest versions.

Assuming no other breaking bugs surface, this will be the last update before v1.3, which will still take a long time.

Changes:

Added Neutral Armor X. It has no special attributes for the time being.

Added sanity checks that caused mods such as Mario '96 to show script errors.

Gaea Armor Giga Attack, Shadow Armor Giga Attack, and Rekkoha are now fully intangible. Meaning they no longer get squished and are no longer affected by some of the stronger lingering hitboxes like Bowser or Chain Chomp. However, their charge time has been increased to compensate for this.

Fixed a bug where charge effects would appear fixed in space for other players who are outside of the player's field of view.

Fixed a bug where online desyncs causes weapons to sometimes not interact with Goombas.

Removed some unused Vile voice clips and added some missing ones to the Japanese Vile voice clips.

The characters now have their proper idle animations in the CS menu when used with the latest versions of Character Select

Each character has their own color in the CS menu, instead of a default blue color for all characters

updates.title: Mega Man X - v1.2.11
updates.changelog:
Added Shadow Armor X and Vile MK-II.

All characters now have a standardized dash punch, which is as important as the ground pound. Vile can dash punch by dashing and using the bomb input.

Vile's dash no longer consumes meter.

Zero has a new move, Rekkoha, which can be executed by pressing the punch button while stationary. Shippuga is now a combo move that can be used by doing a normal ground attack and then pressing the punch input.

Fixed the infamous glitch that makes characters get burnt forever.

Fixed the teleport glitch when opening new doors.

Added interactions with Brutal Bosses and Gore/Hardmode custom enemies. They have more health in general compared to vanilla enemies. The Grand Star from Brutal Bosses is not interactable with the weapons though. I couldn't figure out a proper way to get its behavior.

Added health to Star Road custom objects. Previously, they used to have a locked 1 health.

Added Star Road's chain chomp to the list of interactable objects.

Made the Mad Piano get into attack mode if you attack it first.

Added new dash effects for all characters.

Some animations were changed, including the run animation.

Plenty of character stat changes, including a faster charge shot for X and a few adjusted hitboxes for Zero's saber.

Plenty of other fixes and improvements. This is probably the biggest v1.2.x update in terms of adjustments, so I can't list all of them.

updates.title: Mega Man X - v1.2.10
updates.changelog:
An update because the previous version of the mod is no longer properly compatible with last version of coopdx (v1.3.1).

Changelog:

Black Zero's Z-Saber is now colored purple again, due to the use of the updated gfx functions from coopdx 1.3.1

All weapons are properly lit during night time when using Day/Night DX mod, due to the use of the updated gfx functions from coopdx 1.3.1

Vile's bomb's hitbox has been increased again, after being greatly reduced in 1.2.9

Vile's bombs can now properly get rid of Koopa The Quick again. its removal in 1.2.9 was unintentional

Improved range of Gaea Armor's Giga Attack

Vile bombs and Gaea Giga Attack interact differently with Goombas and Koopas. Now they get deleted instead of stomped.

Adjusted weapons's interactions with Boos

Koopas and Boos no longer receive hits during death animation

Removed typo on Gaea Armor's description when using CS

Updated CS descriptions

Slightly adjusted wall sliding code. Looks visually better when sliding off very small surfaces.

Reworked hitbox interactions' system:

Objects that get deleted from weapon hitboxes now get deleted on the next frame, while being hidden in the current one. This makes the interactions properly appear for other players when playing online

Removed oIntangibleTimer = 0 from all hitboxes and added a custom interactions handler between player. This makes it so that the bob-omb could be juggled again and all other players would be able to see it

Projectiles no longer get deleted when interacting with other players if server interactions are set to Non-Solid

Zero:

Adjusted wait time between hits and hit stop after hits, after discovering that the whole thing wasn't properly implemented. But the new behavior should be roughly the same as the old one

Adjusted some hitboxes

Z-Saber position now moves better depending on Zero's speed

Cancelling the 3-hit Z-Saber combo into Ryuenjin will now set the face angle to the held direction of the stick, rather than the face angle of the slash combo.

Cancelling the landing air slash into Ryuenjin or Dash will now set the face angle to the held direction of the stick, rather than the face angle of the landing slash.

Intangibility timer from moves like Ryuenjin or Raikousen is no longer counting down while in hit stop

updates.title: Mega Man X - v1.2.9.1
updates.changelog:
Fixed Vile bombs causing script errors when hitting NPCSs

Fixed Vile bombs causing script errors when interacting with that wooden box enemy in Star Road

updates.title: Mega Man X - v1.2.9
updates.changelog:
This requires version 1.3 of coopdx, due to use of gfx_parse functions and the extended object fields. Black Zero was possible because of gfx functions that were introduced, that made altering effects much easier than importing and reimporting the models.

You might notice it's not possible to hit blocks or stomp enemies, but this is because coopdx 1.3 does not let custom actions have the default behaviors for hitting above and below. The fix should be added to a future version of coopdx 
Fix INT_HIT_FROM_ABOVE/BELOW check by Sunketchupm · Pull Request #751 · coop-deluxe/sm64coopdx

Gaea Armor X and Black Zero are added. Gaea Armor has unique gimmicks but Black Zero is a reskin with different effect colors. For Gaea Armor:

Gaea Shot

Giga Attack

Wall cling

Less damage from lava boost

Slower Dash

Plenty of other fixes have been added:

All weapons now use a common hitbox system. This makes it easier to make new weapons

Optimized weapons interactions: Instead of looping through all possible interactable objects, the weapons will now only loop through the activated objects in a given level.

Fixed errors that made the mod not compatible with coopdx 1.3

Made all graphical effects not be affected by Day/Night DX light overrides

CS version of the mod now uses the built-in costume manager

Plenty of rebalancing

Rewritten wall sliding

Vile's weapons consume less meter but his bomb radius has been made smaller

And many other more fixes

updates.title: Mega Man X - v1.2.8
updates.changelog:
Obligatory day one patch after a decently big update. This fixes a critical bug involving the buster charge states.

Other changes:

Functions used in the scarf script file are made local. Potentially improving performance.

The scarf is more front facing when performing a dash

Slightly adjusted the scarf vertical rotation calculation

Updated the extra sounds. This one includes JP voice for Alia

updates.title: Mega Man X - v1.2.7
updates.changelog:
This requires coopdx v1.1 or above.

I thought v1.2.6 would be the last one in v1.2, but the release of coopdx compelled me to get a function Command Mission model since I had the model lying around, I just needed to find a way to animated the scarf via lua.

General changes:

The Mega Man X menu has been removed when using the Character Select verison of the mod. Now all character and palette toggling are done with the CS menu

The mod is now categorized as "Moveset" in the mod menu

Removed the "sounds" option in the Mega Man X menu for the non-CS version. This used to only exist due to legacy excoop not supporting custom sounds. This is no longer needed.

New running animation

Exclamation boxes have fixed interaction. They used to be able to be destroyed during an invalid action, potentially duplicating the sounds, effects, and even the loot they drop.

Rendering the correct head state is now done in the "on render" hook. This used to make the models have the wrong heads when combining the mod with something like OMM (throwing cappy forces the wrong head state)

Fixed the models offset when sinking in quick sand

Dash trails lengths are shorter overall

Dash sound properly plays when dashing off ledges immediately

Lowered the volume on some sounds

Fixed the calculations when deciding when to let go of a wall during a wall slide depending on the held stick direction. Yes the calculation was wrong, and now it is much smoother to slide down moving platforms or smaller walls

WF Tower door now is interactable with the weapons

Star Road: Breakable windows, floors, and Wiggler are now interactable with the weapons

Wiggler has more hp for each phase (5 -> 6)

Moneybag has less HP (4 -> 2)

Removed calls for network_send_object when objects have interacted with weapons. This was not doing much and it caused script errors for some romhacks like Star Road

X:

Added Command Mission alt. Functions the same as the default model

Charge time for buster has been reduced, this includes the Armors' charges as well

Spiral Shot no longer interacts with players if the server interactions are set to None. This was an oversight

Full charge shot (not Spiral Shot or Double Shot) damage has been adjusted when using armors (6.5 -> 7), still weaker compared to unarmored X' full charge shot damage

Buster shot can be cancelled into punch and moving punch without visual inconsistencies

Zero:

All hitboxes have been adjusted and are now bigger

Ryuenjin: When hitting bullies, they get knocked back following the face angle of the move

All other moves besides Ryuenjin: When hitting bullies, adjusted the knockback angle to be somewhere in the between the face angle of the move and the position of the bullies relative to the move

Air Slash and Kuuenzan: Visibly bigger sabers to match the new hitboxes

Shippuga: visually adjusted, extra hitbox added

Uses a different voiceline file when he says "I won't lose", making the extra sound pack able to overwrite it

Can no longer grab by doing the normal saber attack

Vile:

Meter gain: 1 -> 1.05 each frame

Dash Attack consumes less meter (3 -> 2.5)

Cannon Shot dmg (5.5 -> 5.8)

Alia:

Fixed a bug where she was able to inherit X' armors properties when using the non-CS version of the mod

She has her own sound file for "wall kick", making some extra sound pack sounds not give her X' voices for wallkicking

She also inherits all unarmored X' changes mentioned above

updates.title: Mega Man X - v1.2.6
updates.changelog:
This update adds a few fixes. This is the last patch for v1.2.x, due to it addressing the few remaining problems.

Character changes:
​

X:

Fixed a bug where swapping characters fast enough while the buster shots are active would cause the wrong remaining buster shot count to be calculated (For reference, 5 regular shots are allowed at a time). This also applies to Alia.

Fixed a bug where the First Armor's pink shot would count as one single hit (instead of 3 hits) when hitting enemies, making it weaker than the regular shot.

Fixed a bug where the Second Armor's second shot would as one single hit (instead of 2 hits) when hitting enemies.

Zero:

Sentsuizan: comes out 1 frame faster.

Raikousen: Lightning damage 2.5 -> 3.5.

Alia:

Changed eye texture, face model, and face normals.

Fixed a bug where there would be a hidden menu option that changes X's armors when she is selected, while playing the non-CS version of the mod.

updates.title: Mega Man X - v1.2.5
updates.changelog:
General changes:

Swoop and Snufit have a down offset when interacting with weapon hitboxes, making them easier to hit.

Scuttlebug and Spindrift HP 4 -> 2. It is now possible to kill them in one hit with the Z-Saber.

Characters are no longer prefixed with [MMX] in Character Select.

Character changes:

All characters:

Fixed a rare bug where the airdash could get nullified and you would fall. This had a bigger chance of happening when airdashing a certain frames after wall kicking.

Wallkick refreshes are now based on the character's face angle rather than the wall normal. This used to be not very consistent due to how Mario 64 detects which is the best wall to use when you are in a corner. This has been made much more consistent as a result.

Alia
 has been added. Her moveset is identical to unarmored X.

Zero
:

Raikousen comes out 1 frame faster.

Bigger hitbox for wall slash.

Slightly bigger hitbox for all 3 hit combo slashes.

Readjusted slightly the Kuuenzan offset (moved back by 1 unit, moved up by 1 unit).

Bob-ombs now get knocked away with 1st hit of 3 hit combo, 2nd hit of 3 hit combo, air slash, and Kuuenzan.

Slightly changed hair color.

Changed voiceline after he gets up from getting knocked out of a level.

Vile
:

Changed voiceline after he gets up from getting knocked out of a level.

Fixed a console error when using vulcans while there are other players.

mh-control-hunters.900.title: (MH) Control Hunters
mh-control-hunters.900.author: ProfeJavix
mh-control-hunters.900.description:
Important: MarioHunt must be loaded to use this mod

In this MH extension, runners will have a menu from which they can select and control a player from the opposing team. After selecting a hunter, the runner will control them for a period of time while the hunter spectates helplessly. When the time is up, the runner will return to their original position. But beware, if the controlled hunter dies, the runner will also die!

Mod Menu Options:

Control Seconds (5-60 seconds):
 set the period of time in which the runner can control the hunter.

Cooldown Seconds (0-30 seconds):
 set the cooldown in which the runner will have to wait to control a hunter again

Original mod idea by Drenchy. Check out his video:

mh-powerups.622.title: (MH) Powerups
mh-powerups.622.author: ProfeJavix
mh-powerups.622.description:
NOTE: BEST PLAYED WITH MARIOHUNT

This mod adds some powerups to give variety to the gameplay.

Currently there are 4 powerups:
​

Hammer
​

Fire Flower
​

Boomerang
​

Cannon
​

Each one has a moveset, so read the controls on screen and perform the desired attack. You can grab them on every level and if you do, there will be a cooldown, so use them wisely.

There's a 
Randomized Mode
, where powerups are unknown, so you'll never know which one you will pick until you grab it. Good luck...

Check the Mod Menu to show/hide controls, allow/block powerups for hunters and toggle Randomized Mode.

Huge credits to 
Arena Mod
 for inspiring some powerups (specially the hammer) 

This mod was a bounty from Drenchy. Visit his channel!
​

updates.changelog: Now MH is not required and can be used in singleplayer

mh-secret-helpers.898.title: (MH) Secret Helpers
mh-secret-helpers.898.author: ProfeJavix
mh-secret-helpers.898.description:
In this MarioHunt extension, you can give some players the role of "Helper," which makes them invisible and gives them the purpose of trolling the opposing team.

Important: 
You must load MarioHunt with this mod!

Use:

To make a player a Helper, the host must type the corresponding command and select the desired player. This player will then become a helper for their current team until the host removes that role (or, in the case of Runners, until all non-helpers are eliminated and the Hunters win). It is recommended that this assignment take place before the match begins. Helpers can't collect stars, coins, keys nor grab things, so go melee!

Chat command:

/sh-toggle : toggles the Helper Selector menu (only for host)

Mod Menu Options:

Rival helpers can see each other: Allow helpers from a team see the helpers of the other one and viceversa

Runner helpers can exit level anytime: Remove the level exit restriction from MH on Helpers

Original mod idea by Drenchy. Check out his video:

milne-the-crystal-fox.194.title: Milne the Crystal Fox
milne-the-crystal-fox.194.author: steven3004
milne-the-crystal-fox.194.description:
Trailer:

You ever wanted to be a silly crystal fox zooming around stages, throwing rocks at enemies and do Russian dances?

No?

Well here's the mod anyway.
​
Milne just somehow got transported to Mario's world and she decided to help save the princess, I guess.

Usage
:

As a standalone mod:
​

Type 
/milne on|off
 to toggle the character.​

Type 
/milnecolor on|off
 to toggle recolorability.​

As a CS Character:
 Two options for a non-recolorable Milne and a recolorable Milne will be in the menu.​

Moveset
:

Twister Thok: 
In the air, you can press A to start a Twister Thok. You can use it two times. First time will launch you upwards, second time downwards. Hold a direction, and you will lunge forwards in said direction. Otherwise it'd be your average double jump. If you try to do this move more than once without landing, you'll immediately launch downwards.

Melee (Punch, Kick and Dive replacement):

Shard Toss: 
Tap B once, and Milne will throw three crystal shards at once, acting as a projectile that damages enemies and players in PVP.

Crystal Lance: 
Quickly double tap B, and Milne will take out her lance and glide across the air in a short time. If she hits a wall, she'll stick to it, and you can either jump off of it 
(A)
, kick off of it 
(B)
, or drop off of it 
(Z)
. You can only use it once.

Grab: 
Getting near a grabbable object and press B will make Milne effortlessly pick it up.

Passive:

No Swimming: 
Milne can't swim, but she will have a slightly tweaked version of her ground moveset:

Twister Thok: 
Milne can now jump up more than once in the air in case she does the move again.

Crystal Lance:
 Milne can now use the move more than once with a 1-second timer if she's off-ground.

Weight:
 Due to being made out of crystals, Milne is denser and heavier, therefore she falls faster than most characters. And when she lands from certain heights, she'll create a shockwave that kills everything in its radius except for players. Her fall damage is also delayed a bit.

Kazotsky Kick (Taunt):

By pressing X as a Milne player while idling, you will do start dancing.

As a non-Milne player, you can go up to a dancing player. When an icon appears above the dancing player, you can press X and join 'em. Each vanilla character can have a unique dance, and you can make your character have a unique dance with this template file below:

This file makes Wario be able to only activate the dance while walking instead of idling and gives him Waluigi's dance.

With that out of the way, I hope y'all enjoy this mod!

​

Credits
:

steven3004
: Almost everything in this mod.

ganewatch
: Projectile code borrowed from Mega-Man X.

CrystallineGazer
: Milne's Mother.

The original SRB2 Milne mod
: The other things.

Voice Actors Sampled:

AJ Michalka (She-Ra and the Princesses of Power)

Erica Lindbeck (Helluva Boss, Mortal Kombat 11)

Ashly Burch(Mortal Kombat X)

Known issues:

- Bowser throwing might not sync too well.

- Kazotsky Kick icon might bug.

mob-control.527.title: Mob Control
mob-control.527.author: ProfeJavix
mob-control.527.description:
This mod allows players to control the different mobs of SM64 and use their (almost) vanilla moves. Just go near them and press X when you see the prompt to take control of them. Then look at the controls on screen, mess with other players and have FUN!

Don't forget to check the Mod Menu options to adjust things such as the control distance or some HUD settings.

There is also an integration with EmilyEmmi's MarioHunt, so if you use that mod, there will be some changes in order to account the team mechanics (also check the Mod Menu and the MarioHunt specific options). 

This is the original mod. If you saw it somewhere else before this post, maybe with a different name, please make sure to report it and use this one.

Thanks to 
TheIncredibleHolc
 for some tips and cool ideas! Also thanks to my pals, the 
Fantacastasmas
, for all the testing!

Bounty from Drenchy

Watch his video 
HERE
!

Made by: 
ProfeJavix

​

mob-morph.566.title: Mob Morph
mob-morph.566.author: ProfeJavix
mob-morph.566.description:
This mod was a bounty from Drenchy. Subscribe his channel!

This mod contains a list with a lot of mobs. Use the DPad to select one and press X to become that mob. Unlike Mob Control, the moves are not vanilla and now they are more challenging for the other players. Be sure to check the Mod Menu for some settings.

This mod is best played with EmilyEmmi's MarioHunt and it's team mechanics (also check the Mod Menu and the MarioHunt specific options).

Thanks to 
Mugiboy
 for helping on the testing.

Made by: ProfeJavix
​

mirror-mode.707.title: Mirror mode
mirror-mode.707.author: Pipocalio
mirror-mode.707.description:
This mod adds a mirror mode to Super Mario 64, flipping the entire game world horizontally — including levels, objects, and animations.

Since it doesn't replace any geometry, so it should work with most custom levels and "romhacks" without issues.

Note that this mod only flips the camera controls if you're using the vanilla camera. If you're using a custom one (romhack camera, analog camera, mouse look), you might want to manually enable "Flip X axis" in your camera settings.

Also, shoutouts to ManIsCat for helping me fix some rendering issues!

updates.title: Mirror mode 2.0
updates.changelog:
Changes:

Directional dialogs now restore properly when mirroring is disabled in the mod menu, instead of resetting everything.

The end credits are now mirrored.

Several optimizations have made the mod process areas over 
12 times
 faster! These include:

Modified displayLists are now cached, so the mod will not process a display list more than once.

Models with culling disabled are now tracked by the extended model ID instead of the vanilla model ID. This prevents models from potentially being inside out.

Replaced manual camera tracking with 
geo_get_current_camera
.

Removed several redundant hooks.

Note:

This version requires 
sm64 coop deluxe
 
v1.3.2
 

or higher

updates.title: Mirror mode 1.4
updates.changelog:
Changes:

- Fixed "nauseating" (rotating) skyboxes.

    - You can toggle the custom skybox via the mod menu.

- Fixed world not being mirrored after a gameover or level restart.

updates.title: Mirror mode 1.2
updates.changelog:
It's a tiny update, but now the mod works with everything that i tested 

Changes

The mod now can disable culling in optional displaylists (this fixes the area 2 of the overworld in Last Impact being inside out)

Directional dialogs are now restored to the original when mirroring is toggled off in the mod menu.

The 
disable_face_culling
 function now assumes the default RSP geometry mode, provided the geometry mode hasn't been set yet (instead of defaulting to 0). While this doesn't fix anything specific, it's a more appropriate default than 0.

updates.title: Mirror mode 1.1
updates.changelog:
Little update to address some issues you reported:

Changes:

Fixed an issue where the player's model would appear inside-out after changing models

Resolved a bug causing mirror room Mario to render inside out

Fixed models appearing inside-out when objects changed model IDs

Culling is now only disabled when necessary (e.g., during area/level transitions or model changes)

monochrome-mario-64.83.title: Monochrome Mario 64
monochrome-mario-64.83.author: Ex Coop Mods Archive
monochrome-mario-64.83.description:
Original Post: January 3, 2023

Author: BlackJoystick

Update (1/17/2023)

Fixed the textures in the castle inside of Monochrome Mario 64.

Original Release

An oldie but a goodie, Monochrome Mario 64 is a mini-hack made for an old hacking contest known as C3 2011 by the user vinyboiler. It contains a single course with 7 stars, for the better experience set your character to be completely black. And If you can exit back to the castle that is supposed to happen, its just a failsafe from the original hack that didn’t work.

mulan.503.title: Mulan
mulan.503.author: Aso-Designer
mulan.503.description:
From the 1998 Disney movie, Fa Mulan is ready to bring honor to her fami-- I mean to Super Mario 64! 

Mulan's assets are Mario Golf 64 (Peach and Maple), the arms are native to Mario 64, with custom textures done by myself. 

Voice clips for the characters are from Kingdom Hearts and Disney Infinity (the Disney infinity voices clips are low for some reasons.) 

Minor issue is the shadow being misplaced for some reason.

Mulan (c) Disney

mx-moveset.95.title: Mx moveset
mx-moveset.95.author: Dremy_Bowser
mx-moveset.95.description:
if you encounter any bugs feel free to dm over on discord

some of the things MX is capable of with the moveset on;

 -can no longer triple jump

- can walk on lava and quick sand (although sand slows him down)

- can now preform butt bounce ( if you hold the boost as you butt bounce you'll get launched decently far)

-included his iconic dash (feel free to terrorize goombas and bombs)

- midair jump (you can now only jumping three times in the air before falling)

- MX can no longer be knock over easily (thx again Birdekek) due to his build

- He now has a super punch! its linked to the left dpad direction! you can also jump out of it by pressing A

- his butt bounce may not be able to break poles and bricks properly (it launches you far tho!)

Not really any new updates just more of a "definitive" version while I work on bug fixes and such, in the ex server it kinda got patched but then it made things a bit confusing so I'm just uploading this makes things less confusing

*ps still doesn't come with the skin use the mario v3.5 skin pack for the actual MX model*

updates.changelog:
um so yeah long time no see but here on the changes 

- removed wall climbing entirely 

+new dash fully working (thank you Steven. for the animation)

now the super punch can be seen by other players

the dash can be seen be other players

The dash itself is much faster than normal boosting

the dash can go through blocks just like in his base game

+While in the dash state he can run on water 

ps it may still be a bit buggy, but i just had to get the update it out since the new Dx broke it apparently

Creators note: IT DOES NOT COME WITH THE SKIN (at some point im gonna add it trust)

so that's a crazy number but just wanted to let you guys that I'm still working on the mod!

 what specifically? (lol yeah haven't forgotten about it)

 -an alternative dash/boosting 

 -and a void jump (probably) 

also in the upcoming update the wall climb will no longer be apart of MX's moveset why?

 1 after playing with it more it didn't fit him specifically 

2 supper buggy despite some efforts on patching/nerfing 

yeah that is all again thanks for playing my mod never expected people to like it in the first place!!!

New update yay!!1!!!!! (its small but I'm happy how it turned out)

- he can now climb! by going up to a wall and press the L trigger

- finally fixed some water bugs that were annoying me, aka you can no longer mid air jump while under water, i tired patching the super punch as well but now at least it isn't as spamable !

minecraft-music-mod.324.title: Minecraft Music Mod
minecraft-music-mod.324.author: iZePlayz
minecraft-music-mod.324.description:
# 
 
Minecraft Music Mod v3.0
 
 

Category: Audio

### 
What's New in v3.0:

Enhanced Randomization:
 The randomization of track selection has been significantly improved for a more varied and enjoyable listening experience.

Code Overhaul:
 A substantial amount of code has been rewritten, leading to better performance and stability.

Bug Fixes:
 Various bugs have been resolved to ensure smoother operation.

New Commands:
 Added 
/songlist
 to list all tracks and 
/skipto <Song-ID>
 to skip to a specific track by its ID.

### 
Mod Description:

This mod brings the original 41 tracks from C418's Minecraft soundtrack into your gameplay. The default in-game music is disabled, and the mod plays the Minecraft tracks in a random order. After each track, there is a brief pause of 10 to 20 seconds, mimicking the music transitions found in Minecraft, but with shorter delays.

Features:

Original Soundtrack:
 Plays all 41 tracks from C418's Minecraft soundtrack randomly.

Random Intervals:
 Pauses of 10-20 seconds between tracks for a more authentic Minecraft experience.

Default Music Disabled:
 The game's default background music is turned off.

Commands:

/skip
 - Skip the current track and play the next one.

/song
 - Display the current track and show the time remaining until the next track starts.

/songlist
 - Lists all songs with their ID, name, and filename.

/skipto <Song-ID>
 - Skip to the specified track by its ID.

### 
Important Installation Information:

To ensure the mod functions correctly, 
all 4 parts of the mod must be loaded and enabled
. You can do this in one of two ways:

1. 
Extract Method:
 Extract all 4 folders from the zip file into your game’s mods folder.

2. 
Drag and Drop Method:
 Drag and drop the 
minecraft-music_v3-0_all-parts.zip
 file into the game. This will automatically load all 4 parts at once.

Note for Game Hosts:
 If you are hosting a game, make sure that all 4 parts of the mod are enabled on your server to ensure the Minecraft music plays correctly for everyone.

Extract Method:
 Extract all 4 folders from the zip file into your game’s mods folder.

2. 
Drag and Drop Method:
 Drag and drop the 
minecraft-music_v3-0_all-parts.zip
 file into the game. This will automatically load all 4 parts at once.

Note for Game Hosts:
 If you are hosting a game, make sure that all 4 parts of the mod are enabled on your server to ensure the Minecraft music plays correctly for everyone.

no-bljs.110.title: No BLJs
no-bljs.110.author: Spring E. Thing
no-bljs.110.description:
Enabling this script as a mod when hosting a server for SM64-CoOp DX will prevent the famous 'Backwards Long Jump' glitch from being possible.

Server hosts have access to the chat command 
/no-blj
. Executing this chat command proving either an argument of 
on
 or 
off
 will 
enable
 or 
disable
 the mod respectively. By default, the mod is 
on
.

This script is an edit of an existing script by community member 'Sunk' who's script was intended to permit the BLJ glitch to be possible regardless of the properties of the surface Mario was performing the glitch upon. The script that I wrote for this addon pretty much just inverts the conditions and removes some unneccessary sections past this decision such that the one condition under which the BLJ glitch is possible in vanilla SM64 no longer exists.

updates.title: BLJ? Conflicts, Away!
updates.changelog:
~ Gave the mod's currently one and only entry into the 
gGlobalSyncTable
 a slightly more distinctive name so as to not risk a conflict with other mods that access 
gGlobalSyncTable
. The chances of a conflict were already fairly low, but might as well make more certain.

updates.title: BLJ? Maybe Later Today...
updates.changelog:
+ Server hosts now have access to the chat command 
/no-blj
. Executing this chat command proving either an argument of 
on
 or 
off
 will 
enable
 or 
disable
 the mod respectively. By default, the mod is 
on
.

updates.title: BLJ? No Way!
updates.changelog: ~ Improved BLJ detection

no-one-under-eighteen-ageverificationmod.title: 🔞 AgeVerificationMod v1.1 🔞 [MOD-RELEASE]
no-one-under-eighteen-ageverificationmod.author: iZePlayz
no-one-under-eighteen-ageverificationmod.description:
Adds an very effective age-verification system to sm64ex-coop by testing the attention span of each player after joining. Every player needs to keep L,R,Z,A,B and D-Left or the corresponding keyboard buttons pressed (Keybindings) down (To prevent them doing something else with their hands in the meantime) for a random amount of seconds between 30s and 60s without a single frame interuption while also not moving to get verified. Any mistake will cause the timer to reset and restart​
 Now also the corresponding keyboard buttons/keybinds will work too (Check the settings in the main menu)​
​
Developed by iZePlayz​

updates.title: AgeVerificationMod v2.2
updates.changelog: This update introduces a dynamic age-verification system in sm64coopdx that tests players' attention spans when joining the game. To pass, players must continuously hold L, R, Z, A, and B while regularly pressing and releasing the D-Pad Left. The duration is randomly set between 60 and 120 seconds. Any movement, releasing a button, or failing to press/release D-Pad Left within 3 seconds will reset the timer and restart the test. Additionally, custom sound effects and music have been added to enhance the experience!​

obelix.572.title: Obelix
obelix.572.author: Aso-Designer
obelix.572.description:
Asterix's best and strong friend created by french comic artists Rene Goscinny and Albert Uderzo is now in Mario 64 as well!  

Assets are all from Mario 64, with custom textures and custom elements (like the belt and the helmet's top) done by me. 

Voices clips are also from few of the Asterix movies , most precisely the ones where Obelix was voiced by the late Pierre Tornade. (Asterix versus Caesar, Asterix In Britain, Asterix and the Big Fight, and Asterix conquers America).

Enjoy the mod as I enjoyed working on it!

Obelix (c) René Goscinny and Albert Uderzo

odyssey-marios-moveset-rebirth.125.title: Odyssey Mario's Moveset: Rebirth
odyssey-marios-moveset-rebirth.125.author: PeachyPeach
odyssey-marios-moveset-rebirth.125.description:
A faithful recreation of sm64ex-omm for sm64coopdx!

Features:

Unique moves and gameplay from Odyssey, including Cappy.

Custom animations, star dances and death sequences!

True Non-Stop mode, designed to be able to collect all stars in one go.

Improved Power-ups:

Wing Cap: Inspired by Galaxy's Red Star, Mario can move freely in the air without height limitation.

Vanish Cap: Mario can walk through almost all thin walls and grids with ease.

Metal Cap: Mario becomes truly invincible. You won't sink in quicksand, you cannot die (unless you're already dead) and objects that try to squash Mario are destroyed.

A redesigned HUD to resemble Odyssey!

Display of each star in the current level, and which ones have and haven't been collected.

Radar that can point to the closest red coin/secret.

Fully custom camera!

Hold R while standing still to enter a new first person that lets you look in all directions.

You can toggle between 8 directional mode and 16 directions by tapping R.

Custom settings for different play styles. Type 
/omm
 in the game chat box to open the menu.

OMM Stars display that shows all levels and which stars have been collected per level, as well as unlocked caps and Bowser keys. Type 
/stars 
in the game chat box or by hold L when the game is paused to display.

Inbuilt support for various popular gamemodes.

Credits:

Author
: PeachyPeach

Contributors
: Isaac, Prince Frizzy, djoslin0, Altiami, Sharen (SMO animations)

updates.title: v1.4
updates.changelog:
Changes:

Fixed button presses in the pause menu

Fixed shell music being toggled by other players

Allowed ledge grabs out of normal kicks (accurate to ex-omm)

Fixed air kicking walls

Made the OMM camera respect SURFACE_FLAG_NO_CAM_COLLISION

Removed forced OMM number textures

Exposed a few OMM camera functions

Reset cap music on fake level reset

Fixed script errors caused by a recent coop update patch

updates.title: v1.3
updates.changelog:
Changes:

Fixed a bug with holding L on the pause menu to open the OMM stars menu

Fixed a bug where star radars would not show another star radar if a different radar was active while the star spawned

Replaced vanilla orange number textures with OMM's number textures (coopdx only)

Added regular OMM's custom shell swimming

Added regular OMM's improved cap durations for metal and vanish cap

Added a vertical wind cancel after 15 frames of not being in wind

Added spin cancel to airborne cappy throw

Fixed OMM warp pipes not updating warp position upon death

Fixed JRB ship not resetting sunken state on level change

Cappy is no longer updated during warp transitions to prevent bugs caused by Cappy interacting with objects during warps

nova-stars.465.title: Nova Stars
nova-stars.465.author: Blocky
nova-stars.465.description:
All 120 stars are needed for the mod to be active.

Alright so we added a LOT of things since the last version, first (as you can tell by the title) we have made it so now it 
isn't OMM specific
 this is now compatible with 
movesets and romhacks

Since this now supports all kinds of movesets and hacks we took it upon our own hands to add support for the vanilla game + vanilla moveset in addition of OMM

The vanilla game + OMM have 19 stars to collect!

The vanilla game + Vanilla moveset has 23 stars to collect!

Totalling to 42 
stars!

Be warned though, this mod is hard!

these stars are not meant to be taken lightly!

Credits :

Creator: @Key's Artworks

Coder: @Blocky.cmd

Additional coding help: Sunk

Star Fanfare: @6b

Contributors: @
Squishy
 - [CS Creator] @ColbyRayz!™ 
@shwetunlinYT

only-up-64-flood-mod.964.title: Only Up 64 Flood Mod
only-up-64-flood-mod.964.author: DizzyThermal
only-up-64-flood-mod.964.description:
Only Up 64 Flood Mod (sm64coopdx)
​

Note: This is NOT the 
Only Up 64 Map
, this is Flood Mod for Only Up 64

Areas 1-8 on 
Hard Mode

What is Flood Mod?
​

Flood Mod is a game mode by Agent X - Climb to the top as the area floods!

Only Up 64 Flood Mod Trailer
​

coopdx-mods/mods/archived/flood at main · AgentXLP/coopdx-mods

Chat Commands
​

			/flood start [area] (a1-a8) - Start the round (optional: provide area)
		

Click to expand...

			/flood speed - Set the speed multiplier manually
		

Click to expand...

			/flood hardmode - Doubles the speed multiplier for all areas
		

Click to expand...

			/flood type [type] - Sets the flood type (water, lava, sand, mud, random)
		

Click to expand...

			/flood reset-all-points - Resets the scoreboard (all points)
		

Click to expand...

			/flood set-points [player-id] [points] - Sets a specified players points
		

Click to expand...

			/flood-scoreboard - Toggles the flood scoreboard
		

Click to expand...

​
Changes
​

Free-Cam Spectate -> Auto-Spectate

Known Issues
​

Final player spectates nothing on completion

New players may not warp to lobby

Credits
​

Agent X (Flood Mod v2.4) for original mod and permission to work on Flood for Only Up 64

All the testers helping me fix bugs and find good speeds for all the areas

only-up-64-plugin.962.title: Only Up 64 Plugin
only-up-64-plugin.962.author: DizzyThermal
only-up-64-plugin.962.description:
Only Up 64 Plugin (sm64coopdx)
​
This is NOT the 
Only Up 64 Map

Plugin Features
​
​
Warp System (Disabled by Default)
​

To 
enable the warp system
, the 
host
 or 
moderator
 must type: /ou64-warps

With warps enabled, type: /ou64-practice or use keybind: 
[X]

Toggle Height (Y-Coordinate) on HUD / Player list:
​

			/ou64-height - Toggles Character height on HUD and Player List.
		

Click to expand...

Ground Pound Twirl (A, Z, A)
​

Rollout after twirl is to not allow consecutive ground pound twirls

Ground Pound Jump (A, Z, A on ground)
​

Triple front flip animation instead of jump twirl

Ground Pound Dive (A, Z, B)
​

Wallslide
​

Allows wallslide from long jump

Instant-Turn
​

Allows for the player to make 180-degree turns when moving slow enough

Chat Commands
​

			/ou64-height - Toggles Character height on HUD and Player List
		

Click to expand...

			/ou64-meter - Toggles Height Meter
		

Click to expand...

			/ou64-moveset - Toggles Only Up 64 Moveset
		

Click to expand...

			/ou64-checkpoints - Toggles Checkpointing [Mod Only]
		

Click to expand...

			/ou64-warps - Toggles Warps [Mod Only]
		

Click to expand...

			/ou64-practice - Shows Warp Menu (Must be Enabled)
		

Click to expand...

			/ou64-run-timer - Toggles Run Timer
		

Click to expand...

			/ou64-leaderboard - Toggles Leaderboard
		

Click to expand...

​
Changes
​

Added Leaderboard and Run Timer

Added / Refactored Chat Commands

Added Checkpoints - modified to work in different areas (thanks djoslin0!)

Added exportable server metrics

Refactored a lot of the code

Added Warp Menu for Practice

Added Flood Mod Support

Added Area 8 and made the plugin compatible with all versions of Only Up 64

Added Debug Warp system from Only Up 64 Alpha testing to Only Up 64 Plugin (Default Off)

Being able to change directions when ground pound diving

Using the triple jump action for the ground pound jump (removed original ground pound jump)

Sparkles on frame-perfect dive rollouts, wallkicks, and speed kicks.

Less jank and higher gravity on the wall slide.

Merging changes from the Only Up 64 Alpha Tests

Decreased Ground Pound Twirl Y-Boost (42.0 -> 40.0)

Decreased Ground Pound Twirl Count (20 -> 10)

Allow Wallslide after Long Jump (Like Only Up 64)

Known Issues
​

Ground Pound Twirl ends in a ACT_FORWARD_ROLLOUT to make sure you cannot ground pound consecutively. This means Mario does a frontflip before entering free fall.

Credits
​

Ground Pound Jump, Ground Pound Dive, and Wallslide are from mods/extended-moveset.lua with some modifications

Moveset contributors: 
@steven3004

Checkpoints: 
@djoslin0

Recolored player heads: 
@EmilyEmmi

sm64coopdx technical help: @cooliokid956, 
@andre8739

Testing help: @retrodarkgamerx, @cooliokid956, @colbyrayz.z64

only-up-64.963.title: Only Up 64
only-up-64.963.author: DizzyThermal
only-up-64.963.description:
Only Up 64 (sm64coopdx)
​

About
​
Only Up 64
 is a romhack created by 
Kaze
 and 
thelegendofzenia

This whole mod is one big, tall level that takes around 25 minutes to complete - if you don't fall. Climb the biggest level ever made! (as of today)

You can use the GP dive and the GP spin to have an easier time in this game but difficult mode is doing it without them!

Mod Description
​
This mod is 
just
 the Only Up 64 map and original music.

Nothing else is required to feel the 
pain
, but if you want the moveset and more goodies, keep reading.

Only Up 64 Plugin
​
The 
Only Up 64 Plugin (sm64coopdx)
 provides the following features:

Only Up 64 Moveset:

Ground Pound Twirl (A, Z, A)

Ground Pound Jump (A, Z, A on ground)

Ground Pound Dive (A, Z, B)

Instant-Turn

Wallslide

Character Heights on HUD and Playerlist

Warp System

Leaderboard / Run Timer

Exportable Server Metrics (Used for 
Dizzy's Abyss
)

Playerlist

Server Start Time

Server Heartbeat

Please make sure all mods are on the latest version for the best experience!

​
Only Up 64 Flood Mod
​

Flood Mod Support
 for Only Up 64.

Flood Mod is a game mode by Agent X - Climb to the top as the area floods!

​
Chat Commands
​

			/ou64-music - Toggles Only Up 64 Original Soundtrack
		

Click to expand...

Known Issues​

Warps can rotate camera for non-free camera

Only Up 64 Map Blender File
​
This mod wouldn't be possible without Kaze releasing the Blender file for the map. Here is my modified one for sm64coopdx: 
Only Up 64 Blender File

The Blender map was recently optimized by going through each object and removing unused textures. The file size has been reduced from 
536.5 MB
 to 
186.4 MB
!

Only Up 64 Mario Blender File
​
The Mario model wouldn't be possible without Kaze. Thank you Kaze for permission to use it in this mod: 
Modified Mario Blender File

Thank you SonicTheHedgeHog64 (originally known as ThePerfectMario64) for post-processing the textures to work correctly.

Warning

Must use Blender 3.2+ with latest 
Fast64-Gart Edition
 - NOT mainline fast64 or legacy fast64-coop

Changes
​

Added Star Model from original ROM Hack (thanks ColbyRayz, Kaze)

Added Mario model from Only Up 64 ROM Hack (thanks SonicTheHedgeHog64)

Fixed some bugged textures (e.g., Vaporeon's eyes, Kakuna's eyes, Koopa flag, end Mario)

Made end Mario recolor off of sm64coopdx part colors (i.e., cap, glove, etc - thanks SonicTheHedgeHog64 for painfully helping with this)

Credits
​

Kaze
 and 
thelegendofzenia
 for creating the original ROM Hack and giving permission to port the ROM hack and use the custom Mario model.

Cooliokid956
 for helping with map backwarping, various other bits to make this all work, and dealing with my Python tendencies (nil not None!!).

SonicTheHedgeHog64
 for post-processing the textures to work correctly in the end Mario and helping me with recoloring the end Mario.

ColbyRayz
 for tracking down map issues (without warping!) to help identify bugged textures and for getting permission and providing the Only Up 64 star model.

Soundtrack
: 
MusicByAI - Only Up 64 OST: AI-Generated Chill Lofi Vibes
.

Special thanks to everyone else on the sm64coopdx Discord who helped with testing and debugging this mod to make Only Up 64 possible!

Voice Acting: Andrat, GenesisJam, Zephyr, and Diario

Lastly, thanks to the entire Render96 team for the permission given to use these assets and all the work they have done to provide inspiration for this mod!

oswald-the-lucky-rabbit.617.title: Oswald the Lucky Rabbit
oswald-the-lucky-rabbit.617.author: Aso-Designer
oswald-the-lucky-rabbit.617.description:
Walt Disney first creation made his way to Mario 64!

 What kind of schenanigans this will bring with this rabbit? 

Assets like the head, tail and textures were done by me, the body is still edited from the Mario 64 model.  

Voice clips are mainly from the Epic Mickey games, where Oswald was voiced by the legendary Frank Welker.

Oswald the Lucky Rabbit (c) Disney

Organ of Matrias
​

A short hack created by Kaze Emanuar back around 2013 where you platform to the top of the Organ of Matrias, featuring custom power-ups such as a Speed Block.

Included in the SirRouven1003 Level Pack. All custom objects were recreated as accurately as possible.

Credits:

B. Bones Johnson - Porting

Playtesters - 
Wbmarioo
, 
Saul

Organ of Matrias
​

A short hack created by Kaze Emanuar back around 2013 where you platform to the top of the Organ of Matrias, featuring custom power-ups such as a Speed Block.

Included in the SirRouven1003 Level Pack. All custom objects were recreated as accurately as possible.

Credits:

B. Bones Johnson - Porting

Playtesters - 
Wbmarioo
, 
Saul

outdated-king-the-memer-reremake.456.title: [OUTDATED] King the Memer - ReRemake
outdated-king-the-memer-reremake.456.author: king the memer
outdated-king-the-memer-reremake.456.description:
Peach's letter was accidentally sent to King's address and without thinking he went to the castle trying to return it

little did he know he would need to spend all day gathering Stars to save someone he doesn't even know

Spoiler: 
CONTROLS

L
+
Y
: Toggle King
 - King is ON by default

Z
: Ball Form
 - King can do alot in ball form with 
A
 and 
B

Spoiler: 
NOTES

Character Select
 is supported but NOT required

/kskin [name]
 to swap loaded skins - an example Santa skin is included for custom skin creation

King's intended palette is located in the 
palettes (add manually)
 folder

King is recommended to be played with a controller

expect bugs as this release was admitedly pretty rushed lol

king can get stuck alot but this is mainly just 64 having shit collision code so i cant do anything about it atm

if any major bugs are found please DM @kingthememer on Discord

Spoiler: 
BACKUPS

i heard a few people thought kings older versions were lost media and while theyre all still on the coop discord mod releases channel, they could pretty easily be lost to time so i gathered everything and uploaded it all to archive.org along with some other info - 
heres the backups

paintball.628.title: Paintball
paintball.628.author: Q10isarobot
paintball.628.description:
Press D pad up to throw a paint ball.

If the paintball hits a player, a random part of that player will change to a random color.

(color of players name will also change randomly)

You can wash off the paint by going into water, or it will wear off after a few minutes have passed.

Paintballs Kill enemies also.

Now you can have a PVP paintball battle!!!!

Credits:

Incredible Hulc: Big thanks for providing the code to make the splatter particles

WIIBoss: Porting My models to the game for me bc I cannot get fast 64 to work

painting-progress-overlay.433.description:
Shows the amount of stars collected in a stage right where its warp is located!

Also shows cap switches, keys and the player count. Compatible with romhacks (mostly), Minimap+, OMM Rebirth, and even older versions of MarioHunt (Since v2.7 already has this by default, it won't do anything)

penelope-pussycat.539.title: Penelope Pussycat
penelope-pussycat.539.author: Aso-Designer
penelope-pussycat.539.description:
A while ago, she used to run around Paris, now she goes after the stars!

Penelope Pussycat, one of the members of the Looney Tunes, is here to kick and bite Bowser's bottom!

Assets are from Looney Tunes World of Mayhem and Mario 64.

Character has no voice clips (expect for coughing, drowning and snoring) due to the character not having actual or very few lines in the looney tunes shorts (classic and modern)

Penelope Pussycat (c) WB

outdated-cs-extra-characters.342.title: OUTDATED - [CS] Extra Characters
outdated-cs-extra-characters.342.author: Yuyake "FunkyLion"
outdated-cs-extra-characters.342.description:
THIS MOD IS ARCHIVED. It will be continued in 
Extra Characters Plus
!

------------------------------------------------

Extra Characters
 is a mod officially worked by members of the CoopDX team to bring the rest of the party as a work around for Super Mario 64's limitations!

PRINCESS PEACH
 - Princess of the Mushroom Kingdom who is... apparently here with us. Weird.

Voiced by: 
SuperKirbyLover
.

PRINCESS DAISY
 - The princess of Sarasaland! A very spunky gal! But make sure you stay on her good side!

Voiced by: 
MorphiGalaxi
.

TOADETTE
 - A very bubble female Toad who loves building!

Voiced by: 
MelissaMekrose
.

YOSHI
 - Mario's dinosaur best friend is also here to help!

Voiced by: 
FunkyLion
.

BIRDO
 - A feminine dinosaur who discovered herself long ago and was once an enemy!

Voiced by: 
LUvvUCY
.

SPIKE
 - A Foreman who was once Mario and Luigi's boss! Has had it out for them since they left!

Voiced by: 
VinnyVinesauce
.

PAULINE
 - A once damsel-in-distress turned Mayor after being saved from the hands of Donkey Kong!

Voiced by: 
BeckyVO
.

ROSALINA
 - Mother of all Lumas that has assisted Mario to save the universe!

Voiced by: 
GauntletQueen

=============================================

DISCLAIMER:

This added as a built-in mod and serves as an alternative in case of accidental deletion or updates until the next patch comes in.

MODEL CREDITS:

Peach - 
Melzinoff

Daisy - 
Melzinoff
 and 
FunkyLion

Yoshi - 
FluffaMario
 and 
FunkyLion

Toadette - 
FunkyLion

Birdo - ThatGurlTilly, 
Melzinoff
 and 
FunkyLion

Spike - 
FunkyLion

Pauline - 
Melzinoff

Rosalina - 
Melzinoff

updates.title: Hotfixes
updates.changelog:
Hotfix:

Rosalina's Spin hitbox serves as a kick now.

Picking up items as Rosalina is easier now.

Infinite Jumps glitch has been fixed.

Yoshi can now flutter in Long Jump and Triple Jump.

Rosalina's Hand Cap and Wing Cap hand states have been fixed.

Spinning Attack model's player colors that affected local players have been fixed.

WIP in the mod's title has been removed which was left by mistake.

Thank you 
xLuigiGamerx
 for saving my bacon once again with the lua fixes.

And thanks to 
Melzinoff
, 
MlopFunny
 and 
Tilly
 for the feedback to help fix these issues.

updates.title: Rosalina joins the party! - Our Biggest Update Yet!
updates.changelog:
Changelog:

Rosalina addition, includes moveset.

Foreman Spike redesigned to fit with Beeb's Concept Art.

Yoshi, Birdo, Toadette, and Pauline now have unique movesets provided by our incredible Lua modders!.

Fixed visual bugs with a few characters.

Special thanks to:

-Melzinoff

-xLuigiGamerx

-EmilyEmmi

-Squishy6094

-Wibblus

For all working hard on this!

updates.title: Pauline jumps to the stage!
updates.changelog:
Voiced by BeckyVO, Pauline joins the party!

Adjusted Peach and Daisy models

New Birdo Voice by LUvvUCY

Peach and Daisy move sets re-added as toggleable.

updates.title: Fixes Peach Player Colors
updates.changelog: As stated above.

updates.title: Audio Fix and Cap Fixes
updates.changelog:
Changelog v6.2:

Audio no longer breaks when other mods with audio are applied. (xxLuigiGamerxx)

Cap Vanish Error has been fixed. (AngelicMiracles)

Spike's skin not being recolorable has been fixed. (AngelicMiracles)

updates.title: Updated Models
updates.changelog:
Changelog v6.1:

Scaling has been properly fixed for Peach and Daisy with re-rigged models.

Proper scaling has been applied to Foreman Spike.

Every character now has CAP models.

Mesh has been updated for Foreman to improve visuals and accuracy.

Now shows version number of the mod in-game, as well as all the characters contained in the mod.

Proper Credits to all the model artists AND voice actors.

Proper CS descriptions to each character! Take a read!

Removed Movesets of Peach and Daisy (for future plans).

permadeath.1134.title: Permadeath
permadeath.1134.author: Dan_SM64
permadeath.1134.description:
For Coopnet Only!

(This doesn't work with Direct Connection.)

If a player dies, that player stays dead for the rest of the session!

If guests reconnect after dying, their death is remembered via their Coopnet ID.

You cannot exit course while midair or in a dying animation.

Reloading the server resets all deaths.

Use /deaths to see the list of dead players and the death count.

CREDITS:

Written by Dan

string_without_hex() function by birdekek

DISCLAIMER: Anyone is allowed to modify and republish this mod as they wish, as long as they credit the original work on this mod. Thanks for playing!

pet-mario-in-real-time-mario-head.505.title: [PET] Mario In Real Time (Mario Head)
pet-mario-in-real-time-mario-head.505.author: ThaGurlTIlly
pet-mario-in-real-time-mario-head.505.description:
Now you can play through Super Mario 64 with the iconic 
Mario Head
 by your side!

Mario In Real Time was a program developed by SimGraphics for Nintendo in 1991, it set the groundworks for the interactive Mario screens we see in Nintendo stores today!

Initially used for live shows like Spaceworld and E3, you may be more familiar with his infamous appearance in the game, 
Mario Teaches Typing 2.

years after the release of this game, the Youtube community got its hands on the FMV animations contained in the game, lovingly naming Mario In Real Time, "Mario Head." and he's been a staple of internet culture ever since.

Which brings us here!

Mario In Real Time is now in Mario 64 Co-op Deluxe, thanks to the wonderful WiddlePets mod!

sporting a brand new from scratch model, designed to fit with the limitations and art style of the original Super Mario 64

that's about it... download? 
​

pet-mario-party-mini-racers.562.title: [PET] Mario Party Mini Racers
pet-mario-party-mini-racers.562.author: Emeraldsniper
pet-mario-party-mini-racers.562.description:
Looks like everyone is here to catch some speed on the track! ...Wait whaddya mean they're 
tiny
?!

This pet pack contains all playable characters from Mario Party 1 in their mini-derby's, including 3 NPCs from Mario Party 2 in their hover cars. This pack also includes a... special pet here that's just a joke for the sake of one. Don't mind him much. ...Unless he knows you're a 
BAD DRIVER.

This whole pack totals up to 10 pets! Including proper sounds for driving on each one!

WIDDLEPETS IS REQUIRED OF COURSE!

Special thanks to 
@ThaGurlTIlly
 for the Mario Head so I could make the joke be reality. Most models were ripped from their games by myself since resource sites never had them ripped before. (It was a pain, even after learning that there was a MP resource website. OOPS.... Maybe in the future I'll figure it out and make a proper update with better looks on the cast.)

Enjoy the pack!

updates.title: HOTFIX 1
updates.changelog: Whoops! I am seriously an idiot when I don't wanna be... (Stupid oversights...)Fixed all shading and sharp edging on the main MP1 cast. They look a ton better now.Sorry for the oversight!

pet-moushley.1152.title: [PET] Moushley
pet-moushley.1152.author: Gamebun
pet-moushley.1152.description:
Ever wanted your very own president's daughter that is actually a mouse following you around? Well look no further! She'll follow ya around and somehow won't end up getting killed by freaky Ganados or Cultists! All she demands is some cheese in return, but will also accept headpats.

If however you WANT to be this lovable little mouse, there is a regular 
Moushley CS mod available right here!

Credits: 

Original fanart design: 
Agrimmora

Model: Gamebun

Voices: Ashley Graham from both Resident Evil 4 (Carolyn Lawrence) and Resident Evil 4 Remake (Genevieve Buechner)

pet-propeller-fly-guy.230.title: [PET] Propeller Fly Guy
pet-propeller-fly-guy.230.author: AgentX
pet-propeller-fly-guy.230.description:
This mod adds a fly guy pet that behaves like the propeller blocks from New Super Mario Bros. Wii.

To use the Propeller Fly Guy, first spawn one through the pets menu, grab him and jump in the air and then press [A]. You will propel upwards and eventually begin to descend. To slow your descent, press [A] in rapid succession. To speed up your descent, hold down [Z].

updates.title: [PET] Propeller Fly Guy v1.0.1
updates.changelog: * Optimized code in accordance to new v1.3.2 functionality

pet-snufit.343.title: [PET] Snufit
pet-snufit.343.author: Alestar24
pet-snufit.343.description:
A legend says that they were once Shy Guy Miners working in Hazy Maze Cave, probably killed by the toxic gas or an unknown entity and then transformed in the Snufits.

A pretty scary story, but they can be cute and cuddly if treated well, they are ghosts but they are still friendly Shy Guys inside.

And now you can have one by your side during your adventures, with recolorability too!

Ready to "pewpewpew" with the Snufit?

(Remember that you will need the latest version of the WiddlePets mod to make it work).

prop-hunt.305.title: Prop Hunt
prop-hunt.305.author: Mr. Bushido
prop-hunt.305.description:
This game mode adds prop hunt to Mario 64. Start the round by pressing L + R + A when at least 2+ players are in the arena. Press left/right on the D-Pad to change map as the host.

This is still in development, as I still have a lot of features (and bug fixes) planned.

Some ideas I have planned are:

"Smart Mode" and "Frantic Mode" for choosing how the props are randomly selected.

Open world mode so that the entire game is the map.

Enemies and NPC's as props.

Please report any bugs or ideas in this thread!

Be extremely subtle, even to the point of formlessness. - Sun Tzu

pet-tiny-phalanx-deluxe-pack.551.title: [PET] Tiny Phalanx Deluxe Pack
pet-tiny-phalanx-deluxe-pack.551.author: Emeraldsniper
pet-tiny-phalanx-deluxe-pack.551.description:
Hey look, it's a ship! But wait.. it's, Tiny??

This is the Phalanx from the secret game Tiny Phalanx hidden away on another game called Zero Divide. This pack contains the following:

[PET] Tiny Phalanx

Phalanx (Koopa Shell)

Phalanx TP (K.S.)

The PET mod of this requires widdlepets to run. Contains two versions of the ship: 

Normal and Transparent Cockpit

Sounds are also from T.P. thanks to the PC port of ZD. The shell replacements follow the same line as the PET, having both versions for their own in their respective folders. (Folder bias may change in the future) The shell replacements can also be used as DynOS if you prefer by taking their bins and using it in the dynos/packs area. The shell replacements did have streamed music within it but due to the nature of the lua mod being buggy and destroying sounds outright sometimes, it was taken out until fixes can be made so where it's more consistent.

This mod will be updated in the future with more features as I progress my knowledge for coding and modeling. (Don't worry, I'm working on deathrun and the DL pack but those will take a long time to finish.. so have this mod in the meantime since this was planned long ago anyway..)Enjoy this pack! And uh... don't ask 
why
 a cat is the pilot of a long lost Legend. I don't know either.

updates.title: Update: PET 0.7 Shell MOD: 1.0
updates.changelog:
Long but overdue update. This update adds songs to the mod version of the shell replacements. (And fixes the mod zip orientation. Oops.)

Thanks to the new audio stream template by blocky.cmd, riding the Phalanx now plays one of three songs from the game it came from. The current song list is as follows:

Assault (Currently default on Phalanx v1.0)

Moon Side (Currently default on Phalanx TP v1.0)

Bio Cave

To change which song you wanna listen to, open the New!ASEQ.lua file and comment out the current choice, then delete the dashes to uncomment the choice you want. You can also adjust the volume if need be. The PET version of this pack is still in development for its shooting capabilities, however I forgot to add an audio file for it long back so I added its exit.ogg sound.

Sadly I can't do anything further for the pack due to my lack of lua knowledge (It'll be a long while. I learn slow..). Plus, if there was a possibility to change songs on the fly with the mod menu system without having to go into the lua file every time, I'd do it. Plus, when dynos audio becomes a thing, the dynos part of the pack will be updated accordingly with the songs. Now go out and ride on with some fancy tunes.

proximity-chat.200.title: Proximity Chat
proximity-chat.200.author: Drenchy
proximity-chat.200.description:
Proximity chat in mario 64 coop is finally here! It does exactly what the title says.

This mod works with an external program to function. The host needs the lua file in order to host a lobby.

THIS DOES NOT WORK WITH MOBILE AND WILL NEVER HAVE MOBILE SUPPORT

Join the coop lobby before joining the prox chat or your name won't show!

use /setdistance [multiplyer] to modify how far away you want the proximity voice to be.

This mod was a bounty from Drenchy that was picked up by Limbokong.

Huge thanks to Yuyake for the renders used in the app!

THIS MOD WAS MADE FOR DRENCHY'S YOUTUBE CHANNEL! IF YOU ARE MAKING A VIDEO ON THIS MOD PLEASE LINK DRENCHY IN THE DESCRIPTION 

DOWNLOAD THE APP HERE:

						Mario 64 Proximity Voicechat 1.2.zip
					

					drive.google.com
				

Prox chat trailer:

HOW TO SET UP:

						How to set up proximity chat in mario 64 coop
					

This guide will show you how to set up proximity chat in mario 64 coop!The first thing you’ll need is mario 64 coop dx found at this website https://sm64coopdx.com/   *I won’t be going over how to install coop dx*  Next you will need to download BOTH the proximity application and lua mod. YES ...

					docs.google.com
				

Trouble Shooting Guide

						Proximity Chat Trouble Shooting
					

This guide will go over troubleshooting if there are any issues with the Proximity chat voice mod! Known issues: Names not appearing  -If names are not appearing when joining a proximity voice chat lobby there is most likely an issue on the host’s end -The host MUST be also using the lua mod and...

					docs.google.com
				

Drenchy's Discord server

						Join the The Drenches Discord Server!
					

Check out the The Drenches community on Discord - hang out with 1381 other members and enjoy free voice and text chat.

					discord.gg
				

Prox Chat support discord server

						Join the SM64 Proximity Voicechat Discord Server!
					

Check out the SM64 Proximity Voicechat community on Discord - hang out with 199 other members and enjoy free voice and text chat.

					discord.gg

quality-of-life-moveset.45.title: Quality of Life Moveset
quality-of-life-moveset.45.author: EmeraldLockdown
quality-of-life-moveset.45.description:
A moveset that enhances the vanilla experience.

Adds:

- Ground Pound in Water

- Ground Pound Jump (water inc)

- Ground Pound Dive (water inc)

- Ground Pound from Rollout

- Twirl Down Faster

- Wall Slide

Author: TheBoiJoshua

Co-Author: EmeraldLockdown

To those wondering, TheBoiJoshua was the original creator of the Quality of Life Moveset. He has since left, and I have lost forms of contact with him. I co-authored the mod, and thus will be publishing it here.

quick-sand-desert.1077.title: Quick Sand Desert
quick-sand-desert.1077.author: Edasd
quick-sand-desert.1077.description: A hack made for the first SirRouven1003 Level Pack, that nominally replaces Whomp's Fortress with a level called Treibsand Wüste, but also replaces Bob-omb Battlefield and Jolly Roger Bay too. NOTE: This hack is only available in German. Called "Treibsand Wüste" in German. Created By: mcmj200 and Sirouven1003, For his Level Pack. Has 16 stars in total. Extra Note: Mr I in Quicksand desert Only Spawn in act 1 for Star 6. Also jrb level only has 2 stars. Once You get 16 stars you don't have to continue since you already beat what's stored in the hack Since you enter the regular Castle inside.
