quickplay.644.title: Quickplay
quickplay.644.author: Dan_SM64
quickplay.644.description:
A streamlined time attack gamemode with emphasis on player coordination. Collect all the stars in each course, either solo or with a party!

FEATURES

Level Select

All Acts Combined

All Players Together

Saves Record Times (Solo Only)

Several QoL Changes

ROM Hack Support (Star Road, SM74, Sapphire, Rainbow Road)

CREDITS

Written and Designed by Dan

PeachyPeach and Isaac (Object Toggle / Progression)

Sunk (Blue Coin Switch Fix, Star Cutscene Skip)

EmilyEmmi (DDD Submarine)

Djoslin (Cannon Timer)

wereyoshi (Race Resets, TTM Monkey Fix)

birdkek (HUD Name Processing)

DISCLAIMER

- Anyone is allowed to modify and republish the Quickplay mod as they please. Thanks for playing!

updates.title: v1.1 Update: Bowser Fights, Hub Courses, and More
updates.changelog:
COURSES

All 3 Bowser Fights have been added, as well as corresponding bosses from the supported ROM Hacks. Bowser Fights have been adjusted to prevent softlocking (Code snippet borrowed from MarioHunt).

Peach's Castle has been added, as well as the HUB Areas from Star Road and SM74.

Lethal Lava Land has its Wing Cap and Shell boxes removed.

FEATURES

The host can now SKIP courses in full-game mode via D-Pad Right (Solo Records will not be saved if used).

Player Interaction (PvP) is now available as an option via /pvp.

The host can now use /autohost to automatically start rounds and skip courses (Each course is skipped after 10 minutes).

UI / HUD

The course select has its colors redone.

"All Levels" has been renamed to "Full Game"

Full Game mode now displays a total star counter.

The race timer has been adjusted for the host so that it doesn't cover the D-Pad guide.

prophunt-hide-and-seek-rebirth.493.title: Prophunt/Hide and Seek Rebirth
prophunt-hide-and-seek-rebirth.493.author: Blocky
prophunt-hide-and-seek-rebirth.493.description:
This aims to be the sucessor of Hide and Seek,

it comes with prophunt and other options!

Prophunt is enabled by default.

This mod is also compatible with romhacks

do /hns to change the settings and/or your binds

Credits goes to biobak for making the custom levels, swagskeleton95 for the freddy model and Squishy for making the custom menu

Video:

updates.title: PROPHUNT UPDATE WOOOO
updates.changelog:
fixed invisible props (for the most part)

added two new maps (by biobak)

added voting system

fixed random level softlock

fixed random floor softlock

fixed weird globalsynctable desync warping some player to the wrong level (might still be present though?, its internet based)

added the slowbomb hunters can throw

added an option to remove the red flashing

added a start button to the menu

added a player list

added current role at the top of the screen

added mouse support to freecam

rd-notification-message.937.title: Rd Notification Message
rd-notification-message.937.author: _rd64_
rd-notification-message.937.description:
RD NOTIFY MESSAGE

Requires sm64coopdx v1.4 or above

What's this mod?

Create custom visual notifications on screen to communicate with your friends during multiplayer. Perfect for announcing events, giving instructions, or just leaving funny messages.

See commands here:

Permanent Alerts: 
/rdt [message] 
(stays on screen)

Timed Alerts: 
/rdt5, /rdt10, /rdt15, /rdt20, /rdt30
 (seconds)

Color Customization: 
/rdc [color]
 (Includes Mario_Red, Luigi_Green, Rainbow, etc.)

Visual Effects: Toggle movement 
(/rdn)
 and glow 
(/rdb)

Logic: Movement ON + Glow O

N = Pulsing text; Movement OFF = Static text

Auto-wrapping for long messages

Host-only permissions for command usage

Open Chat, Type 
/rdt [message] 
to start (
Host only
) or 
/rdt
 to remove message.

Changelog 1.0.1

Major Improvements Complete refactor

Performance optimization

Rendering system optimized

and more

You're all set! thanks to Djoslin0 for Lib source

realistic-explosion.278.title: Realistic Explosion
realistic-explosion.278.author: flipflop bell
realistic-explosion.278.description:
​
Realistic Explosion
​
​
Makes explosions 200% awesomer by making them hyper realistic!!!

You might recognize this from Deltarune and TerminalMontage (which the explosion sfx and textures reference).

By 
@flipflop bell
 with the help of 
@Cooliokid 956
 and 
@I'mNOTYourCat

Enjoy

Your browser is not able to display this video.

Your browser is not able to display this video.

More Footage
​
HOW TO USE WITH OTHER MODS

Since 
gCurrentObject
 isn't exposed, i'm not able to change behavior related functions so you need to edit the mod you want this to work with.

First, find and rename both 
bhv_explosion_init(o)
 and 
bhv_explosion_loop(o)
 to  
custom_bhv_explosion_init(o)
 and 
custom_bhv_explosion_loop(o)

Lastly add 
cur_obj_scale(2.0)
 under 
custom_bhv_explosion_init(o)
 in a loop function

 to

By

gCurrentObject

 and

red-is-dead.855.title: Red is Dead
red-is-dead.855.author: jonathanoflebones
red-is-dead.855.description:
Red Is Dead

Red is Dead, also known as "Rot ist Tot" in German, is a Romhack created by blackshadowdrybones and released in December 31, 2014. It's a 
135 star
 long hack with 
big levels
 and even 
bigger objectives
, plot is as follows:

"Bowser has stolen all the red coins, and it's up to you to find them!"

This port is based on the Unofficial 1.1 version created by UsernamesAreHard, which moves a few objects around and tries to make the hack slightly more accessible to play.

rideable-yoshi.288.title: Rideable Yoshi
rideable-yoshi.288.author: steven3004
rideable-yoshi.288.description:
This mod adds rideable Yoshies to the game in some levels.

When you ride a Yoshi, you can travel a little faster and flutter jump across gaps. You can also get inifinite flutter jumping with a wing cap.

Unfortunately, right now, Yoshies can't eat enemies, and neither can you ride one underwater.

Yoshies will also use the color palette of whoever rides them, and can share the rider's Metal Cap. Though they can't have the Vanish Cap yet.

This mod also comes with two commands:

/YOSHI_DEBUG [on|off|host-only]
Toggles a debug mode where ya can spawn stuff from the mod with a D-Pad:

D-Pad Up: Yoshi Egg

D-Pad Right: Yoshi Nest

D-Pad Down: Yoshi

/yoshi-model [on|off]
 Toggle between the models in the mod, and the in-game vanilla model.

This mod also has a mini API that can place spawn nests around levels in ROM hacks (and only in ROM hacks for now).

(Example will be uploaded later.)

run-binds.403.title: Run Binds
run-binds.403.author: xLuigiGamerx
run-binds.403.description:
Hold 
Y
 to Run, 
X
 to tip-toe, and nothing to walk.

There are settings to modify walking and tip-toeing speeds, and you can invert the binds to run by default and walk with 
Y
!

Keyboard players are no longer inferior to controller players.

roll-the-dice-v2-0.649.title: Roll The Dice! v2.0
roll-the-dice-v2-0.649.author: TheIncredibleHolc
roll-the-dice-v2-0.649.description:
Roll The Dice! v2.0 is a revamp of my original RTD mod. This major update brings a series of quality-of-life improvements, new features, fully sync'd events and sounds, and all sorts of exciting madness!

Press 
Dpad+Up
 to "Roll The Dice" for a random buff, de-buff, or event!

Enable "Auto-rolling" in the Mod Menu to force players to roll every 15 seconds!

36 main events with some events having their own randomized sub-events!

Combine this mod with other game-modes like Flood for fun and chaos!

Special thanks to the following Gore team contributors for pitching in on this mod: 
@Cooliokid 956
 
@Blocky
 
@birdekek
 

Shoutout to 
Sunk
 for being a legend and making the 360-Cannons mod available for all.

set-checkpoints.569.title: Set Checkpoints
set-checkpoints.569.author: Q10isarobot
set-checkpoints.569.description:
This mod lets you set a checkpoint at any time within a level!!!

While holding the L button, Press up on the D pad to set a checkpoint location.

While holding the L button, Press the Y button to travel to your checkpoint.

If no marker is set you will return to the start of the level

This is useful for very challenging maps such as "only up", level testing, and preventing softlock.

I may change the model for the checkpoint but for now its a ! symbol

I realize someone else made something like this after I already made the mod so this is another option.

you are free to use or reuse the code in my mod in your own mod

sharens-animation-overhaul.262.title: Sharen's Animation Overhaul
sharens-animation-overhaul.262.author: Sharen64
sharens-animation-overhaul.262.description:
Since I'll be out of my home for a few days and be unable to work on anything, I decided to give you all a small sample of what I've been working on.

This mod changes a bunch of Mario's animations to give the game a bit of a different feel, as well as make a couple of extra changes to him
 
(which may or may not end up transforming this into a Sharen's Details DX but I do not promise anything).

So far: 
Idle, First Person, Walking, Running, Halting, Turning around, all 3 basic jumps, Freefall, Sideflip, Backflip, both Long Jumps, Wall Jump
 (with a new firstie animation!), 
all of the respective jumps' Landing animations, Crouching, Uncrouching
 and 
Crawling
 have been re-animated.

Also makes Mario open his hands on a couple of animations, makes him look around when strafing in the air, and makes heavy use of the unused eye states.

All of these can be toggled in the options menu.

sharens-improved-swimming.241.author: Ex Coop Mods Archive
sharens-improved-swimming.241.description:
Sharen's Improved Swimming

List of changes:

- Instead of rotating Mario to the desired direction and pressing A at a specific rhythm, you now simply pull the stick to where you wanna go and Mario will simply go there, with no need to mash A as he'll stroke on his own, if you wish to go up or down, just hold A or Z.

- Entering water no longer puts you in a state where you have to wait for Mario to stop moving downwards, instead, you get to control him right away! In addition, if you enter water while already having considerable speed (most commonly via dives or long jumps) you'll get to keep extra speed you'd normally never reach!

- Shells are no longer a stupid joke, their duration was buffed from 8 seconds (yeah I didn't believe it either) to 30, alongside making you swim significantly faster as well as letting you halt to a complete stop faster! Oh yeah, you can also carry them out of the water if you wish, not sure how that's gonna be useful though.

- Metal Mario CAN swim now! You still sink, though, and swimming upwards will be noticeably slower, but hey, at least you get to swim downwards really fast.

- Water grabbing now doubles as a dash, very useful if you haven't entered water the proper way (a.k.a diving) or lost speed, though I wouldn't recommend using it if you did dive, as you'll lose your extra speed

If for some reason you wish to stick to the old way, you can! Simply type 
/better-swim
 and that will toggle the mod on or off.

Your browser is not able to display this video.

shotgun-coop.621.title: Shotgun Coop
shotgun-coop.621.author: ProfeJavix
shotgun-coop.621.description:
This mod gives every player a shotgun with a moveset.
​

Moves:

Y: Shoot

Charged Y (hold until the bar is charged): Boost Shoot

Ground Pound + Y: Ground Pound Shoot

Ground Pound + Charged Y: Boost Ground Pound Shoot

X: Toggle First Person

You can use the shotgun either in PvP or with some game objects/enemies, the choice is yours (tip: each move deals different damage, so not all of them will have an effect on some targets). 

Check Mod Menu to set the reload time and the boost charge time. Also, if you load EmilyEmmi's MarioHunt, the host will have the chat command "/sgcoop-mhteam" to select which team will have the shotguns. Allowed values are:
​

"0" or "hunters" ( default)

"1" or "runners"

"2" or "both"

Credits to Agent X's 
Gun Mod
 for the PvP inspiration and Dorrieal's 
Shotgun Mario
 romhack for the original shotgun concept.

This mod was a bounty from Drenchy. Visit his channel!

updates.title: Bug fixes and QoL addings
updates.changelog:
Changelog
:

Fixed a bug causing the player to sink in the moving sands when shooting far above it.

Added chat commands to change shooting and aiming buttons (
/sgcoop-shootBtn
 and 
/sgcoop-aimBtn
). 
WARNING
: some buttons can conflict with vanilla actions.

Added an option to the Mod Menu to toggle the 
unintended but surprisingly funny
 flying glitch.

Balanced the bullet interaction on some targets (like Bowser and the trees)

Maybe new bugs added...hope not...

shrink-mario-on-low-health.846.title: Shrink Mario on Low Health
shrink-mario-on-low-health.846.author: hyperion
shrink-mario-on-low-health.846.description:
Mario becomes mini-sized if his health drops to 2 bars. Also restricts his moveset (including object grabbing) and makes his voice higher pitched like in some games.

Note: if you use this with Character Select, the high-pitched voice will override custom voices.

shadow-the-hedgehog.472.title: Shadow The Hedgehog
shadow-the-hedgehog.472.author: Chaorrin
shadow-the-hedgehog.472.description: Shadow The Hedgehog arrives in sm64! with his Chaos Control on y button and his bike-summoning abilities on x button, Shadow is ready to take down Bowser! Otherwise he controls mostly like Mario. I did attempt to give him a skating animation but it felt as if he moved too slow to be skating and i'm not really much of an animator anyway. If i ever figure out how to mimic the sm64 style and i'm feeling up to it, maybe i can give him a better model as well. Features full recolorability.

skip-common-cutscenes.1135.title: Skip Common Cutscenes
skip-common-cutscenes.1135.author: MegAmi24
skip-common-cutscenes.1135.description:
This mod skips all those small cutscenes you're bound to watch at least a few times over and over. Specifically this mod skips:

Dialog and save prompts when collecting stars or keys, including the course complete screen

The animation of Mario landing and getting up after dying and getting kicked out of a course

The star door and key door unlocking animations and dialog

Dialog when pressing a cap switch

The cutscene of opening a cannon

This mod is also compatible with 
Star Choose Exit
, so that mod's prompts will still appear.

silent-hill-64.773.title: Silent Hill 64
silent-hill-64.773.author: jonathanoflebones
silent-hill-64.773.description:
This is a Mini Hack by Apioeus taking place in a single big course, inspired by the Silent Hill series. There are 6 stars to find with a slight bit of Kaizo difficulty, you can also hold the L button to view the HUD.

I'm uploading this port here now to archive it as the Coop Mods Archive forgot about it.

simdjams-moveset.402.title: SimDjam's Moveset
simdjams-moveset.402.author: SimDjam
simdjams-moveset.402.description:
Category: Moveset
​

Thanks to 
@YTGolder
 for doing the 
 S M O O T H 
 speedboost and the particles!!1!

All moves added are made by me of course : )

So how this moveset works, there is a lot of things

1. The special long jump: long jump + Y

2. The Rollout Back flip: Jump then X x2

3. The "only up" thing: Jump, Ground pound, Y, B

4. The   H E L I C O P T E R: Super long jump then press X

5. The speedboost: Hold Y while Running (Works with holding a object but not with a heavy object.)

sm64-ds-luigi-voice.576.title: SM64 DS Luigi Voice
sm64-ds-luigi-voice.576.author: Millymilo000
sm64-ds-luigi-voice.576.description:
A mod that replaces Luigi's voice with the Luigi voice used in Super Mario 64 DS. Higher quality versions are used, when available. When high quality versions aren't available, the original version from SM64 DS are used. In the "all-hq" version of this mod, the voice lines with missing high quality versions are replaced with other voice lines I saw fit.

If you are struggling to install this mod please refer to the 
usage section on my github
; Or if that doesn't work, make a comment in the "Discussion" tab and I'll probably reply to it.

Showcase​

Credits​
SMS Alfredo, for the original 
Voice mod template
.

Nintendo and Charles Martinet, for the original voice.

and uh, me, I guess, for gathering all these voices, and nicely putting them in a mod for you all 

This was last tested, and found working with no errors, on sm64coopdx v1.3.2

sm64-chaos-edition.490.title: SM64 Chaos Edition
sm64-chaos-edition.490.author: ManIsCat2
sm64-chaos-edition.490.description:
Super Mario 64, but random codes are injected into the game at random intervals, resulting in an experience that can only be described as chaotic.

Epilepsy Warning:

This mod contains flashing lights or patterns that may trigger seizures in individuals with photosensitive epilepsy. Viewer discretion is advised.

Original Mod Author: Kaze Emanuar

Coop Mod Author: ManIsCat2

Not all the codes (effects) could be ported for coop because of limitations so some are missing. I am deeply sorry!

This mod has a mod menu, the host can modify the Chaoticness and the Chaos Timer, here's what they do:

    - Chaoticness: Max amount of codes (effects) that can be active at once.

    - Chaos Timer: The time between code activation (seconds).

Some info about the mod:

    - Do not report any Bugs to Mods or the actual game while playing this Mod!!!

    - Also remember that this mod can cause lag!!!

    - in this mod, the object effects only sync if the player that has activated the effect and you, are in the same level.

    - If you experience Script Errors, ping me in Coop Central or DM me in Discord. (username is maniscat2)

sm64-halloween-mayhem.889.title: SM64 Halloween Mayhem
sm64-halloween-mayhem.889.author: jonathanoflebones
sm64-halloween-mayhem.889.description:
SM64 
Halloween
 
Mayhem

​

(It is recommended to play this hack using the OpenGL build of the game.)

SM64 Halloween Mayhem is a Romhack made by Kaze Emanuar with custom modeling done by Kinopio, released in 2014. There are 8 stars to find across various spooky themed levels filled with very scary custom objects and things to do.

You're very sure to have a happy halloween playing this hack!

Credits:

Me - Main Porting

The Incredible Holc, ManIsCat2 - Coding Help

Special thanks to xLuigiGamerx for showing me how to make the coin meter appear in hub worlds.

sm64-test-worlds-ii-all-or-nothing.615.title: SM64 Test Worlds II: All or Nothing
sm64-test-worlds-ii-all-or-nothing.615.author: jonathanoflebones
sm64-test-worlds-ii-all-or-nothing.615.description:
Another test hack by Apioeus, made for SirRouven1003's Level Pack. This hack was meant to have 15-18 stars but it was not finished, so it only has one star. This hack is much more difficult than the original Test Worlds. Additionally, the level has a timer that counts down.

This port was originally uploaded only in the Coop Central discord server, since I didn't have the ability to upload mods to the site at the time, now that I can it is available here which should be more accessible.

Special Thanks to 
Fearl
 for technical coding help.

sm64-the-nostalgia-trip.1157.description:
Category: Romhack

Difficulty: Casual

This old hack released back in 2021 by B. Bones Johnson where levels were recreated from several of the most influential hacks that were released over the years. Despite being the creator's first hack, it's pretty fun from what we playtested so give it a shot.

Ported by SimonX64 with fixes provided by me, Rogergm and 1E5.

Additional thanks to Blackalf, MalkAmaril, Pika and 3CL1PS3  for playtesting too.

sm64-year-of-the-plumber-c3-demo.606.title: SM64: Year of the Plumber [C3 Demo]
sm64-year-of-the-plumber-c3-demo.606.author: jonathanoflebones
sm64-year-of-the-plumber-c3-demo.606.description:
This is the C3 Demo of SM64: Year of the Plumber, a hack made by DobieMeltfire that was never finished, it contains 16 Stars and 2 Main Courses. The project would later be rebranded into 
Somari 64.

This port has now been uploaded to the site for archival purposes and better accessibility. Do note that it is possible some of the death barriers may not be present, so if you get stuck in a pit, press "exit course" and you should be good.

(Some Images were taken from the SM64 Hacks Wiki)

sm64coopdx-manager.510.title: SM64CoopDX Manager
sm64coopdx-manager.510.author: Squishy6094
sm64coopdx-manager.510.description:
SM64CoopDX Manager

A tool made for managing SM64CoopDX and it's mods

How to use:

SM64CoopDX Manager attempts to be as user friendly as possible for a console-based manager, but there are some caviates...

Getting Dependancies:

System
 - Must be installed on your machine manually in order to use basic Python functionality

Python
 - The language SM64CoopDX Manager is built in

pip
 - Package installer for Python

Python Libraries
 - Must be installed in order to use SM64CoopDX Manager, if pip is installed you can use these commands in your terminal of choice to download them manually.

requests
 - 
python -m pip install requests

chime
 - 
python -m pip install chime

watchdog
 - 
python -m pip install watchdog

Starting the program:

After installing all of the required dependancies, you should be able to launch the python file in the same way you would an executible file. Once starting, it will attempt to download the Python Libraries above automatically if you haven't already, then you will boot into the Manager Menu!

Goals:

1. (Achieved) A User-Friendly console-based mod organizer made to improve Loading / Mod Cache times

2. (Future Update) An Automatic SM64CoopDX Update Notifier and Installer

Current Functionality:

1. Mod Organization

2. Mass Mod Loading / Unloading

3. Automatic Mod Backups

4. Improved Mod Caching Times (Dependant on Mods loaded)

5. Booting SM64CoopDX from Launcher

6. Automatic Python Package Instalation

Planned Functionality:

1. Automatic SM64CoopDX Update Installation

2. (?) Automatic Mod Update Installation

3. (?) DynOS Organization

4. (?) SM64CoopDX Config Editor/Option Menu

updates.title: SM64CoopDX Manager v1.1
updates.changelog:
SM64CoopDX Manager v1.1 Changelog:

Added Development Mode, which should make Mod Creation using manager much more viable

Changed save file from 
pickle
 format to 
json

Made save named after version to avoid possible future version save conflicts

Added Mod Directory Configuration

Replaced Automatic Dependency Installer with a Dependency List + Install Command Display

Organized the Menus More

Added Boot Options

  - 
boot
: Boot CoopDX without menu navigation

  - 
mods
: Open Mods Menu without menu navigation

  - 
dev
: Start Development Mode without menu navigation

Fixed coop launch directory becoming 
True
, rather than an actual directory

A bunch of other cool stuffs I can't rememberrr

so-retro.666.title: So Retro!
so-retro.666.author: EmilyEmmi
so-retro.666.description:
This is a port of Super Mario Bros. and Super Mario Bros. 2 (JPN) to sm64coopdx! Yes, really. The entire game(s)! Take down King Koopa and his Troopas with up to 16 players online! Featuring QoL adjustments and server options to customize your experience.

Compatible with MarioHunt and Character Select (Character select creators must make their own sprites if they wish). See zz_api.lua for the API. Likely to be incompatible with other mods due to it... you know.. changing the entire game?

CREDITS:

Mod by EmilyEmmi with assistance from xLuigiGamerx

SFX/Music rips:

						The Mushroom Kingdom: Super Mario Bros. downloads and information
					

					themushroomkingdom.net
				

Pipro (Sounds Resource)

KH Insider (Music)

Sprite Rips:

SuperJustinBros (SMB1)

RandomTalkingBush (SMM2)

Custom Sprites: KrystalPhantasm, C. Pariah, FunkyLion, AquariusAlexx, Leohaha, Lyra, SonicZetrex, TenmaAkie

Libraries:

xLuigiGamerx, PeachyPeach

Special thanks:

Dan Salvato, silverslither, JDaster64, doppelganger, and others for technical documentation.

Old
 description (April Fools):

guysm i made my first hack! I calle It so retro!!!1! Get tready for a nose tail gah overload!!!eleven@

I took some inspireation from SMb1 on the nes entertainment system. There are 10 stars in ths hack

btw I also made retro physics so 
it won't work with character r select or movesets (like omm)( or game modes or a bunch of other mods 
 sorry

updates.title: v2.0.2: Yet another hotfix
updates.changelog: Remember how I said I made some corrections to the custom character process? Well, I uploaded the OLD file, so it STILL said so_retro.zip. Now that has been corrected for real this time. A large amount of inaccuracies were also brought to my attention, so I fixed a few easy ones.

updates.title: v2.0.1: Tiny hotfix
updates.changelog:
Some minor fixes, with some relating to custom characters.

Adding a missing Koopa Paratroopa to D-1 that prevented the level from being possible in single player

Fixed a script error if all players died in a level while bubbles were enabled

Made the modfs create itself immediately upon loading the mod if it doesn't exist

The example mod now properly explains how to import custom characters (previously, it referred to so_retro.modfs as so_retro.zip and assumed it was auto-treated as a zip file.)

updates.title: v2.0: One-Year (late) Anniversary! MASSIVE UPDATE!
updates.changelog:
In case you missed it last year (since I presented it as a shoddy rom hack), this is a port of Super Mario Bros. to sm64coopdx, with the goal of being a decently-accurate port. This HUGE update brings tons of new features, including widescreen support, new server options, and even a new port of Lost Levels! Here are the biggest new features:

Lost Levels: Super Mario Bros. 2 (JPN), the notoriously difficult sequel, is now playable! Thank goodness I added an infinite lives option.

Custom character support: Supports Character Select integration, as well as including its own character system. You can even load characters from modFs, allowing you to use characters in any lobby! Check out so_retro_example_char.zip for more.

Editor + API overhaul: The editor has been reworked to be much more useable, and a highly robust API has been added. As much as I would have liked to have a bunch of example mods ready to go, I've been working on this for far too long, so they will have to wait.

MarioHunt support!?: Yes, really. Unfortunately, there may be some minor quirks until the next version of MarioHunt releases.

(NOTE: Main mod is so_retro.zip)

sonic-health.115.title: Sonic health
sonic-health.115.author: wereyoshi
sonic-health.115.description:
on hit drop rings equal to the rings counter if you get hit with no rings or shield you die

coins no longer heal (since rings normally don't give air) and recovery hearts can now give a shield (can be toggled off using /recoveryheartshield command basically i made recovery hearts act as a shield monitor)

has generic super forms no stat changes only invincibility and hurt enemies on touch activated by pressing x (by default can be changed with sonichealthsuperbutton command) and having 50 rings + prereq(default 50 stars)

Spoiler: 
screenshots

Spoiler: 
commands

/decreasecoincounter - [on|off] turn decreasecoincounter on or off to choose whether to decrease the coin counter on hit and rings equal 1 coin or have the coin counter not decease on hit and rings only affect ring counter

/loseringsonlevelchange - turn loseringsonlevelchange on or off to choose if you want to keep your rings between levels.

/maxrecollectablerings - maxrecollectablerings [number] this sets the maximum amount of rings you can get back per hit

/maxringloss [number] this sets the max number of rings you can lose at once set it to 0 to always lose all rings.

/recoveryheartshield = [on|off] turn recoveryheartshield on or  off to choose whether recovery hearts should give an  overshield on touch.

/ringscrushinstadeath - [on|off] turn ringscrushinstadeath on or off to choose if you want being crushed to be instadeath.

/ringui_x - ringui_x [number|dpad|toggleui] this sets the x position of the ring counter should be a value  between 0 and 320, ringui_x \\#A02200\\dpad\\#ffffff\\ for moving the ui with dpad,or ringui_x toggleui to toggle the ui

/ringui_y - ringui_y [number|dpad|toggleui] this sets the y position of the ring counter should be a value between 0 and  -240, ringui_y \\#A02200\\dpad\\#ffffff\\ for moving the ui with dpad,or ringui_y toggleui to toggle the ui

/sonicfalldamage - [on|off] turn sonicfalldamage on or off to choose whether you can take fall damage

/sonichealthconfig = [save|load|savesuperpreqpref|loadsuperpreqpref|printserver|printlocal] to save the current sonic health settings to a file or load them (loading only works if used by a moderator or the server)

/sonichealthsuperbutton - [reset|change] set the button/buttons to turn super, reset sets it back to default(default x) and change allows you to change it

/sonicsuper - [on|off|prereq|7coinstar|number] toggle the ability to go super with 50+ rings + requirement, get the requirement by typing prereq ,change prereq by entering number of stars needed or entering 7coinstar to make super require 7 100 coin stars.

/disablelavabounce', [on|off] turn disablelavabounce \\#00C7FF\\on \\#ffffff\\or \\#A02200\\off \\#ffffff\\to choose if you want to lava bounce on lava.

so you can do /maxringloss 0  and /maxrecollectablerings 20 to lose all rings on hit but only be able to recover 20 of them.

this mod also contains an api that other mods can use _G.sonichealth

Spoiler: 
sonichealth api

customsupercheck --function to allow another mod to pass its own super prereq check for if a romhack wants to set a specific super requirement

supermoveset--function to store super toggles for other mods with the functions having false for off and true for this mod to toggle which allows other mods such as movesets to act differently when super

getringcount --this function allows other mods to check ringcount

increaseringcount --this function allows other mods to modify ringcount

getversion --this function returns the sonic health version

addallycheck --expects the function to have parameters customfunc(attacker,victim) param victim mariostate of the player being attacked and param attacker mariostate of the player attacking and the function should return 1 (when the hit player is an ally and you don't want the player to affect their ally),return 2 (when the hit player is an ally and you want the interaction to happen without ring loss), and return 0 otherwise(which causes the hit player to lose rings on hit).

get_serversetting -- function that returns the value of a gGlobalSyncTable variable or variables used by sonichealth mod

getshield --this function allows other mods to check the player's shield

giveshield ----this function allows other mods to give/take away a shield

addcustomenemyfunction --this function allows other mods to have custom interactions

isplayersuper --this function returns whether a player is super

deprecated 
addsuperenemyfunction--this function allows other mod's objects to have unique interactions with super forms
 use addcustomenemyfunction instead

credits

steven3004
- making rings fling out of your position instead of spawning around your position

sonic-character-rebooted.13.title: Sonic Character: Rebooted
sonic-character-rebooted.13.author: steven3004
sonic-character-rebooted.13.description:
This is a mod that adds Sonic and friends as a playable character in sm64ex-coop.

This mod can be used two ways:

As a Character Select pack: Adds two characters with movesets and palettes to the CS menu.

As a standalone mod: Type /sonic in chat to turn on Sonic characters. Each character overwrites a vanilla character's slot, the list goes:

Mario: Sonic

Luigi: ?

Toad: Amy Rose

Waluigi: ?

Wario: ?

Sonic replaces Mario, and is faster than the vanilla cast, and he also brings some new tricks to the table.

Momentum tweaks: When running or landing Sonic doesn't lose any speed that he has gained. If you let go of the analog stick he'll decelerate instead of stopping immediately.

Air control: While airborne, during some moves, he can turn around in the air and change directions.

No swimming. He instead has a limited version of his ground moveset.

Fall damage is delayed a bit for Sonic.

B button (ground):

Spindash: Hold the B button to charge the spindash, and let go to dash off rollin'. Ya can also spam it and gain some speed, but it's capped.

Sonic Eagle: Hold A and press B and he'll do the Sonic Eagle from Sonic Battle, which is basically a reskinned Jump Kick here.

Windmill Kick: This move replaces Mario's slide kick. By pressng B while crouch-slidin', Sonic will do a spinning kick, attacking most enemies and bouncin' off walls.

B button (air):

Sonic Eagle: Basically the same move, but ya have to let go of the analog stick t' do it.

Dropdash: Hold B in the air with the analog stick and you'll start a dropdash. If ya hold it until you hit the ground, you'll get more speed and start rollin'. If ya release it in the air, you'll instead perform an airdash. If ya hold it until ya hit a wall, you'll climb upwards. The faster you are, the higher you'll jump up.

Bound Jump: Sonic's replacement fer the ground pound. Press Z and you'll bounce on the ground, break stuff, and be immune t' fall damage. Though keep in mind that you'll have less air control.

Grabbing: Just spindash or roll into an object.

Amy goes over Toad, is mostly similar to Sonic in terms of physics, but she has moves of her own that makes for a different play style.

(Her voice clips are mostly unfinished for now.)

Passive abilities:

1. Amy's jump height is much higher than Sonic's and most of the vanilla cast.

2. She can swim, unlike Sonic, but instead of a breaststroke, she only has a flutter kick, and her speed increases the same way it does on land

Giant Steps:

1. This move replaces the Long Jump, in which Amy leaps forward in the held direction, allowing her to gain speed and redirect momentum immediately while on the ground.

2.  Keep in mind that this move doesn't have air mobility and there is a bit of delay for using the move.

    + By pressing B during the move, she will trip over and do what's basically just a reskinned dive.

Hammer Attack: The most basic melee move. You press B on the ground and she'll whack her hammer instead of punching or kicking.

Hammer Twirl: By crouching and holding B, Amy will spin with her hammer and bounce off walls. You're able to change your direction by a bit during this move if yer moving, and it slows you down when you're on the ground.

Hammer Flip:

1. While Amy's in the air, if you press or hold B, she'll spin forwards with her hammer.

2. While the move is being done, she can bounce up walls, retaining some speed and gaining height based on the speed. Note that ya gotta be fully and constantly spinning fer this to be possible. Run into a wall too early and she'll just bonk off of it.

Hammer Jump: When ya press A within a few frames of her hitting her hammer, either from a Hammer Attack or landing with a Hammer Flip, she'll propel upwards. The height you gain depends on how fast you go. This is also how ya fly with the Wing Cap.

Hammer Pound:

1. This is basically just a simple replacement fer the Ground Pound where she spins her hammer downwards.

2. If you press and hold B during the move, she'll thrust forwards a bit and do the Hammer Twirl.

In addition, here's the intended color code fer this model:

Sonic:

Shirt/Cap (Shoes): d91101

Overalls (Quills): 4084d9

Skin: fdc976

Gloves: ffffff

Amy:

Shirt/Cap (Clothes): e41515

Overalls (Secondary Clothes): 00ff86

Hair (Quills): fd90a7

Skin: ffb597

Gloves: ffffff

Credits:

Coding, Modelling and Animating: 
steven.

Ball model: 
king the memer

Sound Effects: 
SEGA - Sonic Team

Sonic VA and Animation Helper: 
AngelicMiracles

Amy Rose VA: Grimoria Webb

Custom voice system: SMS Alfredo

Coolest playtesters:  Asra, Matheus Lopes, Great Kingdom Official, DemnyxOnyxfur, Zerks

Song used in the trailer.

updates.title: Another hotfix lmao.
updates.changelog: Cranked up air deceleration when stick is released. I thought this is a really needed update.

updates.title: They call me Sonic. 'Cause I am faster than sound, I keep on jumping around.
updates.changelog:
Capped Amy's hammer attack backwards speed.

Tweaked the way air controls handles negative speed.

Prevented Sonic from attacking players with his jump.

Fixed animation jank when the air dash action transitions to running.

Tweaked running animation code again.

Tweaked land rolling slope accel.

Fixed the third upwarp bug that's occured with rolling underwater.

Added more deceleration to skidding. Sonic has more deceleration than Amy.

New passive mechanic: Badnik Bounce. This is taken from the classic games where the further you fall, the higher you'll bounce off an enemy. Usually, you'd need to hold A to maintain and gain height from bounces, but some other moves will just automatically gain height upon stomping.

You can't bounce on players for now.

Credits t' 
fbell
 fer the stomp code I used as the foundation fer Badnik Bouncing.

updates.title: A hotfix.
updates.changelog: Fixed ball model recolorability.

updates.title: Quick fixes and additions.
updates.changelog:
Fixed airdash jank. Now the speed from the airdash can transfer properly to the ground.

Generalized and tweaked walkin' animations code.

NEW SONIC MOVE - Windmill Kick: 
This move replaces the Slide Kick. It's good fer a quick attack and a bit of a headstart, but it's just as useful as the move it replaces.

updates.title: Character Select compatibility update
updates.changelog:
Warning: This update changed a file. please delete the older version you installed before updating.

Added Character Select compatibility. Dunno how long this would last.

Ripped off the band-aid after v1.0.1

Changed the way Sonic jumps out of water. (He uses his regular jump now.)

updates.title: The Band-aid.
updates.changelog:
Since the recent update to sm64coopdx fucked up the audio code, I located the source of the problem and temporarily removed it.

This isn't guaranteed to fix the problem 
completely, 
but it should make the crashes less obnoxious since that's a big issue right now.

updates.title: The Rosy Rascal Update.
updates.changelog:
Sonic now has a more efficient bound pound code, so it's less hacky and the move now feels more flowy.

Air Dashes now break breakable surfaces, provided that ya wanna break boxes with this thing in whichever circumstances.

Sonic's water moves are now affected by the water current unless the Metal Cap is worn.

Sonic now has a new lil' animation for exiting paintings with a star collected.

Sonic's water actions can now interact with switches.

Bound Jump now bounces directly off enemies instead of phasing through them.

Removed Sonic's ability t' Long Jump as it's really disruptive t' have in his entire moveset. I'll figure out what t' replace it with later on, but fer now, ya can and will have t' live without yer BLJs.

Added Amy Rose with full movesets.

sonics-ultimate-genesis-music-pack.631.title: Sonic's Ultimate Genesis Music Pack!
sonics-ultimate-genesis-music-pack.631.author: FlyerMations
sonics-ultimate-genesis-music-pack.631.description:
Sonic's Ultimate Genesis Music Pack!

This music pack replaces the following songs in-game to songs from across many genesis titles!

Note: I wanted to get this out as soon as possible (it's a bit incomplete), and also tried to refrain from mainly using Sonic the Hedgehog songs (i tried my hardest). It was extremely rushed so it's a bit scuffed.

List of songs and their replacements:

Castle = Main Menu (Sega Genesis Mini)

Bob Omb Battlefield = Shooting Ristar (Ristar)

Whomp's Fortress = Bonanza Elegy (Bonanza Bros.)

Cool, Cool Mountain = Ring Rink (Ristar)

Jolly Roger Bay = Splash Down!! (Ristar)

Princess' Secret Slide = Ready.. Go!! (Ristar)

Tower of the Wing Cap = Du! Di! Da! (Ristar)

Bowser in the Dark World = Bonanza Suspense Theatre (Bonanza Bros.)

Bowser in the Dark World (Fight) = Battle (Ristar)

Lethal Lava Land = Busy Flare (Ristar)

Shifting Sand Land = Sandopolis Zone (Act 1) (Sonic 3 & Knuckles)

Hazy Maze Cave = Mystic Cave Zone (2-Player) (Sonic the Hedgehog 2)

Dire, Dire Docks = Seascape (Knuckles' Chaotix)

Bowser in the Fire Sea = Castle (Alex Kidd in the Enchanted Castle)

Bowser in the Fire Sea (Fight) = Boss (Streets of Rage)

Tall, Tall Mountain = Mushroom Hill Zone (Act 1) (Sonic 3 & Knuckles)

Wet Dry World = Labyrinth Zone (Sonic the Hedgehog)

Snowman's Land = Ice Scream (Ristar)

Tick Tock Clock = Ready.. Go!! (Ristar)

Bowser in the Sky = Stage 7 (Streets of Rage)

Bowser in the Sky (Fight) = Stage 13 (Dr. Robotnik's Mean Bean Machine)

Credits = Credits (Ristar)

if you have any suggestions for the mod please let me know i am out of ideas

)

For those with people who wants to help, just ask me in dms in Discord if you like

Credit are in the mod itself but here they are in this Mod Page:

updates.title: Speedrun Timer Reworked v1.5
updates.changelog:
It's been a Month Yes, But I decide to release this Update Now, because in 2.0, I'm going to redo everything and try to at least make it look fresh, since I did kinda improve on coding. 

Anyway here are the changes:

Changelog:​

Reworked The Font Menu

The Runs Can Be Viewed In The Settings Menu Or a Popup Now

Tweak The Reset Save File Function, To Sync A Bit Better

Reworked The Romhack Plugin

Reworked Levels And Positions Settings

Etc.

Fixes:​

Fixed The Runs Menu Function Options

Fixed Players Sometimes be at a Random Location

Fixed Buttons/Commands Softlock

Fixed When Players Not Warping to the Starting Level

Fixed Some Functions Plays Even After Not Selecting A Gamemode

Etc.

Plugins:​
Removed All Romhack Plugins Files and Just Decide to Keep the All in One File

Update Custom Sounds For the Latest Update

Now Time For me to make a to do list for the 2.0 Update, I know it won't go so well by myself, but feel free to ask me to help out.

updates.title: Speedrun Timer Reworked v1.4
updates.changelog:
This is probably my Biggest Changes I ever did for a update, and probably my last update until I decide to come back too it.

anyway, here are the changes:

# Additions: 

Added 4 Different Types Gamemodes

Added a Runs Menu

Added Back The Intro Option

Added Menu Command/Buttons Toggle

Added Starting Option Settings For The Host

Added Back 31, 45, and 50 Stars on the SM64 Rules

And Much More!

# Changelog: 

Reworked The Custom Anti-Cheat Plugin to have it's own Menu

Reworked Intermission and Countdown Functions For the Gamemodes

Reworked Lives System (Meaning The Lives Plugin Is No Longer Needed)

Now Custom Plugins has it's Own Option

The Freeze Warp now works without using a Romhack

And Many More!

# Fixes: 

Fixed Menu JoyStick being too Sensitive

Fixed Warping sometimes not Working

Fixed Restart Timer Not Resetting Some Functions

Fixed Save File Desync (I Hope)

Fixed Fanfare not playing sometimes

Fixed Not be able to reset after finishing a run

And a few more!

# Plugins:

Updated The Folders for the Latest Update

i'm actually take a break from this mod and decide to work on something, but do let me know, if there's any bugs you saw.

You can find the latest version on the download button

sonic-adventure-64-dx.135.title: Sonic Adventure 64 DX
sonic-adventure-64-dx.135.author: steven3004
sonic-adventure-64-dx.135.description:
A lil' side project I did fer fun while workin' on Sonic Character: Rebooted. Since I felt it was too lazy t' just shove a small hack into a program and call it a day, I decided t' do more by addin' tiny lil' things into the hack.

This includes:

Newly rendered ring textured.

New character icons.

New action used fer springs.

Bomb-throwin' Ukikis as a substitute fer Kikis. Every hack should have a bomb-chuckin' monkey, I think. (Bombs can be thrown or kicked back at the Ukikis.)

Entirely new checkpoint model with animations.

New sound effects for both springs and checkpoints.

Like, 1 new dialogue.

Credits: 

Original Hack
:

Pablo: Creator, Music

LuigiXHero: Techinical Stuff, Some Ideas and Tester

BlackStone187: Model Assisting

DobieMeltfire: Co-Creator, Music

Vertrex: Model Provider, Music

Port:

steven3004
: Porter, Additional Details and Objects

Sunk: Code Helper, Kaze's MOPs Port

wereyoshi
: Code Helper

sprays.813.title: Sprays
sprays.813.author: BuckleyTim
sprays.813.description:
Your browser is not able to display this video.

SPRAYS:

Spray with dpad_down to graffiti all over any eligible wall!

mario version of jet set radio sfx to accompany the tagging

default spray is [character]: it will conform to your lives icon, it's compatible with Character Select and will conform to custom lives icon used in that as well!

a few other basegame sprays as well (including my good friend Finn (i trapped him in the sprays))

you can even Personalize your Copy of the spray mod by adding your own sprays! API included with the mod can add sprays you put in the textures folder (you'll have to add a few lines of code to get it in game, there's an example file included to show you what you have to do)

don't go posting low-effort spray packs here though lol

Credits:

BuckleyTim

The Incredible Holc

Birdekek

updates.title: 1.1 (Character Select 1.16+ graffiti compatibility)
updates.changelog:
This is very late to the party, but I'm updating the sprays mod to support CS 1.16+ compatibility regarding graffiti. CS Graffiti is now the default spray type, though 'livesicon' has been added to the spray type list and will work as it did in 1.0 if you select it. I believe this mod is still compatible with versions before 1.16, but to be on the safe side I'd update CS to the latest version before using it with this mod.

Hope I didn't break anything with this, lol.

standard-kart-ds-collection.134.title: Standard Kart DS Collection
standard-kart-ds-collection.134.author: [Viande Scolopendragon]
standard-kart-ds-collection.134.description:
This mod is a collection of standard karts of all playable characters of Mario Kart DS game, with some new karts of characters not seen before in Mario Kart DS (Toadette, Rosalina, Pauline, Dry Bowser etc).

/kartconf - with this command you can modify everyone's karts with different modifiers - only the host can use this command.

These modifications are:

Number of coins  

Speed 

MKDS Speed 

Kart Collision

Green Shell shooter 

AutoJump 

/karts - this command allows you to choose between the different karts available.

Developed by: Birdekek, Jzzle, Viandegrasacarnechuleta

HUD Menu based in ANTONBLAST by Sharen

Drift is not yet available, we will eventually add it.

star-choose-exit.442.title: Star Choose Exit
star-choose-exit.442.author: king the memer
star-choose-exit.442.description:
i remember a while back seeing a few people who

wanted the option to choose whether to stay or leave

on the star get screen while using the "Stay In Level"

server option so i thought id try making it myself

its an extremely simple mod, instead of asking if

you want to save it asks if you want to stay in the

level or not saying no will trigger a star exit rather

than a regular death exit

Star Revenge 1.5:
 
Star Takeover Redone
​
About:

125 Stars

Remade and Reimagined Levels

Star Revenge Series

Star Check Support

This is a modern remake of Star Revenge 1 ST with 125 stars, which is also the 2nd time SR1 got remade.

(Older versions before v2.1 only got 121 stars)

Most of the levels are direct edits of the old models or full re-imagines of the levels from SR1. The levels itself are held to classic style.

Versions 2.1 and 2.2 each replace some of the existing levels with even more updated versions, so there will be sometimes a drop in quality, considering not all levels have been given a touch-up yet.

Story: Mario finds himself at the edge of the Mushroom Kingdom, which has been overran by mysterious blue stars.

spotifycoopdx-custom-voicelines.817.title: SpotifyCoopDX & Custom Voicelines
spotifycoopdx-custom-voicelines.817.author: kikwee
spotifycoopdx-custom-voicelines.817.description:
THIS IS A 2 PART MOD READ EVERYTHING TO UNDERSTAND!!!

SpotifyCoopDX:

Bring your spotify playlist to sm64coopdx! add your .mp3 files to the sound folder and add the

file path, song name, artist name, and length of the song in the "add-songs.lua" file. (the limit of of megabytes (MB) of songs is maxed at 35 MB combined (no i cannot change this if u have a problem with it ask the sm64coopdx developers))

Commands:

/pause pause a song

/unpause unpause a song

/restart restart the playing song

/skipto (song ID) skip to a song

/skipmany (number) skip a multiple number of songs

/skip skip song

/playlist shows list of songs in your playlist

/song shows song info

Custom Voicelines:

YOU CAN NOW ADD CUSTOM VOICELINES TO SM64COOPDX IN THE EAISEST WAY POSSIBLE!!! Add your .ogg file in the sound folder and add your .ogg file in the "add-voicelines.ogg" (example: [CHAR_SOUND_OKEY_DOKEY] = 'your voiceline.ogg',).

ITS AS EASY AS IT GETS YOU CAN'T MESS UP (but if you do just message me)

Star Revenge Series (Classic)

This Star Revenge 3, Mario on a trip to a vacation island.

The hack has an open world structure with interconnected levels. Getting a star will take you back the start of the level, but you can keep your coins, as long as you don't die.

Story: After the events of Night of Doom, Mario and Peach set out on a vacation trip to An Saoire.

Note: Version 1.1a has actually 66 stars, the additional star of this version has been turned into a troll star in v1.2 (it is not worth getting).

This hack got replaced by it's remake SR3 VoCD in the timeline, you are better off to play that instead.

star-revenge-3-9-dreamish-block-beats.69.title: Star Revenge 3.9: Dreamish Block Beats
star-revenge-3-9-dreamish-block-beats.69.author: Fearl
star-revenge-3-9-dreamish-block-beats.69.description:
Star Revenge 3.9:
 
Dreamish Block Beats
​

About:

• 
11
 Stars

• 
Beat Blocks

•
 
Checkpoints

• 
Casual

• 
Hard Stars (9)

"This is 
Star Revenge 3.9
, an extension of the beat block stars found in 
SR3.5
 
VoCD
. You explore a small temple with nine 
2.5D 
levels all based around 
Beat Blocks
, which constantly switch between being solid and unsolid. The levels get progressively long and longer with more beat blocks and more checkpoints. The camera can be zoomed out very far to study what is up ahead. The levels can be beat in one cycle, but requires knowing them."

Other notes:

• 
This port uses 
v2.0
 of the romhack.

• 
v2.0
 removes stars in 
Hard Mode
 but i added them back in the port, collecting these is optional.

• 
Hard Mode
 mode removes 
Checkpoints
, stars stay in the same position.

• 
20
 total stars with 
Hard Mode
.

Credits:

• 
BroDute
 (Hack Creator)

• 
Fearl
 (Porter)

• 
ER1CK
 (Playtesting)

star-revenge-6-9-luigi-lost-in-time.240.title: Star Revenge 6.9: Luigi Lost in Time
star-revenge-6-9-luigi-lost-in-time.240.author: flipflop bell
star-revenge-6-9-luigi-lost-in-time.240.description:
Star Revenge 6.9:
 
Luigi Lost in Time
​
About:

27 Stars

Repurposed Levels

Star Revenge Series

This is Star Revenge 6.9, a small side-hack made from levels which were meant for SR8 before it got reworked to feature a lot more Touhou.

You find yourself in a Tower with time portals to different points in the Star Revenge Timeline.

From close to the beginning to the end, you find stars all across 3 main courses and a few smaller levels.

Story: Given the hint from the end of SR6.5, Luigi tries to confront Timerock in the tower he currently resides in.

Star Revenge Series

This is a modern remake of

with 70 stars, this is also one of the easiest SRs.

star-revenge-2-night-of-doom.80.title: Star Revenge 2: Night of Doom
star-revenge-2-night-of-doom.80.author: Ex Coop Mods Archive
star-revenge-2-night-of-doom.80.description:
Original Post: November 15, 2022

Author: BlackJoyStick

If you enjoy romhacks that abuse game mechanics such as quicksand, lava, fire spitters or chuckyas, then say no more! This is the second romhack of the Star Revenge Series, now ported to sm64ex-coop. You really should not play this but it’ll be fun to see you try.

Contains 160 stars. If you find any bugs (if you even get to see them) notify me first.

Original romhack author: BroDute

Editor Note: This Rom Hack has undergone several revisions since its first post.  This is the most up-to-date known release.  A full changelog can be found below.

Spoiler: 
Full Changelog

Star Revenge 2 Quick Bugfix
-Fixed an issue where the first star in course 1 would be impossible to get

Just like with the first one, here's a rework update for Star Revenge 2: Night of Doom.-All Levels now have better looking fog-Added custom music for Koopa the Quick's Race-Added Custom Power Meter-Added (most) Custom Exclamation Boxes! thanks to @Agent X's script, the king bob omb one still doesn't work very well-Potentially fixed an issue with the names of some levelsThis should be more better looking now, if you are able to get past the HUB that is 

Just like with 0.5 I tweaked Star Revenge 2 just a bit.-Fixed Flame Colours-Bowser 3 Now has its custom texturesthose two details were bugging me off

Changed some important stuff and fixed a serious bug i hadn't seen before.-Fixed a collision bug in Space Memories-Disabled Star Get Milestones-Added Cannon Lid Texture-Added Custom Hud-Added King Bob Omb Exclamation Box-Fixed Overworld Red Coin Boxes-Reduced Requirements for Red Coin Stars-Added Infinite Lives, 1UP mushrooms heal you instead.Have fun and so on

-Fixed an Issue in Night of Doom where King Bob Omb would give the wrong star

star-revenge-4-5-the-kedama-takeover-rew.description:
Star Revenge 4.5:
 
The Kedama Takeover Rewritten
​
About:

131 Stars

Open World

Reimagined and Edited Levels

Star Revenge Series

Most of the levels are full re-imagines of the old models or new ones and course 10 and 11 are edited level models. The hack has an open world structure with interconnected levels, but the stars will still take you out of the level 
(not anymore in excoop or coopdx so more fun).

Story: While Mario had his trip to An Saoire, white creatures called Kedamas took over the Mushroom Kingdom and stole the stars of Peach's Castle and kidnapped the princess as well.

star-revenge-4-the-kedama-takeover-64.52.description:
Original Post: August 20, 2023

Author: BlackJoystick

Star Revenge 4: The Kedama Takeover 64 is a ROM Hack made by BroDute and it’s the fourth entry in the Star Revenge series of hacks. It has a total of 100 stars to collect in a big world of interconnected courses. Alongside many custom behaviors that aren’t seen often. And many unique gimmicks.

Luigi's Adventure

121 Stars

New Levels

Star Revenge Series (Classic)

This is Star Revenge 6, a take on exploring Peach's Castle that got taken over by Bowser.

This is pretty much your standard sm64 hack, new levels and a castle with paintings to explore.

Out of the older Star Revenges that have a remake, this is the best one.

sunshine-act-select.744.title: Sunshine Act Select
sunshine-act-select.744.author: Blocky
sunshine-act-select.744.description:
Yo, this adds the Super Mario Sunshine star select screen on top of the original one

One thing that does suck about it is that i do have to warp the player to 
every single level and area
 in order to get their skybox (this is for romhack compatibility).

The level scan shouldn't take long at all (usually within 5 seconds) but this depends on the romhack you are playing (did not test with B3313 but it should take more time)

(shoutouts to kaktus for telling me to finish this mod)
theres also an API that allows for the mod to be disabled if _G.sunshineAS.disabled is set to true

updates.title: Fix character select
updates.changelog: fix small oopsie where player would be in act 99, disabling character select

star-revenge-7-5-kedowsers-return.221.title: Star Revenge 7.5: Kedowser's Return
star-revenge-7-5-kedowsers-return.221.author: flipflop bell
star-revenge-7-5-kedowsers-return.221.description:
Star Revenge 7.5:
 
Kedowser's
 
Return
​

About:

131 Stars
​

Badges
​

Remixed Levels
​

Star Revenge Series
​

This is Star Revenge 7.5, a SMG2 green stars styled hack based on Star Revenge 7.

Unlike SR6.5, this hack features all levels from the hack it's based one, fully edited and with some level themes fully changed.

It being based on SR7, means the 5 badges are back to unlock Triple Jumps, Walljump, the 2 Blocks and the lava defense increase on full health.

This hack is a lot harder than other Star Revenges, specially compared to SR7 itself. Star 6 and 7 in each level are locked behind cap switches as well, leading to a bit more backtracking, depending on how you go about it.

Story: After the failed attempt to stop Timerock, Kedowser was brought back and causes a lot of chaos in the Part and it's surroundings.

It currently supports the base game and over 20 mods, including Star Road, Star Revenge 4.5, and Eureka!

Please note that "Pause in Single player" in misc. options breaks this mod, so you should disable it.

There's a yellow switch in this one!

super-chained-bros.359.title: Super Chained Bros.
super-chained-bros.359.author: ProfeJavix
super-chained-bros.359.description:
This mod adds mechanics consisting of chaining players together to limit their movements and then they will have to cooperate when doing parkour (something like the game Chained Together).

Commands:
​

scb-chain [number or name] - Chain yourself to a group by its number or to the group where a player is (Default is Group 0)

scb-unchain - Unchain yourself.

scb-spectate - Spectate your chain group.

Be sure to check the mod menu options to customize your experience.

star-revenge-7-park-of-time.144.author: Fearl
star-revenge-7-park-of-time.144.description:
Star Revenge 7:
 
Park of
 
Time
​

About:

• 121 Stars

• Badges

• New Levels

• Star Revenge Series

You enter a park, split into 3 sections based on water, the sky and various other environments.

Upon entering Mario looses his ability to perform triple jumps and walljumps + his path is blocked by Blocks similar to stone and metal blocks from Paper Mario.

Story: Mario enters a strange park set up by Timerock. He losses some moves which get sealed into badges hidden across the park, which some new ones as well. (Levels with a badge start by spawning Mario into 1 or more coins)

super-luigi-64-trolling-edition.585.author: jonathanoflebones
super-luigi-64-trolling-edition.585.description:
This is a vanilla edit for the original game with harder levels and 118 Stars by TheLegendofYoshi13. The hack is in german, it doesn't affect gameplay at all but you'll understand what the dialogue says if you know the language.

I made this port a while back and released it on the coop discord server, since it wasn't reuploaded by the Archive account in here, I'm reuploading it myself for better accessibility, I'll do the same with other ports of mine that haven't been uploaded to the site.

star-revenge-8-scepter-of-hope.801.title: Star Revenge 8: Scepter of Hope
star-revenge-8-scepter-of-hope.801.author: SamCardCounter
star-revenge-8-scepter-of-hope.801.description:
Star
 
Revenge
 8: 
S
c
e
p
t
e
r
 
o
f
 
H
o
p
e
​

About:

121 stars

Open world

Levels themed around various locations of the Touhou Project series

Star Revenge series

This is Star Revenge 8, a full-size hack featuring a world of interconnected levels and branching paths, all based on Touhou Project. Collect stars, cap switches, and returning badges from Star Revenge 7 in order to traverse Gensokyo and the realms that connect to it.

Story:
 After the events of Star Revenge 7.5, the Earth was hopelessly pulverized, and the mysterious big star Scriosadh has taken hold of the Scepter of Faith lingering in the planet's remains, shaping the world into it's image: a dark void.

Now, Mario, after being brought back from the dead by mistake, must explore the still-intact Gensokyo in search of stars to defeat Scriosadh and recharge the Scepter to reshape the Earth once more; either for better or for worse.

Other notes:

Navigation map included inside the zip.

This port uses v1.4.3 of the romhack.

Music sequences, instead, are ported from the v1.0, since the sequences featured in the newest versions utilize custom soundbanks, an impossible task for SM64CoopDx yet.

By default, the jingles for both collecting a star and the following hi-score play instead a full, looping music track. You can change this back to a simple, modern jingle by using the comand 
/newJingle [on/off]
.

With the command 
/sr8mode [pointdevice/legacy] or [0/1]
 you can change between two gamemodes. Pointdevice mode is the default, with infinite lives, 1ups are replaced with full heal items and there is no fall damage. Legacy mode changes it back to traditional lives and fall damage.

This romhack, among it's levels, features 2 challenging extra stages. They can only be accessed after inputing a password in a room near of the starting point of the hack. Where is this password? You can find it by either playing Star Revenge 6.9 or defeating the final boss of this hack.

This hack will not work properly in versions of SM64CoopDx below v1.3 (preferably the latest, scrolling textures were re-broken until 1.3.1!).

There was an attempt at reimplementing jukeboxes back from the More Objects Patch.

updates.title: v1.1 Changelog
updates.changelog:
Fixes

Corrected SuperBlock and UltraBlock locations in course 7, swapping them back to their intended places.

Added a missing SwitchBlock exception for course 4 and 14, now starting the level with blue pressed instead of red.

Skip intro is permanently toggled on. Peach has already stopped existing alongside the rest of the Earth.

Stay in course when collecting a star is now permanently toggled off, as it is necessary for progression.

Made exclamation boxes that contains metal caps respawnable.

Updated checkpoint flag code to more sophisticated standards seen in the SR2.5 port.

Improved implementation of magma levels in course 4, deviating from it's original implementation.

Lava will now be always rendered regardless of where the camera is. (Thanks Fearl)

Lava will now gradually change height instead of snapping to position. Have fun griefing your friends!

Moved around the home points of the three blarrgs in the deep cavern so that they always work... 

...and yet don't show their ugly head when raising the lava to the highest level. What a pain.

Added

Introduced Legacy mode, for the flawless or traditional plumber.

Accessible through the command 
/sr8mode [pointdevice/legacy] or [0/1]
.

Full power items are replaced back to 1ups, lives are once again limited and fall damage is back.

Default gamemode with infinite lives, full heal items instead of 1ups and no fall damage is now denominated Pointdevice.

Added custom sound effects for collecting full power/1up items. (Thanks to BlockyCmd's audio stream)

I've recieved a few notifications of crashes occurring randomly throught the port, with a few hotspots more frequent than others, like boss courses. If you run into any, feel free to report them, it'd be of great help in pinpointing the reason (most likely a memory leak most frequent when running with many other mods?).

I'm taking it way too easy...
​

super-mario-64-2.1117.title: Super Mario 64(2)
super-mario-64-2.1117.author: jonathanoflebones
super-mario-64-2.1117.description:
Super Mario 64(2) is a hack created by FeYoshiParty that was made in Toad's Tool 64 back in 2007, making it one of the first and oldest hacks ever created. 

This hack was claimed to be lost for a very long time with footage seen only in youtube videos from the creator's channel, then a working build of the hack was uploaded to the Internet Archive in 2023. Which I later reuploaded to Romhacking.com with a patch fixing a few game breaking bugs made by myself, and now the hack has been ported to coop using that same patch.

The hack has 121 stars total. (122 if you can get the second star in Dire Dire Docks), it features retextured levels, edited object layouts, and this port also overrides the 5 Main Character palettes, changing them into a Fire Flower outfit seen in the original hack (thanks 
birdekek
, for the help)

Have fun playing through a piece of romhacking history!

super-mario-128.619.title: Super Mario 128
super-mario-128.619.author: jonathanoflebones
super-mario-128.619.description:
We both thought the same, but nope, it's not the gamecube tech demo! This is an old piece

of romhacking history.
 
Super Mario 128 is a ROM hack created by RJWaters2, and released in 2008. It is one of the oldest SM64 ROM hacks which uses modified levels from the original game, and was highly known for its extreme puzzle-platforming difficulty level. 

The hack was sadly discontinued, only leaving this 16 Star demo, however, there's extra levels that were modified which you can access, bringing up the total to 52 possible stars.

super-banjo-kazooie-64-redux.772.author: jonathanoflebones
super-banjo-kazooie-64-redux.772.description:
Super 
Banjo
-
Kazooie
 64 
REDUX
 
​
A Romhack Created by Trenavix in 2018, This demo contains various levels from the original Banjo-Kazooie that were beautifully recreated in SM64! Made as a demonstartion of Trenavix's SM64Paint tool, and while a full version never came to be. The little levels we have are still a beautiful sight to see within Mario 64.

There's 18 Jiggies to find in total across 4 levels, with one of them being a secret... can you find it?

Credits:

Me - Porting

Fearl
 - Minor Code Help

ManIsCat2
 - Updating RM2C To be able to export this, This port literally wouldn't be possible without his help!

super-mario-64-flash-tracks.762.title: Super Mario 64: Flash Tracks
super-mario-64-flash-tracks.762.author: reykappy
super-mario-64-flash-tracks.762.description:
Super Mario 64
: 
Flash Tracks

Game mode inspired by GTA V Online custom races and Fall Guys platforming levels.

The goal is to 
reach the finish line
 as quickly as possible by 
dodging obstacles at top speed and kicking others
 to prevent them from reaching it before you.

If you want to create your own levels for this game mode or modify the existing ones, here you have the 
source code
.

CREDITS:

Creators of the MIDIs used to make the music for this mod: 
Yoshimaster, The Deku Trombonist, SonicFan113, HBreit, DeathBasket, 
and
 AvidGaming.

The rest of the mod has been developed by 
Kappy
.

updates.changelog:
Sections of levels that 
recycled assets
 from other levels have been 
removed
, so that no level feels repetitive.

Instead, the levels have been 
extended
 with 
new sections
 that replace these.

Several sections of the levels have been 
retextured
 to make them feel less monotonous.

Several sections have been adjusted to make the levels 
more accessible
, except for Real Rumble, which is now even more difficult, as it is intended as “the hard level”.

Fixed a lot of bugs.

super-mario-74-ten-years-after.106.title: Super Mario 74 - Ten Years After
super-mario-74-ten-years-after.106.author: flipflop bell
super-mario-74-ten-years-after.106.description:
Super Mario 74 - Ten Years After
​
About:

155 Stars

Light Kaizo

Remixed Levels

Super Mario 74

Also known as Super Mario 74xEE, this hack is a reimagining of Super Mario 74 and Super Mario 74 EE.

Dev recommendation: while Deluxe serves as the prime version of the hack, I highly encourage to play the Super Deluxe update as it features extra level design enhancements and new stars that replaces filler-type collectible missions. Completing this version gives the same points like the past versions. As for the difficulty, it pushes at medium-hard at best. It makes no difference whether you're a casual or experienced player.

Credits:

Lincrash
 (Hack Creator)

Lugmillord
 (Original SM74)

@flipflop bell
 (Porter for the Super Deluxe ver)

@Blocky
 (Porter for the Deluxe ver)

Sunk (Scrolling Textures and more for the Super Deluxe ver)

OneCalledRPG (Overhauled Custom HUD)

Brazillian Coop Community (Playtesting Super Deluxe)

Coop Central Server (more credits in code files)

Original

super-mario-64-the-underworld.1.title: Super Mario 64: The Underworld
super-mario-64-the-underworld.1.author: AgentX
super-mario-64-the-underworld.1.description:
Mario is pulled into another land some call The Underworld... He must make his way through this condemned land and help in both the escape of himself and someone he thinks he can trust from the Underworld... This is a 30 star rom hack with a fully custom cutscene system, dialog system and boss fight entirely in Lua created for the sm64ex-coop level competition.

• Special thanks to Squishy for the compass textures

• Special thanks to Trashcam for the boss theme

super-mario-bros-3d.973.title: Super Mario Bros. 3D
super-mario-bros-3d.973.author: jonathanoflebones
super-mario-bros-3d.973.description:
Super Mario Bros.
 
3D

Super Mario Bros. 3D is a mini hack made by Kaze Emanuar and Released in 2013, There are a lot of custom objects in this hack that make it feel more unique and varied.

There is also 
Luigi Mode
, enabled by typing in the /luigi-mode command. It'll make you more slippery and grant you a new special move.
​
NOTE: For Character Select compatiblity please use 
Version 1.16 or higher.

Credits:

Me - Porting

Audio Stream Template - Blocky

Special Thanks to PeachyPeachSM64, DizzyThermal and other members of the SM64CoopDX community for coding help.

(i'd upload images but my internet does NOT want to help)

super-mario-kart.24.title: Super Mario Kart
super-mario-kart.24.author: Skeltan
super-mario-kart.24.description:
Super Mario Kart
​

Here is 3 tracks for Shell Rush coming from Super Mario Kart :

- Mario Circuit 2 (MC2)

- Bowser's Castle 2 (BC2)

- Rainbow Road (RR)

You can access theses tracks with the following command : 
/race [MC2/BC2/RR]

Note : If you fall in Rainbow Road, you respawn at the beginning of the track so be careful not to fall off.

Credits:

djoslin0 
- Original Shell Rush Author

Skeltan - SMK Tracks Creator

super-mario-the-power-star-journey.764.title: Super Mario - The Power Star Journey
super-mario-the-power-star-journey.764.author: jonathanoflebones
super-mario-the-power-star-journey.764.description:
The Power Star Journey
​
Released by Fares242 in 2012, this is a 101 star long Major Hack that contains new hub worlds. Lots of custom areas and long, challenging levels. Be wary though, this port is based on version 1.0 of the hack and it really shows it's age, you'll always be taken back to the first overworld after getting a star or dying. Expect a lot of backtracking.

This port also comes with OMM Support, courtesy of 
Jairo The Plumber

updates.title: Port updated to 1.1
updates.changelog:
Port has been updated to the unofficial 1.1 Update by LinCrash. Changes Include:

-Fixed warps for all courses

-No level intro textboxes

-Buffed swimming (Just use the faster swimming mod) + Hangable ceiling speed

-*Somewhat* improved music (you can still choose to listen to the original awful ost by checking the 'altsound' folder within the mod's files!)

-Renamed a few stars to have a clear hint

-Added a return warp to Toad Valley via Lava Valley (OW3)

-Restored Course 15's Rainbow Textures

Course Changes:

C1 - Moved one secret in a better spot, added a coin indicator for one stupidly hidden red coin

C3 - Moved the spawn down to make the fall quick

C5 - Improved the secrets star + added an arrowed coin indicator for the WC entrance (star 1 only)

C6 - Moved the secret Chain Chomp warp in a better spot ;)

C7 - Made a total new star 6 (read corner sign for hint) + fixed a strange crash during star 6

C8 - Added metal boxes and moved the shell along with for star 3

C10 - Added warp pipes leading to the top floor (stars 4-6 only), added metal boxes as a platform for the Mr I star (star 6 only)

C12 - Moved a red coin in a better spot

B3 part 1 - collecting the star won't kick you out of the level

If you find any bugs/issues let me know!

super-mario-the-galactic-journey.215.title: Super Mario The Galactic Journey
super-mario-the-galactic-journey.215.author: Dragonary
super-mario-the-galactic-journey.215.description:
Super Mario The Galactic Journey

Romhack created by Fares242

Ported to co-op by Dragonary

Story​
There exists a Star of great power placed in its altar in the center of the universe. It is called the "Galactic Star". It balances the spatial activity especially for planets with life on them. Bowser steals the Galactic Star for his desire for an intergalactic empire. A Luma comes and request Mario's help from the Toads and builds a Starship for them that is powered on Silver Stars. Unfortunately, Silver Stars zoom out as a result of the Galactic Star's absence. One of the Toads manages to catch one Silver Star before it zoomed away which was enough to start the journey with the Starship. Silver Stars have spread around from all around space, and Mario's quest is to collect them, power up the engine of the Starship to go as far as it can before Mario would resume his galactic adventure on foot.

Features​

			102 Stars across 23 worlds (side levels and hub worlds included)
		

Click to expand...

			Custom music from various games
		

Click to expand...

			Fall damage DISABLED
		

Click to expand...

			No 100 coin stars
		

Click to expand...

super-smash-bros-co-op.253.title: Super Smash Bros. Co-op
super-smash-bros-co-op.253.author: Keeberghrh
super-smash-bros-co-op.253.description:
Super Smash Bros. Co-op v0.1​
After two months, this mod is being released! 

As a quick warning: Larger player counts may break the game.

It is recommended you stick to smaller groups, between 2 and 5 players.

The mod works with more players, but game breaking bugs seem more common with higher player counts.

Features​
10 fighters!
 5 Additional Characters

Mario - Basic fighter, closest to vanilla movement.

Luigi - Similar to Mario, but with different aerials.

Toad - Fast and powerful attacks.

Waluigi - Has attacks that can combo fairly well.

Wario - Heavy hitter, but slow on the ground.

New Characters

Bowser - Powerful attacks, fire breath and heavier than most fighters. (Model by 
@wibblus
, thank you 
)Kirby - Has Inhale as a Special to copy your opponent's Special.

King Bob-omb - Can throw Bob-ombs which deal a lot of damage. Very heavy and large hurtbox.

Sonic - Fastest fighter, but slightly weaker.

Emerl - Can copy all characters! By pressing DPAD UP, Emerl enters a menu where any individual attack can be chosen and swapped out. Saves to mod storage.

Three Gamemodes!

Smash Mode - Regular Smash, dealing damage increases your opponent's %!

Stamina Mode - Instead of %, damage simply lowers your opponent's HP.

Boss Mode - The Host selects one player to be the Boss. The Boss has heavy armour, takes reduced knockback, a health bar, and can be resized to be larger or smaller. Non-Boss Players have to work to defeat the boss!

		Code:
	

Grounded + B + Idle    = Jab
Grounded + B + Running = Dash Attack
Grounded + B + Crouch  = Special
Aerial + B             = Aerial
Ground Pound + A       = Recovery
Ground Pound + B       = Ground Pound Dive

Enjoy!

updates.title: Super Smash Bros. Co-op API Update
updates.changelog:
Hey all! First update, hopefully fully implementing the API alongside a few other changes!

Smaller changes, Bowser and Emerl have two new palettes, and I've rewritten the Stock Render functions to be more streamlined, also using the new functions so there shouldn't be any warning spam in console anymore.

There is a new built-in stage, Sunshine Isle! It takes place on an island in the middle of the ocean with an elevated area for fighting. You can stay in the water for 3 seconds before you drown.

It should now be possible to add custom fighters and stages, using the templates attached! However they only work with v0.2 onwards due to a mistake on my end. Each template has a version number that will prevent them from being loaded on incompatible version in the future.

super-mazio-64.902.title: Super Mazio 64
super-mazio-64.902.author: jonathanoflebones
super-mazio-64.902.description:
Note:
 
Course 10's 6th Star and the Rainbow Clouds star are unobtainable.

Super Mazio 64 is a romhack created by IngoH and released in 2021 that converts every level of the game into a giant maze, all main courses have 6 stars to find, with secret courses varying between 1 or 2 secret stars. 

With a grand total of 106 stars, this hack is just what your next MarioHunt session needs!
