superstar-saga-moveset.336.title: Superstar Saga Moveset
superstar-saga-moveset.336.author: Nefty
superstar-saga-moveset.336.description:
# 
Superstar Saga Moveset!

Category: Moveset

Lets go! Okie Dokie!

Credits

Made by: Nefty

With the Help of Jabelrpo

Fire and Thunder code by: Wibblus

Bugs fixs by: Atrael2

Beta Testers: Foster The Arsonist, Jekino & JMC | Corlg

Controls

Mario

Y after triple jump: Spin

X after Jump: Ball

Z+B (Breakdance): Fire

D_JPAD: Mini Mario (On)

U_JPAD: Mini Mario (Off)

U_JPAD + Spin: Mid Spin

B + Spin: Spin Cancel

Luigi

 - Z + L_JPAD: Hight

Hight + Y: Thunder Attack

Z+ B (Breakdance): Thunder

D_JPAD:Mole Luigi (On)

U_JPAD: Mole Luigi (Off)

Features

Fourth Jump

Superstar Saga Water (Press B to Swim)

A Move of 2 Players

Image Render by: CL

updates.title: Quality Life Update
updates.changelog:
Superstar Saga Moveset v3.0 - Quality Life Update

Category: Moveset

Hey!, it's been 4 months since 2.1! and I think it's time to update this mod, here are the additions and changes of v3.0:

- Mario -

Reworked Ball

The height of the mini boost that gives you the spin has been changed

[New] Mini Mario: Press D_JPAD to become smaller and faster, losing several of the actions (to return to normal press U_JPAD)

[New] Mid Spin: Hold U_JPAD to stay in the air while doing the spin

[New] Spin Cancel: Press B during the spin to go straight down (Made by Jabelrpo )

- Luigi -

Reworked Hight

[New] Mole Luigi: Press D_JPAD to become invisible and little more faster, losing several of the actions (to return to normal press U_JPAD)

Luigi's Cyclone has been removed (it will be added in the future or replaced with some other move)

- Brothers -

- [New] Two Player Movement: Swing Bros!

Player 1 must hit player 2 and player 2 will be launched forward at high speed.

- [New] Superstar Saga Water:

Now water works like in Superstar Saga (Press B to swim)

- [New] Fourth Jump:

(Referring to the fact that when you press at the exact moment you make a more powerful jump, and to the second jump that you can do in the same way as the above) After doing a triple jump, press a and you will do a fourth jump!

- Other Things -

The command to activate or deactivate the moveset has been renamed to 
Ssm

Added a command to view the respective controls of the mod's actions

(Hammers for the next Update)

Attention: Mini Mario and Mole Luigi have a synchronization error in which the other player cannot see you in the state of the aforementioned actions.

Renders made by: CL

updates.title: Luigi Update
updates.changelog:
Superstar Saga Moveset v2.0! - The Luigi Update

Category: Moveset

Features

- Luigi now have his moves!:

A + A in the air: Hight

X: Cyclone (Wil be improved in v3)

Z+B (Breakdance): Thunder

Mario spin now is more faster and have sparkles particles

Mario fire Animation changed

Fixed Bugs

Credits

Thunder code fixes and help in fixing bugs: Jabelrpo

Hight code by: Dremy_Bowser

Thunder code by: Wibblus

Originally I was going to make Mario only able to spin after a triple jump, but I left it so that it wouldn't be like that!

tag-dlc-pack.40.author: Charaster
tag-dlc-pack.40.description:
An update to the tag gamemode made by emerald lockdown that adds some of the missing stages, some stages are still not in here because they just dont work that well with this(like wing mario over the rainbow). any bugs can be reported to me on here or on discord("charaster")

In addition to the stages, gamemodes and modifiers are disabled by default

list of stages, characters between the "()" is the name for the /start command

castle grounds(cg)

bomb-omb battlefield(bob)

whomps fortress(wf)

cool cool mountain(ccm)

lethal lava land(lll)

shifting sand land(ssl)

pyramide inside(issl)

bowser in the fire sea(bitfs)

tall tall mountain(ttm)

tiny huge island(thi)

snowmans land(sl)

tick tock clock(ttc)

jolly rogger bay(jrb)

rainbow ride(rr)

big boo's haunt(bbh)

hazy maze cave(hmc)

wet dry world(wdw)

secret aquarium(sa)

arena(arena)

cavern of the metal cap(cotmc)

taunts.97.description:
Original Post: February 6, 2022

Author: SonicDark

So uh… Taunts!

D-Down = Shivering

D-Up = Cough

D-Left = Backflip land

D-Right = Sleep

L + D-Down = Hard KB

L + D-Up = Unlocking Star Door

L + D-Left = Shocked

And L + D-Right = Fade In

team-hud.365.title: Team Hud
team-hud.365.author: ProfeJavix
team-hud.365.description:
This simple mod lets you create groups to see the icon, name, health and location of the other group members in your own HUD.​
Commands:
​

join-group [number] - Join to a group in the specified range.

leave-group - Leave the current group.

Mod Menu Options:
​

HUD Alpha - The transparency of the Team HUD.

Players per page - The amount of players displaying at the same time in the HUD (change the page with D-PAD UP and DOWN)

If you are using my other mod Super Chained Bros. the commands won't be enabled, as this mod works automatically with the group system of SCB (a crown will be displayed in the group leader). Also compatible with CS icons.
​

teleportation.786.title: Teleportation
teleportation.786.author: kikwee
teleportation.786.description: Use d-pad down to enter teleportation mode, use the power of freecam to move around and press it again to teleport to that location. Don't be a cheater though you can only be in teleportation mode for 10 seconds and you can only teleport every 20 seconds.

tag.29.title: Tag
tag.29.author: EmeraldLockdown
tag.29.description:
Tag

This mod is a collection of multiple gamemodes all in one mod! The mod contains 9 gamemodes, modifiers that effect the gameplay of the gamemode, in-depth, easy to understand settings, and statistics!

Gamemodes

Tag contains multiple tag-related gamemodes! All gamemodes involve "tagging" another player. There are as of right now 9 different gamemodes. These gamemodes are Tag, Freeze Tag, Infection, Hot Potato, Juggernaut (meh), Assassins, Sardines, Hunt, and Deathmatch! Each gamemode gives it's own fun to the mod!

Modifiers

There are plenty of modifiers to add variety your game! From simple gravity changes to blasters and fog, modifiers add plenty of enjoyable (or annoying) changes to the base gamemodes!

Romhacks

Romhack support depends on the romhack. Offical romhacks have paintings, and pipes like vanilla levels! Non-official romhacks don't have these benefits, however, the romhack should still work perfectly fine!

Arena Stage

Arena Stages are fully supported, with pipes and all! It is highly recommended to play with arena stages. Downside is you don't get paintings.

Official Tag Stages

Tag Stages include paintings and custom-placed pipes, these are perfect mods to add to your tag experience!

Blacklists

Don't like a gamemode, modifier, or level? Blacklist it! Blacklisting allows you to turn off certain gamemods, modifiers, or levels that you don't like in your game.

Stats

Each player has stats! These stats go from playtime, total tags, and total time as runner, to total runner victories and tagger victories. The best part is each gamemode gets it's own statistics for each of these metrics!

Frequently Asked Questions

sm64ex-coop/sm64coopdx Support:

This mod supports both repos. If you encounter a bug with a specific one, make an issue 
here
 so it can be addressed.

Romhack Compatibility:

Yes, Tag supports romhacks. You can add paintings and more to romhacks by creating what's called an official hack (wow great name!). You can learn how to do that 
here
. The mod also includes a blacklist to remove incompatible levels.

Code Usage:

Generally, you can use code from this mod for your own projects. Credit is not required, but ensure you understand the code and avoid copying large portions without modification.

Custom Versions:

You're welcome to publish custom versions of this mod. However, consider contributing to the main repo first. Ensure your custom version doesn't include code from unreleased versions or other mods without proper credit. Include me in the credits, and I reserve the right to incorporate your code into the base Tag with appropriate credit.

Contributing to the Repo:

Fork the repo 
here
 and contribute by creating pull requests.

Bug Reports and Suggestions:

Report bugs or suggestions 
here
.

Update Notifications:

You can make an account on this site here, and you'll be emailed for when this mod is updated!

Contact Information:

If you need to contact me, visit my profile 
here
.

Arena Map Support:

Yes, Tag supports arena maps and automatically adds pipes based on the CTF flags, and set your spawn to the Flag Tag flag spawn. For additional features like paintings, check out 
this repo
, where well-known arena maps are ported.

updates.title: Tag v2.3
updates.changelog:
Tag v2.3 is here!

Gamemodes

Added Sardines (Me (EmeraldLockdown))

Added Hunt (Me)

Added Deathmatch (Me)

Modifiers

Readded Fly (Me)

Added Blaster (Me)

Added Double Jump (Me) (Inspired by EmilyEmmi)

Added Shells (Me) (Inspired by EmilyEmmi)

Added Bljs (If bljs are on, this is a no blj modifier) (Me)

Added One Runner (Me)

Heavily improved Fog (Blocky)

Levels

Added Wet-dry Town (Me)

Added Red’s In HMC (Me)

Added Toxic Maze (Me)

Romhacks

Added Star Road (Murioz)

Added Super Mario 74 (Murioz)

Added SM64 Sapphire (Me)

Added Royal Legacy (Me)

Added SM64 Trouble Town (Me)

New Features

Added auto hide hud feature (Me)

Redesigned settings ui (it’s centered now!) (Me)

Reorganized settings ui (Me)

Revamp blacklist system (you can now blacklist gamemodes and modifiers!) (Me)

Lots of other hud improvements (Me)

Created a easy way to add romhacks with pipes and spawn points (Me)

Added support for any custom arena stages (Me)

Added a custom api for custom levels that want to add paintings, etc. (Me)

Make hazards toggleable (Me)

Add Statistics (Me)

Heavily improve CoopDX compatibility (Me)

Remove join screen, instead initialize everything the moment you sync

Reduced time in leaderboard and vote screens

Revamp Bomb Physics

Use Saves instead of Time As Runner in Freeze Tag

There's more than this, this is what I remember.

super-retro-land.34.title: Super Retro Land
super-retro-land.34.author: Mr.Needlemouse
super-retro-land.34.description: The Construction Crew of the Mushroom Kingdom is creating a new Mario Party board, and the theme is Retro! Tons of references to SMB1, SMRPG, Yoshi's Island, SMW and more can found here! To make sure its ready, Mario sets out to test the Mario 3 section of the map, which contain purple coin missions for you to tackle on! This game has 4 Stars in total.

tiki-tak-tribe.565.title: Tiki Tak Tribe
tiki-tak-tribe.565.author: Aso-Designer
tiki-tak-tribe.565.description:
Hide your bananas! 

The Tiki Tak Tribe has invaded Super Mario 64... as pets! 

This pack contains the models from Donkey Kong Country Returns (ported by Brewster T Koopa). 

All 7 tikis are included in this file, from Krazy Kalimba to Cordian.

Pet them, hold them, throw them, they follow you, without any troubles hopefully! 

Sound effect are straight from the game (recorded directly from DKCRHD), and textures has been modified to not have any issues with Mario 64.

Enjoy!

Tiki Tak Tribe (c) Nintendo and Retro Studios

tostring-nil.1166.title: tostring(nil)
tostring-nil.1166.author: Wall_E20
tostring-nil.1166.description:
[DESCRIPTION]

[ATTACH width="258px" alt="MAIN_IMAGE.png"]7619[/ATTACH]

CHAR_NAME

"nil - Object reference not set to an instance of an object."

a-movesets.lua:

[ATTACH width="220px" alt="ACT_FLY.png"]7614[/ATTACH]

[B]

--press Y to fly!

[/B]

if (m.controller.buttonPressed & Y_BUTTON) ~= 0 then

set_mario_action(m, ACT_FLY, 0)

end

[ATTACH width="176px"  
alt="BOBOMB_BIN.png"]7615[/ATTACH]

[B]

--grab grabbable objects with B

[/B]

if (m.controller.buttonPressed & B_BUTTON) ~= 0 then

 mario_check_object_grab(m)

end

[B]

--the landing action can be used as ground pound!

[/B]

hook_mario_action(_G.ACT_LAND_NIL, act_land_NIL, INT_GROUND_POUND)

--add the rest of description here

[/DESCRIPTION]

{"Ok here is an actual description:

as you may have understood nil is a character fully based on flying!

in case you did not, here is a little recap:

Y button to fly

B to grab grabbable objects

and the landing from jump can be used as groundpound

--totally not op character?

dont worry, feel free to disable character movesets if you want, nil will maybe not complain.

they may fly but their ground moves are very limited.

they have many ingame quirks like random name and description and icon!

and maybe, they will even be abile to talk with you."}

--ps, they enjoy bhv_goomba for some reason

be sure to use latest CS when using this character

trick-boosts.1030.title: Trick Boosts
trick-boosts.1030.author: ⭐️SxbZer0⭐️
trick-boosts.1030.description:
HIT X OR Y TO DO A TRICK

When you hit X You Backflip which gives you speed when you land

When you hit Y You Frontflip which gives 3 times the speed when you land

v1-3-null-object-check-fix.687.title: v1.3 Null Object Check Fix
v1-3-null-object-check-fix.687.author: EmilyEmmi
v1-3-null-object-check-fix.687.description:
Fixes script errors related to object functions introduced in coopDX v1.3. This allows mods such as Tag and SM64 Remix v4 to be played without immense lag. The original version was not uploaded here because I thought it would be irrelevant by now, but um... guess not. This new version fixes a crash when shooting an egg as Birdo in Extra Characters.

Let's see how long this mod is actually relevant!

EDIT: Okay, if you use this with Tag, pipes will not work properly. This is, as far as I am aware, completely unfixable. Sorry.

titeuf.580.title: Titeuf
titeuf.580.author: Aso-Designer
titeuf.580.description:
Titeuf, (also known as Tootuff in certain countries)  the disruptive school boy created by Swiss comic artist Zep, made his way in Mario 64! 

Ready to imagine beating Bowser with a laser! 

Or just making sure to defeat him? Maybe? At least he won't get bad grades by saving a princess! 

Assets are from Titeuf Mega Party and Mario 64. Voice clips are from the many medias done for the character, including streaming, motion comics, tv show etc, performed by voice actor Donald Reignoux. 

Note: The Character doesn't blink, but does have a "death head"  

Minor issue: Script error for some reason, but it doesn't affect the game at all.

wanted.127.title: Wanted!
wanted.127.author: PeachyPeach
wanted.127.description:
Remember that 
New Super Mario Bros.
/
Super Mario 64 DS
 minigame?

This mod includes both a single player and a multiplayer version.

The goal is simple: the player has to find one of the four characters (Mario, Luigi, Wario or Toad) amongst a large crowd of the others.

You can play with a controller, but also with a mouse: bind your A button to the 
right
 click (not left), and you're ready to play!

Single player​
The default version. The player starts with 10 seconds and gain 5 seconds and 1 point each time they select the wanted character, but lose 10 seconds if they select any other one. The game ends when the player runs out of time.

Multiplayer​
This version is auto-enabled as soon as another player joins the game. Players have 30 seconds to find as many wanted characters as possible. Selecting the wanted character gives 1 point, but selecting any other one removes 1 point. The game ends when the timer reaches 0, and the player who has the most points win.

Settings​
Some commands to customize your game:

/wanted scores: View your single player high scores. Only the top 5 ones are saved.

/wanted settings: View the game settings.

Host only:

/wanted reset: Reset the game settings to their default value.

/wanted <setting> <value>: Change a setting before the game starts.

Settings are:

level_start: Starting level.

time_start: Starting time in seconds (single player).

time_max: Max time in seconds (single player).

time_bonus: Time gained in seconds (single player).

time_penalty: Time lost in seconds (single player).

time_multi: Duration in seconds of a multiplayer session.

Credits:

Authors
: PeachyPeach

waluigis-taco-stand.791.title: Waluigi's Taco Stand
waluigis-taco-stand.791.author: jonathanoflebones
waluigis-taco-stand.791.description:
Waluigi's Taco Stand
​

DISCLAIMER: 
Make sure to clean your save file before starting the hack!
​

​

"Uh Oh, Waluigi's has blown all his money away at the casino! However, his landlord Mr. Rent has offered him a job at a Taco Stand. Make Tacos with the ingredients your customers request to make end's meet!"

Waluigi's Taco Stand is a hack Created by Kaze Emanuar in 2018, which has now been ported to SM64 Coop Deluxe and is fully playable in multiplayer! This port also comes with the option to replay the story and an unlockable 
Endless Mode
 after completing the base game! Serve endless rows of customers as you aim for the highest score. 

Credits:

B. Bones Johnson
 - Porting, General Assistance

ManIsCat2
 - Main Programmer, Taco Master 
(carried the port lmfao)

WBmarioo
 - Ingredient Models, 
Taco Waluigi [CS]

Saul
 - Endless Mode Timer Model, Moral Support

Special Thanks to:

Blocky
 - Made Menu Template

Kaze Emanuar
 - Made the Original Hack

warp-node-randomizer.767.title: Warp Node Randomizer
warp-node-randomizer.767.author: EmilyEmmi
warp-node-randomizer.767.description:
Are you tired of Super Mario 64 being sensible to navigate? This mod offers a new experience every time you play (sort of)! Now paintings could go anywhere, and warps can send you to other levels completely! But don't worry, use /warps to see a record of where everything leads. Also check the mod menu (Pause, and then press R, and you should see it) for options on which warps get randomized. Some ways to play this:

Get all 120 stars (It should be possible with coop, but let me know if you find an impossible seed),

Race with your friends to see who can find a given level first,

Do random seed speedruns (Now it's like Minecraft speedrunning! Better increase those Piglin Trade odds...),

See who can make the most warp discoveries,

Romhack support is available, but it's a bit buggy. Also credit to Blocky for some of the RNG-related code.

The soundtrack for the Nintendo DS & Gameboy Advance versions of "The Sims 2", originally composed by Ian Stocker.

Some problems with the music mods have been fixed, including the bug that causes boss music and other music to play at the same time as the samples.

weather-cycle-dx.272.title: Weather Cycle DX
weather-cycle-dx.272.author: AgentX
weather-cycle-dx.272.description:
This mod adds a weather cycle system with cloudy skies, rain, and storms to sm64coopdx. It uses Day Night Cycle DX as a base library, meaning you need to have it enabled in order to use this mod. There is also a toggleable Aurora Borealis that starts after midnight. I've worked on this mod for months now and managed to optimize the storm to run at 200-300 microseconds, which is an impressive number especially compared to the earlier 6000 microseconds.

Special thanks to Floralys for the original concept.

Special thanks to eros71 for saving the mod!

Added lightning damage toggle

Added mod menu buttons for setting weather types

updates.title: Weather Cycle DX v1.1.4
updates.changelog:
Optimized code in accordance to new v1.3.2 functionality

Made rain particles slightly more performant

Improved rainy footstep code

updates.title: Weather Cycle DX v1.1.3
updates.changelog:
Added rain footstep sounds

Made cleanups and optimizations to code all around

updates.title: Weather Cycle DX v1.1.2
updates.changelog:
Fixed weather skybox model bug in v1.3

Added more constants to the API

Improved code quality

updates.title: Weather Cycle DX v1.1.1
updates.changelog: * Fixed bug with mod not properly disabling

updates.title: Weather Cycle DX v1.1
updates.changelog:
Once again optimized file size to make the mod even smaller and more compact

Made the aurora slightly darker

Opened up Dire, Dire Docks area 2 to not have a fade to dark roof

Fixed some API functions

Added weather tinting to Wet Dry World, Big Boo's Haunt, and Bowser in the Sky. They all look amazing.

Made Bowser in the Sky's weather skybox less opaque to blend with the original skybox in a very mesmerizing way

Untied lightning interval from time scale

Scripted it to always rain/storm in Bowser in the Sky to make the level look very cool

Added cool scripted lightning bolt when Bowser 3's dialog box shows up

Fixed snow particles showing up in non snow levels

Fixed bugs with aurora not disabling properly

updates.title: Weather Cycle DX v1.0.1
updates.changelog:
Significantly optimized file size

Added more fields to the API

Adjusted rain parameters slightly

Fixed some jank with transitioning between weather types

Made weather immediately transition if the time scale is 0

Made rain look more blue and transparent

Added Query Weather button to mod menu

widdlepets.209.title: WiddlePets
widdlepets.209.author: wibblus
widdlepets.209.description:
WiddlePets​
A buddy/pet mod for sm64coopdx, with API for other mods to add their own pets ! Have these lil guys follow you around on your adventure, and give em lil headpats :3

Use DPAD-RIGHT (can be disabled) or the '/wpets' command to open the menu.

This version comes with 
four
 default pets: Headphone Goomba, Mechakoopa, Fly Guy, and Bob-Omb Buddy !

This mod is made exclusively for coopdx. Ensure that you are using sm64coopdx and do not have ex-coop compatibility turned on.​
​
If you are interested in mods using the WiddlePets API, check out the 
GitHub page
!
​

updates.title: v1.2: coopdx 1.0 update
updates.changelog:
update for 
sm64coopdx 1.0
 ! fixes everything for the new update, and updates to make the API more elegant.

the full changelog available on the 
github release page
 as usual.

however, there is a very important change for API users: audio samples are preloaded, meaning that the update hook where 
wpets.process_pet_samples()
 was called is no longer needed for custom pets! the function has been deprecated and will simply do nothing now; so previous custom pet mods are still fully functional.

for future reference, the [PET] Template mod has been updated, along with the guide and API docs on the 
wiki
.

updates.title: v1.1.1: warp fix
updates.changelog:
found a bug that could occur in various romhacks where pets would get stuck in their 'warping' state and unable to respawn. all instances of this should be fixed now!

full changelog on Github as always!

(i'm done now i swear x2)

updates.title: v1.1 hotfix
updates.changelog:
Updated the release download for version 1.1 to fix a bug with pets despawning when any player disconnects, and the mod command being named incorrectly.

last update for a while, i prommy :3

updates.title: v1.1
updates.changelog:
v1.1 so soon ! there were a few bugs that really needed fixing, so i took the chance to also improve on some mechanics and implement some suggested features/changes. Reworked some settings, added to the API, improved pet jumping and physics, among other fixes and improvements.

The full changelog is available on the 
release page on Github
.

( your WiddlePets settings will be reset after switching to this update! )

you-got-a-star-text.1136.title: You Got A Star! Text
you-got-a-star-text.1136.author: MegAmi24
you-got-a-star-text.1136.description: This mods shows the text "YOU GOT A STAR!" as well as the name and number (if applicable) of the star, similar to Mario Odyssey and Bowser's Fury. The same applies to keys as well. This makes it easier to tell which star you grabbed while using the Stay in Level or Non-Stop star collection settings without having to exit the course and check the pause screen or star selection screen.

wegas-wansion.670.title: Wega's Wansion
wegas-wansion.670.author: birdekek
wegas-wansion.670.description:
The man, the myth, the legend, Wega himself!

This is a short romhack featuring 1 stage, and 2 bosses

Due to time restrictions, this must be played in singleplayer [setting max players to 1] and since it is in first-person, i recommend binding your A button to LMB, and your stick controls to WASD

Credits to 
@TheIncredibleHolc
  for his gibs made for Gore/Hardmode which [with permission] i re-used here as machine gibs.

Everything else here from what i can recall is made by me [excluding the main menu music]

If you can, check out the extras menu you unlock at the end of the game!

Trailer

yume-nikki-64.468.description:
Yume Nikki 64 - Character Select​
A model pack for 
SM64CoopDX
 and the

 which adds Yume Nikki characters.

Character list​

wario-land-4x64-pack.632.title: Wario Land 4x64 Pack
wario-land-4x64-pack.632.author: Garrulous64
wario-land-4x64-pack.632.description:
This is a small collection of Wario Land 4 mods for Super Mario 64 Coop DX! If you don't want to use a part of the modpack, just delete the other folders (or don't enable them).

Pack Includes:

Wario Land 4 Skin
 (Custom Model by 
Mariofan2468
)

(Custom Expressions, Voice Pack, Custom Caps)

Keyzer WiddlePet 
(Custom Model by 
Peardian
)

Wario Land 4 OST Replacement - 
Exactly what it sounds like ("HQ OST by 
Weario
 & 
Merios
)

Known Issues:

OST Replacement causes the Star Music to loop if you're playing in "Don't Leave Level" Mode.

OST Replacement mutes the Koopa the Quick Race theme (main level theme continues to play)

yoshis-adventure-64.16.title: Yoshi's Adventure 64
yoshis-adventure-64.16.author: Fearl
yoshis-adventure-64.16.description:
Yoshi's Adventure 64
​

● 56 Stars to collect

● Difficulty: 4/10 

● Yoshi Skin

● Cool Hack

Yoshi has entered the Luna Valley of the island, looking to find the power stars and find Bowser to see why he's dispersed them. 

On the way, he goes to the moon, finds other sunglass wearing Yoshis,

a land of Candy, a strange mine of diamonds, and more!

This hack uses Yoshi's mod by Lucho_Gamer  which makes it more fun.

xmario.399.title: XMario
xmario.399.author: fastestthingalive
xmario.399.description:
Remember that one Speedruner mario mod that Sonic1Sonic hosts? Yeah, that's this mod.

if u see someone named xmario thats me on coop dx

CONTEROLLER RECOMMENDED

 
The moves: 

Twirl: Press x to twirl! depends on your speed level for height, and you only can't do it when in the water. Press z to cancel it, (can we used to chain wall jumps) and hold a to float(can go to EXTREME speeds if no joystick button is pressed).

Sunshine Dive: Spam b on the ground when diving to dive again with no interruption!

Ground Pound Dive: Press b when ground pounding to dive.

Long Pound: Hold z when landing a ground pound to long jump.

Extras:
 new sega genesis music for some levels 

That's about it.

Full Potential
